AI.motivation: 现有高维在线学习方法面临误差界或每批样本量随数据批次增加而发散的挑战，需要一种能保持稳定误差界的方法。
AI.method: 提出异步分解框架，利用摘要统计量构建当前批次学习的代理评分函数，通过动态正则化迭代硬阈值算法实现稀疏在线优化。
AI.result: 估计器在所有批次中保持非发散误差界和ℓ0稀疏性，随着批次积累自适应获得额外增益，达到如同访问整个历史数据集且已知真实支持集的oracle精度。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为高维在线学习提供了计算和内存高效的解决方案，理论性质在广义线性模型示例中得到进一步验证。

title: A Control Architecture for Fast Frequency Regulation with Increasing Penetration of Inverter Based Resources
comment: Under Review in IEEE Transactions on Sustainable Energy
summary: This paper addresses frequency regulation under operational constraints in interconnected power systems with high penetration of inverter-based renewable generation. A two-layer control architecture is proposed that combines optimized droop and Virtual Synchronous Machine (VSM) primary control with a Model Predictive Control (MPC) secondary layer operating at realistic control-room update rates. Unlike recent proposed approaches, the proposed framework integrates MPC within existing grid control structures, enabling constraint-aware coordination. A reduced-order frequency response model is systematically derived from a high-fidelity grid model using Hankel singular values, and a reduced-order Kalman-Bucy observer enables state and disturbance estimation using only measurable outputs. Validation using representative data from the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia demonstrates effective frequency regulation under realistic operating conditions.

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合优化下垂控制/VSM一次控制和MPC二次控制的两层架构，用于高可再生能源渗透率电网的频率调节，通过降阶模型和状态估计实现约束感知协调。
AI.motivation: 解决高比例逆变器型可再生能源并网下，电网频率调节面临的运行约束问题，需要在现有电网控制结构中集成约束感知的协调控制。
AI.method: 提出两层控制架构：一次层采用优化下垂控制和虚拟同步机技术；二次层采用模型预测控制，以实际控制室更新速率运行。通过Hankel奇异值从高保真电网模型推导降阶频率响应模型，并使用降阶卡尔曼-布西观测器进行状态和扰动估计。
AI.result: 使用沙特阿拉伯代表性数据进行验证，表明该框架在现实运行条件下能有效进行频率调节，成功将MPC集成到现有电网控制结构中。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为高可再生能源渗透率电网提供了有效的约束感知频率调节方案，通过降阶模型和状态估计实现了在实际控制室更新速率下的可行控制。

title: An experimental study of KV cache reuse strategies in chunk-level caching systems
summary: Retrieval-augmented generation improves large language models' accuracy by adding relevant retrieved text to the prompt. Chunk level caching (CLC) accelerates inference by precomputing KV caches for these retrieved chunks and reusing them. However, these caches miss cross-attention dependencies between chunks, which can reduce output quality. Several methods try to improve CLC accuracy using different techniques. We make two main contributions. First, we show that existing CLC approaches have fundamental limitations that limit their accuracy or their applicability. We back this conclusion with an extensive CLC system experimental evaluation. Second, we observe that existing CLC techniques are complementary. We leverage this insight to propose a new CLC design that carefully combines them and achieves better accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了检索增强生成中的块级缓存技术，指出现有方法存在跨块注意力依赖缺失问题，并提出了一种结合现有互补技术的新设计来提升准确性。
AI.motivation: 检索增强生成通过添加相关检索文本来提升大语言模型的准确性，块级缓存通过预计算KV缓存来加速推理。然而，现有块级缓存方法忽略了块间的跨注意力依赖关系，这会降低输出质量，需要改进。
AI.method: 首先通过广泛的系统实验评估证明现有块级缓存方法存在根本性限制；其次观察到现有技术具有互补性，基于此提出新的块级缓存设计，精心结合这些技术以获得更好的准确性。
AI.result: 实验评估表明现有块级缓存方法在准确性或适用性上存在根本限制；提出的新设计通过结合互补技术实现了更好的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 现有块级缓存方法存在局限性，但不同技术具有互补性。通过精心组合这些技术的新设计能够克服现有方法的限制，在保持推理加速的同时提升准确性。

title: Leveraging Natural Language Processing and Machine Learning for Evidence-Based Food Security Policy Decision-Making in Data-Scarce Making
comment: 25 pages, 12 figures, 2 tables. Submitted for academic publication
summary: Food security policy formulation in data-scarce regions remains a critical challenge due to limited structured datasets, fragmented textual reports, and demographic bias in decision-making systems. This study proposes ZeroHungerAI, an integrated Natural Language Processing (NLP) and Machine Learning (ML) framework designed for evidence-based food security policy modeling under extreme data scarcity. The system combines structured socio-economic indicators with contextual policy text embeddings using a transfer learning based DistilBERT architecture. Experimental evaluation on a 1200-sample hybrid dataset across 25 districts demonstrates superior predictive performance, achieving 91 percent classification accuracy, 0.89 precision, 0.85 recall, and an F1 score of 0.86 under imbalanced conditions. Comparative analysis shows a 13 percent performance improvement over classical SVM and 17 percent over Logistic Regression models. Precision Recall evaluation confirms robust minority class detection (average precision around 0.88). Fairness aware optimization reduces demographic parity difference to 3 percent, ensuring equitable rural urban policy inference. The results validate that transformer based contextual learning significantly enhances policy intelligence in low resource governance environments, enabling scalable and bias aware hunger prediction systems.

AI.tldr: ZeroHungerAI是一个结合NLP和ML的框架，用于数据稀缺地区的粮食安全政策建模，通过DistilBERT架构整合结构化指标和文本嵌入，在1200个样本上实现91%准确率，比传统方法提升13-17%，并减少人口统计偏差。
AI.motivation: 数据稀缺地区的粮食安全政策制定面临挑战：结构化数据有限、文本报告碎片化、决策系统存在人口统计偏差。需要开发能够在极端数据稀缺条件下进行基于证据的政策建模的系统。
AI.method: 提出ZeroHungerAI框架，结合结构化社会经济指标和上下文政策文本嵌入，使用基于迁移学习的DistilBERT架构。采用公平感知优化减少人口统计偏差。
AI.result: 在25个地区的1200个样本混合数据集上，实现91%分类准确率、0.89精确率、0.85召回率和0.86 F1分数。比传统SVM提升13%，比逻辑回归提升17%。公平优化将人口统计差异减少到3%。
AI.conclusion: 基于Transformer的上下文学习显著增强了低资源治理环境中的政策智能，实现了可扩展且具有偏见识别的饥饿预测系统，为数据稀缺地区的粮食安全政策制定提供了有效解决方案。

title: Graph-Aware Text-Only Backdoor Poisoning for Text-Attributed Graphs
summary: Many learning systems now use graph data in which each node also contains text, such as papers with abstracts or users with posts. Because these texts often come from open platforms, an attacker may be able to quietly poison a small part of the training data and later make the model produce wrong predictions on demand. This paper studies that risk in a realistic setting where the attacker edits only node text and does not change the graph structure. We propose TAGBD, a text-only backdoor attack for text-attributed graphs. TAGBD first finds training nodes that are easier to influence, then generates natural-looking trigger text with the help of a shadow graph model, and finally injects the trigger by either replacing the original text or appending a short phrase. Experiments on three benchmark datasets show that the attack is highly effective, transfers across different graph models, and remains strong under common defenses. These results demonstrate that text alone is a practical attack channel in graph learning systems and suggest that future defenses should inspect both graph links and node content.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TAGBD攻击方法，仅通过修改节点文本（不改变图结构）就能在图学习系统中植入后门，实验证明攻击效果显著且能绕过常见防御。
AI.motivation: 许多学习系统使用包含文本的图数据（如带摘要的论文、带帖子的用户）。由于这些文本来自开放平台，攻击者可能悄悄毒化部分训练数据，使模型在特定条件下产生错误预测。本文研究仅通过编辑节点文本（不改变图结构）的现实攻击场景。
AI.method: 提出TAGBD攻击方法：1) 寻找更容易影响的训练节点；2) 借助影子图模型生成自然外观的触发文本；3) 通过替换原始文本或附加短短语注入触发文本。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上的实验表明，攻击效果显著，能跨不同图模型迁移，且在常见防御下仍保持强大效果。
AI.conclusion: 仅通过文本就是图学习系统中的实用攻击渠道，未来的防御措施应同时检查图链接和节点内容。

title: Optimality in Decentralized Optimization under Bandwidth Constraints
summary: We consider a realistic decentralized setup with bandwidth-constrained communication and derive optimal time complexities for non-convex stochastic parallel and asynchronous optimization (up to logarithmic factors). We develop the corresponding methods, Grace SGD and Leon SGD, for both homogeneous and heterogeneous settings. Unlike previous work, our optimal bounds are characterized in terms of min-cut/max-flow quantities and rely on tools from Gomory-Hu trees and Steiner Tree Packing problems, providing tighter and more practical complexities.

AI.tldr: 提出了Grace SGD和Leon SGD方法，在带宽受限的分布式环境中实现了非凸随机优化的最优时间复杂度
AI.motivation: 解决现实世界中带宽受限的分布式环境下的非凸随机优化问题，现有方法的时间复杂度不够紧致且不够实用
AI.method: 基于图论工具（Gomory-Hu树和Steiner树打包问题），通过最小割/最大流理论推导最优时间复杂性，开发了Grace SGD（同构设置）和Leon SGD（异构设置）两种方法
AI.result: 获得了比现有工作更紧致、更实用的最优时间复杂性界限，这些界限用最小割/最大流量来表征
AI.conclusion: 通过图论工具为带宽受限的分布式非凸随机优化提供了理论最优的时间复杂性分析，并开发了相应的实用算法

title: Email in the Era of LLMs
comment: 47 pages (including appendix), 6 figures, 2 tables main body
summary: Email communication increasingly involves large language models (LLMs), but we lack intuition on how they will read, write, and optimize for nuanced social goals. We introduce HR Simulator, a game where communication is the core mechanic: players play as a Human Resources officer and write emails to solve socially challenging workplace scenarios. An analysis of 600+ human and LLM emails with LLMs-as-judge reveals evidence for larger LLMs becoming more homogenous in their email quality judgments. Under LLM judges, humans underperform LLMs (e.g., 23.5% vs. 48-54% success rate), but a human+LLM approach can outperform LLM-only (e.g., from 40% to nearly 100% in one scenario). In cases where models' email preferences disagree, emergent tact is a plausible explanation: weaker models prefer less tactful strategies while stronger models prefer more tactful ones. Regarding tone, LLM emails are more formal and empathetic while human emails are more varied. LLM rewrites make human emails more formal and empathetic, but models still struggle to imitate human emails in the low empathy, low formality quadrant, which highlights a limitation of current post-training approaches. Our results demonstrate the efficacy of communication games as instruments to measure communication in the era of LLMs, and posit human-LLM co-writing as an effective form of communication in that future.

AI.tldr: HR Simulator游戏研究显示：LLM在邮件沟通中表现出更强的同质化判断倾向，人类+LLM协作优于纯LLM，强模型更偏好策略性沟通，LLM邮件更正式且有同理心，但难以模仿人类低同理心低正式度的风格。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM在邮件沟通中应用增加，缺乏对其如何阅读、写作和优化社交目标的理解，需要研究LLM在复杂社交场景中的沟通表现。
AI.method: 开发HR Simulator游戏，玩家扮演HR官员通过写邮件解决职场社交难题，收集600+人类和LLM邮件，使用LLM作为评判者进行分析。
AI.result: 大模型在邮件质量判断上更同质化；人类表现低于LLM（23.5% vs. 48-54%成功率）；人类+LLM协作优于纯LLM（某些场景从40%提升至近100%）；强模型偏好更有策略性的沟通方式；LLM邮件更正式且有同理心；LLM改写使人类邮件更正式有同理心，但难以模仿人类低同理心低正式度的风格。
AI.conclusion: 沟通游戏是衡量LLM时代沟通的有效工具，人类-LLM协同写作是未来有效的沟通形式，当前后训练方法在模仿人类低同理心低正式度风格方面存在局限。

title: Auto-differentiable data assimilation: Co-learning of states, dynamics, and filtering algorithms
summary: Data assimilation algorithms estimate the state of a dynamical system from partial observations, where the successful performance of these algorithms hinges on costly parameter tuning and on employing an accurate model for the dynamics. This paper introduces a framework for jointly learning the state, dynamics, and parameters of filtering algorithms in data assimilation through a process we refer to as auto-differentiable filtering. The framework leverages a theoretically motivated loss function that enables learning from partial, noisy observations via gradient-based optimization using auto-differentiation. We further demonstrate how several well-known data assimilation methods can be learned or tuned within this framework. To underscore the versatility of auto-differentiable filtering, we perform experiments on dynamical systems spanning multiple scientific domains, such as the Clohessy-Wiltshire equations from aerospace engineering, the Lorenz-96 system from atmospheric science, and the generalized Lotka-Volterra equations from systems biology. Finally, we provide guidelines for practitioners to customize our framework according to their observation model, accuracy requirements, and computational budget.

AI.tldr: 提出可自动微分的滤波框架，联合学习状态、动力学和滤波算法参数，通过梯度优化实现数据同化
AI.motivation: 传统数据同化算法需要昂贵的参数调优和精确的动力学模型，限制了实际应用
AI.method: 提出可自动微分滤波框架，使用理论驱动的损失函数，通过自动微分实现梯度优化，支持多种数据同化方法的学习和调优
AI.result: 在多个科学领域的动力系统上验证了框架的有效性，包括航空航天工程的Clohessy-Wiltshire方程、大气科学的Lorenz-96系统和系统生物学的广义Lotka-Volterra方程
AI.conclusion: 该框架为从业者提供了根据观测模型、精度要求和计算预算进行定制的指南，展示了可自动微分滤波在数据同化中的广泛应用潜力

title: Performance Guarantees for Data-Driven Sequential Decision-Making
summary: The solutions to many sequential decision-making problems are characterized by dynamic programming and Bellman's principle of optimality. However, due to the inherent complexity of solving Bellman's equation exactly, there has been significant interest in developing various approximate dynamic programming (ADP) schemes to obtain near-optimal solutions. A fundamental question that arises is: how close are the objective values produced by ADP schemes relative to the true optimal objective values? In this paper, we develop a general framework that provides performance guarantees for ADP schemes in the form of ratio bounds. Specifically, we show that the objective value under an ADP scheme is at least a computable fraction of the optimal value. We further demonstrate the applicability of our theoretical framework through two applications: data-driven robot path planning and multi-agent sensor coverage.

AI.tldr: 提出一个通用框架，为近似动态规划方案提供性能保证，证明ADP方案的目标值至少是最优值的可计算分数
AI.motivation: 由于贝尔曼方程求解的固有复杂性，近似动态规划方案被广泛使用，但缺乏对其性能的理论保证。需要回答一个基本问题：ADP方案产生的目标值与真实最优目标值有多接近？
AI.method: 开发一个通用框架，以比率界的形式为ADP方案提供性能保证。该框架证明ADP方案的目标值至少是最优值的可计算分数。
AI.result: 建立了ADP方案的性能保证理论框架，并通过两个应用验证了其适用性：数据驱动的机器人路径规划和多智能体传感器覆盖。
AI.conclusion: 提出的通用框架能够为近似动态规划方案提供理论性能保证，解决了ADP方案与最优解之间差距的量化问题，并在实际应用中展示了有效性。

title: Thinking into the Future: Latent Lookahead Training for Transformers
summary: Autoregressive language models trained with next-token prediction generate text by sampling one discrete token at a time. Although very scalable, this objective forces the model to commit at every step, preventing it from exploring or reflecting upon multiple plausible continuations. Furthermore, the compute allocation across tokens is uniform; every token is formed based on a single forward-pass, potentially limiting the model's expressiveness in cases where difficult tokens require inherently more compute. Towards addressing these limitations, we introduce latent lookahead, a training strategy that enables models to "think" before generating: at selected positions in the sequence, before committing to the next token, the model performs a multi-step lookahead in latent space. More precisely, instead of sampling future tokens, we leverage the network's latent space by recursively feeding its hidden states back into the context for $τ$ steps, investing more compute on predicting that token. This produces $τ$ latent predictions that are supervised against the next $τ$ ground-truth tokens, encouraging the model to "lookahead" and refine its prediction. We show that latent lookahead substantially outperforms both autoregressive and non-autoregressive baselines on planning tasks such as maze solving, Sudoku, and ProsQA, where foresight is essential.

AI.tldr: 提出latent lookahead训练策略，让语言模型在生成前进行潜在空间多步前瞻，提高规划任务性能
AI.motivation: 传统自回归语言模型每次只预测一个token，无法探索多个可能的延续，且计算分配均匀，难以处理需要更多计算的困难token
AI.method: 在序列特定位置，模型在提交下一个token前，在潜在空间进行多步前瞻：将隐藏状态递归反馈到上下文中τ步，产生τ个潜在预测，监督学习后续τ个真实token
AI.result: 在迷宫求解、数独和ProsQA等需要前瞻的规划任务上，latent lookahead显著优于自回归和非自回归基线
AI.conclusion: latent lookahead通过让模型在潜在空间"思考"再生成，解决了传统自回归模型的局限性，在需要前瞻的规划任务中表现优异

title: Deep reflective reasoning in interdependence constrained structured data extraction from clinical notes for digital health
summary: Extracting structured information from clinical notes requires navigating a dense web of interdependent variables where the value of one attribute logically constrains others. Existing Large Language Model (LLM)-based extraction pipelines often struggle to capture these dependencies, leading to clinically inconsistent outputs. We propose deep reflective reasoning, a large language model agent framework that iteratively self-critiques and revises structured outputs by checking consistency among variables, the input text, and retrieved domain knowledge, stopping when outputs converge. We extensively evaluate the proposed method in three diverse oncology applications: (1) On colorectal cancer synoptic reporting from gross descriptions (n=217), reflective reasoning improved average F1 across eight categorical synoptic variables from 0.828 to 0.911 and increased mean correct rate across four numeric variables from 0.806 to 0.895; (2) On Ewing sarcoma CD99 immunostaining pattern identification (n=200), the accuracy improved from 0.870 to 0.927; (3) On lung cancer tumor staging (n=100), tumor stage accuracy improved from 0.680 to 0.833 (pT: 0.842 -> 0.884; pN: 0.885 -> 0.948). The results demonstrate that deep reflective reasoning can systematically improve the reliability of LLM-based structured data extraction under interdependence constraints, enabling more consistent machine-operable clinical datasets and facilitating knowledge discovery with machine learning and data science towards digital health.

AI.tldr: 提出深度反思推理框架，通过迭代自批判和修订来改善LLM在临床结构化信息提取中的一致性，在三个肿瘤学应用中显著提升性能。
AI.motivation: 临床笔记中的结构化信息提取面临变量间相互依赖的挑战，现有LLM提取流程难以捕捉这些依赖关系，导致临床不一致的输出结果。
AI.method: 提出深度反思推理框架，这是一个LLM代理框架，通过迭代自批判和修订结构化输出来检查变量间、输入文本和检索领域知识的一致性，直到输出收敛为止。
AI.result: 在三个肿瘤学应用中取得显著改进：1) 结直肠癌同步报告：8个分类变量的平均F1从0.828提升到0.911，4个数值变量的平均正确率从0.806提升到0.895；2) Ewing肉瘤CD99免疫染色模式识别：准确率从0.870提升到0.927；3) 肺癌肿瘤分期：肿瘤分期准确率从0.680提升到0.833。
AI.conclusion: 深度反思推理能够系统性地改善LLM在依赖约束下的结构化数据提取可靠性，实现更一致的机器可操作临床数据集，促进数字健康领域的知识发现。

title: Interpretable Multiple Myeloma Prognosis with Observational Medical Outcomes Partnership Data
summary: Machine learning (ML) promises better clinical decision-making, yet opaque model behavior limits the adoption in healthcare. We propose two novel regularization techniques for ensuring the interpretability of ML models trained on real-world data. In particular, we consider the prediction of five-year survival for multiple myeloma patients using clinical data from Helsinki University Hospital. To ensure the interpretability of the trained models, we use two alternative constructions for a penalty term used for regularization. The first one penalizes deviations from the predictions obtained from an interpretable logistic regression method with two manually chosen features. The second construction requires consistency of model predictions with the revised international staging system (R-ISS). We verify the usefulness of the proposed regularization techniques in numerical experiments using data from 812 patients. They achieve an accuracy up to 0.721 on a test set and SHAP values show that the models rely on the selected important features.

AI.tldr: 提出两种新的正则化技术，确保基于真实世界数据训练的机器学习模型具有可解释性，应用于多发性骨髓瘤患者的五年生存预测
AI.motivation: 机器学习在临床决策中具有潜力，但模型行为不透明限制了其在医疗领域的应用。需要确保模型可解释性以促进医疗AI的采用。
AI.method: 提出两种正则化技术：1）惩罚与可解释逻辑回归模型预测的偏差（使用两个手动选择的特征）；2）要求模型预测与修订的国际分期系统（R-ISS）保持一致。应用于赫尔辛基大学医院812名多发性骨髓瘤患者的临床数据。
AI.result: 在测试集上达到最高0.721的准确率，SHAP值显示模型依赖于选定的重要特征，验证了所提正则化技术的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的正则化技术能够确保机器学习模型在保持预测性能的同时具有可解释性，有助于促进医疗AI在临床决策中的应用。

title: Local Convergence Analysis of ADMM for Nonconvex Composite Optimization
summary: In this paper, we study the local convergence of the standard ADMM scheme for a class of nonconvex composite problems arising from modern imaging and machine learning models. This problem is constrained by a closed convex set, while its objective is the sum of a continuously differentiable (possibly nonconvex) smooth term and a polyhedral convex nonsmooth term composed with a linear mapping. Our analysis is mainly motivated by the recent works of Rockafellar [29,30]. We begin with an elementary proof of a key local strong convexity property of the Moreau envelope of polyhedral convex functions. Building on this property, we show that the strong variational sufficiency condition holds for the considered problem under appropriate assumptions. Using the strong variational sufficiency condition, we further derive a descent inequality for the ADMM iterates, in a form analogous to the classical descent analysis of ADMM for convex problems. As a consequence, for a suitable choice of the penalty parameter, we establish local convergence of the ADMM scheme to a primal-dual solution, and a local linear convergence rate for the case where the constraint set is polyhedral convex. Finally, we present three analytic examples to illustrate the applicability of our local convergence result and the necessity of the local assumptions.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了ADMM算法在一类非凸复合优化问题中的局部收敛性，这类问题来源于现代成像和机器学习模型。通过建立强变分充分条件，证明了在适当参数选择下ADMM的局部收敛性，并在多面体凸约束下获得了局部线性收敛率。
AI.motivation: 现代成像和机器学习模型常涉及非凸复合优化问题，这类问题包含连续可微（可能非凸）的平滑项与多面体凸非平滑项的组合。虽然ADMM在凸优化中已有成熟理论，但在非凸问题中的收敛性分析仍具挑战性。本文受Rockafellar近期工作的启发，旨在建立ADMM在非凸复合问题中的局部收敛理论。
AI.method: 首先给出了多面体凸函数的Moreau包络的局部强凸性基本证明。基于此性质，在适当假设下证明了所考虑问题满足强变分充分条件。利用该条件，推导出ADMM迭代的下降不等式（形式类似于凸问题的经典下降分析）。最后通过三个解析示例说明结果的适用性和局部假设的必要性。
AI.result: 对于合适的惩罚参数选择，建立了ADMM方案向原始-对偶解的局部收敛性。当约束集为多面体凸时，获得了局部线性收敛率。通过三个示例验证了局部收敛结果的适用性，并展示了局部假设的必要性。
AI.conclusion: 本文成功建立了ADMM在一类非凸复合优化问题中的局部收敛理论框架。通过引入强变分充分条件，将凸优化中的经典下降分析推广到非凸情形，为现代成像和机器学习中的非凸优化问题提供了理论保证。结果表明，在适当假设下，ADMM能够实现局部收敛甚至线性收敛。

title: Writing literature reviews with AI: principles, hurdles and some lessons learned
comment: 31 pages and 193 pages of Appendices, including 6 different versions of the literature review, and complete chat with the LLM
summary: We qualitatively compared literature reviews produced with varying degrees of AI assistance. The same LLM, given the same corpus of 280 papers but different selections, produced dramatically different reviews, from mainstream and politically neutral to critical and post-colonial, though neither orientation was intended. LLM outputs always appear at first glance to be well written, well informed and thought out, but closer reading reveals gaps, biases and lack of depth. Our comparison of six versions shows a series of pitfalls and suggests precautions necessary when using AI assistance to make a literature review. Main issues are: (1) The bias of ignorance (you do not know what you do not get) in the selection of relevant papers. (2) Alignment and digital sycophancy: commercial AI models slavishly take you further in the direction they understand you give them, reinforcing biases. (3) Mainstreaming: because of their statistical nature, LLM productions tend to favor mainstream perspectives and content; in our case there was only 20% overlap between paper selections by humans and the LLM. (4) Limited capacity for creative restructuring, with vague and ambiguous statements. (5) Lack of critical perspective, coming from distant reading and political correctness. Most pitfalls can be addressed by prompting, but only if the user knows the domain well enough to detect them. There is a paradox: producing a good AI-assisted review requires expertise that comes from reading the literature, which is precisely what AI was meant to reduce. Overall, AI can improve the span and quality of the review, but the gain of time is not as massive as one would expect, and a press-button strategy leaving AI to do the work is a recipe for disaster. We conclude with recommendations for those who write, or assess, such LLM-augmented reviews.

AI.tldr: AI辅助文献综述存在严重缺陷：选择偏差、数字谄媚、主流化倾向、缺乏创造性重组和批判视角，需要专业知识才能有效使用
AI.motivation: 研究AI辅助文献综述的质量问题，揭示LLM在学术写作中的潜在风险和局限性，为使用AI进行文献综述提供警示
AI.method: 使用同一LLM对280篇论文进行不同选择的文献综述生成，比较六个版本的质量差异，分析AI辅助文献综述的常见陷阱
AI.result: AI生成的文献综述表面质量高但存在严重问题：选择偏差（人类与AI选择仅20%重叠）、数字谄媚、主流化倾向、缺乏深度和批判性，需要专业知识才能有效使用
AI.conclusion: AI辅助文献综述需要专业知识，一键式策略会导致灾难性结果，应谨慎使用并配合人工监督，为撰写和评估AI辅助综述提供建议

title: Active Inference for Physical AI Agents -- An Engineering Perspective
summary: Physical AI agents, such as robots and other embodied systems operating under tight and fluctuating resource constraints, remain far less capable than biological agents in open-ended real-world environments. This paper argues that Active Inference (AIF), grounded in the Free Energy Principle, offers a principled foundation for closing that gap. We develop this argument from first principles, following a chain from probability theory through Bayesian machine learning and variational inference to active inference and reactive message passing. From the FEP perspective, systems that maintain their structural and functional integrity over time can, under suitable assumptions, be described as minimizing variational free energy (VFE), and AIF operationalizes this by unifying perception, learning, planning, and control within a single computational objective. We show that VFE minimization is naturally realized by reactive message passing on factor graphs, where inference emerges from local, parallel computations. This realization is well matched to the constraints of physical operation, including hard deadlines, asynchronous data, fluctuating power budgets, and changing environments. Because reactive message passing is event-driven, interruptible, and locally adaptable, performance degrades gracefully under reduced resources while model structure can adjust online. We further show that, under suitable coupling and coarse-graining conditions, coupled AIF agents can be described as higher-level AIF agents, yielding a homogeneous architecture based on the same message-passing primitive across scales. Our contribution is not empirical benchmarking, but a clear theoretical and architectural case for the engineering community.

AI.tldr: 该论文认为基于自由能原理的主动推理为物理AI系统提供了理论基础，通过变分自由能最小化和反应式消息传递实现感知、学习、规划和控制的统一，适合资源受限的物理环境。
AI.motivation: 物理AI代理（如机器人）在资源受限的真实环境中能力远不如生物代理，需要一种理论基础来缩小这一差距。
AI.method: 从概率论出发，通过贝叶斯机器学习、变分推理到主动推理，提出变分自由能最小化在因子图上通过反应式消息传递实现，支持局部并行计算。
AI.result: 展示了反应式消息传递的事件驱动、可中断和局部适应性特性，能在资源减少时优雅降级，耦合的主动推理代理可描述为更高层级的主动推理代理。
AI.conclusion: 主动推理为工程社区提供了清晰的理论和架构基础，通过统一的变分自由能最小化框架实现跨尺度的同构架构，适合物理系统的资源约束。

title: Sustainable Load Balancing for Wireless Networks With Renewable Energy Sources
summary: Future wireless networks powered by renewable energy sources and storage systems (e.g., batteries) require energy-aware mechanisms to ensure stability in critical and high-demand scenarios. These include large-scale user gatherings, especially during evening hours when solar generation is unavailable, and days with poor wind conditions that limit the effectiveness of wind-based energy harvesting. Maintaining network performance under such constraints, while preserving stored energy, remains a key challenge. This work proposes an enhanced Proactive-Reactive Load Balancing algorithm that integrates energy conditions into mobility management. By leveraging standardized mobility events, the algorithm optimizes traffic distribution and energy utilization (avoiding complete drainage of stored energy), thereby preventing service degradation. Simulations show improved energy sustainability and network performance under congestion and limited solar availability.

AI.tldr: 提出增强型主动-反应式负载均衡算法，将能源条件整合到移动性管理中，优化流量分配和能源利用，提高能源可持续性和网络性能
AI.motivation: 未来无线网络依赖可再生能源和储能系统，在关键高需求场景下需要能源感知机制来确保稳定性。特别是在大规模用户聚集、夜间太阳能不可用、以及风力条件差限制风能收集的情况下，如何在保持网络性能的同时保护存储能源是一个关键挑战。
AI.method: 提出增强型主动-反应式负载均衡算法，通过整合能源条件到移动性管理中，利用标准化移动事件优化流量分配和能源利用，避免存储能源完全耗尽。
AI.result: 仿真结果显示，在拥塞和太阳能可用性有限的情况下，该算法提高了能源可持续性和网络性能。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提出的能源感知负载均衡算法能有效应对可再生能源网络的稳定性挑战，在资源受限场景下保持网络服务质量。

title: Linguistic Signatures for Enhanced Emotion Detection
summary: Emotion detection is a central problem in NLP, with recent progress driven by transformer-based models trained on established datasets. However, little is known about the linguistic regularities that characterize how emotions are expressed across different corpora and labels. This study examines whether linguistic features can serve as reliable interpretable signals for emotion recognition in text. We extract emotion-specific linguistic signatures from 13 English datasets and evaluate how incorporating these features into transformer models impacts performance. Our RoBERTa-based models enriched with high level linguistic features achieve consistent performance gains of up to +2.4 macro F1 on the GoEmotions benchmark, showing that explicit lexical cues can complement neural representations and improve robustness in predicting emotion categories.

AI.tldr: 研究探讨语言特征能否作为文本情感识别的可靠可解释信号，通过从13个英文数据集中提取情感特异性语言特征，并将其融入Transformer模型，在GoEmotions基准上实现了最高+2.4宏F1的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 尽管基于Transformer的模型在情感检测方面取得了进展，但不同语料库和标签中情感表达的语言规律性尚不清楚。研究旨在探索语言特征能否作为情感识别的可靠可解释信号。
AI.method: 从13个英文数据集中提取情感特异性语言特征，将这些高级语言特征融入RoBERTa模型，评估其对性能的影响。
AI.result: 融入高级语言特征的RoBERTa模型在GoEmotions基准上实现了最高+2.4宏F1的稳定性能提升，表明显性词汇线索可以补充神经表示并提高情感类别预测的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 语言特征可以作为情感识别的可靠可解释信号，将显性语言线索与神经表示相结合能够提升情感检测模型的性能和鲁棒性。

title: DiffGraph: An Automated Agent-driven Model Merging Framework for In-the-Wild Text-to-Image Generation
summary: The rapid growth of the text-to-image (T2I) community has fostered a thriving online ecosystem of expert models, which are variants of pretrained diffusion models specialized for diverse generative abilities. Yet, existing model merging methods remain limited in fully leveraging abundant online expert resources and still struggle to meet diverse in-the-wild user needs. We present DiffGraph, a novel agent-driven graph-based model merging framework, which automatically harnesses online experts and flexibly merges them for diverse user needs. Our DiffGraph constructs a scalable graph and organizes ever-expanding online experts within it through node registration and calibration. Then, DiffGraph dynamically activates specific subgraphs based on user needs, enabling flexible combinations of different experts to achieve user-desired generation. Extensive experiments show the efficacy of our method.

AI.tldr: DiffGraph：基于图的智能体驱动模型融合框架，自动整合在线专家模型以满足多样化的文本到图像生成需求
AI.motivation: 现有模型融合方法无法充分利用丰富的在线专家模型资源，难以满足实际应用中多样化的用户需求
AI.method: 构建可扩展的图结构，通过节点注册和校准组织在线专家模型，根据用户需求动态激活特定子图，灵活组合不同专家模型
AI.result: 大量实验证明了该方法的有效性
AI.conclusion: DiffGraph框架能够自动利用在线专家资源，灵活融合模型以满足多样化的文本到图像生成需求

title: The Multiverse of Time Series Machine Learning: an Archive for Multivariate Time Series Classification
summary:
Time series machine learning (TSML) is a growing research field that spans a wide range
  of tasks. The popularity of established tasks such as classification, clustering, and
  extrinsic regression has, in part, been driven by the availability of benchmark datasets.
  An archive of 30 multivariate time series classification datasets, introduced in 2018 and
  commonly known as the UEA archive, has since become an essential resource cited in hundreds
  of publications. We present a substantial expansion of this archive that more than quadruples
  its size, from 30 to 133 classification problems. We also release preprocessed versions of
  datasets containing missing values or unequal length series, bringing the total number of
  datasets to 147. Reflecting the growth of the archive and the broader community, we rebrand
  it as the Multiverse archive to capture its diversity of domains. The Multiverse archive
  includes datasets from multiple sources, consolidating other collections and standalone
  datasets into a single, unified repository. Recognising that running experiments across the
  full archive is computationally demanding, we recommend a subset of the full archive called
  Multiverse-core (MV-core) for initial exploration. To support researchers in using the new
  archive, we provide detailed guidance and a baseline evaluation of established and recent
  classification algorithms, establishing performance benchmarks for future research. We have
  created a dedicated repository for the Multiverse archive that provides a common aeon
  and scikit-learn compatible framework for reproducibility, an extensive record of
  published results, and an interactive interface to explore the results.

AI.tldr: UEA时间序列分类数据集库从30个扩展到133个，更名为Multiverse档案库，包含147个预处理数据集，提供基准评估和交互界面
AI.motivation: 现有UEA时间序列分类数据集库规模有限（仅30个），无法满足日益增长的研究需求，需要更大规模、更多样化的基准数据集来推动时间序列机器学习研究发展
AI.method: 将UEA档案库从30个数据集扩展到133个分类问题，整合多个来源的数据集，预处理包含缺失值或不等长序列的数据集，创建统一的Multiverse档案库，提供MV-core子集用于初步探索
AI.result: 创建了包含147个数据集的Multiverse档案库（133个分类问题+14个预处理版本），建立了性能基准，提供了与aeon和scikit-learn兼容的框架、结果记录和交互界面
AI.conclusion: Multiverse档案库为时间序列分类研究提供了更丰富、更多样化的基准资源，将促进算法比较和性能评估，推动该领域的研究进展

title: Derivative-Free Bilevel Optimization with Inexact Lower-Level Solutions
summary: In this work, we propose derivative-free framework for bilevel optimization. We consider both the upper and lower-level problems with bound constraints on the variables, as well as general nonlinear constraints, assuming that first-order information (in the upper-level) is not available or it is impractical to obtain. The lower-level problem is solved with an accuracy that is progressively refined throughout the optimization process. We first analyze the case in which the upper-level problem is subject only to bound constraints, establishing convergence to Clarke-Jahn stationary points when the refinement process is allowed to reach its maximum precision. When a limitation is imposed on this refinement process, we prove convergence to approximate stationary points using an extended notion of Goldstein stationarity. Finally, we extend the proposed framework to handle more complex constraints via an exact penalty function approach, proving convergence to stationary points under suitable assumptions. A comprehensive numerical study on 160 problems from the BOLIB collection shows that the adaptive accuracy strategy consistently yields better results than fixed-precision solves, with its benefits becoming more pronounced as the required lower-level accuracy becomes more stringent.

AI.tldr: 提出无导数双层优化框架，处理带约束问题，采用渐进精度策略求解下层问题，证明收敛性，数值实验显示自适应精度优于固定精度
AI.motivation: 解决无导数双层优化问题，当上层问题的一阶信息不可用或不切实际时，需要处理变量边界约束和一般非线性约束
AI.method: 提出无导数框架，下层问题采用渐进精度求解策略，上层仅边界约束时分析收敛性，复杂约束时采用精确罚函数方法
AI.result: 证明收敛到Clarke-Jahn稳定点（完全精度）和Goldstein稳定点（有限精度），数值实验在160个BOLIB问题上显示自适应精度策略优于固定精度
AI.conclusion: 提出的无导数双层优化框架能有效处理约束问题，自适应精度策略在精度要求严格时优势更明显，为无导数双层优化提供了理论保证和实用方法

title: Stability of AI Governance Systems: A Coupled Dynamics Model of Public Trust and Social Disruptions
comment: 15 pages, 8 figures. Equal contribution by Jiaqi Lai and Hou Liang
summary: As artificial intelligence (AI) is increasingly deployed in high-stakes public decision-making (from resource allocation to welfare distribution), public trust in these systems has become a critical determinant of their legitimacy and sustainability. Yet existing AI governance research remains largely qualitative, lacking formal mathematical frameworks to characterize the precise conditions under which public trust collapses. This paper addresses that gap by proposing a rigorous coupled dynamics model that integrates a discrete-time Hawkes process -- capturing the self-exciting generation of AI controversy events such as perceived algorithmic unfairness or accountability failures -- with a Friedkin-Johnsen opinion dynamics model that governs the evolution of institutional trust across social networks. A key innovation is the bidirectional feedback mechanism: declining trust amplifies the intensity of subsequent controversy events, which in turn further erode trust, forming a self-reinforcing collapse loop. We derive closed-form equilibrium solutions and perform formal stability analysis, establishing the critical spectral condition rho(J_{2nt}) < 1 that delineates the boundary between trust resilience and systemic collapse. Numerical experiments further reveal how echo chamber network structures and media amplification accelerate governance failure. Our core contribution to the AI governance field is a baseline collapse model: a formal stability analysis framework demonstrating that, absent strong institutional intervention, even minor algorithmic biases can propagate through social networks to trigger irreversible trust breakdown in AI governance systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个耦合动力学模型，将离散时间霍克斯过程（捕捉AI争议事件的自激生成）与弗里德金-约翰森意见动力学模型（控制社会网络中制度信任的演化）相结合，分析AI治理系统中的信任崩溃机制。
AI.motivation: 当前AI治理研究主要停留在定性层面，缺乏正式的数学框架来精确描述公众信任崩溃的条件。随着AI在高风险公共决策中的部署增加，公众信任成为系统合法性和可持续性的关键决定因素。
AI.method: 提出双向反馈的耦合动力学模型：1) 离散时间霍克斯过程捕捉AI争议事件（如算法不公平、问责失败）的自激生成；2) 弗里德金-约翰森意见动力学模型描述社会网络中制度信任的演化；3) 建立双向反馈机制：信任下降放大后续争议事件强度，争议事件进一步侵蚀信任，形成自我强化的崩溃循环。
AI.result: 推导出闭式均衡解并进行形式稳定性分析，建立了临界谱条件ρ(J_{2nt}) < 1，划定了信任韧性与系统崩溃之间的边界。数值实验显示回声室网络结构和媒体放大会加速治理失败。
AI.conclusion: 本文为AI治理领域提供了基线崩溃模型：一个形式稳定性分析框架，证明即使没有强有力的制度干预，微小的算法偏见也能通过社会网络传播，触发AI治理系统中不可逆的信任崩溃。

title: Stability of Sequential and Parallel Coordinate Ascent Variational Inference
summary: We highlight a striking difference in behavior between two widely used variants of coordinate ascent variational inference: the sequential and parallel algorithms. While such differences were known in the numerical analysis literature in simpler settings, they remain largely unexplored in the optimization-focused literature on variational inference in more complex models. Focusing on the moderately high-dimensional linear regression problem, we show that the sequential algorithm, although typically slower, enjoys convergence guarantees under more relaxed conditions than the parallel variant, which is often employed to facilitate block-wise updates and improve computational efficiency.

AI.tldr: 比较坐标上升变分推断的两种变体：顺序算法和并行算法，在线性回归问题中展示顺序算法收敛条件更宽松但速度较慢，并行算法计算效率高但收敛条件更严格
AI.motivation: 揭示坐标上升变分推断中顺序算法和并行算法之间的行为差异，这种差异在数值分析文献中已知但在更复杂模型的变分推断优化文献中尚未充分探索
AI.method: 聚焦于中等高维线性回归问题，分析两种算法的收敛特性，比较它们的收敛条件和计算效率
AI.result: 顺序算法虽然通常较慢，但在更宽松的条件下具有收敛保证；并行算法常用于促进分块更新和提高计算效率，但收敛条件更严格
AI.conclusion: 两种坐标上升变分推断变体在收敛条件和计算效率之间存在权衡，顺序算法收敛性更强但速度慢，并行算法计算效率高但收敛条件更严格

title: Online Feedback Optimization of Energy Storage to Smooth Data Center Grid Impacts
summary: The growing electricity demand of AI data centers introduces significant voltage variability in power networks, affecting not only their own operation but also the experience of all users sharing the network. To smooth data center impacts on power networks, we develop an online feedback optimization approach that controls distributed battery energy storage systems to mitigate voltage issues induced by data center operations. The controller adjusts the active and reactive power setpoints of distributed battery systems in response to voltage measurements, with a two-fold objective: managing voltage to minimize the magnitude of constraint violations and smoothing voltage profiles. Control performance is evaluated in a high-fidelity simulation environment that integrates a three-phase distribution feeder and a detailed battery system model, and benchmarked against a local control approach with similar objectives but without optimality guarantees and constraint enforcement. We show that the proposed controller delivers consistent voltage regulation in the long term, while the local control approach pursues the objectives more aggressively but quickly hits the storage limits.

AI.tldr: 提出一种在线反馈优化方法，通过控制分布式电池储能系统来缓解AI数据中心引起的电网电压波动问题。
AI.motivation: AI数据中心日益增长的电力需求导致电网电压显著波动，不仅影响数据中心自身运行，还影响共享电网的所有用户体验。需要平滑数据中心对电网的影响。
AI.method: 开发在线反馈优化控制器，根据电压测量调整分布式电池系统的有功和无功功率设定点，实现双重目标：管理电压以最小化约束违规幅度，并平滑电压曲线。
AI.result: 在高保真仿真环境中评估，控制器在长期内提供一致的电压调节，而本地控制方法虽然更积极地追求目标，但很快达到储能限制。
AI.conclusion: 提出的在线反馈优化控制器能有效缓解AI数据中心引起的电网电压问题，相比本地控制方法具有更好的长期稳定性和约束保证。

title: Beyond Test-Time Compute Strategies: Advocating Energy-per-Token in LLM Inference
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) demonstrate exceptional performance across diverse tasks but come with substantial energy and computational costs, particularly in request-heavy scenarios. In many real-world applications, the full scale and capabilities of LLMs are often unnecessary, as Small Language Models (SLMs) can provide accurate responses for simpler text generation tasks. When enhanced with advanced reasoning strategies, such as Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting or Majority Voting, SLMs can approach the performance of larger models while reducing overall computational requirements. However, these strategies can also introduce additional energy costs, creating an energy-accuracy trade-off. Our analysis examines these trade-offs in test-time compute strategies for smaller models compared to larger ones, using the MMLU benchmark. Additionally, we explore the input-output token dynamics of transformer architectures, which result in nonlinear hardware energy operation curves for LLMs. To bridge AI research with its physical impact, we propose \textit{energy efficiency metrics}, including Energy-per-Token, as complements to traditional accuracy benchmarks. Beyond model selection, we propose controlled reasoning in CoT token generation, using operating curves to regulate reasoning depth dynamically. This vision integrates a energy-aware routing mechanism, ensuring that model selection and inference strategies balance accuracy for sustainable AI deployment.

AI.tldr: 该论文探讨大型语言模型(LLMs)与小语言模型(SLMs)在能耗与准确性之间的权衡，提出能量效率指标和动态推理深度控制，以实现可持续AI部署。
AI.motivation: LLMs虽然性能卓越但能耗巨大，而SLMs在许多简单任务中已足够准确。当SLMs结合先进推理策略时，能以更低计算成本接近大模型性能，但会引入额外能耗，形成能耗-准确性权衡。
AI.method: 1) 分析SLMs与LLMs在测试时计算策略的能耗-准确性权衡，使用MMLU基准；2) 探索transformer架构的输入-输出token动态特性导致的非线性硬件能耗曲线；3) 提出能量效率指标（如Energy-per-Token）作为传统准确性基准的补充；4) 提出受控推理机制，使用操作曲线动态调节CoT推理深度。
AI.result: 研究发现SLMs结合推理策略能在降低计算需求的同时接近LLMs性能，但需平衡额外能耗。transformer架构的非线性能耗特性被揭示，能量效率指标能更全面评估模型可持续性。
AI.conclusion: 需要将AI研究与物理影响结合，通过能量感知路由机制平衡模型选择和推理策略，实现准确性与可持续性的平衡。能量效率指标和动态推理控制是实现可持续AI部署的关键。

title: Efficient Counterfactual Reasoning in ProbLog via Single World Intervention Programs
summary: Probabilistic Logic Programming (PLP) languages, like ProbLog, naturally support reasoning under uncertainty, while maintaining a declarative and interpretable framework. Meanwhile, counterfactual reasoning (i.e., answering ``what if'' questions) is critical for ensuring AI systems are robust and trustworthy; however, integrating this capability into PLP can be computationally prohibitive and unstable in accuracy. This paper addresses this challenge, by proposing an efficient program transformation for counterfactuals as Single World Intervention Programs (SWIPs) in ProbLog. By systematically splitting ProbLog clauses to observed and fixed components relevant to a counterfactual, we create a transformed program that (1) does not asymptotically exceed the computational complexity of existing methods, and is strictly smaller in common cases, and (2) reduces counterfactual reasoning to marginal inference over a simpler program. We formally prove the correctness of our approach, which relies on a weaker set independence assumptions and is consistent with conditional independencies, showing the resulting marginal probabilities match the counterfactual distributions of the underlying Structural Causal Model in wide domains. Our method achieves a 35\% reduction in inference time versus existing methods in extensive experiments. This work makes complex counterfactual reasoning more computationally tractable and reliable, providing a crucial step towards developing more robust and explainable AI systems. The code is at https://github.com/EVIEHub/swip.

AI.tldr: 提出一种高效的程序转换方法，将反事实推理转换为单世界干预程序，在ProbLog中实现更快速、更稳定的反事实推理
AI.motivation: 概率逻辑编程语言如ProbLog支持不确定性推理，但反事实推理（回答"如果...会怎样"问题）在PLP中计算成本高且准确性不稳定，这限制了AI系统的鲁棒性和可信度
AI.method: 提出一种程序转换方法，将反事实推理转换为单世界干预程序，通过系统地将ProbLog子句拆分为与反事实相关的观察和固定组件，创建转换后的程序
AI.result: 方法在计算复杂度上不超出现有方法，且在常见情况下更小；将反事实推理简化为对更简单程序的边际推断；实验显示推理时间减少35%
AI.conclusion: 该方法使复杂的反事实推理计算上更易处理且更可靠，为开发更鲁棒和可解释的AI系统提供了关键步骤

title: CAMA: Exploring Collusive Adversarial Attacks in c-MARL
summary: Cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning (c-MARL) has been widely deployed in real-world applications, such as social robots, embodied intelligence, UAV swarms, etc. Nevertheless, many adversarial attacks still exist to threaten various c-MARL systems. At present, the studies mainly focus on single-adversary perturbation attacks and white-box adversarial attacks that manipulate agents' internal observations or actions. To address these limitations, we in this paper attempt to study collusive adversarial attacks through strategically organizing a set of malicious agents into three collusive attack modes: Collective Malicious Agents, Disguised Malicious Agents, and Spied Malicious Agents. Three novelties are involved: i) three collusive adversarial attacks are creatively proposed for the first time, and a unified framework CAMA for policy-level collusive attacks is designed; ii) the attack effectiveness is theoretically analyzed from the perspectives of disruptiveness, stealthiness, and attack cost; and iii) the three collusive adversarial attacks are technically realized through agent's observation information fusion, attack-trigger control. Finally, multi-facet experiments on four SMAC II maps are performed, and experimental results showcase the three collusive attacks have an additive adversarial synergy, strengthening attack outcome while maintaining high stealthiness and stability over long horizons. Our work fills the gap for collusive adversarial learning in c-MARL.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对协作多智能体强化学习系统的合谋对抗攻击框架CAMA，包含三种合谋攻击模式，通过理论分析和实验验证了其攻击效果。
AI.motivation: 当前对抗攻击研究主要关注单攻击者扰动攻击和白盒攻击，这些攻击通过操纵智能体的内部观察或动作进行。为了突破这些限制，本文研究合谋对抗攻击，通过战略性地组织一组恶意智能体来增强攻击效果。
AI.method: 提出三种合谋攻击模式：集体恶意智能体、伪装恶意智能体和间谍恶意智能体，设计统一的CAMA框架，通过智能体观察信息融合和攻击触发控制实现技术实现。
AI.result: 在四个SMAC II地图上进行多维度实验，结果显示三种合谋攻击具有加性对抗协同效应，在保持高隐蔽性和长期稳定性的同时增强了攻击效果。
AI.conclusion: 本文填补了协作多智能体强化学习中合谋对抗学习的空白，提出的合谋攻击框架在破坏性、隐蔽性和攻击成本方面具有理论优势。

title: A reliability-aware randomized simheuristic for the team orienteering problem with stochastic travel times
summary:
We study a stochastic variant of the Team Orienteering Problem (TOP) with uncertain travel times and an all-or-nothing reward policy, under which the reward of a route is lost if its travel time exceeds the available budget. This setting makes the trade-off between expected reward and route reliability a central issue in solution design.
  To address this problem, we propose a reliability-aware simheuristic that combines a savings-based constructive heuristic, controlled randomization, local search, and Monte Carlo simulation. The method evaluates candidate solutions directly under uncertainty and selects them using both estimated expected reward and a reliability criterion, rather than relying on deterministic optimization followed by ex-post stochastic evaluation.
  Computational experiments on benchmark instances adapted from the TOP literature show that the proposed approach substantially improves stochastic performance with respect to a deterministic baseline evaluated under uncertainty. In most instances, the simheuristic increases both expected reward and reliability, and in the loosest regimes reliability can approach 0.99 while keeping computation times moderate.

AI.tldr: 提出一种可靠性感知的模拟启发式方法，用于解决具有不确定旅行时间和全有或全无奖励策略的随机团队定向问题，该方法在保持适度计算时间的同时显著提高了期望奖励和可靠性。
AI.motivation: 研究随机团队定向问题（TOP）中旅行时间不确定性和全有或无奖励策略带来的挑战，在这种策略下，如果路线旅行时间超过可用预算，则奖励完全丧失。这使得期望奖励与路线可靠性之间的权衡成为解决方案设计的核心问题。
AI.method: 提出一种可靠性感知的模拟启发式方法，结合了基于节约的构造启发式、受控随机化、局部搜索和蒙特卡洛模拟。该方法直接在不确定性下评估候选解，并使用估计的期望奖励和可靠性标准来选择解，而不是依赖确定性优化后进行事后随机评估。
AI.result: 在TOP文献基准实例上的计算实验表明，所提方法相对于在不确定性下评估的确定性基线，显著提高了随机性能。在大多数实例中，模拟启发式方法同时增加了期望奖励和可靠性，在最宽松的情况下，可靠性可以接近0.99，同时保持适度的计算时间。
AI.conclusion: 可靠性感知的模拟启发式方法能有效处理随机团队定向问题中的不确定性和可靠性权衡，在保持计算效率的同时显著提升解决方案的期望奖励和可靠性表现。

title: AI Detectors Fail Diverse Student Populations: A Mathematical Framing of Structural Detection Limits
summary: Student experiences and empirical studies report that "black box" AI text detectors produce high false positive rates with disproportionate errors against certain student populations, yet typically theoretical analyses model detection as a test between two known distributions for human and AI prose. This framing omits the structural feature of university assessment whereby an assessor generally does not know the individual student's writing distribution, making the null hypothesis composite. Standard application of the variational characterisation of total variation distance to this composite null shows trade-off bounds that any text-only, one-shot detector with useful power must produce false accusations at a rate governed by the distributional overlap between student writing and AI output. This is a constraint arising from population diversity that is logically independent of AI model quality and cannot be overcome by better detector engineering or technology. A subgroup mixture bound connects these quantities to observable demographic groups, providing a theoretical basis for the disparate impact patterns documented empirically. We propose suggestions to improve policy and practice, and argue that detection scores should not serve as sole evidence in misconduct proceedings.

AI.tldr: 论文分析了AI文本检测器在学术评估中的理论局限：由于学生写作分布未知（复合零假设），任何基于文本的一次性检测器必须在检测能力和误判率之间权衡，误判率受学生写作与AI输出分布重叠度约束，这种约束与AI模型质量无关且无法通过技术改进消除。
AI.motivation: 现有AI文本检测器在实践中存在高误判率，且对某些学生群体产生不成比例的错误，但理论研究通常将检测建模为已知人类和AI文本分布之间的测试，忽略了大学评估中评估者不知道学生个体写作分布这一结构性特征。
AI.method: 采用变分特征化总变差距离的方法分析复合零假设下的检测问题，推导出检测器性能的基本权衡界限，并通过子群混合界限将这些理论量与实际可观察的人口统计群体联系起来。
AI.result: 理论分析表明：任何基于文本的一次性检测器，若要有用检测能力，其误判率必然受学生写作与AI输出分布重叠度的约束；这种约束源于人口多样性，与AI模型质量无关，无法通过更好的检测器工程或技术克服；子群混合界限为实证观察到的差异影响模式提供了理论基础。
AI.conclusion: AI文本检测器存在固有的理论局限，检测分数不应作为学术不端行为的唯一证据；需要改进政策和实践，建议采用更全面的评估方法。

title: Hard labels sampled from sparse targets mislead rotation invariant algorithms
summary: One of the most common machine learning setups is logistic regression. In many classification models, including neural networks, the final prediction is obtained by applying a logistic link function to a linear score. In binary logistic regression, the feedback can be either soft labels, corresponding to the true conditional probability of the data (as in distillation), or sampled hard labels (taking values $\pm 1$). We point out a fundamental problem that arises even in a particularly favorable setting, where the goal is to learn a noise-free soft target of the form $σ(\mathbf{x}^{\top}\mathbf{w}^{\star})$. In the over-constrained case (i.e. the number of samples $n$ exceeds the input dimension $d$) with examples $(\mathbf{x}_i,σ(\mathbf{x}_i^{\top}\mathbf{w}^{\star}))$, it is sufficient to recover $\mathbf{w}^{\star}$ and hence achieve the Bayes risk. However, we prove that when the examples are labeled by hard labels $y_i$ sampled from the same conditional distribution $σ(\mathbf{x}_i^{\top}\mathbf{w}^{\star})$ and $\mathbf{w}^{\star}$ is $s$-sparse, then rotation-invariant algorithms are provably suboptimal: they incur an excess risk $Ω\!\left(\frac{d-1}{n}\right)$, while there are simple non-rotation invariant algorithms with excess risk $O(\frac{s\log d}{n})$. The simplest rotation invariant algorithm is gradient descent on the logistic loss (with early stopping). A simple non-rotation-invariant algorithm for sparse targets that achieves the above upper bounds uses gradient descent on the weights $u_i,v_i$, where now the linear weight $w_i$ is reparameterized as $u_iv_i$.

AI.tldr: 论文指出在逻辑回归中，旋转不变算法在硬标签下学习稀疏目标时存在根本性缺陷，而非旋转不变算法能获得更好的理论保证。
AI.motivation: 研究逻辑回归中软标签和硬标签学习性能的差异，特别是当目标是稀疏向量时，揭示旋转不变算法的理论局限性。
AI.method: 理论分析证明：1) 在过约束情况下，软标签可直接恢复最优参数；2) 硬标签下，旋转不变算法（如逻辑损失梯度下降）存在Ω((d-1)/n)的额外风险；3) 提出简单非旋转不变算法（权重重参数化为u_i*v_i的梯度下降），获得O(s*log d/n)的更好上界。
AI.result: 证明了旋转不变算法在硬标签学习稀疏目标时存在根本性缺陷，额外风险下界为Ω((d-1)/n)；而非旋转不变算法能达到O(s*log d/n)的更好上界，两者存在显著的理论差距。
AI.conclusion: 在逻辑回归中，当使用硬标签学习稀疏目标时，旋转不变性成为性能瓶颈，需要设计非旋转不变的算法才能获得最优的理论保证。

title: Towards Certified Sim-to-Real Transfer via Stochastic Simulation-Gap Functions
summary: This paper introduces the notion of stochastic simulation-gap function, which formally quantifies the gap between an approximate mathematical model and a high-fidelity stochastic simulator. Since controllers designed for the mathematical model may fail in practice due to unmodeled gaps, the stochastic simulation-gap function enables the simulator to be interpreted as the nominal model with bounded state- and input-dependent disturbances. We propose a data-driven approach and establish a formal guarantee on the quantification of this gap. Leveraging the stochastic simulation-gap function, we design a controller for the mathematical model that ensures the desired specification is satisfied in the high-fidelity simulator with high confidence, taking a step toward bridging the sim-to-real gap. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method using a TurtleBot model and a pendulum system in stochastic simulators.

AI.tldr: 提出随机仿真间隙函数概念，量化近似数学模型与高保真随机仿真器之间的差距，并设计控制器确保在仿真器中满足规范要求
AI.motivation: 针对数学模型设计的控制器在实际应用中可能因未建模的差距而失效，需要量化数学模型与高保真随机仿真器之间的差距，以弥合仿真到现实的鸿沟
AI.method: 引入随机仿真间隙函数概念，将仿真器解释为带有有界状态和输入相关扰动的标称模型；提出数据驱动方法量化该间隙，并基于此设计控制器
AI.result: 建立了量化间隙的形式化保证，设计的控制器能确保在高保真随机仿真器中以高置信度满足期望规范，在TurtleBot模型和摆系统上验证了有效性
AI.conclusion: 随机仿真间隙函数为弥合仿真到现实差距提供了有效工具，通过量化数学模型与仿真器之间的差距，能设计出在实际仿真中可靠的控制器

title: Decoding the decoder: Contextual sequence-to-sequence modeling for intracortical speech decoding
summary: Speech brain--computer interfaces require decoders that translate intracortical activity into linguistic output while remaining robust to limited data and day-to-day variability. While prior high-performing systems have largely relied on framewise phoneme decoding combined with downstream language models, it remains unclear what contextual sequence-to-sequence decoding contributes to sublexical neural readout, robustness, and interpretability. We evaluated a multitask Transformer-based sequence-to-sequence model for attempted speech decoding from area 6v intracortical recordings. The model jointly predicts phoneme sequences, word sequences, and auxiliary acoustic features. To address day-to-day nonstationarity, we introduced the Neural Hammer Scalpel (NHS) calibration module, which combines global alignment with feature-wise modulation. We further analyzed held-out-day generalization and attention patterns in the encoder and decoders. On the Willett et al. dataset, the proposed model achieved a state-of-the-art phoneme error rate of 14.3%. Word decoding reached 25.6% WER with direct decoding and 19.4% WER with candidate generation and rescoring. NHS substantially improved both phoneme and word decoding relative to linear or no day-specific transform, while held-out-day experiments showed increasing degradation on unseen days with temporal distance. Attention visualizations revealed recurring temporal chunking in encoder representations and distinct use of these segments by phoneme and word decoders. These results indicate that contextual sequence-to-sequence modeling can improve the fidelity of neural-to-phoneme readout from intracortical speech signals and suggest that attention-based analyses can generate useful hypotheses about how neural speech evidence is segmented and accumulated over time.

AI.tldr: 提出基于Transformer的多任务序列到序列模型，结合神经锤子手术刀校准模块，用于从颅内记录解码尝试语音，在音素和单词解码上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 语音脑机接口需要能够将颅内活动转化为语言输出，同时应对有限数据和日常变化的解码器。虽然现有高性能系统主要依赖帧级音素解码结合下游语言模型，但上下文序列到序列解码对于亚词汇神经读取、鲁棒性和可解释性的贡献尚不明确。
AI.method: 提出多任务Transformer序列到序列模型，联合预测音素序列、单词序列和辅助声学特征。为应对日常非平稳性，引入神经锤子手术刀校准模块，结合全局对齐和特征级调制。分析留出日泛化能力和编码器-解码器的注意力模式。
AI.result: 在Willett数据集上，模型达到14.3%的音素错误率（SOTA）。单词解码直接解码达到25.6% WER，候选生成和重打分后达到19.4% WER。NHS相比线性或无日特定变换显著改善音素和单词解码。留出日实验显示随着时间距离增加，未见日性能下降。注意力可视化显示编码器表示中的重复时间分块以及音素和单词解码器对这些片段的不同使用。
AI.conclusion: 上下文序列到序列建模可以提高颅内语音信号到音素读取的保真度，基于注意力的分析可以生成关于神经语音证据如何随时间分段和累积的有用假设。

title: Grounded Chess Reasoning in Language Models via Master Distillation
summary: Language models often lack grounded reasoning capabilities in specialized domains where training data is scarce but bespoke systems excel. We introduce a general framework for distilling expert system reasoning into natural language chain-of-thought explanations, enabling compact models to acquire domain expertise and the ability to generate faithful, grounded explanations. Rather than distilling only final outputs, we capture the full reasoning process, transforming opaque expert computations into transparent, step-by-step explanations. We demonstrate this approach in chess, a canonical reasoning domain where language models continue to underperform. Our 4B parameter model, C1, advances from a near-zero baseline to 48.1% accuracy, outperforming all open-source models and most frontier proprietary systems. Notably, C1 surpasses its distillation teacher and generates solutions in two orders of magnitude fewer tokens than baselines. Unlike prior neural chess approaches that predict only best moves, C1 generates explainable solutions revealing strategic reasoning. Our pipeline combines supervised fine-tuning and reinforcement learning with theme-balanced data sampling for comprehensive tactical coverage. Master Distillation demonstrates how to inject expert-level knowledge into compact models for under-optimized domains, offering a recipe for unlocking RLVR where LLMs lack sufficient base capabilities.

AI.tldr: 提出Master Distillation框架，将专家系统的推理过程蒸馏为自然语言思维链，使小型语言模型获得领域专业知识和可解释的推理能力，在象棋领域实现显著性能提升
AI.motivation: 语言模型在专业领域（如象棋）缺乏基础推理能力，而专家系统虽然擅长但推理过程不透明。需要一种方法将专家系统的推理知识注入到紧凑的语言模型中，使其既能获得专业能力又能生成可解释的推理过程。
AI.method: 提出Master Distillation框架：1）将专家系统的不透明计算转化为透明的逐步解释；2）不仅蒸馏最终输出，还捕捉完整的推理过程；3）结合监督微调和强化学习；4）使用主题平衡数据采样确保全面的战术覆盖。
AI.result: 4B参数的C1模型在象棋任务中从接近零基线提升到48.1%准确率，超越所有开源模型和大多数前沿专有系统。C1甚至超越了其蒸馏教师，且生成解决方案所需的token数量比基线少两个数量级。模型不仅能预测最佳走法，还能生成揭示战略推理的可解释解决方案。
AI.conclusion: Master Distillation展示了如何将专家级知识注入到紧凑模型中，为语言模型基础能力不足的领域提供了一种解锁RLVR（强化学习与价值推理）的配方，实现了专业领域中的可解释推理能力。

title: SymCircuit: Bayesian Structure Inference for Tractable Probabilistic Circuits via Entropy-Regularized Reinforcement Learning
summary: Probabilistic circuit (PC) structure learning is hampered by greedy algorithms that make irreversible, locally optimal decisions. We propose SymCircuit, which replaces greedy search with a learned generative policy trained via entropy-regularized reinforcement learning. Instantiating the RL-as-inference framework in the PC domain, we show the optimal policy is a tempered Bayesian posterior, recovering the exact posterior when the regularization temperature is set inversely proportional to the dataset size. The policy is implemented as SymFormer, a grammar-constrained autoregressive Transformer with tree-relative self-attention that guarantees valid circuits at every generation step. We introduce option-level REINFORCE, restricting gradient updates to structural decisions rather than all tokens, yielding an SNR (signal to noise ratio) improvement and >10 times sample efficiency gain on the NLTCS dataset. A three-layer uncertainty decomposition (structural via model averaging, parametric via the delta method, leaf via conjugate Dirichlet-Categorical propagation) is grounded in the multilinear polynomial structure of PC outputs. On NLTCS, SymCircuit closes 93% of the gap to LearnSPN; preliminary results on Plants (69 variables) suggest scalability.

AI.tldr: SymCircuit使用基于熵正则化强化学习的生成策略替代贪婪算法进行概率电路结构学习，通过Transformer架构保证每一步生成有效电路，在NLTCS数据集上显著提升性能。
AI.motivation: 概率电路结构学习受限于贪婪算法，这些算法做出不可逆的局部最优决策，限制了学习效果。
AI.method: 提出SymCircuit框架：1) 使用基于熵正则化强化学习的生成策略替代贪婪搜索；2) 实现为SymFormer，一个语法约束的自回归Transformer，具有树相对自注意力机制；3) 引入选项级REINFORCE算法，将梯度更新限制在结构决策而非所有token上；4) 基于概率电路的多线性多项式结构，提出三层不确定性分解。
AI.result: 在NLTCS数据集上，SymCircuit缩小了与LearnSPN之间93%的性能差距；在Plants数据集（69个变量）上的初步结果显示良好的可扩展性；选项级REINFORCE带来信噪比提升和超过10倍的样本效率增益。
AI.conclusion: SymCircuit通过将强化学习作为推理框架应用于概率电路领域，结合Transformer架构和不确定性分解，为概率电路结构学习提供了一种更有效且可扩展的方法。

title: On hyperbolic PDEs, filtered feedback control laws, and fractal-like stability crossing curves
summary: The paper addresses the boundary control of a class of hyperbolic PDEs, based on an equivalent representation in terms of an integral-difference equation. The situation is considered where direct compensation of reflection terms induces a fragile closed-loop system, in the sense of lack of strong stability. This is theoretically resolved by adding a low-pass filter to the control law, but the choice of its cut-off frequency is crucial in balancing robustness at high frequencies and performance at low frequencies. First, the maximum stability interval in parameter $T$ is determined, with $T$ the inverse of the filter's cutoff frequency. Next, model mismatch on the PDE parameters is considered and a sufficient stability condition is derived in terms of allowable mismatch and cut-off frequency, satisfied in a region in the combined parameter space with a conic shape around $T=0$. Finally, this qualitative behavior is confirmed by exact stability charts for a special case where all model mismatch is contained into one parameter. It is highlighted that the set of stability crossing curves exhibits a fractal-like structure, which is explained using a limit system with discrete delays.

AI.tldr: 本文研究一类双曲型PDE的边界控制问题，通过积分-差分方程表示，解决直接补偿反射项导致的系统脆弱性问题。通过引入低通滤波器，在参数T（滤波器截止频率的倒数）的最大稳定区间内平衡高频鲁棒性和低频性能，并分析模型失配下的稳定性条件。
AI.motivation: 双曲型PDE边界控制中，直接补偿反射项会导致闭环系统缺乏强稳定性，形成脆弱系统。需要找到既能保证稳定性又能维持性能的控制方法。
AI.method: 采用积分-差分方程表示双曲型PDE，在控制律中加入低通滤波器。首先确定参数T的最大稳定区间，然后分析PDE参数失配情况下的稳定性条件，推导出允许失配与截止频率的充分稳定性条件。
AI.result: 确定了滤波器参数T的最大稳定区间；推导了模型失配下的稳定性条件，在参数空间中形成以T=0为中心的锥形稳定区域；在特殊单参数失配情况下，稳定性穿越曲线呈现分形结构，可用离散时滞极限系统解释。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入低通滤波器可以有效解决双曲型PDE边界控制的稳定性问题，在参数T的适当选择下可以平衡鲁棒性与性能。模型失配分析提供了稳定性保证的定量条件，分形结构的发现揭示了系统稳定性的复杂本质。

title: Profiling learners' affective engagement: Emotion AI, intercultural pragmatics, and language learning
summary: Learning another language can be a highly emotional process, typically characterized by numerous frustrations and triumphs, big and small. For most learners, language learning does not follow a linear, predictable path, its zigzag course shaped by motivational (or demotivating) variables such as personal characteristics, teacher/peer relationships, learning materials, and dreams of a future L2 (second language) self. While some aspects of language learning (reading, grammar) are relatively mechanical, others can be stressful and unpredictable, especially conversing in the target language. That experience necessitates not only knowledge of structure and lexis, but also the ability to use the language in ways that are appropriate to the social and cultural context. A new opportunity to practice conversational abilities has arrived through the availability of AI chatbots, with both advantages (responsive, non-judgmental) and drawbacks (emotionally void, culturally biased). This column explores aspects of emotion as they arise in technology use and in particular how automatic emotion recognition and simulated human responsiveness in AI systems interface with language learning and the development of pragmatic and interactional competence. Emotion AI, the algorithmically driven interpretation of users' affective signals, has been seen as enabling greater personalized learning, adapting to perceived learner cognitive and emotional states. Others warn of emotional manipulation and inappropriate and ineffective user profiling

AI.tldr: 论文探讨语言学习中的情感因素，以及AI聊天机器人如何通过情感识别技术影响语言学习的情感体验和语用能力发展。
AI.motivation: 语言学习是一个充满情感波动的非线性过程，涉及动机、人际关系、学习材料等多种变量。传统语言学习中的口语交流尤其具有压力和不预测性，而新兴的AI聊天机器人提供了新的练习机会，但其情感识别和模拟响应功能对语言学习的影响值得深入研究。
AI.method: 通过分析情感在技术使用中的表现，特别是自动情感识别和AI系统模拟人类响应如何与语言学习、语用能力和互动能力发展相互作用。探讨情感AI（算法驱动的用户情感信号解释）在语言学习中的应用。
AI.result: AI聊天机器人在语言学习中具有响应迅速、无评判性等优势，但也存在情感空洞、文化偏见等缺点。情感AI被认为能实现更个性化的学习，适应学习者的认知和情感状态，但也可能带来情感操纵和不适当的用户画像风险。
AI.conclusion: 需要平衡AI技术在语言学习中的利弊，既要利用情感AI实现个性化学习，又要警惕其可能带来的情感操纵和文化偏见问题，确保技术真正促进语言学习者的语用和互动能力发展。

title: Gradient Descent with Projection Finds Over-Parameterized Neural Networks for Learning Low-Degree Polynomials with Nearly Minimax Optimal Rate
summary: We study the problem of learning a low-degree spherical polynomial of degree $k_0 = Θ(1) \ge 1$ defined on the unit sphere in $\RR^d$ by training an over-parameterized two-layer neural network with augmented feature in this paper. Our main result is the significantly improved sample complexity for learning such low-degree polynomials. We show that, for any regression risk $\eps \in (0, Θ(d^{-k_0})]$, an over-parameterized two-layer neural network trained by a novel Gradient Descent with Projection (GDP) requires a sample complexity of $n \asymp Θ( \log(4/δ) \cdot d^{k_0}/\eps)$ with probability $1-δ$ for $δ\in (0,1)$, in contrast with the representative sample complexity $Θ(d^{k_0} \max\set{\eps^{-2},\log d})$. Moreover, such sample complexity is nearly unimprovable since the trained network renders a nearly optimal rate of the nonparametric regression risk of the order $\log({4}/δ) \cdot Θ(d^{k_0}/{n})$ with probability at least $1-δ$. On the other hand, the minimax optimal rate for the regression risk with a kernel of rank $Θ(d^{k_0})$ is $Θ(d^{k_0}/{n})$, so that the rate of the nonparametric regression risk of the network trained by GDP is nearly minimax optimal. In the case that the ground truth degree $k_0$ is unknown, we present a novel and provable adaptive degree selection algorithm which identifies the true degree and achieves the same nearly optimal regression rate. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first time that a nearly optimal risk bound is obtained by training an over-parameterized neural network with a popular activation function (ReLU) and algorithmic guarantee for learning low-degree spherical polynomials. Due to the feature learning capability of GDP, our results are beyond the regular Neural Tangent Kernel (NTK) limit.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了使用过参数化两层神经网络学习单位球面上低阶球面多项式的问题，提出了GDP算法，显著降低了样本复杂度，达到了接近最优的回归风险率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法学习低阶球面多项式需要较高的样本复杂度（Θ(d^{k₀} max{ε⁻², log d})），本文旨在通过过参数化神经网络和新的训练算法显著降低样本复杂度，同时突破NTK的限制。
AI.method: 提出梯度下降投影算法（GDP），训练具有增强特征的过参数化两层ReLU神经网络。当真实阶数未知时，还提出了可证明的自适应阶数选择算法。
AI.result: GDP算法仅需n ≍ Θ(log(4/δ)·d^{k₀}/ε)的样本复杂度，达到了接近最优的非参数回归风险率log(4/δ)·Θ(d^{k₀}/n)，且该速率接近极小极大最优。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次通过训练过参数化ReLU神经网络获得了接近最优的风险界限，突破了NTK限制，为学习低阶球面多项式提供了高效的算法保证。

title: Physics-Informed Graph Neural Jump ODEs for Cascading Failure Prediction in Power Grids
summary: Cascading failures in power grids pose severe risks to infrastructure reliability, yet real-time prediction of their progression remains an open challenge. Physics-based simulators require minutes to hours per scenario, while existing graph neural network approaches treat cascading failures as static classification tasks, ignoring temporal evolution and physical laws. This paper proposes Physics-Informed Graph Neural Jump ODEs (PI-GN-JODE), combining an edge-conditioned graph neural network encoder, a Neural ODE for continuous power redistribution, a jump process handler for discrete relay trips, and Kirchhoff-based physics regularization. The model simultaneously predicts edge and node failure probabilities, severity classification, and demand not served, while an autoregressive extension enables round-by-round temporal cascade prediction. Evaluated on the IEEE 24-bus and 118-bus systems with 20,000 scenarios each, PI-GN-JODE achieves a Precision--Recall Area Under the Curve of 0.991 for edge failure detection, 0.973 for node failure detection, and a coefficient of determination of 0.951 for demand-not-served regression on the 118-bus system, outperforming a standard graph convolutional network baseline (0.948, 0.925, and 0.912, respectively). Ablation studies reveal that the four components function synergistically, with the physics-informed loss alone contributing +9.2 points to demand-not-served regression. Performance improves when scaling to larger grids, and the architecture achieves the highest balanced accuracy (0.996) on the PowerGraph benchmark using data from a different simulation framework.

AI.tldr: 提出PI-GN-JODE模型，结合图神经网络、神经ODE、跳跃过程和物理正则化，实时预测电网级联故障的时空演化，在IEEE标准系统上取得优异性能。
AI.motivation: 电网级联故障实时预测是重要挑战：物理模拟器耗时过长（分钟到小时），现有图神经网络方法将级联故障视为静态分类任务，忽略了时间演化和物理规律。
AI.method: 提出Physics-Informed Graph Neural Jump ODEs (PI-GN-JODE)：1) 边条件图神经网络编码器；2) 神经ODE用于连续功率再分配；3) 跳跃过程处理器处理离散继电器跳闸；4) 基于基尔霍夫定律的物理正则化。模型同时预测边/节点故障概率、严重程度分类和未满足需求，自回归扩展支持逐轮时间级联预测。
AI.result: 在IEEE 24总线和118总线系统（各20,000场景）上：PI-GN-JODE在118总线系统上取得边故障检测PR-AUC 0.991、节点故障检测0.973、未满足需求回归R² 0.951，优于标准图卷积网络基线（0.948、0.925、0.912）。消融研究显示四个组件协同工作，仅物理正则化损失就为未满足需求回归贡献+9.2分。扩展到更大电网性能提升，在PowerGraph基准上达到最高平衡准确率0.996。
AI.conclusion: PI-GN-JODE通过结合图神经网络、神经ODE、跳跃过程和物理约束，有效解决了电网级联故障的实时时空预测问题，在多个基准测试中表现出色，为电网可靠性分析提供了高效工具。

title: LLM-Driven Heuristic Synthesis for Industrial Process Control: Lessons from Hot Steel Rolling
summary: Industrial process control demands policies that are interpretable and auditable, requirements that black-box neural policies struggle to meet. We study an LLM-driven heuristic synthesis framework for hot steel rolling, in which a language model iteratively proposes and refines human-readable Python controllers using rich behavioral feedback from a physics-based simulator. The framework combines structured strategic ideation, executable code generation, and per-component feedback across diverse operating conditions to search over control logic for height reduction, interpass time, and rolling velocity. Our first contribution is an auditable controller-synthesis pipeline for industrial process control. The generated controllers are explicit programs accessible to expert review, and we pair them with an automated audit pipeline that formally verifies key safety and monotonicity properties for the best synthesized heuristic. Our second contribution is a principled budget allocation strategy for LLM-driven heuristic search: we show that Luby-style universal restarts -- originally developed for randomized algorithms -- transfer directly to this setting, eliminating the need for problem-specific budget tuning. A single 160-iteration Luby campaign approaches the hindsight-optimal budget allocation derived from 52 ad-hoc runs totalling 730 iterations.

AI.tldr: 提出一个基于LLM的工业过程控制启发式合成框架，用于热轧钢过程控制，生成可审计的Python控制器，并采用Luby式重启策略优化搜索预算分配。
AI.motivation: 工业过程控制需要可解释和可审计的策略，而黑盒神经网络策略难以满足这些要求。需要开发能够生成人类可读、可审计控制器的框架。
AI.method: 采用LLM驱动的启发式合成框架：语言模型迭代提出和精炼人类可读的Python控制器，利用基于物理的模拟器提供行为反馈。框架结合结构化战略构思、可执行代码生成和跨不同操作条件的组件级反馈，搜索高度缩减、道次间隔时间和轧制速度的控制逻辑。
AI.result: 1) 建立了可审计的控制器合成管道，生成的控制器是专家可审查的显式程序，并配有自动审计管道，可形式化验证最佳合成启发式的关键安全和单调性属性。2) 提出了LLM驱动启发式搜索的原则性预算分配策略：Luby式通用重启策略可直接应用于此设置，无需问题特定的预算调优。单个160次迭代的Luby活动接近从52个临时运行总计730次迭代得出的后见之明最优预算分配。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为工业过程控制开发了一个可审计的LLM驱动控制器合成框架，结合了可解释的代码生成和形式化验证，并展示了通用重启策略在优化搜索预算分配方面的有效性。

title: KV Cache Optimization Strategies for Scalable and Efficient LLM Inference
summary: The key-value (KV) cache is a foundational optimization in Transformer-based large language models (LLMs), eliminating redundant recomputation of past token representations during autoregressive generation. However, its memory footprint scales linearly with context length, imposing critical bottlenecks on GPU memory capacity, memory bandwidth, and inference throughput as production LLMs push context windows from thousands to millions of tokens. Efficient KV cache management has thus become a first-order challenge for scalable LLM deployment. This paper provides a systematic review of recent KV cache optimization techniques, organizing them into five principal directions: cache eviction, cache compression, hybrid memory solutions, novel attention mechanisms, and combination strategies. For each category we analyze the underlying mechanisms, deployment trade-offs, and empirical performance across memory reduction, throughput, and model accuracy metrics. We further map techniques to seven practical deployment scenarios, including long-context single requests, high-throughput datacenter serving, edge devices, multi-turn conversations, and accuracy-critical reasoning, providing actionable guidance for practitioners selecting among competing approaches. Our analysis reveals that no single technique dominates across all settings; instead, the optimal strategy depends on context length, hardware constraints, and workload characteristics, pointing toward adaptive, multi-stage optimization pipelines as a promising direction for future research.

AI.tldr: KV缓存优化技术综述：系统回顾五大方向（缓存驱逐、压缩、混合内存、新型注意力机制、组合策略），分析机制与权衡，为不同部署场景提供实践指导。
AI.motivation: Transformer大语言模型中的KV缓存虽然消除了过去token表示的重计算，但其内存占用随上下文长度线性增长，成为GPU内存容量、带宽和推理吞吐量的关键瓶颈，特别是当上下文窗口从数千扩展到数百万token时，高效KV缓存管理成为可扩展LLM部署的首要挑战。
AI.method: 对近期KV缓存优化技术进行系统性综述，将其组织为五大主要方向：缓存驱逐、缓存压缩、混合内存解决方案、新型注意力机制和组合策略。分析每类技术的底层机制、部署权衡和实证性能（内存减少、吞吐量、模型准确性）。
AI.result: 将技术映射到七种实际部署场景（长上下文单请求、高吞吐量数据中心服务、边缘设备、多轮对话、准确性关键推理等），为从业者选择竞争性方法提供可操作指导。分析显示没有单一技术在所有设置中占主导地位。
AI.conclusion: 最优策略取决于上下文长度、硬件约束和工作负载特性，指向自适应、多阶段优化管道作为未来研究的有前景方向。

title: Implicit Regularization of Large Neural Networks via Mean-Field Formulation
summary: We propose a mathematical framework to explain implicit regularization from early stopping during the training of overparametrized neural networks. In the mean-field limit, the parameter distribution evolves according to a gradient flow on the space of probability measures. We show that these dynamics admit an equivalent McKean-Vlasov stochastic control formulation through the corresponding Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman (HJB) equation. The control viewpoint yields a Dynamic Programming Principle (DPP), which we use to define a new metric on probability measures. This metric can be viewed as a mean-field generalization of the control representation of the Wasserstein-2 distance, and it naturally appears as a regularization term selected by early stopping. We further obtain non-asymptotic bounds describing how the induced regularization depends on the stopping time.

AI.tldr: 提出一个数学框架解释过参数化神经网络训练中早停的隐式正则化，通过平均场极限将参数分布演化建模为概率测度空间上的梯度流，并建立与McKean-Vlasov随机控制的等价性。
AI.motivation: 解释过参数化神经网络训练中早停现象产生的隐式正则化机制，为理解深度学习中的正则化效应提供理论框架。
AI.method: 在平均场极限下，将参数分布演化建模为概率测度空间上的梯度流，建立与McKean-Vlasov随机控制的等价性，通过Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman方程推导动态规划原理，定义新的概率测度度量。
AI.result: 获得了一个新的概率测度度量，可视为Wasserstein-2距离控制表示的平均场推广，该度量自然作为早停选择的隐式正则化项出现，并得到了描述正则化与停止时间依赖关系的非渐近界。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为理解神经网络训练中早停的隐式正则化提供了理论解释，将早停效应量化为概率测度空间上的正则化项，并建立了与随机控制理论的联系。

title: Revenue-Sharing as Infrastructure: A Distributed Business Model for Generative AI Platforms
summary: Generative AI platforms (Google AI Studio, OpenAI, Anthropic) provide infrastructures (APIs, models) that are transforming the application development ecosystem. Recent literature distinguishes three generations of business models: a first generation modeled on cloud computing (pay-per-use), a second characterized by diversification (freemium, subscriptions), and a third, emerging generation exploring multi-layer market architectures with revenue-sharing mechanisms. Despite these advances, current models impose a financial barrier to entry for developers, limiting innovation and excluding actors from emerging economies. This paper proposes and analyzes an original model, "Revenue-Sharing as Infrastructure" (RSI), where the platform offers its AI infrastructure for free and takes a percentage of the revenues generated by developers applications. This model reverses the traditional upstream payment logic and mobilizes concepts of value co-creation, incentive mechanisms, and multi-layer market architecture to build an original theoretical framework. A detailed comparative analysis shows that the RSI model lowers entry barriers for developers, aligns stakeholder interests, and could stimulate innovation in the ecosystem. Beyond its economic relevance, RSI has a major societal dimension: by enabling developers without initial capital to participate in the digital economy, it could unlock the "latent jobs dividend" in low-income countries, where mobile penetration reaches 84%, and help address local challenges in health, agriculture, and services. Finally, we discuss the conditions of feasibility and strategic implications for platforms and developers.

AI.tldr: 论文提出"收入分成即基础设施"(RSI)模型，让AI平台免费提供基础设施，从开发者应用收入中分成，降低开发门槛并促进创新。
AI.motivation: 当前AI平台的商业模式（按使用付费、订阅制等）对开发者设置了财务门槛，限制了创新，并排除了新兴经济体的参与者。需要一种更包容的商业模式来降低进入壁垒。
AI.method: 提出RSI模型理论框架，结合价值共创、激励机制和多层市场架构概念。通过详细的比较分析，评估该模型对开发者进入门槛、利益相关者利益协调和生态系统创新的影响。
AI.result: RSI模型能显著降低开发者进入门槛，更好协调利益相关者利益，并能刺激生态系统创新。该模型还具有重要社会意义，能让无初始资本的开发者参与数字经济，释放低收入国家的"潜在就业红利"。
AI.conclusion: RSI模型是一种有前景的替代商业模式，能解决当前AI平台的经济和社会限制。论文讨论了该模型的可行性条件和平台与开发者的战略影响，强调了其在促进包容性数字经济发展方面的潜力。

title: Stochastic approximation in non-markovian environments revisited
summary: Based on some recent work of the author on stochastic approximation in non-markovian environments, the situation when the driving random process is non-ergodic in addition to being non-markovian is considered. Using this, we propose an analytic framework for understanding transformer based learning, specifically, the `attention' mechanism, and continual learning, both of which depend on the entire past in principle.

AI.tldr: 该论文基于作者近期在非马尔可夫环境中的随机逼近研究，探讨了驱动随机过程既非马尔可夫又非遍历的情况，并提出了一个分析框架来理解基于transformer的学习（特别是注意力机制）和持续学习。
AI.motivation: 现有随机逼近理论主要针对马尔可夫或遍历过程，但transformer的注意力机制和持续学习本质上依赖于整个历史，属于非马尔可夫且可能非遍历的过程，需要新的理论框架来分析这类学习问题。
AI.method: 基于作者在非马尔可夫环境中随机逼近的最新工作，扩展考虑驱动随机过程既非马尔可夫又非遍历的情况，构建一个统一的分析框架来研究transformer注意力机制和持续学习。
AI.result: 提出了一个能够处理非马尔可夫且非遍历随机过程的理论框架，为分析transformer注意力机制和持续学习提供了数学基础，这些学习问题都依赖于整个历史信息。
AI.conclusion: 该研究扩展了随机逼近理论到非遍历非马尔可夫环境，为理解transformer学习和持续学习提供了新的理论视角，这些学习过程本质上依赖于整个历史而非仅当前状态。

title: Koopman Meets Discrete-Time Control Barrier Functions: A Linear Model Predictive Control Framework
summary: This paper proposes a Koopman-based linear model predictive control (LMPC) framework for safety-critical control of nonlinear discrete-time systems. Existing MPC formulations based on discrete-time control barrier functions (DCBFs) enforce safety through barrier constraints but typically result in computationally demanding nonlinear programming. To address this challenge, we construct a DCBF-augmented dynamical system and employ Koopman operator theory to lift the nonlinear dynamics into a higher-dimensional space where both the system dynamics and the barrier function admit a linear predictor representation. This enables the transformation of the nonlinear safety-constrained MPC problem into a quadratic program (QP). To improve feasibility while preserving safety, a relaxation mechanism with slack variables is introduced for the barrier constraints. The resulting approach combines the modeling capability of Koopman operators with the computational efficiency of QP. Numerical simulations on a navigation task for a robot with nonlinear dynamics demonstrate that the proposed framework achieves safe trajectory generation and efficient real-time control.

AI.tldr: 提出基于Koopman算子的线性模型预测控制框架，将非线性系统的安全约束MPC问题转化为二次规划问题，提高计算效率。
AI.motivation: 现有基于离散时间控制屏障函数（DCBF）的MPC方法虽然能保证安全，但通常导致计算密集的非线性规划问题，难以实时应用。
AI.method: 构建DCBF增强的动力系统，利用Koopman算子理论将非线性动力学提升到高维空间，使系统动力学和屏障函数都获得线性预测表示，从而将非线性安全约束MPC转化为二次规划问题，并引入松弛机制提高可行性。
AI.result: 在具有非线性动力学的机器人导航任务数值模拟中，该框架实现了安全轨迹生成和高效的实时控制。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架结合了Koopman算子的建模能力和二次规划的计算效率，为非线性系统的安全关键控制提供了有效的解决方案。

title: Abjad-Kids: An Arabic Speech Classification Dataset for Primary Education
summary: Speech-based AI educational applications have gained significant interest in recent years, particularly for children. However, children speech research remains limited due to the lack of publicly available datasets, especially for low-resource languages such as Arabic.This paper presents Abjad-Kids, an Arabic speech dataset designed for kindergarten and primary education, focusing on fundamental learning of alphabets, numbers, and colors. The dataset consists of 46397 audio samples collected from children aged 3 - 12 years, covering 141 classes. All samples were recorded under controlled specifications to ensure consistency in duration, sampling rate, and format. To address high intra-class similarity among Arabic phonemes and the limited samples per class, we propose a hierarchical audio classification based on CNN-LSTM architectures. Our proposed methodology decomposes alphabet recognition into a two-stage process: an initial grouping classification model followed by specialized classifiers for each group. Both strategies: static linguistic-based grouping and dynamic clustering-based grouping, were evaluated. Experimental results demonstrate that static linguistic-based grouping achieves superior performance. Comparisons between traditional machine learning with deep learning approaches, highlight the effectiveness of CNN-LSTM models combined with data augmentation. Despite achieving promising results, most of our experiments indicate a challenge with overfitting, which is likely due to the limited number of samples, even after data augmentation and model regularization. Thus, future work may focus on collecting additional data to address this issue. Abjad-Kids will be publicly available.
