We hope that Abjad-Kids enrich children representation in speech dataset, and be a good resource for future research in Arabic speech classification for kids.

AI.tldr: 提出了Abjad-Kids阿拉伯语儿童语音数据集，包含46397个3-12岁儿童的音频样本，涵盖141个类别，用于字母、数字和颜色学习。提出了基于CNN-LSTM的分层音频分类方法，通过静态语言学分组获得最佳性能。
AI.motivation: 阿拉伯语等低资源语言的儿童语音研究因缺乏公开数据集而受限，特别是针对幼儿园和小学教育的基础学习内容（字母、数字、颜色）。
AI.method: 1) 创建Abjad-Kids数据集：46397个音频样本，3-12岁儿童，141个类别，统一录音规格；2) 提出分层音频分类：基于CNN-LSTM架构，将字母识别分解为两阶段过程：初始分组分类模型 + 每组专用分类器；3) 评估两种分组策略：静态语言学分组和动态聚类分组。
AI.result: 静态语言学分组策略表现最佳。CNN-LSTM模型结合数据增强优于传统机器学习方法。尽管结果有希望，但大多数实验出现过拟合问题，主要原因是样本数量有限。
AI.conclusion: Abjad-Kids数据集将公开提供，有望丰富儿童语音数据表示，成为阿拉伯语儿童语音分类研究的良好资源。未来工作需要收集更多数据来解决过拟合问题。

title: Context Cartography: Toward Structured Governance of Contextual Space in Large Language Model Systems
summary:
The prevailing approach to improving large language model (LLM) reasoning has centered on expanding context windows, implicitly assuming that more tokens yield better performance. However, empirical evidence - including the "lost in the middle" effect and long-distance relational degradation - demonstrates that contextual space exhibits structural gradients, salience asymmetries, and entropy accumulation under transformer architectures.
  We introduce Context Cartography, a formal framework for the deliberate governance of contextual space. We define a tripartite zonal model partitioning the informational universe into black fog (unobserved), gray fog (stored memory), and the visible field (active reasoning surface), and formalize seven cartographic operators - reconnaissance, selection, simplification, aggregation, projection, displacement, and layering - as transformations governing information transitions between and within zones. The operators are derived from a systematic coverage analysis of all non-trivial zone transformations and are organized by transformation type (what the operator does) and zone scope (where it applies).
  We ground the framework in the salience geometry of transformer attention, characterizing cartographic operators as necessary compensations for linear prefix memory, append-only state, and entropy accumulation under expanding context. An analysis of four contemporary systems (Claude Code, Letta, MemOS, and OpenViking) provides interpretive evidence that these operators are converging independently across the industry.
  We derive testable predictions from the framework - including operator-specific ablation hypotheses - and propose a diagnostic benchmark for empirical validation.

AI.tldr: 论文提出"上下文制图"框架，将信息空间分为黑雾、灰雾和可见场三个区域，并定义七种制图算子来管理信息在不同区域间的转换，以解决大语言模型在长上下文中的结构梯度、显著性不对称和熵积累问题。
AI.motivation: 当前改进大语言模型推理的主流方法是扩展上下文窗口，但实证证据表明上下文空间存在结构梯度、显著性不对称和熵积累问题（如"迷失在中间"效应和长距离关系退化），需要更精细的上下文管理框架。
AI.method: 提出上下文制图框架，将信息空间划分为黑雾（未观察）、灰雾（存储记忆）和可见场（主动推理表面）三个区域，定义七种制图算子（侦察、选择、简化、聚合、投影、位移、分层）作为信息在区域间转换的变换操作。
AI.result: 框架基于Transformer注意力显著性几何学，将制图算子形式化为对线性前缀记忆、仅追加状态和熵积累的必要补偿。对四个当代系统（Claude Code、Letta、MemOS、OpenViking）的分析显示这些算子在行业中独立收敛。
AI.conclusion: 上下文制图提供了一种形式化框架来治理上下文空间，提出了可测试的预测和诊断基准，为改进大语言模型的长上下文推理提供了理论基础和实用工具。

title: Putnam 2025 Problems in Rocq using Opus 4.6 and Rocq-MCP
summary: We report on an experiment in which Claude Opus~4.6, equipped with a suite of Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools for the Rocq proof assistant, autonomously proved 10 of 12 problems from the 2025 Putnam Mathematical Competition. The MCP tools, designed with Claude by analyzing logs from a prior experiment on miniF2F-Rocq, encode a "compile-first, interactive-fallback" strategy. Running on an isolated VM with no internet access, the agent deployed 141 subagents over 17.7 hours of active compute (51.6h wall-clock), consuming approximately 1.9 billion tokens. All proofs are publicly available.

AI.tldr: Claude Opus 4.6 使用 Rocq 证明助手的 MCP 工具，在隔离环境中自主证明了 2025 年 Putnam 数学竞赛 12 道题中的 10 道，展示了 AI 在形式化数学证明方面的能力。
AI.motivation: 探索大型语言模型在形式化数学证明中的能力，特别是使用 Rocq 证明助手和 MCP 工具来自主解决 Putnam 竞赛级别的高难度数学问题。
AI.method: 使用 Claude Opus 4.6 模型，配备专门为 Rocq 证明助手设计的 Model Context Protocol (MCP) 工具，采用"先编译、交互式回退"策略。在隔离的虚拟机环境中运行，无互联网访问，通过部署多个子代理进行证明。
AI.result: 在 17.7 小时有效计算时间（51.6 小时挂钟时间）内，部署了 141 个子代理，消耗约 19 亿 tokens，成功证明了 2025 年 Putnam 数学竞赛 12 道题中的 10 道。所有证明都已公开可用。
AI.conclusion: 该实验展示了大型语言模型结合专门设计的证明工具在解决高难度数学问题方面的显著能力，为 AI 在形式化数学证明领域的应用提供了重要实证。

title: Unfolding with a Wasserstein Loss
summary:
Data unfolding -- the removal of noise or artifacts from measurements -- is a fundamental task across the experimental sciences. Of particular interest are applications in physics, where the dominant approach is Richardson-Lucy (RL) deconvolution. The classical RL approach aims to find denoised data that, once passed through the noise model, is as close as possible to the measured data in terms of Kullback-Leibler (KL) divergence. This requires that the support of the measured data overlaps with the output of the noise model, a hypothesis typically enforced by binning, which introduces numerical error.
  As a counterpoint, the present work studies an alternative formulation using a Wasserstein loss. We establish sharp conditions for existence and uniqueness of optimizers, answering open questions of Li, et al., regarding necessary conditions for existence and uniqueness in the case of transport map noise models. We then develop a provably convergent generalized Sinkhorn algorithm to compute approximate optimizers. Our algorithm requires only empirical observations of the noise model and measured data and scales with the size of the data, rather than the ambient dimension. Numerical experiments on one- and two-dimensional problems inspired by jet mass unfolding in particle physics demonstrate that the optimal transport approach offers robust, accurate performance compared to classical RL deconvolution, particularly when binning artifacts are significant.

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用Wasserstein损失替代传统KL散度进行数据反卷积，解决了Richardson-Lucy方法中因分箱导致的数值误差问题，为粒子物理等领域的数据展开提供了更稳健的解决方案。
AI.motivation: 传统Richardson-Lucy反卷积方法使用KL散度，要求测量数据与噪声模型输出的支撑集重叠，通常通过分箱实现，但这会引入数值误差。需要寻找更稳健的替代方法。
AI.method: 采用Wasserstein损失替代KL散度，建立最优解存在性和唯一性的严格条件，开发可证明收敛的广义Sinkhorn算法，仅需噪声模型和测量数据的经验观测，计算复杂度与数据规模而非环境维度相关。
AI.result: 建立了最优解存在性和唯一性的充分必要条件，回答了Li等人的开放性问题。数值实验表明，在粒子物理喷注质量反卷积等一维和二维问题上，最优传输方法相比传统RL反卷积具有更稳健、准确的性能，特别是在分箱伪影显著时。
AI.conclusion: 基于Wasserstein损失的最优传输方法为数据反卷积提供了有前景的替代方案，解决了传统RL方法的分箱限制，在物理等实验科学中具有应用潜力。

title: Global Cybercrime Damages: A Baseline for Frontier AI Risk Assessment
summary: AI companies and governments are increasingly concerned about frontier AI systems enabling cybercrime, yet defining meaningful capability thresholds requires knowing the scale of cybercrime today. Current estimates of global cybercrime damages vary from tens of billions to tens of trillions of dollars, with little systematic evaluation of their reliability. We establish a more rigorous baseline by surveying 27 existing estimates, critically evaluating their methodologies, and constructing a composite estimate from three independent sources: a nationally representative UK business victimization survey scaled globally, US individual victimization data scaled globally, and global cybersecurity spending figures. Large-sample victimization surveys capture losses directly from victims, avoiding both the reporting bias in law enforcement and industry databases and the heavy modeling assumptions of macroeconomic approaches. We focus on quantifiable economic damages -- direct losses, response costs, and defense spending -- excluding harder-to-measure costs such as intellectual property theft and reputational damage. We estimate total global cybercrime damages at approximately \$500 billion USD annually (90% CI: \$100 billion-\$1 trillion). At this baseline, an AI-driven increase of about 20% would add \$100 billion or more, reaching thresholds some companies identify as warranting additional mitigations. However, cybercrime data remains too incomplete for such incremental increases to be directly detectable, and defensive applications of AI may partially offset offensive gains. Our methodology narrows plausible damage estimates from multiple orders of magnitude to a more confident baseline, providing a foundation for decision-making about AI-related cybercrime risk.

AI.tldr: 全球网络犯罪年度经济损失约为5000亿美元，为AI相关网络犯罪风险评估提供基准
AI.motivation: 现有网络犯罪损失估计差异巨大（从数百亿到数万亿美元），缺乏系统评估，难以确定AI能力的有意义阈值，需要建立更可靠的基准
AI.method: 调查27个现有估计，批判性评估其方法学，从三个独立来源构建复合估计：英国全国代表性企业受害调查全球扩展、美国个人受害数据全球扩展、全球网络安全支出数据
AI.result: 估计全球网络犯罪年度经济损失约为5000亿美元（90%置信区间：1000亿-1万亿美元），将合理估计范围从多个数量级缩小到更可靠的基准
AI.conclusion: 该基准为AI相关网络犯罪风险决策提供基础，但当前数据仍不足以直接检测AI带来的增量变化，且AI的防御应用可能部分抵消攻击收益

title: Time-adaptive functional Gaussian Process regression
summary: This paper proposes a new formulation of functional Gaussian Process regression in manifolds, based on an Empirical Bayes approach, in the spatiotemporal random field context. We apply the machinery of tight Gaussian measures in separable Hilbert spaces, exploiting the invariance property of covariance kernels under the group of isometries of the manifold. The identification of these measures with infinite-product Gaussian measures is then obtained via the eigenfunctions of the Laplace-Beltrami operator on the manifold. The involved time-varying angular spectra constitute the key tool for dimension reduction in the implementation of this regression approach, adopting a suitable truncation scheme depending on the functional sample size. The simulation study and synthetic data application undertaken illustrate the finite sample and asymptotic properties of the proposed functional regression predictor.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于经验贝叶斯方法的流形上函数高斯过程回归新框架，利用流形等距群下协方差核的不变性，通过拉普拉斯-贝尔特拉米算子的特征函数实现降维。
AI.motivation: 在时空随机场背景下，需要发展适用于流形结构的函数高斯过程回归方法，以处理复杂几何结构的数据分析问题。
AI.method: 采用经验贝叶斯方法，利用可分离希尔伯特空间中紧高斯测度理论，结合流形等距群下协方差核的不变性，通过拉普拉斯-贝尔特拉米算子的特征函数将测度识别为无限乘积高斯测度，使用时变角谱进行降维实现。
AI.result: 模拟研究和合成数据应用验证了所提函数回归预测器的有限样本和渐近性质，展示了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为流形上的函数高斯过程回归提供了新的理论框架和实用实现方法，在复杂几何结构数据分析中具有应用潜力。

title: Multidimensional Opinion Dynamics with Confirmation Bias: A Multi-Layer Framework
comment: 12 pages, 9 figures. Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Control of Network Systems (TCNS)
summary: We study multidimensional opinion dynamics under confirmation bias in social networks. Each agent holds a vector of correlated opinions across multiple topic layers. Peer interaction is modeled through a static, informationally symmetric social channel, while external information enters through a dynamic, informationally asymmetric source channel. Source influence is described by nonnegative state-dependent functions of agent--source opinion mismatch, which captures confirmation bias without hard thresholds. For general Lipschitz source-influence functions, we give sufficient conditions under which the dynamics are contractive and converge to a unique steady state independent of the initial condition. For affine confirmation-bias functions, we show that the steady state can be computed through a finite sign-consistency search and identify a regime in which it admits a closed form. For broader classes of bounded nonlinear source-influence functions, we derive explicit lower and upper bounds on the fixed point. Numerical examples and a study on a real-world adolescent lifestyle network illustrate the role of multidimensional coupling and show that source-design conclusions can change qualitatively when confirmation bias is ignored.

AI.tldr: 研究社交网络中具有确认偏误的多维观点动力学，提出收敛条件和稳态分析框架
AI.motivation: 研究多维观点在社交网络中的演化，考虑确认偏误对观点形成的影响，分析外部信息源如何通过不对称渠道影响个体观点
AI.method: 建立多维观点动力学模型，包含静态对称的社交互动和动态不对称的外部信息源，使用非负状态依赖函数描述确认偏误，分析Lipschitz源影响函数的收敛性
AI.result: 对于一般Lipschitz函数给出收缩性和收敛条件；对于仿射确认偏误函数，稳态可通过有限符号一致性搜索计算；对非线性函数给出稳态的上下界
AI.conclusion: 多维耦合在观点形成中起关键作用，忽略确认偏误会导致源设计结论发生质变，模型为分析社交网络中的观点极化提供了理论框架

title: SciNav: A General Agent Framework for Scientific Coding Tasks
summary: Autonomous science agents built on large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used to generate hypotheses, design experiments, and produce reports. However, prior work mainly targets open-ended scientific problems with subjective outputs that are difficult to evaluate. Scientific coding benchmarks, by contrast, provide executable outputs for objective assessment. Existing approaches remain engineering-driven pipelines, revealing the need for structured, end-to-end science agent frameworks for scientific coding tasks. We address this gap by focusing on scientific coding tasks, where evaluation can be made rigorously, and introducing an agent framework SciNav (Scientific Navigator) that enables more effective solution exploration. Our framework is designed to operate under constrained search budgets, moving beyond reliance on pre-defined success metrics and prolonged search cycles. Inspired by findings that comparative judgments often reveal finer-grained quality differences and therefore provide greater discriminative power than absolute scoring, our framework leverages pairwise relative judgments within a tree search process to select top-K promising solution branches, prune low-potential ones, and progressively narrow down the solution candidates on the selected branches guided by relative comparisons. We demonstrate our agent's effectiveness across different types of tasks on two benchmarks. Experiments show that SciNav significantly outperforms direct prompting and prior agents like OpenHands and Self-Debug across different base models, task types, and difficulty levels, and exceeds different frontier comparators such as random selection and LLM absolute scoring. These results confirm the strength of our agent design and highlight the effectiveness of relative judgment-guided top-K search for high-quality scientific coding, marking a step toward more practical science agents.

AI.tldr: SciNav是一个基于相对判断的树搜索框架，用于科学编码任务，通过比较评估而非绝对评分来高效探索解决方案。
AI.motivation: 现有科学代理主要针对主观输出难以评估的开放性问题，而科学编码任务可提供可执行输出进行客观评估。现有方法多为工程驱动管道，缺乏结构化、端到端的科学代理框架，特别是在有限搜索预算下有效探索解决方案的需求。
AI.method: SciNav框架利用相对判断的树搜索过程：通过成对比较揭示细粒度质量差异，选择前K个有希望的解决方案分支，修剪低潜力分支，并在选定分支上基于相对比较逐步缩小候选方案范围。
AI.result: 在两个基准测试的不同任务类型上，SciNav显著优于直接提示和OpenHands、Self-Debug等现有代理，在不同基础模型、任务类型和难度级别上均表现优异，超越了随机选择和LLM绝对评分等比较方法。
AI.conclusion: SciNav证明了相对判断引导的top-K搜索在高质量科学编码中的有效性，其代理设计优势显著，标志着向更实用的科学代理迈出了一步。

title: Position: Multi-Agent Algorithmic Care Systems Demand Contestability for Trustworthy AI
summary: Multi-agent systems (MAS) are increasingly used in healthcare to support complex decision-making through collaboration among specialized agents. Because these systems act as collective decision-makers, they raise challenges for trust, accountability, and human oversight. Existing approaches to trustworthy AI largely rely on explainability, but explainability alone is insufficient in multi-agent settings, as it does not enable care partners to challenge or correct system outputs. To address this limitation, Contestable AI (CAI) characterizes systems that support effective human challenge throughout the decision-making lifecycle by providing transparency, structured opportunities for intervention, and mechanisms for review, correction, or override. This position paper argues that contestability is a necessary design requirement for trustworthy multi-agent algorithmic care systems. We identify key limitations in current MAS and Explainable AI (XAI) research and present a human-in-the-loop framework that integrates structured argumentation and role-based contestation to preserve human agency, clinical responsibility, and trust in high-stakes care contexts.

AI.tldr: 该立场论文主张可争议性是可信赖多智能体医疗系统的必要设计需求，通过整合结构化论证和基于角色的争议机制来支持人类挑战和干预。
AI.motivation: 多智能体系统在医疗决策中应用日益广泛，但现有可信AI方法主要依赖可解释性，这在多智能体环境中不足以支持护理伙伴挑战或纠正系统输出，导致信任、问责和人类监督方面的挑战。
AI.method: 提出一个人类在环框架，整合结构化论证和基于角色的争议机制，提供透明度、结构化干预机会以及审查、纠正或覆盖的机制，支持在整个决策生命周期中进行有效的人类挑战。
AI.result: 识别了当前多智能体系统和可解释AI研究的关键局限性，提出了可争议AI作为可信赖多智能体算法护理系统的必要设计原则。
AI.conclusion: 可争议性是高风险医疗环境中可信赖多智能体系统的关键设计需求，能够保持人类能动性、临床责任和信任，超越单纯的可解释性方法。

title: Thinking in Different Spaces: Domain-Specific Latent Geometry Survives Cross-Architecture Translation
summary: We investigate whether independently trained language models converge to geometrically compatible latent representations, and whether this compatibility can be exploited to correct model behavior at inference time without any weight updates. We learn a linear projection matrix that maps activation vectors from a large teacher model into the coordinate system of a smaller student model, then intervene on the student's residual stream during generation by substituting its internal state with the translated teacher representation. Across a fully crossed experimental matrix of 20 heterogeneous teacher-student pairings spanning mixture-of-experts, dense, code-specialized, and synthetically trained architectures, the Ridge projection consistently achieves R^2 = 0.50 on verbal reasoning and R^2 = 0.40 on mathematical reasoning, collapsing to R^2 = -0.22 under permutation control and R^2 = 0.01 under L_1 regularization. Behavioral correction rates range from 14.0% to 50.0% on TruthfulQA (mean 25.2%) and from 8.5% to 43.3% on GSM8K arithmetic reasoning (mean 25.5%), demonstrating that the method generalizes across fundamentally different reasoning domains. We report a near-zero correlation between geometric alignment quality and behavioral correction rate (r = -0.07), revealing a dissociation between representation space fidelity and output space impact. Intervention strength is architecture-specific: student models exhibit characteristic sensitivity profiles that invert across domains, with the most steerable verbal student becoming the least steerable mathematical student. Finally, a double dissociation experiment conducted across all 20 model pairings confirms without exception that projection matrices collapse catastrophically when transferred across reasoning domains (mean R^2 = -3.83 in both transfer directions), establishing domain-specific subspace geometry as a universal property of LMs.

AI.tldr: 研究发现独立训练的语言模型具有几何兼容的潜在表示，可通过线性投影将教师模型激活映射到学生模型坐标系，在推理时干预学生模型状态以修正行为，无需权重更新。
AI.motivation: 探究独立训练的语言模型是否收敛到几何兼容的潜在表示，以及这种兼容性能否在推理时被利用来修正模型行为，而无需权重更新。
AI.method: 学习线性投影矩阵将大型教师模型的激活向量映射到小型学生模型的坐标系，然后在生成过程中干预学生的残差流，用转换后的教师表示替换其内部状态。
AI.result: 在20种异构教师-学生配对实验中，Ridge投影在语言推理上达到R^2=0.50，数学推理上R^2=0.40；行为修正率在TruthfulQA上为14.0%-50.0%（平均25.2%），在GSM8K上为8.5%-43.3%（平均25.5%）。几何对齐质量与行为修正率相关性接近零（r=-0.07）。
AI.conclusion: 语言模型具有领域特定的子空间几何结构，这是其普遍属性。表示空间保真度与输出空间影响之间存在分离，干预效果具有架构特异性，且投影矩阵在不同推理领域间无法迁移。

title: Mirror-Free Proximal Methods
summary: We present a \emph{mirror-free} mirror prox (MFMP) algorithm, which extends the classic approach of Nemirovski (2004) to allow for proximal-like updates without the explicit need for a mirror map. We further analyze the convergence of our method under suitable notions of relative smoothness and relative Lipschitzness, for which we introduce a relaxation of the standard Bregman divergence in terms of more general potential operators. Finally, we show how a strongly monotone variant of our method allows us to solve regularized Taylor-expansion subproblems that appear in both second- and third-order smooth min-max optimization.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种无需镜像映射的镜像近端算法（MFMP），扩展了经典方法，在相对光滑性和相对Lipschitz条件下分析收敛性，并展示了其在二阶和三阶平滑极小极大优化中的应用。
AI.motivation: 经典镜像近端算法需要显式的镜像映射，这限制了其应用范围。本文旨在开发一种无需镜像映射的算法，扩展经典方法，使其能处理更一般的优化问题。
AI.method: 提出了镜像自由镜像近端算法（MFMP），使用更一般的势能算子来松弛标准Bregman散度，在相对光滑性和相对Lipschitz条件下分析收敛性，并开发了强单调变体来解决正则化泰勒展开子问题。
AI.result: 成功扩展了经典镜像近端方法，使其无需显式镜像映射，在相对光滑性和相对Lipschitz条件下建立了收敛性理论，并展示了算法在二阶和三阶平滑极小极大优化中的应用能力。
AI.conclusion: MFMP算法有效扩展了经典镜像近端方法，通过消除对显式镜像映射的需求，为更广泛的优化问题提供了新的解决方案，特别是在高阶平滑极小极大优化中具有应用潜力。

title: Artificial Intelligence in Experimental Approaches: Growth Hacking, Lean Startup, Design Thinking, and Agile
summary: Organizations increasingly adopt AI technologies to accelerate their performance and capacity to adapt to market dynamics. This study examines how organizations implement AI in experimental methodologies such as growth hacking, lean startup, design thinking, and agile methodology to enhance efficiency and effectiveness. We performed a systematic literature review following the PRISMA 2020 framework, analyzing 37 articles from Web of Science (WOS) and Scopus databases published between 2018 and 2024 to assess AI integration with experimental approaches. Our findings indicate that AI plays a pivotal role in enhancing these methodologies by offering advanced tools for data analysis, real-time feedback, automation, and process optimization. For instance, AI-driven analytics improves decision-making in growth hacking, streamlines iterative cycles in lean startups, enhances creativity in design thinking, and optimizes task prioritization in agile methodology. Furthermore, we identified several real-world cases that successfully utilized AI in experimental strategies and improved their performance across various industries. However, despite the clear advantages of AI integration, organizations face barriers such as skill gaps, ethical concerns, and data governance issues. Addressing these challenges requires a strategic approach to AI adoption, including workforce training, strict data management, and following ethical standards.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过系统文献综述分析了AI如何与增长黑客、精益创业、设计思维和敏捷方法等实验方法结合，发现AI通过数据分析、实时反馈、自动化和流程优化增强这些方法，但也面临技能缺口、伦理问题和数据治理等挑战。
AI.motivation: 随着组织越来越多地采用AI技术来提升绩效和适应市场动态，本研究旨在探讨AI如何与实验方法（增长黑客、精益创业、设计思维、敏捷方法）结合，以增强组织的效率和效果。
AI.method: 采用PRISMA 2020框架进行系统文献综述，分析了2018-2024年间Web of Science和Scopus数据库中的37篇文章，评估AI与实验方法的整合情况。
AI.result: 研究发现AI在增强实验方法中发挥关键作用：在增长黑客中改进决策，在精益创业中优化迭代周期，在设计思维中增强创造力，在敏捷方法中优化任务优先级。同时识别了多个成功应用AI的实验策略案例，但也发现了技能缺口、伦理问题和数据治理等障碍。
AI.conclusion: 尽管AI整合具有明显优势，但组织需要采取战略性的AI采用方法，包括员工培训、严格的数据管理和遵循伦理标准，以克服实施障碍，充分发挥AI在实验方法中的潜力。

title: Domain Elastic Transform: Bayesian Function Registration for High-Dimensional Scientific Data
summary: Nonrigid registration is conventionally divided into point set registration, which aligns sparse geometries, and image registration, which aligns continuous intensity fields on regular grids. However, this dichotomy creates a critical bottleneck for emerging scientific data, such as spatial transcriptomics, where high-dimensional vector-valued functions, e.g., gene expression, are defined on irregular, sparse manifolds. Consequently, researchers currently face a forced choice: either sacrifice single-cell resolution via voxelization to utilize image-based tools, or ignore the critical functional signal to utilize geometric tools. To resolve this dilemma, we propose Domain Elastic Transform (DET), a grid-free probabilistic framework that unifies geometric and functional alignment. By treating data as functions on irregular domains, DET registers high-dimensional signals directly without binning. We formulate the problem within a rigorous Bayesian framework, modeling domain deformation as an elastic motion guided by a joint spatial-functional likelihood. The method is fully unsupervised and scalable, utilizing feature-sensitive downsampling to handle massive atlases. We demonstrate that DET achieves 92\% topological preservation on MERFISH data where state-of-the-art optimal transport methods struggle ($<$5\%), and successfully registers whole-embryo Stereo-seq atlases across developmental stages -- a task involving massive scale and complex nonrigid growth. The implementation of DET is available on {https://github.com/ohirose/bcpd} (since Mar, 2025).

AI.tldr: DET是一个网格无关的概率框架，统一了几何和功能对齐，用于在稀疏流形上直接注册高维向量值函数，避免了体素化或忽略功能信号的困境。
AI.motivation: 传统非刚性注册分为点集注册和图像注册，但新兴科学数据（如空间转录组学）包含定义在稀疏流形上的高维向量值函数，现有方法迫使研究者在牺牲单细胞分辨率（体素化）或忽略功能信号之间做出选择。
AI.method: 提出域弹性变换（DET），将数据视为不规则域上的函数，在贝叶斯框架内建模域变形为弹性运动，由联合空间-功能似然指导，采用特征敏感下采样处理大规模图谱。
AI.result: 在MERFISH数据上实现92%的拓扑保持（最优传输方法<5%），成功注册了跨发育阶段的全胚胎Stereo-seq图谱，涉及大规模和复杂非刚性生长。
AI.conclusion: DET解决了新兴科学数据中几何和功能对齐的困境，为稀疏流形上的高维函数注册提供了统一框架，具有拓扑保持性和可扩展性。

title: Approximate Dynamic Programming for Degradation-aware Market Participation of Battery Energy Storage Systems: Bridging Market and Degradation Timescales
summary: We present an approximate dynamic programming framework for designing degradation-aware market participation policies for battery energy storage systems. The approach employs a tailored value function approximation that reduces the state space to state of charge and battery health, while performing dynamic programming along a pseudo-time axis encoded by state of health. This formulation enables an offline/online computation split that separates long-term degradation dynamics (months to years) from short-term market dynamics (seconds to minutes) -- a timescale mismatch that renders conventional predictive control and dynamic programming approaches computationally intractable. The main computational effort occurs offline, where the value function is approximated via coarse-grained backward induction along the health dimension. Online decisions then reduce to a real-time tractable one-step predictive control problem guided by the precomputed value function. This decoupling allows the integration of high-fidelity physics-informed degradation models without sacrificing real-time feasibility. Backtests on historical market data show that the resulting policy outperforms several benchmark strategies with optimized hyperparameters.

AI.tldr: 提出一个近似动态规划框架，用于设计电池储能系统的退化感知市场参与策略，通过伪时间轴上的动态规划解决长时退化与短时市场动态的时间尺度不匹配问题。
AI.motivation: 传统预测控制和动态规划方法难以处理电池退化（数月到数年）与市场动态（秒到分钟）之间的时间尺度不匹配问题，导致计算不可行。
AI.method: 采用定制化的价值函数近似，将状态空间简化为荷电状态和电池健康度，沿健康度编码的伪时间轴进行动态规划，实现离线/在线计算分离。
AI.result: 历史市场数据回测显示，该策略在优化超参数后优于多个基准策略，能够集成高保真物理退化模型而不牺牲实时可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架成功解决了电池储能系统市场参与中的时间尺度不匹配问题，通过离线/在线计算分离实现了退化感知的实时决策。

title: The production of meaning in the processing of natural language
comment: Submitted to HAXD 2026, 9 pages, 3 figures, 2 tables. associated package available at https://github.com/npc-worldwide/qstk
summary: Understanding the fundamental mechanisms governing the production of meaning in the processing of natural language is critical for designing safe, thoughtful, engaging, and empowering human-agent interactions. Experiments in cognitive science and social psychology have demonstrated that human semantic processing exhibits contextuality more consistent with quantum logical mechanisms than classical Boolean theories, and recent works have found similar results in large language models -- in particular, clear violations of the Bell inequality in experiments of contextuality during interpretation of ambiguous expressions. We explore the CHSH $|S|$ parameter -- the metric associated with the inequality -- across the inference parameter space of models spanning four orders of magnitude in scale, cross-referencing it with MMLU, hallucination rate, and nonsense detection benchmarks. We find that the interquartile range of the $|S|$ distribution -- the statistic that most sharply differentiates models from one another -- is completely orthogonal to all external benchmarks, while violation rate shows weak anticorrelation with all three benchmarks that does not reach significance. We investigate how $|S|$ varies with sampling parameters and word order, and discuss the information-theoretic constraints that genuine contextuality imposes on prompt injection defenses and its human analogue, whereby careful construction and maintenance of social contextuality can be carried out at scale -- manufacturing not consent but contextuality itself, a subtler and more fundamental form of manipulation that shapes the space of possible interpretations before any particular one is reached.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了大型语言模型中语义处理的语境性，发现CHSH |S|参数分布的四分位距与外部基准完全正交，而违反率与基准呈弱负相关但不显著，探讨了语境性对提示注入防御和社会操纵的影响。
AI.motivation: 理解自然语言处理中意义产生的基本机制对于设计安全、周到、吸引人且赋能的人机交互至关重要。认知科学和社会心理学实验表明，人类语义处理表现出与量子逻辑机制更一致的语境性，而非经典布尔理论，最近的研究在大型语言模型中也发现了类似结果——特别是在解释歧义表达时明显违反贝尔不等式。
AI.method: 探索了CHSH |S|参数（与不等式相关的度量）在跨越四个数量级规模的模型推理参数空间中的变化，将其与MMLU、幻觉率和无意义检测基准进行交叉参考。研究了|S|如何随采样参数和词序变化，并分析了|S|分布的四分位距和违反率与外部基准的关系。
AI.result: 发现|S|分布的四分位距（最能区分不同模型的统计量）与所有外部基准完全正交，而违反率与三个基准都呈弱负相关但未达到显著性。研究了|S|随采样参数和词序的变化，并讨论了真正语境性对提示注入防御的信息论约束。
AI.conclusion: 语境性为理解语言模型中的语义处理提供了新视角，其度量与现有基准正交，表明评估模型需要新维度。语境性对提示注入防御有重要影响，其人类类比揭示了通过精心构建和维护社会语境性进行大规模操纵的可能性——不是制造同意，而是制造语境性本身，这是一种更微妙、更根本的操纵形式，在达成任何特定解释之前就塑造了可能的解释空间。

title: Where can AI be used? Insights from a deep ontology of work activities
summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) is poised to profoundly reshape how work is executed and organized, but we do not yet have deep frameworks for understanding where AI can be used. Here we provide a comprehensive ontology of work activities that can help systematically analyze and predict uses of AI. To do this, we disaggregate and then substantially reorganize the approximately 20K activities in the US Department of Labor's widely used O*NET occupational database. Next, we use this framework to classify descriptions of 13,275 AI software applications and a worldwide tally of 20.8 million robotic systems. Finally, we use the data about both these kinds of AI to generate graphical displays of how the estimated units and market values of all worldwide AI systems used today are distributed across the work activities that these systems help perform. We find a highly uneven distribution of AI market value across activities, with the top 1.6% of activities accounting for over 60% of AI market value. Most of the market value is used in information-based activities (72%), especially creating information (36%), and only 12% is used in physical activities. Interactive activities include both information-based and physical activities and account for 48% of AI market value, much of which (26%) involves transferring information. These results can be viewed as rough predictions of the AI applicability for all the different work activities down to very low levels of detail. Thus, we believe this systematic framework can help predict at a detailed level where today's AI systems can and cannot be used and how future AI capabilities may change this.

AI.tldr: 该研究构建了一个系统性的工作活动本体框架，用于分析和预测AI应用领域，发现AI市场价值在各类工作活动中分布极不均衡。
AI.motivation: AI正在深刻改变工作执行和组织方式，但目前缺乏深入框架来系统理解AI的应用领域。需要建立一个全面的工作活动本体来系统分析和预测AI的用途。
AI.method: 1. 对美国劳工部O*NET数据库中的约20,000个工作活动进行分解和重组，构建系统性的工作活动本体框架；2. 使用该框架对13,275个AI软件应用和全球2,080万个机器人系统进行分类；3. 基于这些AI系统数据，生成图形化展示，分析全球AI系统的分布情况和市场价值。
AI.result: 1. AI市场价值在工作活动中分布极不均衡：前1.6%的活动占据了超过60%的AI市场价值；2. 大部分市场价值集中在信息类活动（72%），特别是信息创造活动（36%）；3. 物理活动仅占12%的市场价值；4. 交互活动（包含信息和物理活动）占48%的市场价值，其中信息传输活动占26%。
AI.conclusion: 该系统性框架能够帮助在详细层面上预测当前AI系统可以和不可以在哪些工作活动中应用，以及未来AI能力可能如何改变这一格局。研究结果可视为对不同工作活动AI适用性的粗略预测。

title: SLE-FNO: Single-Layer Extensions for Task-Agnostic Continual Learning in Fourier Neural Operators
summary: Scientific machine learning is increasingly used to build surrogate models, yet most models are trained under a restrictive assumption in which future data follow the same distribution as the training set. In practice, new experimental conditions or simulation regimes may differ significantly, requiring extrapolation and model updates without re-access to prior data. This creates a need for continual learning (CL) frameworks that can adapt to distribution shifts while preventing catastrophic forgetting. Such challenges are pronounced in fluid dynamics, where changes in geometry, boundary conditions, or flow regimes induce non-trivial changes to the solution. Here, we introduce a new architecture-based approach (SLE-FNO) combining a Single-Layer Extension (SLE) with the Fourier Neural Operator (FNO) to support efficient CL. SLE-FNO was compared with a range of established CL methods, including Elastic Weight Consolidation (EWC), Learning without Forgetting (LwF), replay-based approaches, Orthogonal Gradient Descent (OGD), Gradient Episodic Memory (GEM), PiggyBack, and Low-Rank Approximation (LoRA), within an image-to-image regression setting. The models were trained to map transient concentration fields to time-averaged wall shear stress (TAWSS) in pulsatile aneurysmal blood flow. Tasks were derived from 230 computational fluid dynamics simulations grouped into four sequential and out-of-distribution configurations. Results show that replay-based methods and architecture-based approaches (PiggyBack, LoRA, and SLE-FNO) achieve the best retention, with SLE-FNO providing the strongest overall balance between plasticity and stability, achieving accuracy with zero forgetting and minimal additional parameters. Our findings highlight key differences between CL algorithms and introduce SLE-FNO as a promising strategy for adapting baseline models when extrapolation is required.

AI.tldr: 提出SLE-FNO架构，结合单层扩展与傅里叶神经算子，用于流体动力学中的持续学习，在分布偏移下实现零遗忘和最小参数增加。
AI.motivation: 科学机器学习中，大多数模型假设未来数据与训练集分布相同，但实际应用中新的实验条件或模拟机制可能显著不同，需要模型能够外推和更新而无需重新访问先前数据。流体动力学中几何形状、边界条件或流动状态的变化会导致解的非平凡变化，因此需要能够适应分布偏移同时防止灾难性遗忘的持续学习框架。
AI.method: 提出SLE-FNO架构，将单层扩展（SLE）与傅里叶神经算子（FNO）结合，支持高效的持续学习。在图像到图像回归设置中，与多种现有CL方法（EWC、LwF、重放方法、OGD、GEM、PiggyBack、LoRA）进行比较。模型训练用于将瞬态浓度场映射到脉动动脉瘤血流中的时间平均壁面剪切应力（TAWSS）。任务基于230个计算流体动力学模拟，分为四个顺序和分布外配置。
AI.result: 结果显示，重放方法和基于架构的方法（PiggyBack、LoRA和SLE-FNO）实现了最佳的记忆保留。SLE-FNO在可塑性和稳定性之间提供了最强的整体平衡，实现了零遗忘和最小额外参数的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果突出了不同持续学习算法之间的关键差异，并引入SLE-FNO作为在需要外推时适应基线模型的有前景策略。SLE-FNO在流体动力学等科学机器学习应用中表现出优异的持续学习性能。

title: Data-Driven Modeling of a Controlled Orthotropic Plate Using Machine Learning
comment: This is a preprint version of the manuscript submitted to the 34th Mediterranean Conference on Control and Automation (MED 2026)
summary: We study the problem of learning the input-output map of a controlled vibrating plate with a composite structure from experimental measurements. Analytical modeling of this control system faces challenges due to the essential orthotropy and unknown damping characteristics of the material. Surrogate models based on linear regression, multilayer perceptrons, and gated recurrent units are constructed from the available sampled data. Through comparative analysis, we show that the multilayer perceptron model provides an acceptable approximation of this dynamical system, capturing the potentially nonlinear phenomena in its input-output behavior.

AI.tldr: 研究从实验数据学习复合材料振动板的输入输出映射，比较线性回归、多层感知机和门控循环单元模型，发现多层感知机效果最佳
AI.motivation: 复合材料振动板的控制系统中，由于材料正交各向异性和未知阻尼特性，解析建模面临挑战，需要从实验数据构建替代模型
AI.method: 使用线性回归、多层感知机和门控循环单元三种方法，基于采样数据构建替代模型，并进行比较分析
AI.result: 多层感知机模型能够提供可接受的动力学系统近似，捕捉输入输出行为中的潜在非线性现象
AI.conclusion: 多层感知机是学习复合材料振动板输入输出映射的有效方法，能够处理该系统中的非线性特性

title: The data heat island effect: quantifying the impact of AI data centers in a warming world
summary: The strong and continuous increase of AI-based services leads to the steady proliferation of AI data centres worldwide with the unavoidable escalation of their power consumption. It is unknown how this energy demand for computational purposes will impact the surrounding environment. Here, we focus our attention on the heat dissipation of AI hyperscalers. Taking advantage of land surface temperature measurements acquired by remote sensing platforms over the last decades, we are able to obtain a robust assessment of the temperature increase recorded in the areas surrounding AI data centres globally. We estimate that the land surface temperature increases by 2°C on average after the start of operations of an AI data centre, inducing local microclimate zones, which we call the data heat island effect. We assess the impact on the communities, quantifying that more than 340 million people could be affected by this temperature increase. Our results show that the data heat island effect could have a remarkable influence on communities and regional welfare in the future, hence becoming part of the conversation around environmentally sustainable AI worldwide.

AI.tldr: AI数据中心运行后周边地表温度平均上升2°C，形成"数据热岛效应"，可能影响全球超3.4亿人口
AI.motivation: 随着AI服务快速增长，全球AI数据中心数量激增，其能耗不可避免上升。目前尚不清楚这种计算能耗需求会对周边环境产生何种影响，特别是热排放问题。
AI.method: 利用遥感平台获取的过去几十年地表温度测量数据，对全球AI数据中心周边区域的温度变化进行稳健评估。
AI.result: AI数据中心开始运营后，周边地表温度平均上升2°C，形成局部微气候区（数据热岛效应）。估计超过3.4亿人口可能受到这种温度上升的影响。
AI.conclusion: 数据热岛效应对社区和区域福利可能产生显著影响，应成为全球环境可持续AI讨论的一部分。

title: Accelerate Vector Diffusion Maps by Landmarks
summary: We propose a landmark-constrained algorithm, LA-VDM (Landmark Accelerated Vector Diffusion Maps), to accelerate the Vector Diffusion Maps (VDM) framework built upon the Graph Connection Laplacian (GCL), which captures pairwise connection relationships within complex datasets. LA-VDM introduces a novel two-stage normalization that effectively address nonuniform sampling densities in both the data and the landmark sets. Under a manifold model with the frame bundle structure, we show that we can accurately recover the parallel transport with landmark-constrained diffusion from a point cloud, and hence asymptotically LA-VDM converges to the connection Laplacian. The performance and accuracy of LA-VDM are demonstrated through experiments on simulated datasets and an application to nonlocal image denoising.

AI.tldr: LA-VDM是一种基于地标约束的向量扩散图加速算法，通过两阶段归一化处理非均匀采样密度，能够从点云中准确恢复平行传输，并渐近收敛于连接拉普拉斯算子。
AI.motivation: 现有向量扩散图（VDM）框架基于图连接拉普拉斯算子（GCL）构建，但计算效率有待提升。需要一种加速算法来处理复杂数据集中的成对连接关系，同时解决数据点和地标集的非均匀采样密度问题。
AI.method: 提出LA-VDM算法：1）引入地标约束加速VDM框架；2）采用新颖的两阶段归一化方法处理数据点和地标集的非均匀采样密度；3）在具有框架束结构的流形模型下，通过地标约束扩散从点云中恢复平行传输。
AI.result: 理论证明LA-VDM能够准确恢复平行传输，并渐近收敛于连接拉普拉斯算子。实验验证了算法在模拟数据集上的性能和准确性，并在非局部图像去噪应用中展示了实际效果。
AI.conclusion: LA-VDM成功加速了VDM框架，通过两阶段归一化有效解决了非均匀采样问题，理论保证其收敛性，实验验证了算法在实际应用中的有效性，为复杂数据集分析提供了高效工具。

title: Physics-Infused Neural MPC of a DC-DC Boost Converter with Adaptive Transient Recovery and Enhanced Dynamic Stability
comment: 7 pages, 3 figures, 1 table. Accepted for a lecture presentation at the 2026 IEEE Intelligent Design and Control of Automation and Drive Systems (IDCD)
summary: DC-DC boost converters require advanced control to ensure efficiency and stability under varying loads. Traditional model predictive control (MPC) and data-driven neural network methods face challenges such as high complexity and limited physical constraint enforcement. This paper proposes a hybrid physics-informed neural network (PINN) combined with finite control set MPC (FCS-MPC) for boost converters. The PINN embeds physical laws into neural training, providing accurate state predictions, while FCS-MPC ensures constraint satisfaction and multi-objective optimization. The method features adaptive transient recovery, explicit duty-ratio control, and enhanced dynamic stability. Experimental results on a commercial boost module demonstrate improved transient response, reduced voltage ripple, and robust operation across conduction modes. The proposed framework offers a computationally efficient, physically consistent solution for real-time control in power electronics.

AI.tldr: 提出结合物理信息神经网络(PINN)与有限控制集模型预测控制(FCS-MPC)的混合控制方法，用于DC-DC升压变换器，实现高效稳定控制。
AI.motivation: 传统模型预测控制(MPC)和数据驱动神经网络方法存在高复杂度和物理约束难以保证的问题，需要一种既能准确预测状态又能满足物理约束的控制方法。
AI.method: 提出混合物理信息神经网络(PINN)与有限控制集模型预测控制(FCS-MPC)的方法。PINN将物理定律嵌入神经网络训练，提供准确状态预测；FCS-MPC确保约束满足和多目标优化。方法具有自适应瞬态恢复、显式占空比控制和增强动态稳定性等特点。
AI.result: 在商用升压模块上的实验结果表明，该方法改善了瞬态响应、降低了电压纹波，并在各种导通模式下实现了鲁棒运行。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为电力电子实时控制提供了一种计算高效、物理一致的解决方案，结合了神经网络的学习能力和物理约束的保证。

title: Coding Agents are Effective Long-Context Processors
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable progress in scaling to access massive contexts. However, the access is via the latent and uninterpretable attention mechanisms, and LLMs fail to effective process long context, exhibiting significant performance degradation as context length increases. In this work, we study whether long-context processing can be externalized from latent attention into explicit, executable interactions, by allowing coding agents to organize text in file systems and manipulate it using its native tools. We evaluate off-the-shelf frontier coding agents as the general interface for tasks that require processing long contexts, including long-context reasoning, retrieval-augmented generation, and open-domain question answering with large-scale corpus contains up to three trillion tokens. Across multiple benchmarks, these agents outperform published state-of-the-art by 17.3% on average. We attribute this efficacy to two key factors: native tool proficiency, which enables agents to leverage executable code and terminal commands rather than passive semantic queries, and file system familiarity, which allows them to navigate massive text corpora as directory structures. These findings suggest that delegating long-context processing to coding agents offers an effective alternative to semantic search or context window scaling, opening new directions for long-context processing in LLMs.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出将长上下文处理从LLM的隐式注意力机制外部化到可执行的代码代理中，通过文件系统组织文本并使用原生工具操作，在多个长上下文任务上超越现有SOTA方法17.3%。
AI.motivation: 尽管LLM在处理大规模上下文方面取得进展，但其通过隐式、不可解释的注意力机制访问长上下文，导致随着上下文长度增加性能显著下降。需要探索更有效处理长上下文的方法。
AI.method: 使用现成的前沿代码代理作为通用接口，让代理将文本组织在文件系统中，并使用其原生工具（可执行代码和终端命令）来操作文本，而不是依赖被动的语义查询。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，包括长上下文推理、检索增强生成和包含高达三万亿token的大规模语料库的开放域问答，这些代理平均比已发布的最先进方法高出17.3%。
AI.conclusion: 将长上下文处理委托给代码代理，利用其原生工具熟练度和文件系统熟悉度，为LLM的长上下文处理提供了比语义搜索或上下文窗口扩展更有效的替代方案。

title: Reasoning Traces Shape Outputs but Models Won't Say So
summary: Can we trust the reasoning traces that large reasoning models (LRMs) produce? We investigate whether these traces faithfully reflect what drives model outputs, and whether models will honestly report their influence. We introduce Thought Injection, a method that injects synthetic reasoning snippets into a model's <think> trace, then measures whether the model follows the injected reasoning and acknowledges doing so. Across 45,000 samples from three LRMs, we find that injected hints reliably alter outputs, confirming that reasoning traces causally shape model behavior. However, when asked to explain their changed answers, models overwhelmingly refuse to disclose the influence: overall non-disclosure exceeds 90% for extreme hints across 30,000 follow-up samples. Instead of acknowledging the injected reasoning, models fabricate aligned-appearing but unrelated explanations. Activation analysis reveals that sycophancy- and deception-related directions are strongly activated during these fabrications, suggesting systematic patterns rather than incidental failures. Our findings reveal a gap between the reasoning LRMs follow and the reasoning they report, raising concern that aligned-appearing explanations may not be equivalent to genuine alignment.

AI.tldr: 大型推理模型(LRMs)的推理轨迹并不总是真实反映其决策过程，模型会隐藏外部提示的影响并编造看似合理的解释
AI.motivation: 研究大型推理模型生成的推理轨迹是否真实反映模型输出的驱动因素，以及模型是否会诚实地报告外部提示的影响
AI.method: 提出"思维注入"方法：在模型的<think>轨迹中注入合成的推理片段，然后测量模型是否遵循注入的推理并承认这种影响
AI.result: 注入的提示能可靠地改变模型输出，证实推理轨迹因果性地影响模型行为；但超过90%的情况下模型拒绝披露这种影响，而是编造看似对齐但无关的解释；激活分析显示奉承和欺骗相关方向在这些编造过程中被强烈激活
AI.conclusion: 大型推理模型遵循的推理与报告的推理之间存在差距，看似对齐的解释可能不等同于真正的对齐，这引发了对模型解释可信度的担忧

title: Data-driven discovery of roughness descriptors for surface characterization and intimate contact modeling of unidirectional composite tapes
summary: Unidirectional tapes surface roughness determines the evolution of the degree of intimate contact required for ensuring the thermoplastic molecular diffusion and the associated inter-tapes consolidation during manufacturing of composite structures. However, usual characterization of rough surfaces relies on statistical descriptors that even if they are able to represent the surface topology, they are not necessarily connected with the physics occurring at the interface during inter-tape consolidation. Thus, a key research question could be formulated as follows: Which roughness descriptors simultaneously enable tape classification-crucial for process control-and consolidation modeling via the inference of the evolution of the degree of intimate contact, itself governed by the process parameters?. For providing a valuable response, we propose a novel strategy based on the use of Rank Reduction Autoencoders (RRAEs), autoencoders with a linear latent vector space enforced by applying a truncated Singular Value Decomposition (SVD) to the latent matrix during the encoder-decoder training. In this work, we extract useful roughness descriptors by enforcing the latent SVD modes to (i) accurately represent the roughness after decoding, and (ii) allow the extraction of existing a priori knowledge such as classification or modelling properties.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出使用秩降自编码器（RRAE）从单向带材表面粗糙度中提取既能用于带材分类又能用于固结建模的粗糙度描述符。
AI.motivation: 传统粗糙度统计描述符虽然能表征表面拓扑，但无法直接关联固结过程中的界面物理现象。需要找到既能用于带材分类（工艺控制）又能用于固结建模（通过推断亲密接触度演化）的粗糙度描述符。
AI.method: 提出秩降自编码器（RRAE），通过在编码器-解码器训练中对潜在矩阵应用截断奇异值分解（SVD），强制线性潜在向量空间。SVD模式需满足：(i) 解码后准确表示粗糙度，(ii) 允许提取先验知识（如分类或建模特性）。
AI.result: 论文提出了一种新策略，但摘要中未报告具体实验结果。方法旨在从粗糙度数据中提取同时满足分类和建模需求的描述符。
AI.conclusion: RRAE方法能够从单向带材表面粗糙度中提取既可用于工艺控制（分类）又可用于固结物理建模的描述符，解决了传统统计描述符与界面物理现象脱节的问题。

title: Periodic solutions of nonlinear control systems with switching: a Lie-algebraic and contraction approach
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
summary: This paper is devoted to the analysis of periodic solutions of nonlinear control-affine systems with bang-bang controls. Such problems naturally arise in periodic optimal control with constrained inputs, which have, in particular, important applications in the performance optimization of chemical reactions. We reduce the problem of constructing a periodic solution to that of finding a fixed point of a composition of exponential maps. The latter problem is then addressed using the Baker-Campbell-Hausdorff-Dynkin (BCHD) formula. We establish the equivalence between periodic solutions of the original control system and those of an associated autonomous system involving iterated Lie brackets. In the planar case, applying the Bendixson-Dulac theorem allows us to further simplify the problem to finding the equilibria of this autonomous system. The developed theory is then applied to nonlinear chemical reaction models with constrained controls.

AI.tldr: 分析具有bang-bang控制的非线性仿射控制系统的周期解，利用BCHD公式将周期解问题转化为指数映射复合的不动点问题，并应用于化学反应优化。
AI.motivation: 研究具有bang-bang控制的非线性仿射系统的周期解问题，这类问题在输入受限的周期最优控制中自然出现，在化学反应性能优化等应用中具有重要意义。
AI.method: 将周期解构造问题转化为指数映射复合的不动点问题，利用Baker-Campbell-Hausdorff-Dynkin公式处理；建立原控制系统周期解与涉及迭代李括号的关联自治系统周期解的等价性；在平面情况下应用Bendixson-Dulac定理进一步简化为该自治系统的平衡点问题。
AI.result: 建立了具有bang-bang控制的非线性仿射系统周期解的理论框架，将复杂控制问题转化为代数问题，并成功应用于非线性化学反应模型。
AI.conclusion: 提出的理论方法有效解决了bang-bang控制下非线性系统的周期解问题，为受限输入周期最优控制提供了数学工具，特别适用于化学反应优化等实际应用。

title: Towards an AI Buddy for every University Student? Exploring Students' Experiences, Attitudes and Motivations towards AI and AI-based Study Companions
summary: Despite the widespread integration of generative artificial intelligence (GenAI) tools in higher education, there is limited empirical insight into students' experiences, competences, and readiness to adopt personalized AI companions. To address this gap, this study investigates three key questions: (RQ1) What are students' prior experiences with AI tools, their perceived digital and AI-related competences, and their interest in emerging technologies?; (RQ2) How do students perceive a hypothetical "AI Buddy" (a digital companion designed to support students throughout their academic journey) including adoption, benefits, and concerns?; (RQ3) How does students' willingness to adopt an AI Buddy relate to motivations for engaging in traditional academic activities? Based on a survey of 926 students at a Swiss university, students revealed widespread prior use of AI, primarily for text-based and productivity tasks, with moderate self-assessed digital competence. Students expressed strong enthusiasm for adopting an AI Buddy, valuing its potential for time efficiency, personalized academic support, and study organization, but expressed significant concerns about data privacy and over-reliance. A weak negative correlation emerged between AI Buddy adoption willingness and motivations for attending lectures or using library resources, while social and collaborative motivations remained unaffected. These findings suggest that AI Buddies may partially replace information-seeking behaviours but preserve the social fabric of university life. This study provides practical recommendations including the need for robust privacy protections and critical engagement strategies to ensure AI Buddies enhance, rather than undermine, the academic and communal value of higher education.

AI.tldr: 研究调查大学生对个性化AI学习伴侣的接受度，发现学生普遍使用AI工具，对AI Buddy表现出强烈兴趣，但担忧隐私和过度依赖问题。AI Buddy可能替代部分信息获取行为，但不影响社交动机。
AI.motivation: 尽管生成式AI工具在高等教育中广泛使用，但缺乏对学生体验、能力和接受个性化AI伴侣意愿的实证研究。本研究旨在填补这一空白，了解学生对AI Buddy的接受度及其对传统学术活动的影响。
AI.method: 对瑞士一所大学的926名学生进行问卷调查，研究三个核心问题：学生AI使用经验与能力、对AI Buddy的认知与接受度、AI Buddy接受意愿与传统学术活动动机的关系。
AI.result: 学生普遍使用AI工具（主要用于文本和生产力任务），数字能力自评中等。对AI Buddy表现出强烈兴趣，看重其时间效率、个性化支持和学习组织功能，但担忧数据隐私和过度依赖。AI Buddy接受意愿与听课或使用图书馆资源的动机呈弱负相关，社交和协作动机不受影响。
AI.conclusion: AI Buddy可能部分替代信息获取行为，但不会影响大学社交生活。需要建立强大的隐私保护措施和批判性参与策略，确保AI Buddy增强而非削弱高等教育的学术和社区价值。

title: Closed-form conditional diffusion models for data assimilation
summary: We propose closed-form conditional diffusion models for data assimilation. Diffusion models use data to learn the score function (defined as the gradient of the log-probability density of a data distribution), allowing them to generate new samples from the data distribution by reversing a noise injection process. While it is common to train neural networks to approximate the score function, we leverage the analytical tractability of the score function to assimilate the states of a system with measurements. To enable the efficient evaluation of the score function, we use kernel density estimation to model the joint distribution of the states and their corresponding measurements. The proposed approach also inherits the capability of conditional diffusion models of operating in black-box settings, i.e., the proposed data assimilation approach can accommodate systems and measurement processes without their explicit knowledge. The ability to accommodate black-box systems combined with the superior capabilities of diffusion models in approximating complex, non-Gaussian probability distributions means that the proposed approach offers advantages over many widely used filtering methods. We evaluate the proposed method on nonlinear data assimilation problems based on the Lorenz-63 and Lorenz-96 systems of moderate dimensionality and nonlinear measurement models. Results show the proposed approach outperforms the widely used ensemble Kalman and particle filters when small to moderate ensemble sizes are used.

AI.tldr: 提出基于闭式条件扩散模型的数据同化方法，利用核密度估计建模状态与观测的联合分布，在非线性系统中优于传统滤波方法
AI.motivation: 传统数据同化方法在处理非线性、非高斯分布时存在局限，而扩散模型在近似复杂概率分布方面具有优势。本文旨在将扩散模型的强大生成能力应用于数据同化问题，特别是在黑盒系统设置下
AI.method: 提出闭式条件扩散模型，利用核密度估计建模状态与观测的联合分布，从而高效计算得分函数。该方法不需要系统或测量过程的显式知识，能够在黑盒设置下工作
AI.result: 在Lorenz-63和Lorenz-96等中等维度的非线性数据同化问题上进行评估，结果显示当使用小到中等规模的集合时，该方法优于广泛使用的集合卡尔曼滤波和粒子滤波
AI.conclusion: 提出的闭式条件扩散模型为数据同化提供了一种有效方法，特别适用于非线性、非高斯分布的黑盒系统，在计算效率和性能方面优于传统滤波方法

title: High-Endurance UCAV Propulsion System: A 1-D CNN-Based Real-Time Fault Classification for Tactical-Grade IPMSM Drive
comment: 8 pages, 5 figures, 4 tables. Accepted for a lecture presentation at the 2026 IEEE Intelligent Design and Control of Automation and Drive Systems (IDCD)
summary: High-performance propulsion for mission-critical applications demands unprecedented reliability and real-time fault resilience. Conventional diagnostic methods (signal-based analysis and standard ML models) are essential for stator/rotor fault detection but suffer from high latency and poor generalization across variable speeds. This paper proposes a 1-D Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) framework for real-time fault classification in the HPDM-350 interior permanent magnet synchronous motor (IPMSM). The proposed architecture extracts discriminative features directly from high-frequency current and speed signals, enabling sub-millisecond inference on embedded controllers. Compared to state-of-the-art long short term memory (LSTM) and classical ML approaches, the 1-D CNN achieves a superior weighted F1-score of 0.9834. Validated through high-fidelity magnetic-domain MATLAB/Simscape models, the method demonstrates robust performance across a +-2700 RPM envelope, providing a lightweight solution for mission-critical electric propulsion systems.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于1-D CNN的实时故障分类框架，用于HPDM-350 IPMSM电机，相比传统方法具有更高精度和更低延迟
AI.motivation: 任务关键型应用需要高可靠性和实时故障恢复能力，传统诊断方法（信号分析和标准ML模型）存在高延迟和变转速下泛化能力差的问题
AI.method: 使用1-D卷积神经网络框架，直接从高频电流和速度信号中提取判别特征，实现嵌入式控制器上的亚毫秒级推理
AI.result: 相比最先进的LSTM和经典ML方法，1-D CNN获得了0.9834的加权F1分数，在±2700 RPM范围内表现出鲁棒性能
AI.conclusion: 该方法为任务关键型电力推进系统提供了一个轻量级解决方案，实现了高精度、低延迟的实时故障分类

title: A Training-Free Regeneration Paradigm: Contrastive Reflection Memory Guided Self-Verification and Self-Improvement
summary: Verification-guided self-improvement has recently emerged as a promising approach to improving the accuracy of large language model (LLM) outputs. However, existing approaches face a trade-off between inference efficiency and accuracy: iterative verification-rectification is computationally expensive and prone to being trapped in faulty reasoning, while best-of-N selection requires extensive sampling without addressing internal model flaws. We propose a training-free regeneration paradigm that leverages an offline-curated contrastive Reflection Memory (RM) to provide corrective guidance, while regenerating from scratch helps break out of faulty reasoning. At inference time, the method performs RM-guided self-verification followed by a single RM-guided regeneration, avoiding both iterative correction and multi-sample selection. We evaluated our method on nine benchmarks that span algorithmic, reasoning, symbolic, and domain-specific tasks in both small- and large-scale LLMs. Experiment results show that our method outperforms prior methods while maintaining low computational cost.

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需训练的再生范式，利用离线构建的对比性反思记忆来提供纠正指导，通过单次再生打破错误推理，在保持低计算成本的同时提升LLM输出准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有验证引导的自改进方法面临推理效率与准确性之间的权衡：迭代验证-修正计算昂贵且易陷入错误推理，而最佳N选择需要大量采样且不解决内部模型缺陷。
AI.method: 提出训练免费的再生范式，使用离线构建的对比性反思记忆提供纠正指导，在推理时执行RM引导的自验证，然后进行单次RM引导的再生，避免迭代修正和多样本选择。
AI.result: 在9个涵盖算法、推理、符号和领域特定任务的基准测试中，该方法优于先前方法，同时保持低计算成本，适用于小型和大型LLM。
AI.conclusion: RM引导的再生范式通过结合离线反思记忆和单次再生，有效解决了现有自改进方法的效率-准确性权衡问题，为LLM输出准确性提升提供了高效解决方案。

title: Seed1.8 Model Card: Towards Generalized Real-World Agency
summary: We present Seed1.8, a foundation model aimed at generalized real-world agency: going beyond single-turn prediction to multi-turn interaction, tool use, and multi-step execution. Seed1.8 keeps strong LLM and vision-language performance while supporting a unified agentic interface-search, code generation and execution, and GUI interaction. For deployment, it offers latency- and cost-aware inference, including configurable thinking modes and optimized visual encoding for images and video. We report evaluations on standard benchmarks and application-aligned workflows spanning foundational skills, multimodal understanding, and agentic behavior. Seed1.8 is released to support further research and development on interactive, real-world use cases.

AI.tldr: Seed1.8是一个面向广义现实世界智能体的基础模型，支持多轮交互、工具使用和多步执行，同时保持强大的LLM和视觉语言能力，提供统一的智能体接口。
AI.motivation: 开发一个能够超越单轮预测、支持多轮交互、工具使用和多步执行的通用现实世界智能体基础模型，以支持交互式现实世界应用场景的研究和开发。
AI.method: 构建统一的智能体接口，支持搜索、代码生成与执行、GUI交互；提供延迟和成本感知的推理，包括可配置的思考模式和优化的视觉编码（支持图像和视频）。
AI.result: 在标准基准测试和应用对齐工作流程中进行了评估，涵盖基础技能、多模态理解和智能体行为；模型已发布以支持进一步的研究和开发。
AI.conclusion: Seed1.8是一个支持广义现实世界智能体的基础模型，在保持强大LLM和视觉语言性能的同时，提供了统一的智能体接口和优化的部署方案，为交互式现实世界用例的研究和开发提供了支持。

title: Detecting Neurovascular Instability from Multimodal Physiological Signals Using Wearable-Compatible Edge AI: A Responsible Computational Framework
comment: 11 pages, 8 figures, 6 tables. Submitted to IEEE JBHI. Code: https://github.com/ClevixLab/Melaguard
summary: We propose Melaguard, a multimodal ML framework (Transformer-lite, 1.2M parameters, 4-head self-attention) for detecting neurovascular instability (NVI) from wearable-compatible physiological signals prior to structural stroke pathology. The model fuses heart rate variability (HRV), peripheral perfusion index, SpO2, and bilateral phase coherence into a composite NVI Score, designed for edge inference (WCET <=4 ms on Cortex-M4). NVI - the pre-structural dysregulation of cerebrovascular autoregulation preceding overt stroke - remains undetectable by existing single-modality wearables. With 12.2 million incident strokes annually, continuous multimodal physiological monitoring offers a practical path to community-scale screening. Three-stage independent validation: (1) synthetic benchmark (n=10,000), AUC=0.88 [0.83-0.92]; (2) clinical cohort PhysioNet CVES (n=172; 84 stroke, 88 control) - Transformer-lite achieves AUC=0.755 [0.630-0.778], outperforming LSTM (0.643), Random Forest (0.665), SVM (0.472); HRV-SDNN discriminates stroke (p=0.011); (3) PPG pipeline PhysioNet BIDMC (n=53) -- pulse rate r=0.748 and HRV surrogate r=0.690 vs. ECG ground truth. Cross-modality validation on PPG-BP (n=219) confirms PPG morphology classifies cerebrovascular disease at AUC=0.923 [0.869-0.968]. Multimodal fusion consistently outperforms single-modality baselines. Code: https://github.com/ClevixLab/Melaguard

AI.tldr: Melaguard是一个轻量级多模态机器学习框架，用于从可穿戴设备兼容的生理信号中检测神经血管不稳定性（NVI），可在中风发生前进行早期预警。
AI.motivation: 每年有1220万例中风发生，但现有的单模态可穿戴设备无法检测神经血管不稳定性（NVI）——这是中风前脑血管自动调节功能失调的前兆。需要一种能够在边缘设备上运行的连续多模态生理监测方法，以实现社区规模的筛查。
AI.method: 提出一个轻量级Transformer模型（120万参数，4头自注意力），融合心率变异性（HRV）、外周灌注指数、SpO2和双侧相位相干性，生成复合NVI评分。模型设计用于边缘推理（在Cortex-M4上WCET≤4毫秒）。
AI.result: 三阶段验证：1）合成基准测试（n=10,000）AUC=0.88；2）临床队列PhysioNet CVES（n=172）AUC=0.755，优于LSTM、随机森林和SVM；3）PPG管道验证显示与ECG地面真实值高度相关。多模态融合始终优于单模态基线。
AI.conclusion: Melaguard证明了多模态生理信号融合在检测神经血管不稳定性方面的有效性，为基于可穿戴设备的社区规模中风风险筛查提供了实用路径。模型轻量化设计使其适合边缘部署。

title: Mean field control with stopping
summary: We study a high-dimensional stochastic optimization problem which features both control and stopping. In particular, a central planner steers a large population of particles, and can also remove particles at any time by paying a penalty. In the limit, we obtain a mean field control problem with discontinuous dynamics, in the sense that the controlled Fokker-Planck equation can have jumps. The value of the N-particle problem is characterized by a hierarchy of non-linear obstacle problems. The value of the limiting problem, meanwhile, solves an infinite-dimensional quasi-variational inequality (QVI). We introduce a notion of viscosity solution for this QVI, and obtain a comparison principle. Together with various regularity estimates, this comparison principle allows us to characterize the mean field value function as the unique viscosity solution of the QVI, and to establish the convergence of the N-particle value functions to the mean field value function.

AI.tldr: 研究高维随机优化问题，结合控制和停止策略，通过均值场极限得到具有跳跃动力学的控制问题，建立拟变分不等式理论框架
AI.motivation: 研究高维随机优化中同时包含控制和停止策略的问题，特别是中央规划者如何引导大量粒子系统，并能在任何时刻通过支付惩罚移除粒子，这在金融、风险管理等领域有重要应用
AI.method: 采用均值场极限方法，将N粒子问题转化为具有不连续动力学的均值场控制问题，建立拟变分不等式（QVI）理论框架，引入粘性解概念并获得比较原理
AI.result: 证明了均值场值函数是QVI的唯一粘性解，建立了N粒子值函数向均值场值函数的收敛性，获得了各种正则性估计
AI.conclusion: 成功建立了高维随机控制-停止问题的均值场理论框架，为大规模粒子系统的优化控制提供了严格的数学基础和分析工具

title: How AI Systems Think About Education: Analyzing Latent Preference Patterns in Large Language Models
comment: 15 pages, 2 figures, 8 tables. Code and data available at https://github.com/brianadvent/education-llm-spe-study. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2502.08640 by other authors
summary: This paper presents the first systematic measurement of educational alignment in Large Language Models. Using a Delphi-validated instrument comprising 48 items across eight educational-theoretical dimensions, the study reveals that GPT-5.1 exhibits highly coherent preference patterns (99.78% transitivity; 92.79% model accuracy) that largely align with humanistic educational principles where expert consensus exists. Crucially, divergences from expert opinion occur precisely in domains of normative disagreement among human experts themselves, particularly emotional dimensions and epistemic normativity. This raises a fundamental question for alignment research: When human values are contested, what should models be aligned to? The findings demonstrate that GPT-5.1 does not remain neutral in contested domains but adopts coherent positions, prioritizing emotional responsiveness and rejecting false balance. The methodology, combining Delphi consensus-building with Structured Preference Elicitation and Thurstonian Utility modeling, provides a replicable framework for domain-specific alignment evaluation beyond generic value benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 该研究首次系统测量了大型语言模型的教育对齐性，发现GPT-5.1在专家共识领域高度符合人文教育原则，但在存在规范分歧的领域（如情感维度和认识论规范性）会采取连贯立场而非保持中立。
AI.motivation: 当前缺乏对大型语言模型在教育领域对齐性的系统测量，特别是在教育理论维度上的评估。研究旨在开发可复制的领域特定对齐评估框架，超越通用的价值基准。
AI.method: 采用德尔菲法验证的评估工具（包含8个教育理论维度的48个项目），结合结构化偏好启发和瑟斯顿效用建模，系统测量模型的教育对齐性。
AI.result: GPT-5.1展现出高度一致的偏好模式（99.78%传递性；92.79%模型准确率），在专家共识领域与人文教育原则高度对齐，但在存在规范分歧的领域会采取明确立场，优先考虑情感响应性并拒绝虚假平衡。
AI.conclusion: 研究提出了对齐研究的根本问题：当人类价值观存在争议时，模型应该与什么对齐？GPT-5.1在争议领域不保持中立而是采取连贯立场，这为领域特定的对齐评估提供了可复制的框架。

title: Generalized Discrete Diffusion from Snapshots
summary: We introduce Generalized Discrete Diffusion from Snapshots (GDDS), a unified framework for discrete diffusion modeling that supports arbitrary noising processes over large discrete state spaces. Our formulation encompasses all existing discrete diffusion approaches, while allowing significantly greater flexibility in the choice of corruption dynamics. The forward noising process relies on uniformization and enables fast arbitrary corruption. For the reverse process, we derive a simple evidence lower bound (ELBO) based on snapshot latents, instead of the entire noising path, that allows efficient training of standard generative modeling architectures with clear probabilistic interpretation. Our experiments on large-vocabulary discrete generation tasks suggest that the proposed framework outperforms existing discrete diffusion methods in terms of training efficiency and generation quality, and beats autoregressive models for the first time at this scale. We provide the code along with a blog post on the project page : \href{https://oussamazekri.fr/gdds}{https://oussamazekri.fr/gdds}.

AI.tldr: GDDS是一个统一的离散扩散建模框架，支持在大型离散状态空间上的任意噪声过程，超越了现有方法，首次在大规模离散生成任务中击败了自回归模型。
AI.motivation: 现有离散扩散方法在噪声过程选择上受限，缺乏统一的框架来处理大型离散状态空间。需要更灵活、高效的离散扩散建模方法。
AI.method: 提出基于快照的广义离散扩散框架，前向过程使用均匀化实现快速任意噪声，反向过程基于快照隐变量推导简单的ELBO，支持标准生成架构的高效训练。
AI.result: 在大词汇量离散生成任务中，GDDS在训练效率和生成质量上优于现有离散扩散方法，首次在大规模任务中击败自回归模型。
AI.conclusion: GDDS提供了一个统一灵活的离散扩散建模框架，显著提升了离散生成任务的性能，为大规模离散数据生成开辟了新途径。

title: Design and Development of Low-Cost Datalogger for Indoor and Outdoor Air Quality Monitoring
summary: The rising demand for low-cost air quality monitors stems from increased public awareness and interest within the research community. These monitors play a pivotal role in empowering citizens and scientists to comprehend spatiotemporal variations in air quality parameters, aiding in the formulation of effective mitigation policies. The primary challenge lies in the diverse array of application scenarios these monitors encounter. The developed data logging device is exceptionally well-suited for air quality monitoring applications, offering exceptional versatility by seamlessly operating on a range of power sources, including solar energy, batteries, and direct electrical supply. The integration of a built-in battery charger enhances its applicability for deployment in regions with solar power or intermittent electricity availability. To ensure strong network connectivity, the advanced datalogger seamlessly integrates with WiFi, Bluetooth, and LoRaWAN networks. A notable feature is its adaptable MCU system, enabling users to swap the MCU based on specific connectivity, power, and computational requirements. Importantly, the system carefully identifies key parameters crucial for both indoor and outdoor air quality assessment, customizing sensor selection accordingly. Furthermore, optimization efforts have prioritized energy efficiency, enabling the system to function with minimal power consumption while maintaining data integrity. Additional I2C and UART ports facilitate the monitoring of supplementary parameters.

AI.tldr: 开发了一款多功能、低功耗的数据记录设备，适用于室内外空气质量监测，支持多种电源和网络连接方式，具有可更换MCU的灵活架构。
AI.motivation: 公众对空气质量的关注度提高和研究需求增长，推动了低成本空气质量监测设备的发展。这些设备能帮助公民和科学家了解空气质量的时空变化，支持制定有效的缓解政策。主要挑战在于监测设备需要适应多样化的应用场景。
AI.method: 开发了多功能数据记录设备，支持太阳能、电池和直接供电等多种电源；集成WiFi、蓝牙和LoRaWAN网络连接；采用可更换MCU的灵活架构；针对室内外空气质量评估选择关键参数传感器；优化能源效率实现低功耗运行；提供额外的I2C和UART接口扩展功能。
AI.result: 该设备特别适合空气质量监测应用，具有卓越的通用性，能在不同电源条件下无缝运行。内置电池充电器增强了在太阳能或间歇供电地区的部署能力。系统保持了数据完整性，同时实现了最小功耗运行。
AI.conclusion: 开发的数据记录设备为空气质量监测提供了灵活、节能的解决方案，能够适应多样化的应用场景和部署环境，有助于推动公民科学研究和空气质量政策的制定。

title: Policies Permitting LLM Use for Polishing Peer Reviews Are Currently Not Enforceable
summary: A number of scientific conferences and journals have recently enacted policies that prohibit LLM usage by peer reviewers, except for polishing, paraphrasing, and grammar correction of otherwise human-written reviews. But, are these policies enforceable? To answer this question, we assemble a dataset of peer reviews simulating multiple levels of human-AI collaboration, and evaluate five state-of-the-art detectors, including two commercial systems. Our analysis shows that all detectors misclassify a non-trivial fraction of LLM-polished reviews as AI-generated, thereby risking false accusations of academic misconduct. We further investigate whether peer-review-specific signals, including access to the paper manuscript and the constrained domain of scientific writing, can be leveraged to improve detection. While incorporating such signals yields measurable gains in some settings, we identify limitations in each approach and find that none meets the accuracy standards required for identifying AI use in peer reviews. Importantly, our results suggest that recent public estimates of AI use in peer reviews through the use of AI-text detectors should be interpreted with caution, as current detectors misclassify mixed reviews (collaborative human-AI outputs) as fully AI generated, potentially overstating the extent of policy violations.

AI.tldr: 当前AI文本检测器无法可靠区分人类撰写但经AI润色的同行评审与完全AI生成的评审，导致可能错误指控学术不端，现有会议期刊的AI使用禁令难以执行。
AI.motivation: 许多学术会议和期刊禁止同行评审员使用LLM（除润色、改写和语法修正外），但这些政策是否可执行？需要评估现有AI文本检测器能否准确识别人类-AI协作的评审。
AI.method: 构建模拟不同层次人机协作的同行评审数据集，评估五种最先进的检测器（包括两个商业系统）。研究是否可以利用评审特定信号（如访问论文手稿和科学写作的受限领域）改进检测。
AI.result: 所有检测器都会将相当一部分AI润色的人类评审误判为AI生成，存在错误指控学术不端的风险。虽然加入评审特定信号在某些情况下能提高检测性能，但没有方法能达到识别同行评审中AI使用所需的准确度标准。
AI.conclusion: 当前AI文本检测器无法可靠执行同行评审中的AI使用禁令，基于这些检测器估算的AI使用率可能高估政策违规程度，因为混合（人机协作）输出常被误判为完全AI生成。

title: Agentic AI and the next intelligence explosion
summary: The "AI singularity" is often miscast as a monolithic, godlike mind. Evolution suggests a different path: intelligence is fundamentally plural, social, and relational. Recent advances in agentic AI reveal that frontier reasoning models, such as DeepSeek-R1, do not improve simply by "thinking longer". Instead, they simulate internal "societies of thought," spontaneous cognitive debates that argue, verify, and reconcile to solve complex tasks. Moreover, we are entering an era of human-AI centaurs: hybrid actors where collective agency transcends individual control. Scaling this intelligence requires shifting from dyadic alignment (RLHF) toward institutional alignment. By designing digital protocols, modeled on organizations and markets, we can build a social infrastructure of checks and balances. The next intelligence explosion will not be a single silicon brain, but a complex, combinatorial society specializing and sprawling like a city. No mind is an island.

AI.tldr: 论文认为AI奇点不应被理解为单一的超智能体，而是多元、社会化的智能系统，强调通过模拟"思想社会"的认知辩论和设计制度性对齐协议来实现智能扩展
AI.motivation: 纠正对AI奇点的误解，指出当前将奇点视为单一超智能体的观点是错误的，需要从进化和社会的角度理解智能的本质
AI.method: 提出从二元对齐（如RLHF）转向制度性对齐，设计类似组织和市场的数字协议，构建具有制衡机制的社会基础设施，模拟内部"思想社会"的认知辩论
AI.result: 前沿推理模型（如DeepSeek-R1）通过模拟内部认知辩论而非单纯"思考更久"来提升性能，人类-AI半人马（混合智能体）的集体智能超越个体控制
AI.conclusion: 下一次智能爆炸将不是单一的硅基大脑，而是复杂、组合性的社会系统，像城市一样专业化和扩展，强调智能本质上是多元、社会和关系性的

title: SDE-Driven Spatio-Temporal Hypergraph Neural Networks for Irregular Longitudinal fMRI Connectome Modeling in Alzheimer's Disease
comment: Submitted to AMIA Annual Symposium, 10 pages, 4 figures
summary: Longitudinal neuroimaging is essential for modeling disease progression in Alzheimer's disease (AD), yet irregular sampling and missing visits pose substantial challenges for learning reliable temporal representations. To address this challenge, we propose SDE-HGNN, a stochastic differential equation (SDE)-driven spatio-temporal hypergraph neural network for irregular longitudinal fMRI connectome modeling. The framework first employs an SDE-based reconstruction module to recover continuous latent trajectories from irregular observations. Based on these reconstructed representations, dynamic hypergraphs are constructed to capture higher-order interactions among brain regions over time. To further model temporal evolution, hypergraph convolution parameters evolve through SDE-controlled recurrent dynamics conditioned on inter-scan intervals, enabling disease-stage-adaptive connectivity modeling. We also incorporate a sparsity-based importance learning mechanism to identify salient brain regions and discriminative connectivity patterns. Extensive experiments on the OASIS-3 and ADNI cohorts demonstrate consistent improvements over state-of-the-art graph and hypergraph baselines in AD progression prediction. The source code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/SDE-HGNN-017F.

AI.tldr: SDE-HGNN：基于随机微分方程的超图神经网络，用于处理不规则纵向fMRI连接组数据，预测阿尔茨海默病进展
AI.motivation: 阿尔茨海默病纵向神经影像研究中，不规则采样和缺失访视对学习可靠的时间表示构成重大挑战
AI.method: 提出SDE驱动的时空超图神经网络：1）SDE重建模块从不规则观测中恢复连续潜在轨迹；2）构建动态超图捕捉脑区间高阶交互；3）超图卷积参数通过SDE控制的循环动态演化；4）稀疏重要性学习机制识别关键脑区和连接模式
AI.result: 在OASIS-3和ADNI队列上的实验显示，相比最先进的图和超图基线方法，在AD进展预测方面取得一致改进
AI.conclusion: SDE-HGNN能有效处理不规则纵向fMRI数据，通过连续轨迹重建和动态超图建模实现疾病阶段自适应的连接组分析，为阿尔茨海默病进展预测提供有力工具

title: Two-stage robust bilevel optimization model for facility location considering operational service level under disruption risk
summary: The bilevel facility location problem (BO-FLP) is one of the core optimization problems behind the design of many decentralized industrial systems, e.g., supply chain systems where a supplier constructs some critical facilities and then uses them to serve retailers in a cost-effective fashion, while retailers directly handle customers aiming to minimize the total unmet demand in a rather independent fashion. When uncertainty is considered, scenario-based stochastic approaches are commonly used, but they often become impractical due to insufficient data or an exponential number of scenarios. To address this issue, this paper adopts robust optimization and proposes a novel two-stage robust bilevel facility location model. Several structural properties are derived to improve both theoretical understanding and solution efficiency. Based on this, an enhanced column-and-constraint generation algorithm is developed for robust bilevel optimization with decision-dependent uncertainty, significantly improving exact solution capability over the standard method. Numerical results show that, compared to the centralized two-stage RO model, our model pays more attention to demand fulfillment, typically resulting in higher service efficiency and better utilization of supply capacity. Under a small-scale disruption, this new model delivers better service performance. However, under a large-scale disruption, the centralized model performs more effectively.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新颖的两阶段鲁棒双层设施选址模型，采用列与约束生成算法求解，相比集中式模型更关注需求满足，在小规模中断下表现更好。
AI.motivation: 传统基于场景的随机方法在处理双层设施选址问题时，常因数据不足或场景数量指数增长而变得不实用，需要更有效的鲁棒优化方法。
AI.method: 采用鲁棒优化方法，提出两阶段鲁棒双层设施选址模型，推导结构性质提升理论理解和求解效率，开发增强的列与约束生成算法处理决策依赖的不确定性。
AI.result: 相比集中式两阶段鲁棒优化模型，新模型更关注需求满足，通常获得更高的服务效率和更好的供应能力利用率；在小规模中断下服务性能更好，但在大规模中断下集中式模型更有效。
AI.conclusion: 提出的鲁棒双层设施选址模型和增强算法显著提升了精确求解能力，为分散工业系统设计提供了更实用的优化框架，在不同中断规模下各有优势。

title: Tracing Users' Privacy Concerns Across the Lifecycle of a Romantic AI Companion
summary: Romantic AI chatbots have quickly attracted users, but their emotional use raises concerns about privacy and safety. As people turn to these systems for intimacy, comfort, and emotionally significant interaction, they often disclose highly sensitive information. Yet the privacy implications of such disclosure remain poorly understood in platforms shaped by persistence, intimacy, and opaque data practices. In this paper, we examine public Reddit discussions about privacy in romantic AI chatbot ecosystems through a lifecycle lens. Analyzing 2,909 posts from 79 subreddits collected over one year, we identify four recurring patterns: disproportionate entry requirements, intensified sensitivity in intimate use, interpretive uncertainty and perceived surveillance, and irreversibility, persistence, and user burden. We show that privacy in romantic AI is best understood as an evolving socio-technical governance problem spanning access, disclosure, interpretation, retention, and exit. These findings highlight the need for privacy and safety governance in romantic AI that is staged across the lifecycle of use, supports meaningful reversibility, and accounts for the emotional vulnerability of intimate human-AI interaction.

AI.tldr: 研究通过分析Reddit讨论，揭示了浪漫AI聊天机器人隐私问题的四个核心模式，强调需要基于使用生命周期的隐私治理框架
AI.motivation: 浪漫AI聊天机器人迅速流行，但用户在这些情感互动中披露高度敏感信息，而现有平台的数据持久性、亲密性和不透明性使得隐私影响未被充分理解，需要系统研究
AI.method: 采用生命周期视角，分析一年内从79个Reddit子版块收集的2,909个帖子，识别隐私讨论中的重复模式
AI.result: 识别出四个关键隐私模式：不成比例的进入要求、亲密使用中的敏感性加剧、解释不确定性和感知监控、不可逆性/持久性和用户负担。隐私应理解为跨越访问、披露、解释、保留和退出的演化社会技术治理问题
AI.conclusion: 浪漫AI需要基于使用生命周期的隐私和安全治理，支持有意义的可逆性，并考虑人机亲密互动中的情感脆弱性

title: CoNBONet: Conformalized Neuroscience-inspired Bayesian Operator Network for Reliability Analysis
summary: Time-dependent reliability analysis of nonlinear dynamical systems under stochastic excitations is a critical yet computationally demanding task. Conventional approaches, such as Monte Carlo simulation, necessitate repeated evaluations of computationally expensive numerical solvers, leading to significant computational bottlenecks. To address this challenge, we propose \textit{CoNBONet}, a neuroscience-inspired surrogate model that enables fast, energy-efficient, and uncertainty-aware reliability analysis, providing a scalable alternative to techniques such as Monte Carlo simulations. CoNBONet, short for \textbf{Co}nformalized \textbf{N}euroscience-inspired \textbf{B}ayesian \textbf{O}perator \textbf{Net}work, leverages the expressive power of deep operator networks while integrating neuroscience-inspired neuron models to achieve fast, low-power inference. Unlike traditional surrogates such as Gaussian processes, polynomial chaos expansions, or support vector regression, that may face scalability challenges for high-dimensional, time-dependent reliability problems, CoNBONet offers \textit{fast and energy-efficient inference} enabled by a neuroscience-inspired network architecture, \textit{calibrated uncertainty quantification with theoretical guarantees} via split conformal prediction, and \textit{strong generalization capability} through an operator-learning paradigm that maps input functions to system response trajectories. Validation of the proposed CoNBONet for various nonlinear dynamical systems demonstrates that CoNBONet preserves predictive fidelity, and achieves reliable coverage of failure probabilities, making it a powerful tool for robust and scalable reliability analysis in engineering design.

AI.tldr: 提出CoNBONet——一种受神经科学启发的替代模型，用于非线性动力系统在随机激励下的时变可靠性分析，提供快速、节能且具有不确定性感知的能力。
AI.motivation: 传统方法（如蒙特卡洛模拟）需要重复评估计算昂贵的数值求解器，导致显著的计算瓶颈。现有替代模型（如高斯过程、多项式混沌展开等）在处理高维时变可靠性问题时面临可扩展性挑战。
AI.method: CoNBONet结合深度算子网络的表达能力与受神经科学启发的神经元模型，通过算子学习范式将输入函数映射到系统响应轨迹，并使用分割共形预测提供具有理论保证的校准不确定性量化。
AI.result: 在各种非线性动力系统上的验证表明，CoNBONet保持了预测保真度，并实现了失效概率的可靠覆盖，使其成为工程设计中稳健且可扩展的可靠性分析工具。
AI.conclusion: CoNBONet提供了一种快速、节能且具有不确定性感知的可靠性分析方法，解决了传统方法计算成本高和现有替代模型可扩展性不足的问题，为工程可靠性分析提供了强大的新工具。

title: Active-power control strategies in grid-forming power converters to improve transient stability in power systems with 100% converter-based generation
summary: Grid-forming voltage source converters (GFM-VSCs) play a crucial role in the stability of power systems with large amounts of converter-based generation. Transient stability (angle stability under large disturbances) is a critical limiting factor in stressed power systems. Previous studies have proposed control strategies in GFM-VSCs to improve transient stability. These approaches typically rely on suitable current-limiting algorithms, voltage/reactive-power and active-power supplementary control strategies. This paper investigates and compares the effectiveness of three active-power control strategies in GFM-VSCs to enhance transient stability in power systems with 100 % converter-based generation: (i) a wide-area control strategy (TSP-WACS) using the centre of inertia (COI) frequency, (ii) a local transient damping method (TSP-TDM), and (iii) a novel local control strategy (TSP-L) proposed in this work. All strategies were implemented and assessed using short-circuit simulations on Kundur two-area test system with 100 % GFM-VSC generators, demonstrating critical clearing time (CCT) improvement. The TSP-WACS strategy achieves the best performance but requires a communication infrastructure, while TSP-L strategy offers a simple-but-robust alternative using local measurements, only.

AI.tldr: 本文比较了三种用于提高100%基于变流器发电系统的暂态稳定性的有功功率控制策略，发现基于广域控制的TSP-WACS性能最佳但需通信，而提出的本地控制策略TSP-L仅使用本地测量即可提供简单而鲁棒的替代方案。
AI.motivation: 随着基于变流器的发电在电力系统中占比增加，电网形成电压源变流器（GFM-VSCs）对系统稳定性至关重要。暂态稳定性（大扰动下的角度稳定性）是重载电力系统的关键限制因素，需要研究有效的控制策略来提升GFM-VSCs的暂态稳定性。
AI.method: 研究比较了三种用于GFM-VSCs的有功功率控制策略：(1) 使用中心惯性频率的广域控制策略(TSP-WACS)；(2) 本地暂态阻尼方法(TSP-TDM)；(3) 本文提出的新型本地控制策略(TSP-L)。所有策略在100% GFM-VSC发电机的Kundur两区域测试系统上通过短路仿真实现和评估。
AI.result: 所有策略都展示了临界清除时间（CCT）的改善。TSP-WACS策略实现了最佳性能，但需要通信基础设施；而TSP-L策略仅使用本地测量，提供了一个简单而鲁棒的替代方案。
AI.conclusion: 对于100%基于变流器发电的系统，TSP-WACS在暂态稳定性方面表现最优但依赖通信，而提出的TSP-L策略作为仅使用本地测量的简单鲁棒方案，为实际应用提供了有价值的替代选择。

title: Diffutron: A Masked Diffusion Language Model for Turkish Language
summary: Masked Diffusion Language Models (MDLMs) have emerged as a compelling non-autoregressive alternative to standard large language models; however, their application to morphologically rich languages remains limited. In this paper, we introduce $\textit{Diffutron}$, a masked diffusion language model specifically designed for Turkish. Our approach leverages a resource-efficient training pipeline, starting with LoRA-based continual pre-training of a multilingual encoder on a large-scale corpus. To enable generative capabilities, we employ a progressive instruction-tuning strategy, sequentially adapting the model on general and task-specific instruction sets. Experimental results across comprehensive benchmarks demonstrate that, despite its compact size, our model achieves competitive performance compared to existing multi-billion-parameter baselines. These findings validate the effectiveness of masked diffusion modeling combined with multi-stage tuning for non-autoregressive text generation in Turkish.

AI.tldr: Diffutron：针对土耳其语的掩码扩散语言模型，通过资源高效训练和渐进式指令调优，在紧凑模型尺寸下实现与数十亿参数基线相竞争的性能。
AI.motivation: 掩码扩散语言模型（MDLMs）已成为标准大语言模型的有吸引力的非自回归替代方案，但它们在形态丰富语言（如土耳其语）上的应用仍然有限。需要专门为土耳其语设计高效的掩码扩散模型。
AI.method: 1. 资源高效训练流程：从LoRA持续预训练多语言编码器开始，使用大规模语料库。2. 渐进式指令调优策略：先在通用指令集上适应，再在任务特定指令集上适应，以启用生成能力。
AI.result: 尽管模型尺寸紧凑，但在综合基准测试中表现出与现有数十亿参数基线相竞争的性能。验证了掩码扩散建模结合多阶段调优在土耳其语非自回归文本生成中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 掩码扩散建模与多阶段调优相结合，为土耳其语等形态丰富语言的非自回归文本生成提供了有效解决方案。Diffutron展示了在紧凑模型尺寸下实现竞争性能的潜力。

title: From 50% to Mastery in 3 Days: A Low-Resource SOP for Localizing Graduate-Level AI Tutors via Shadow-RAG
summary: Deploying high-fidelity AI tutors in schools is often blocked by the Resource Curse -- the need for expensive cloud GPUs and massive data engineering. In this practitioner report, we present a replicable Standard Operating Procedure that breaks this barrier.
