Using a Vision-Language Model data cleaning strategy and a novel Shadow-RAG architecture, we localized a graduate-level Applied Mathematics tutor using only 3 person-days of non-expert labor and open-weights 32B models deployable on a single consumer-grade GPU. Our pilot study on a full graduate-level final exam reveals a striking emergence phenomenon: while both zero-shot baselines and standard retrieval stagnate around 50-60% accuracy across model generations, the Shadow Agent, which provides structured reasoning guidance, triggers a massive capability surge in newer 32B models, boosting performance from 74% (Naive RAG) to mastery level (90%). In contrast, older models see only modest gains (~10%). This suggests that such guidance is the key to unlocking the latent power of modern small language models. This work offers a cost-effective, scientifically grounded blueprint for ubiquitous AI education.

AI.tldr: 提出一种低成本AI导师部署方案，通过Shadow-RAG架构和视觉语言模型数据清洗，仅用3人天非专家劳动和消费级GPU实现研究生数学导师，性能从74%提升至90%
AI.motivation: 解决AI教育中存在的"资源诅咒"问题——需要昂贵的云GPU和大规模数据工程，阻碍了高质量AI导师在学校中的普及部署
AI.method: 采用视觉语言模型数据清洗策略和创新的Shadow-RAG架构，使用开源32B模型在单消费级GPU上部署，仅需3人天非专家劳动
AI.result: 在研究生期末考试测试中，Shadow Agent触发新32B模型能力突增，性能从74%提升至90%，而旧模型仅提升约10%；零-shot基线和标准检索停滞在50-60%准确率
AI.conclusion: 结构化推理指导是解锁现代小型语言模型潜力的关键，为普及AI教育提供了成本效益高、科学基础强的蓝图

title: Reinforcement Learning from Multi-Source Imperfect Preferences: Best-of-Both-Regimes Regret
summary: Reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) replaces hard-to-specify rewards with pairwise trajectory preferences, yet regret-oriented theory often assumes that preference labels are generated consistently from a single ground-truth objective. In practical RLHF systems, however, feedback is typically \emph{multi-source} (annotators, experts, reward models, heuristics) and can exhibit systematic, persistent mismatches due to subjectivity, expertise variation, and annotation/modeling artifacts. We study episodic RL from \emph{multi-source imperfect preferences} through a cumulative imperfection budget: for each source, the total deviation of its preference probabilities from an ideal oracle is at most $ω$ over $K$ episodes. We propose a unified algorithm with regret $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{K/M}+ω)$, which exhibits a best-of-both-regimes behavior: it achieves $M$-dependent statistical gains when imperfection is small (where $M$ is the number of sources), while remaining robust with unavoidable additive dependence on $ω$ when imperfection is large. We complement this with a lower bound $\tildeΩ(\max\{\sqrt{K/M},ω\})$, which captures the best possible improvement with respect to $M$ and the unavoidable dependence on $ω$, and a counterexample showing that naïvely treating imperfect feedback as as oracle-consistent can incur regret as large as $\tildeΩ(\min\{ω\sqrt{K},K\})$. Technically, our approach involves imperfection-adaptive weighted comparison learning, value-targeted transition estimation to control hidden feedback-induced distribution shift, and sub-importance sampling to keep the weighted objectives analyzable, yielding regret guarantees that quantify when multi-source feedback provably improves RLHF and how cumulative imperfection fundamentally limits it.

AI.tldr: 研究多源不完美偏好下的强化学习，提出统一算法实现后悔界 $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{K/M}+ω)$，证明多源反馈在瑕疵较小时可带来统计增益，但不可避免依赖于瑕疵预算 $ω$。
AI.motivation: 实际RLHF系统中反馈通常来自多个来源（标注者、专家、奖励模型、启发式方法），这些反馈存在系统性、持续性的不匹配问题，而现有理论假设偏好标签来自单一真实目标函数。
AI.method: 提出统一算法，包含瑕疵自适应加权比较学习、值目标转移估计来控制隐藏反馈引起的分布偏移、子重要性采样保持加权目标可分析性。
AI.result: 算法后悔界为 $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{K/M}+ω)$，下界为 $\tildeΩ(\max\{\sqrt{K/M},ω\})$，证明多源反馈在瑕疵较小时可带来 $M$ 相关的统计增益，但不可避免依赖于瑕疵预算 $ω$。
AI.conclusion: 量化了多源反馈何时能改进RLHF以及累积瑕疵如何从根本上限制其性能，为实际RLHF系统提供了理论指导。

title: A Modular Approach to Stochastic Optimisation for Inverse Problems Using the Core Imaging Library
summary: The Core Imaging Library (CIL) is an open-source versatile Python framework for solving inverse problems with special emphasis on imaging applications such as computed tomography (CT), using a plug-in architecture for data and operators, interfacing to toolboxes such as ASTRA, TIGRE and SIRF. A key component of CIL is its optimisation module enabling users to flexibly combine mathematical operators and functionals to form smooth and non-smooth optimisation problems and solve these with a range of first-order algorithms. The present work introduces an expansion of CIL with a new modular framework for stochastic optimisation, allowing researchers to easily use a variety of existing stochastic optimisation algorithms as well form new ones by combining modular building blocks. Users can flexibly configure algorithmic components, adapt to diverse problem structures, and experiment with various sampling and step size strategies. Rather than individual black-box implementations of each fixed algorithm with significant redundancies, our design is modular providing building blocks that can be flexibly combined to realise a wealth of algorithm instances. The framework is particularly well-suited for large-scale applications, where stochastic methods offer notable computational advantages over deterministic approaches. To demonstrate its versatility and practical utility, we present experiments on real-world datasets from imaging inverse problems, such as X-Ray CT and Positron Emission Tomography (PET) reconstruction. In summary, the presented software expansion aims to support the research community with a robust, extensible optimisation suite for developing, testing, and benchmarking stochastic methods for inverse problems.

AI.tldr: CIL扩展了随机优化模块，提供模块化框架，支持灵活组合算法组件，适用于大规模成像逆问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的确定性优化方法在大规模成像逆问题中计算成本高，需要更灵活、高效的随机优化框架来支持研究和应用。
AI.method: 扩展CIL优化模块，设计模块化随机优化框架，提供可灵活组合的算法组件（如采样策略、步长策略），支持多种随机优化算法。
AI.result: 成功开发了模块化随机优化框架，能够灵活配置算法，在X射线CT和PET重建等真实数据集上展示了实用性和计算优势。
AI.conclusion: 该扩展为研究社区提供了强大、可扩展的随机优化套件，支持开发、测试和基准测试逆问题的随机方法。

title: WARBENCH: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Evaluating LLMs in Military Decision-Making
summary: Large Language Models are increasingly being considered for deployment in safety-critical military applications. However, current benchmarks suffer from structural blindspots that systematically overestimate model capabilities in real-world tactical scenarios. Existing frameworks typically ignore strict legal constraints based on International Humanitarian Law (IHL), omit edge computing limitations, lack robustness testing for fog of war, and inadequately evaluate explicit reasoning. To address these vulnerabilities, we present WARBENCH, a comprehensive evaluation framework establishing a foundational tactical baseline alongside four distinct stress testing dimensions. Through a large scale empirical evaluation of nine leading models on 136 high-fidelity historical scenarios, we reveal severe structural flaws. First, baseline tactical reasoning systematically collapses under complex terrain and high force asymmetry. Second, while state of the art closed source models maintain functional compliance, edge-optimized small models expose extreme operational risks with legal violation rates approaching 70 percent. Furthermore, models experience catastrophic performance degradation under 4-bit quantization and systematic information loss. Conversely, explicit reasoning mechanisms serve as highly effective structural safeguards against inadvertent violations. Ultimately, these findings demonstrate that current models remain fundamentally unready for autonomous deployment in high stakes tactical environments.

AI.tldr: WARBENCH评估框架揭示当前LLM在战术军事应用中的严重缺陷：复杂地形下战术推理崩溃、小型模型法律违规率近70%、量化导致性能灾难性下降，表明模型尚不适合高风险战术环境自主部署。
AI.motivation: 现有基准存在结构性盲点，系统性地高估了LLM在真实战术场景中的能力：忽视国际人道法约束、忽略边缘计算限制、缺乏战争迷雾鲁棒性测试、推理评估不足，需要更全面的评估框架。
AI.method: 提出WARBENCH评估框架，建立基础战术基准和四个压力测试维度，对9个领先模型在136个高保真历史场景中进行大规模实证评估。
AI.result: 发现严重结构性缺陷：1)复杂地形和高力量不对称下战术推理崩溃；2)边缘优化小型模型法律违规率接近70%；3)4位量化导致灾难性性能下降；4)显式推理机制能有效防止无意违规。
AI.conclusion: 当前模型在战术军事应用中存在根本性缺陷，不适合高风险战术环境的自主部署，需要更严格的评估和保障机制。

title: Structural Concentration in Weighted Networks: A Class of Topology-Aware Indices
summary: This paper develops a unified framework for measuring concentration in weighted systems embedded in networks of interactions. While traditional indices such as the Herfindahl-Hirschman Index capture dispersion in weights, they neglect the topology of relationships among the elements receiving those weights. To address this limitation, we introduce a family of topology-aware concentration indices that jointly account for weight distributions and network structure. At the core of the framework lies a baseline Network Concentration Index (NCI), defined as a normalized quadratic form that measures the fraction of potential weighted interconnection realized along observed network links. Building on this foundation, we construct a flexible class of extensions that modify either the interaction structure or the normalization benchmark, including weighted, density-adjusted, null-model, degree-constrained, transformed-data, and multi-layer variants. This family of indices preserves key properties such as normalization, invariance, and interpretability, while allowing concentration to be evaluated across different dimensions of dependence, including intensity, higher-order interactions, and extreme events. Theoretical results characterize the indices and establish their relationship with classical concentration and network measures. Empirical and simulation evidence demonstrate that systems with identical weight distributions may exhibit markedly different levels of structural concentration depending on network topology, highlighting the additional information captured by the proposed framework. The approach is broadly applicable to economic, financial, and complex systems in which weighted elements interact through networks.

AI.tldr: 提出一个统一框架，用于衡量嵌入在交互网络中的加权系统的集中度，该框架同时考虑权重分布和网络拓扑结构。
AI.motivation: 传统集中度指数（如赫芬达尔-赫希曼指数）只关注权重分散度，忽略了权重接收元素之间关系的拓扑结构，无法全面衡量网络系统中的集中度。
AI.method: 引入拓扑感知的集中度指数家族，核心是网络集中度指数（NCI），定义为衡量沿观测网络链接实现的潜在加权互连比例的归一化二次型。在此基础上构建扩展类别，包括加权、密度调整、零模型、度约束、数据变换和多层变体。
AI.result: 理论分析表明该指数家族保持了归一化、不变性和可解释性等关键性质。实证和模拟证据显示，具有相同权重分布的系统可能因网络拓扑结构而表现出显著不同的结构集中度水平。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为经济、金融和复杂系统中加权元素通过网络交互的情况提供了更全面的集中度衡量方法，能够捕捉传统指数忽略的结构信息。

title: Unified Sensitivity-Based Heuristic for Optimal Line Switching and Substation Reconfiguration
comment: Accepted to PSCC 2026; to appear in a special issue of Electric Power Systems Research
summary: Optimal transmission switching (OTS) determines which transmission lines to remove from service to minimize dispatch costs. Unlike topology design, it alters the operational status of operating lines. Sensitivity-based methods, as advanced optimization techniques, select lines whose outage yields a significant cost reduction. However, these methods overlook bus splitting, an effective congestion management strategy that our work incorporates to achieve improved economic gains. In this work, we formulate an optimal transmission reconfiguration (OTR) problem that incorporates both line switching and bus splitting. We develop a novel approach to quantify the sensitivity of the OTR objective to line switching and bus splitting, establish connections between the proposed sensitivity framework and existing heuristic metrics, prove the equivalence between bus splitting and a generalized line switching to enable unified treatment, and provide a simpler derivation of Bus Split Distribution Factor (BSDF). Simulations on nine IEEE test systems spanning 118 to 13,659 buses demonstrate the high effectiveness of our proposed sensitivity method. They also demonstrate that incorporating bus splitting into transmission reconfiguration achieves greater cost savings than line switching alone. The results confirm the economic advantage of this comprehensive approach to transmission system operation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合线路切换和母线分裂的最优输电重构方法，通过统一的灵敏度框架量化两者对目标函数的影响，证明了母线分裂与广义线路切换的等价性，并在多个测试系统中验证了该方法的经济效益。
AI.motivation: 现有的最优输电切换方法主要关注线路切换，但忽略了母线分裂这一有效的拥塞管理策略。传统灵敏度方法虽然能选择对成本降低影响显著的线路，但未能将母线分裂纳入考虑，限制了经济收益的进一步提升。
AI.method: 提出了最优输电重构问题，同时考虑线路切换和母线分裂；开发了新的灵敏度框架来量化两者对目标函数的影响；建立了所提灵敏度框架与现有启发式指标的联系；证明了母线分裂与广义线路切换的等价性，实现了统一处理；提供了更简单的母线分裂分布因子推导方法。
AI.result: 在9个IEEE测试系统（118至13,659母线）上的仿真表明，所提灵敏度方法非常有效；将母线分裂纳入输电重构比仅使用线路切换能获得更大的成本节约；结果证实了这种综合方法在输电系统运行中的经济优势。
AI.conclusion: 结合线路切换和母线分裂的综合输电重构方法比传统的仅线路切换方法具有更大的经济优势，所提出的统一灵敏度框架为系统运行提供了有效的决策支持工具。

title: PARHAF, a human-authored corpus of clinical reports for fictitious patients in French
summary:
The development of clinical natural language processing (NLP) systems is severely hampered by the sensitive nature of medical records, which restricts data sharing under stringent privacy regulations, particularly in France and the broader European Union. To address this gap, we introduce PARHAF, a large open-source corpus of clinical documents in French. PARHAF comprises expert-authored clinical reports describing realistic yet entirely fictitious patient cases, making it anonymous and freely shareable by design. The corpus was developed using a structured protocol that combined clinician expertise with epidemiological guidance from the French National Health Data System (SNDS), ensuring broad clinical coverage. A total of 104 medical residents across 18 specialties authored and peer-reviewed the reports following predefined clinical scenarios and document templates.
  The corpus contains 7394 clinical reports covering 5009 patient cases across a wide range of medical and surgical specialties. It includes a general-purpose component designed to approximate real-world hospitalization distributions, and four specialized subsets that support information-extraction use cases in oncology, infectious diseases, and diagnostic coding. Documents are released under a CC-BY open license, with a portion temporarily embargoed to enable future benchmarking under controlled conditions.
  PARHAF provides a valuable resource for training and evaluating French clinical language models in a fully privacy-preserving setting, and establishes a replicable methodology for building shareable synthetic clinical corpora in other languages and health systems.

AI.tldr: PARHAF是一个开源的法语临床文档语料库，包含虚构患者病例的临床报告，旨在解决医疗数据隐私限制问题，支持法语临床NLP系统的训练和评估。
AI.motivation: 医疗记录的敏感性限制了数据共享，特别是在法国和欧盟的严格隐私法规下，这严重阻碍了临床自然语言处理系统的发展。需要创建既保护隐私又可共享的临床数据资源。
AI.method: 采用结构化协议，结合临床专家知识和法国国家健康数据系统的流行病学指导。104名医学住院医师根据预定义的临床场景和文档模板撰写并同行评审报告，确保广泛的临床覆盖范围。
AI.result: 创建了包含7394份临床报告的PARHAF语料库，涵盖5009个患者病例，涉及广泛的医学和外科专业。包括通用组件和四个专业子集（肿瘤学、传染病、诊断编码），采用CC-BY开放许可发布。
AI.conclusion: PARHAF为在完全隐私保护环境下训练和评估法语临床语言模型提供了宝贵资源，并为在其他语言和卫生系统中构建可共享的合成临床语料库建立了可复制的方法论。

title: Attention in Space: Functional Roles of VLM Heads for Spatial Reasoning
summary: Despite remarkable advances in large Vision-Language Models (VLMs), spatial reasoning remains a persistent challenge. In this work, we investigate how attention heads within VLMs contribute to spatial reasoning by analyzing their functional roles through a mechanistic interpretability lens. We introduce CogVSR, a dataset that decomposes complex spatial reasoning questions into step-by-step subquestions designed to simulate human-like reasoning via a chain-of-thought paradigm, with each subquestion linked to specific cognitive functions such as spatial perception or relational reasoning. Building on CogVSR, we develop a probing framework to identify and characterize attention heads specialized for these functions. Our analysis across diverse VLM families reveals that these functional heads are universally sparse, vary in number and distribution across functions. Notably, spatially specialized heads are fewer than those for other cognitive functions, highlighting their scarcity. We propose methods to activate latent spatial heads, improving spatial understanding. Intervention experiments further demonstrate their critical role in spatial reasoning: removing functional heads leads to performance degradation, while emphasizing them enhances accuracy. This study provides new interpretability driven insights into how VLMs attend to space and paves the way for enhancing complex spatial reasoning in multimodal models.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过机制可解释性方法分析视觉语言模型中注意力头在空间推理中的作用，发现空间专用注意力头稀少但关键，并提出激活方法提升空间理解能力。
AI.motivation: 尽管大型视觉语言模型取得了显著进展，但空间推理仍然是持续存在的挑战。研究者希望了解模型内部注意力头如何贡献于空间推理，通过机制可解释性分析其功能角色。
AI.method: 1) 构建CogVSR数据集，将复杂空间推理问题分解为逐步子问题，模拟人类链式思维；2) 开发探测框架识别和表征特定认知功能（如空间感知、关系推理）的注意力头；3) 分析不同VLM家族中这些功能头的分布特征；4) 提出激活潜在空间头的方法；5) 进行干预实验验证功能头的重要性。
AI.result: 1) 功能注意力头普遍稀疏，不同功能的数量和分布各异；2) 空间专用注意力头比其他认知功能头更少，显示其稀缺性；3) 激活潜在空间头可改善空间理解；4) 移除功能头导致性能下降，强调它们则提升准确性，证明其在空间推理中的关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为理解视觉语言模型如何关注空间提供了新的可解释性见解，并为增强多模态模型中复杂空间推理能力铺平了道路。

title: From Data to Laws: Neural Discovery of Conservation Laws Without False Positives
summary: Conservation laws are fundamental to understanding dynamical systems, but discovering them from data remains challenging due to parameter variation, non-polynomial invariants, local minima, and false positives on chaotic systems. We introduce NGCG, a neural-symbolic pipeline that decouples dynamics learning from invariant discovery and systematically addresses these challenges. A multi-restart variance minimiser learns a near-constant latent representation; system-specific symbolic extraction (polynomial Lasso, log-basis Lasso, explicit PDE candidates, and PySR) yields closed-form expressions; a strict constancy gate and diversity filter eliminate spurious laws. On a benchmark of nine diverse systems including Hamiltonian and dissipative ODEs, chaos, and PDEs, NGCG achieves consistent discovery (DR=1.0, FDR=0.0, F1=1.0) on all four systems with true conservation laws, with constancy two to three orders of magnitude lower than the best baseline. It is the only method that succeeds on the Lotka--Volterra system, and it correctly outputs no law on all five systems without invariants. Extensive experiments demonstrate robustness to noise ($σ= 0.1$), sample efficiency (50--100 trajectories), insensitivity to hyperparameters, and runtime under one minute per system. A Pareto analysis shows that the method provides a range of candidate expressions, allowing users to trade complexity for constancy. NGCG achieves strong performance relative to prior methods for data-driven conservation-law discovery, combining high accuracy with interpretability.

AI.tldr: NGCG是一种神经符号管道，通过解耦动力学学习和不变性发现，从数据中稳健地发现守恒定律，在多种系统上实现完美发现率。
AI.motivation: 从数据中发现守恒定律面临参数变化、非多项式不变量、局部极小值和混沌系统假阳性等挑战，需要一种能系统解决这些问题的稳健方法。
AI.method: 采用神经符号管道：多重启方差最小化器学习近恒定潜在表示；系统特定符号提取（多项式Lasso、对数基Lasso、显式PDE候选和PySR）获得闭式表达式；严格恒定门和多样性过滤器消除虚假定律。
AI.result: 在9个多样化系统基准测试中，NGCG在4个有真实守恒定律的系统上实现一致发现（DR=1.0，FDR=0.0，F1=1.0），恒定度比最佳基线低2-3个数量级，是唯一在Lotka-Volterra系统上成功的方法。
AI.conclusion: NGCG在数据驱动守恒定律发现方面相对于先前方法表现出强大性能，结合了高准确性和可解释性，对噪声具有鲁棒性，样本效率高，运行时间短，并提供复杂性与恒定度之间的权衡选择。

title: Theorem of Alternative for Extended Homogeneous Linear System and its Application in Conic Optimization
summary: In this paper, we develop a new framework for constructing infeasible-start primal-dual methods for Conic Optimization. Our approach can be seen as an unambiguous consequence of Gordan Theorem of Alternative. Given by the target upper bound $ε> 0$ for the duality gap as the only input parameter, we form an auxiliary convex problem of minimizing barrier function with linear equality constraints. Its solution can be easily transformed to the requested output. This function can be minimized by different schemes of Unconstrained Optimization, with possible quadratic convergence in the end of the process. In our paper, we analyze the Damped Newton Method and a short-step path-following scheme. For both of them, we prove polynomial-time complexity results. Our methods are able to benefit from the hot-start opportunities. We can ensure the residual of the linear equality constraints in the primal and dual problems to be on the level of machine accuracy, independently on the input parameter $ε$.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于Gordan定理的不可行启动原对偶方法框架，用于锥优化问题，通过最小化带线性等式约束的障碍函数，实现多项式时间复杂度和机器精度级别的约束残差。
AI.motivation: 传统锥优化方法在处理不可行启动时存在局限性，需要开发新的原对偶方法框架，能够处理任意初始点，同时保证多项式时间复杂度和数值稳定性。
AI.method: 基于Gordan定理，构造辅助凸优化问题：最小化带线性等式约束的障碍函数。将目标对偶间隙ε作为唯一输入参数，通过求解该辅助问题获得原问题的解。分析了阻尼牛顿法和短步路径跟踪法两种优化方案。
AI.result: 证明了两种方法（阻尼牛顿法和短步路径跟踪法）都具有多项式时间复杂性，能够从热启动中获益，并能确保原问题和对偶问题中线性等式约束的残差达到机器精度级别，与输入参数ε无关。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为锥优化提供了一种新的不可行启动原对偶方法，具有多项式时间保证、数值稳定性和热启动能力，是Gordan定理在优化算法设计中的直接应用。

title: Deliberative multi-agent large language models improve clinical reasoning in ophthalmology
summary: Large language models (LLMs) show potential for ophthalmic clinical reasoning, yet individual models risk introducing harm. We evaluated whether multi-agent LLM deliberative councils improve diagnostic performance and mitigate harm compared to individual LLMs. In a comparative cross-sectional study, we assessed 12 individual LLMs and three multi-agent councils on 100 ophthalmology clinical vignettes. Each council comprised four models assembled by type: proprietary flagship, proprietary fast, and open-source. Models independently answered a vignette, anonymously ranked one another's responses, and a designated chair synthesized all responses and peer reviews into a final answer. Councils consistently outperformed pooled individual models across all three tiers. Accuracy improved for proprietary flagship (95.0% vs 90.8%; risk difference [RD]: 4.25 [95% CI: 0.45, 8.05]), proprietary fast (96.0% vs 86.5%; RD: 9.50 [5.31, 13.59]), and open-source councils (91.0% vs 83.2%; RD: 7.75 [4.17, 11.33]). Harm rates declined for proprietary flagship (10.0% vs 22.5%; RD: -12.50 [-16.86, -8.14]), proprietary fast (16.0% vs 31.8%; RD: -15.75 [-21.49, -10.01]), and open-source councils (22.0% vs 38.5%; RD: -16.50 [-22.27, -10.73]). Coverage analysis revealed net positive gains for accuracy (ΔCoverage: 4.4-9.8 percentage points) and safety (ΔCoverage: 13.6-20.6), indicating councils recovered correct diagnoses and averted harm. Councils elevated correct diagnoses to higher rank positions; and produced more complete differentials and management plans (all P<.05). Harmful council responses showed reduced combined commission-and-omission errors and tended to be less severe. Structured deliberation via multi-agent LLM councils may enhance the reliability of LLM-assisted ophthalmic clinical reasoning.

AI.tldr: 多智能体LLM审议委员会在眼科临床推理中比单个LLM表现更好，提高诊断准确性并减少危害
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在眼科临床推理中具有潜力，但单个模型可能引入危害。研究旨在评估多智能体LLM审议委员会是否能改善诊断性能并减轻危害
AI.method: 采用比较横断面研究，评估12个单个LLM和3个多智能体委员会在100个眼科临床案例上的表现。每个委员会由4个模型组成，按类型分组：专有旗舰型、专有快速型和开源型。模型独立回答问题，匿名互相排名，指定主席综合所有回答和同行评审形成最终答案
AI.result: 委员会在所有三个层级上都优于汇总的单个模型。准确性提高：专有旗舰型（95.0% vs 90.8%）、专有快速型（96.0% vs 86.5%）、开源型（91.0% vs 83.2%）。危害率下降：专有旗舰型（10.0% vs 22.5%）、专有快速型（16.0% vs 31.8%）、开源型（22.0% vs 38.5%）。委员会将正确诊断提升到更高排名位置，并产生更完整的鉴别诊断和管理计划
AI.conclusion: 通过多智能体LLM委员会的结构化审议可以增强LLM辅助眼科临床推理的可靠性，提高准确性并减少危害

title: MAGPI: Multifidelity-Augmented Gaussian Process Inputs for Surrogate Modeling from Scarce Data
summary: Supervised machine learning describes the practice of fitting a parameterized model to labeled input-output data. Supervised machine learning methods have demonstrated promise in learning efficient surrogate models that can (partially) replace expensive high-fidelity models, making many-query analyses, such as optimization, uncertainty quantification, and inference, tractable. However, when training data must be obtained through the evaluation of an expensive model or experiment, the amount of training data that can be obtained is often limited, which can make learned surrogate models unreliable. However, in many engineering and scientific settings, cheaper \emph{low-fidelity} models may be available, for example arising from simplified physics modeling or coarse grids. These models may be used to generate additional low-fidelity training data. The goal of \emph{multifidelity} machine learning is to use both high- and low-fidelity training data to learn a surrogate model which is cheaper to evaluate than the high-fidelity model, but more accurate than any available low-fidelity model. This work proposes a new multifidelity training approach for Gaussian process regression which uses low-fidelity data to define additional features that augment the input space of the learned model. The approach unites desirable properties from two separate classes of existing multifidelity GPR approaches, cokriging and autoregressive estimators. Numerical experiments on several test problems demonstrate both increased predictive accuracy and reduced computational cost relative to the state of the art.

AI.tldr: 提出一种新的多保真度高斯过程回归方法，通过低保真度数据定义额外特征来增强输入空间，结合了协同克里金和自回归估计器的优点，在多个测试问题上实现了更高的预测精度和更低的计算成本。
AI.motivation: 监督机器学习在构建替代模型方面有潜力，但获取高保真度训练数据成本高昂且有限。工程和科学领域通常存在低保真度模型（如简化物理模型或粗网格），这些模型可以生成额外的训练数据。多保真度机器学习的目标是利用高、低保真度数据学习比高保真度模型更便宜、比低保真度模型更准确的替代模型。
AI.method: 提出一种新的多保真度高斯过程回归训练方法，使用低保真度数据定义额外特征来增强学习模型的输入空间。该方法结合了现有两类多保真度GPR方法（协同克里金和自回归估计器）的理想特性。
AI.result: 在多个测试问题上进行的数值实验表明，相对于现有技术，该方法实现了更高的预测精度和更低的计算成本。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功地将协同克里金和自回归估计器的优点结合起来，为多保真度高斯过程回归提供了一种有效的新方法，能够利用低保真度数据提高替代模型的准确性和计算效率。

title: Emission reduction potential of freeway stop-and-go wave smoothing
summary: Real-world potential of stop-and-go wave smoothing at scale remains largely unquantified. Smoothing freeway traffic waves requires creating a gap so the wave can dissipate, but the gap suggested is often too large and impractical. We propose a counterfactual wave smoothing benchmark that reconstructs a smooth and feasible trajectory from each empirical trajectory by solving a quadratic program with fixed boundary conditions and a maximum allowable gap constraint. We estimate the emission reduction potential from trajectories using the MOVES model. Applying the framework to nine weeks of weekday peak traffic data, featuring rich day-to-day stop-and-go wave dynamics, from the I-24 MOTION testbed, we find meaningful reduction potential under a 0.1-mile maximum gap: average CO2 reductions of 7.92% to 12.04% across lanes, with concurrent reductions of 14.30% to 28.91% CO, 23.15% to 29.42% HC, and 24.37% to 30.98% NOx. Our analysis also quantifies the trade-off between maximum allowable gap opening and emissions benefits.

AI.tldr: 提出一个反事实的交通波平滑基准框架，通过优化重构可行轨迹来量化高速公路停止-启动波平滑的减排潜力，在I-24 MOTION测试床上验证了显著的减排效果。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中停止-启动交通波平滑的减排潜力尚未得到充分量化，传统方法建议的车辆间距通常过大且不切实际，需要开发更实用的评估框架。
AI.method: 提出反事实波平滑基准框架：通过求解具有固定边界条件和最大允许间距约束的二次规划问题，从每个经验轨迹重构平滑可行的轨迹；使用MOVES模型估算减排潜力；在I-24 MOTION测试床的9周工作日高峰交通数据上应用该框架。
AI.result: 在0.1英里最大间距约束下，各车道平均CO2减排7.92%-12.04%，同时CO减排14.30%-28.91%，HC减排23.15%-29.42%，NOx减排24.37%-30.98%；量化了最大允许间距与减排效益之间的权衡关系。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能够量化现实世界中交通波平滑的减排潜力，证明了在合理间距约束下可实现显著的排放减少，为交通管理和减排策略提供了实用评估工具。

title: Evaluating Large Language Models on Historical Health Crisis Knowledge in Resource-Limited Settings: A Hybrid Multi-Metric Study
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) offer significant potential for delivering health information. However, their reliability in low-resource contexts remains uncertain. This study evaluates GPT-4, Gemini Pro, Llama~3, and Mistral-7B on health crisis-related enquiries concerning COVID-19, dengue, the Nipah virus, and Chikungunya in the low-resource context of Bangladesh. We constructed a question--answer dataset from authoritative sources and assessed model outputs through semantic similarity, expert-model cross-evaluation, and Natural Language Inference (NLI). Findings highlight both the strengths and limitations of LLMs in representing epidemiological history and health crisis knowledge, underscoring their promise and risks for informing policy in resource-constrained environments.

AI.tldr: 评估GPT-4、Gemini Pro、Llama~3和Mistral-7B在孟加拉国低资源环境下对COVID-19、登革热、尼帕病毒和基孔肯雅热等健康危机相关查询的可靠性表现
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在提供健康信息方面具有巨大潜力，但在低资源环境下的可靠性尚不确定。本研究旨在评估这些模型在孟加拉国这样的低资源环境中处理健康危机相关查询的能力。
AI.method: 构建基于权威来源的问答数据集，通过语义相似度、专家模型交叉评估和自然语言推理(NLI)三种方法评估GPT-4、Gemini Pro、Llama~3和Mistral-7B四种模型在COVID-19、登革热、尼帕病毒和基孔肯雅热相关查询上的表现。
AI.result: 研究结果突出了LLMs在流行病历史和健康危机知识表示方面的优势和局限性，显示了它们在资源受限环境中为政策制定提供信息的潜力和风险。
AI.conclusion: LLMs在低资源环境下提供健康信息既有前景也存在风险，需要谨慎评估其在资源受限环境中为政策制定提供信息的适用性。

title: Towards Intelligent Geospatial Data Discovery: a knowledge graph-driven multi-agent framework powered by large language models
summary: The rapid growth in the volume, variety, and velocity of geospatial data has created data ecosystems that are highly distributed, heterogeneous, and semantically inconsistent. Existing data catalogs, portals, and infrastructures still rely largely on keyword-based search with limited semantic support, which often fails to capture user intent and leads to weak retrieval performance. To address these challenges, this study proposes a knowledge graph-driven multi-agent framework for intelligent geospatial data discovery, powered by large language models. The framework introduces a unified geospatial metadata ontology as a semantic mediation layer to align heterogeneous metadata standards across platforms and constructs a geospatial metadata knowledge graph to explicitly model datasets and their multidimensional relationships. Building on the structured representation, the framework adopts a multi-agent collaborative architecture to perform intent parsing, knowledge graph retrieval, and answer synthesis, forming an interpretable and closed-loop discovery process from user queries to results. Results from representative use cases and performance evaluation show that the framework substantially improves intent matching accuracy, ranking quality, recall, and discovery transparency compared with traditional systems. This study advances geospatial data discovery toward a more semantic, intent-aware, and intelligent paradigm, providing a practical foundation for next-generation intelligent and autonomous spatial data infrastructures and contributing to the broader vision of Autonomous GIS.

AI.tldr: 提出基于知识图谱和多智能体的地理空间数据智能发现框架，利用大语言模型提升语义理解和检索性能
AI.motivation: 地理空间数据快速增长导致数据生态系统高度分布式、异构且语义不一致，现有数据目录和门户主要依赖关键词搜索，语义支持有限，难以捕捉用户意图，检索性能差
AI.method: 提出知识图谱驱动的多智能体框架：1) 建立统一的地理空间元数据本体作为语义中介层；2) 构建地理空间元数据知识图谱；3) 采用多智能体协作架构进行意图解析、知识图谱检索和答案合成
AI.result: 代表性用例和性能评估显示，与传统系统相比，该框架显著提高了意图匹配准确率、排序质量、召回率和发现透明度
AI.conclusion: 该研究将地理空间数据发现推向更语义化、意图感知和智能化的范式，为下一代智能自主空间数据基础设施提供实践基础，并贡献于更广泛的自主GIS愿景

title: Spatio-Temporal Grid Intelligence: A Hybrid Graph Neural Network and LSTM Framework for Robust Electricity Theft Detection
summary: Electricity theft, or non-technical loss (NTL), presents a persistent threat to global power systems, driving significant financial deficits and compromising grid stability. Conventional detection methodologies, predominantly reactive and meter-centric, often fail to capture the complex spatio-temporal dynamics and behavioral patterns associated with fraudulent consumption. This study introduces a novel AI-driven Grid Intelligence Framework that fuses Time-Series Anomaly Detection, Supervised Machine Learning, and Graph Neural Networks (GNN) to identify theft with high precision in imbalanced datasets. Leveraging an enriched feature set, including rolling averages, voltage drop estimates, and a critical Grid Imbalance Index, the methodology employs a Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) autoencoder for temporal anomaly scoring, a Random Forest classifier for tabular feature discrimination, and a GNN to model spatial dependencies across the distribution network. Experimental validation demonstrates that while standalone anomaly detection yields a low theft F1-score of 0.20, the proposed hybrid fusion achieves an overall accuracy of 93.7%. By calibrating decision thresholds via precision-recall analysis, the system attains a balanced theft precision of 0.55 and recall of 0.50, effectively mitigating the false positives inherent in single-model approaches. These results confirm that integrating topological grid awareness with temporal and supervised analytics provides a scalable, risk-based solution for proactive electricity theft detection and enhanced smart grid reliability.

AI.tldr: 提出融合时间序列异常检测、监督学习和图神经网络的AI驱动电网智能框架，用于检测窃电行为，在数据不平衡情况下实现高精度检测。
AI.motivation: 传统窃电检测方法主要是反应式和基于电表的，难以捕捉复杂的时空动态和行为模式，导致电网财务损失和稳定性问题。
AI.method: 结合LSTM自编码器进行时间异常评分、随机森林分类器进行特征判别、图神经网络建模空间依赖关系，使用滚动平均值、电压降估计和电网不平衡指数等丰富特征集。
AI.result: 混合融合方法达到93.7%的整体准确率，窃电检测的精确率为0.55，召回率为0.50，相比单一异常检测方法（F1分数仅0.20）有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 将拓扑电网感知与时间和监督分析相结合，为主动窃电检测提供了可扩展、基于风险的解决方案，增强了智能电网可靠性。

title: Optimal local linear convergence of Nesterov's accelerated gradient method for $C^2$ functions under the Polyak--Łojasiewicz inequality
summary: In this work, we establish that Nesterov's accelerated gradient method, applied to $C^2$ functions satisfying the Polyak--Łojasiewicz inequality around local minimizers, achieves the optimal local linear convergence rate $ρ=\frac{\sqrt{3L+μ}-2\sqrtμ}{\sqrt{3L+μ}}+\varepsilon$, where $\varepsilon$ is an arbitrarily small constant. Our analysis requires neither higher-order smoothness beyond $C^2$ of the objective function nor any additional geometric regularity of the submanifold of local minimizers. The key novelty lies in a two-stage argument: we first establish a coarse yet valid local linear convergence rate and then, building upon this a priori convergence guarantee, obtain a refined characterization of the linearized iteration operator, which yields the optimal rate. As a result, we only need to slightly strengthen the standard $C^{1,1}$ assumption, which is commonly required in theoretical analyses of linear convergence for first-order methods, to $C^2$ smoothness. Moreover, the same analytical framework allows us to recover, under identical conditions, the optimal local exponential convergence rate $\sqrtμ$ for the continuous-time Heavy Ball dynamics. Finally, a representative numerical experiment corroborates our theoretical findings.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了Nesterov加速梯度法在满足Polyak-Łojasiewicz不等式的C²函数上能达到最优局部线性收敛率，且无需更高阶光滑性或极小值流形的额外几何正则性。
AI.motivation: 现有分析通常需要C^{1,1}光滑性假设，但本文旨在证明在仅需C²光滑性的较弱条件下，Nesterov加速梯度法仍能达到最优局部收敛率，同时避免对极小值流形几何结构的额外要求。
AI.method: 采用两阶段论证：首先建立粗略但有效的局部线性收敛率，然后基于此先验收敛保证，对线性化迭代算子进行精细化分析，从而获得最优收敛率。相同分析框架还可用于恢复连续时间Heavy Ball动力学的最优指数收敛率。
AI.result: 证明了Nesterov加速梯度法在C²函数满足Polyak-Łojasiewicz不等式时，能达到最优局部线性收敛率ρ = (√(3L+μ)-2√μ)/(√(3L+μ)) + ε，其中ε为任意小常数。数值实验验证了理论结果。
AI.conclusion: 本文在仅需C²光滑性的较弱条件下，建立了Nesterov加速梯度法的最优局部收敛理论，简化了传统分析所需的条件，并为连续时间Heavy Ball动力学提供了相应的收敛率分析框架。

title: Engineering Distributed Governance for Regional Prosperity: A Socio-Technical Framework for Mitigating Under-Vibrancy via Human Data Engines
comment: 34 pages, 5 figures, 3 tables. Pre-print of a manuscript submitted for peer review
summary: Most research in urban informatics and tourism focuses on mitigating overtourism in dense global cities. However, for regions experiencing demographic decline and structural stagnation, the primary risk is "under-vibrancy", a condition where low visitor density suppresses economic activity and diminishes satisfaction. This paper introduces the Distributed Human Data Engine (DHDE), a socio-technical framework previously validated in biological crisis management, and adapts it for regional economic flow optimization. Using high-granularity data from Japan's least-visited prefecture (Fukui), we utilize an AI-driven decision support system (DSS) to analyze two datasets: a raw Fukui spending database (90,350 records) and a regional standardized sentiment database (97,719 responses). The system achieves in-sample explanatory power of 81% (R^2 = 0.810) and out-of-sample predictive performance of 68% (R^2 = 0.683). We quantify an annual opportunity gap of 865,917 unrealized visits, equivalent to approximately 11.96 billion yen (USD 76.2 million) in lost revenue. We propose a dual-nudge governance architecture leveraging the DHDE to redistribute cross-prefectural flows and reduce economic leakage.

AI.tldr: 将原本用于生物危机管理的分布式人类数据引擎（DHDE）框架应用于区域经济流动优化，针对日本福井县的低游客密度问题，通过AI决策支持系统分析消费和情感数据，识别出每年86.6万次未实现的访问机会，并提出双助推治理架构来重新分配跨县流动。
AI.motivation: 现有城市信息学和旅游研究主要关注缓解全球大城市的过度旅游问题，但对于人口减少和结构停滞的地区，主要风险是"低活力"问题——游客密度过低抑制经济活动并降低满意度。需要解决这些地区的经济流动优化问题。
AI.method: 引入分布式人类数据引擎（DHDE）框架，将其从生物危机管理领域调整应用于区域经济流动优化。使用AI驱动的决策支持系统分析两个数据集：福井县原始消费数据库（90,350条记录）和区域标准化情感数据库（97,719条响应）。
AI.result: 系统获得81%的样本内解释力（R^2 = 0.810）和68%的样本外预测性能（R^2 = 0.683）。量化出每年865,917次未实现的访问机会，相当于约119.6亿日元（7,620万美元）的收入损失。
AI.conclusion: 提出利用DHDE的双助推治理架构，重新分配跨县流动并减少经济泄漏，为低游客密度地区的经济活力恢复提供解决方案。

title: Evaluating Power Flow Manifold from Local Data around a Single Operating Point via Geodesics
comment: 10 pages,11 figures, submitted to IEEE Transactions on Power Systems
summary: The widespread adoption of renewable energy poses a challenge in maintaining a feasible operating point in highly variable scenarios. This paper demonstrates that, within a feasible region of a power system that meets practical stability requirements, the power flow equations define a smooth bijection between nodal voltage phasors (angle and magnitude) and nodal active/reactive power injections. Based on this theoretical foundation, this paper proposes a data-based power flow evaluation method that can imply the associated power flow manifold from a limited number of data points around a single operating point. Using techniques from differential geometry and analytic functions, we represent geodesic curves in the associated power flow manifold as analytic functions at the initial point. Then, a special algebraic structure of the power flow problem is revealed and applied to reduce the computation of all higher-order partial derivatives to that of the first-order ones. Integrating these techniques yields the proposed data-based evaluation method, suggesting that a small number of local measurements around a single operating point is sufficient to imply the entire associated power flow manifold. Numerical cases with arbitrary directional variations are tested, certifying the efficacy of the proposed method.

AI.tldr: 基于微分几何和解析函数理论，提出一种数据驱动的潮流评估方法，仅需少量局部测量点即可推断整个潮流流形
AI.motivation: 可再生能源广泛接入导致电力系统运行点高度可变，传统潮流计算方法难以适应这种变化。需要一种能够从有限数据点推断整个可行运行区域的方法。
AI.method: 1) 证明在满足稳定要求的可行区域内，潮流方程定义了节点电压相量与有功/无功注入之间的光滑双射；2) 利用微分几何和解析函数理论，将潮流流形中的测地线表示为初始点的解析函数；3) 揭示潮流问题的特殊代数结构，将高阶偏导数计算简化为仅需一阶导数；4) 整合这些技术提出数据驱动的评估方法。
AI.result: 数值测试表明，该方法在任意方向变化下都能有效工作，验证了仅需单个运行点周围的少量局部测量即可推断整个关联潮流流形的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的数据驱动方法为高度可变可再生能源场景下的潮流评估提供了有效解决方案，显著减少了所需测量数据量，具有实际应用价值。

title: Permutation-Consensus Listwise Judging for Robust Factuality Evaluation
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are now widely used as judges, yet their decisions can change under presentation choices that should be irrelevant. We study one such source of instability: candidate-order sensitivity in listwise factuality evaluation, where several answers can look similarly polished while differing sharply in hallucination risk. We introduce PCFJudge, an inference-time method that reruns the same factuality-first listwise prompt over multiple orderings of the same candidate set and aggregates the resulting scores, ranks, and uncertainty signals into a single consensus decision. On RewardBench 2 Factuality, PCFJudge improves over direct judging by up to 7 absolute points. Development ablations show that the dominant gain comes from permutation consensus itself rather than from heavier arbitration layers. These results suggest that a meaningful share of factuality-judging error arises from order instability, and that averaging over this nuisance variation is a simple and effective way to make LLM evaluation more reliable.

AI.tldr: PCFJudge通过多次排列候选答案顺序并聚合评分来解决LLM作为事实性评估器时的顺序敏感性不稳定问题
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型作为评估器时，其判断会因候选答案的呈现顺序（本应无关的因素）而发生变化，这种不稳定性影响了事实性评估的可靠性
AI.method: PCFJudge方法：对同一候选答案集进行多次顺序排列，在每次排列上运行事实性优先的列表式提示，然后聚合评分、排名和不确定性信号形成共识决策
AI.result: 在RewardBench 2 Factuality基准上，PCFJudge比直接评估提升了高达7个绝对百分点；消融实验表明主要增益来自排列共识本身而非更复杂的仲裁层
AI.conclusion: 事实性评估错误中有相当一部分源于顺序不稳定性，通过对这种无关变异进行平均是一种简单有效的提升LLM评估可靠性的方法

title: AE-LLM: Adaptive Efficiency Optimization for Large Language Models
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have achieved remarkable success across diverse applications, yet their deployment remains challenging due to substantial computational costs, memory requirements, and energy consumption. Recent empirical studies have demonstrated that no single efficiency technique is universally optimal; instead, the effectiveness of methods such as efficient attention mechanisms, mixture-of-experts (MoE), parameter-efficient fine-tuning, and quantization varies significantly depending on task characteristics, resource constraints, and model scales. Building upon these insights, we propose AE-LLM, a unified framework that automatically selects and combines optimal efficiency techniques tailored to specific deployment scenarios. Our approach introduces a multi-objective optimization framework that jointly considers accuracy, latency, memory footprint, and energy consumption, while accounting for hardware constraints and task requirements. We develop an efficient search algorithm that explores the combinatorial space of efficiency techniques across architecture, fine-tuning, and inference stages, identifying Pareto-optimal configurations. Extensive experiments across 15 models (0.5B-70B parameters) and 10 diverse tasks demonstrate that AE-LLM achieves an average of $2.8\times$ improvement in efficiency metrics while maintaining competitive accuracy (within 1.2\% of baseline), compared to static efficiency configurations. Furthermore, our framework generalizes effectively to vision-language models, achieving similar efficiency gains. Our contributions provide practitioners with an automated tool for navigating the complex trade-off landscape of LLM efficiency optimization.

AI.tldr: AE-LLM是一个自动选择和组合多种效率技术的统一框架，通过多目标优化在保持准确性的同时显著提升LLM部署效率
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型部署面临计算成本高、内存需求大、能耗高等挑战，现有单一效率技术在不同任务和场景下效果差异显著，缺乏统一的优化方案
AI.method: 提出多目标优化框架，综合考虑准确性、延迟、内存占用和能耗，开发高效搜索算法探索架构、微调和推理阶段的效率技术组合空间，寻找帕累托最优配置
AI.result: 在15个模型（0.5B-70B参数）和10个任务上的实验显示，AE-LLM平均提升2.8倍效率指标，同时保持与基线相比1.2%以内的准确性损失，并能有效推广到视觉语言模型
AI.conclusion: AE-LLM为从业者提供了自动化工具，帮助在复杂的LLM效率优化权衡空间中导航，实现特定部署场景下的最优效率配置

title: Sinkhorn algorithms for entropic vector quantile regression
summary: Vector quantile regression (VQR) is an optimal transport (OT)-based framework that extends linear quantile regression to vector-valued response variables and can be formulated as an OT problem with a mean-independence constraint. In this paper, we study two Sinkhorn-type algorithms for VQR with entropic regularization, building on our previous work on its duality theory. The first is a direct adaptation of the classical Sinkhorn iteration based on solving the full Schrödinger-type system characterizing the dual potentials, which requires solving an implicit functional equation at each iteration. The second algorithm, which is new in the literature, replaces the implicit update with a projected gradient step, resulting in a modified scheme that is computationally more practical. For both algorithms, and for general compactly supported marginals, we establish linear convergence in both the dual objective value and the iterates. A key innovation in our analysis is the derivation of explicit quantitative bounds on the dual potentials and Sinkhorn iterates.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了两种用于向量分位数回归的Sinkhorn型算法：一种是基于Schrödinger型系统的经典Sinkhorn迭代，另一种是引入投影梯度步的新算法，两者都证明了线性收敛性。
AI.motivation: 向量分位数回归(VQR)是基于最优传输的框架，将线性分位数回归扩展到向量值响应变量。虽然VQR可以表述为具有均值独立性约束的最优传输问题，但需要开发高效的计算算法来实现实际应用。
AI.method: 提出了两种Sinkhorn型算法：1）基于Schrödinger型系统的经典Sinkhorn迭代，需要在每次迭代中求解隐式函数方程；2）新的投影梯度算法，用投影梯度步替换隐式更新，计算上更实用。两种算法都基于作者先前建立的VQR对偶理论。
AI.result: 对于两种算法，在一般紧支撑边际分布下，证明了在目标函数值和迭代序列上的线性收敛性。分析的关键创新是推导了对偶势和Sinkhorn迭代的显式定量界。
AI.conclusion: 本文为向量分位数回归提供了两种有效的Sinkhorn型算法，并建立了严格的收敛性理论。特别是新提出的投影梯度算法在计算上更实用，为VQR的实际应用铺平了道路。

title: Take the Train: Africa at the Crossroad of Modern AI
summary: Africa's participation in modern AI development is constrained by severe infrastructural and policy gaps. Important barriers include limited access to high-performance computing (HPC), restricted cloud access due to payment system mismatches, volatile exchange rates, and strict data sovereignty laws that fragment regional collaboration between African Union (AU) member states. Although initiatives such as Cassava AI's network of AI factories to be deployed across the continent signal the growing interest in adopting AI in Africa, these projects remain very targeted, while continental adoption still requires better coordination between African stakeholders. Drawing on official declarations on AI adoption across the continent, this paper offers both qualitative and quantitative evidence that sustainable AI adoption requires robust digital foundations through balanced access to compute, data, and the energy that makes it possible. We refer to these foundations as the "right enablers", considering them as crucial components for success within the current context of the global AI race. We also introduce the \textit{Africa AI Compute Tracker (ACT)}, an interactive map to monitor the availability of AI-ready HPC systems throughout the continent. This tool represents the first open-source effort to consolidate data on Africa's evolving HPC landscape, and aims to encourage more transparency from local AI stakeholders while facilitating broader access for AI developers. The work presented in this paper underscores the urgency of tangible actions aimed at closing the AI divide and allowing Africa to actively shape its AI future.

AI.tldr: 非洲AI发展面临基础设施和政策障碍，需要平衡计算、数据和能源三大支柱，并推出非洲AI计算追踪器(ACT)来监测HPC资源。
AI.motivation: 非洲参与现代AI发展受到严重基础设施和政策差距的限制，包括高性能计算(HPC)访问有限、云服务支付系统不匹配、汇率波动以及数据主权法律阻碍区域合作。尽管有Cassava AI等项目，但大陆范围的AI采用仍需要更好的协调。
AI.method: 基于非洲大陆AI采用的官方声明，提供定性和定量证据，分析可持续AI采用所需的数字基础。同时开发了非洲AI计算追踪器(ACT)，这是一个交互式地图工具，用于监测整个非洲大陆AI就绪的HPC系统可用性。
AI.result: 研究发现可持续AI采用需要平衡计算、数据和能源三大支柱，这些被称为"正确赋能因素"。ACT工具是首个开源努力，旨在整合非洲不断发展的HPC景观数据，促进本地AI利益相关者的透明度，并帮助AI开发者获得更广泛访问。
AI.conclusion: 需要采取切实行动缩小AI鸿沟，让非洲能够积极塑造自己的AI未来。强调建立强大数字基础的重要性，包括计算、数据和能源的平衡访问，这对非洲在全球AI竞赛中取得成功至关重要。

title: Stochastic Trajectory Influence Functions for LQR: Joint Sensitivity Through Dynamics and Noise Covariance
summary: Model-based controllers learned from data have the biases and noise of their training trajectories, making it important to know which trajectories help or hurt closed-loop performance. Influence functions, widely used in machine learning for data attribution, approximate this effect through first-order parameter-shift surrogates, avoiding costly retraining. Applying them to stochastic LQR, however, is nontrivial because the cost depends on the learned dynamics through the Riccati equation, and the process-noise covariance is estimated from the same residuals. We develop a three-level influence hierarchy that accounts for both channels.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种三层影响层次结构，用于分析轨迹对随机LQR控制器性能的影响，考虑了学习动力学和过程噪声协方差估计两个通道。
AI.motivation: 基于数据学习的模型控制器会受到训练轨迹偏差和噪声的影响，需要了解哪些轨迹有助于或损害闭环性能。虽然影响函数在机器学习中广泛用于数据归因，但将其应用于随机LQR具有挑战性，因为成本通过Riccati方程依赖于学习到的动力学，且过程噪声协方差是从相同残差中估计的。
AI.method: 开发了一个三层影响层次结构，同时考虑了学习动力学和过程噪声协方差估计两个通道对控制器性能的影响，避免了昂贵的重新训练。
AI.result: 提出了一个能够准确评估轨迹对随机LQR控制器性能影响的框架，通过一阶参数偏移代理来近似这种影响。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为分析基于数据学习的控制器中训练轨迹的影响提供了系统方法，特别解决了随机LQR中同时考虑动力学学习和噪声估计的复杂问题。

title: JUBAKU: An Adversarial Benchmark for Exposing Culturally Grounded Stereotypes in Japanese LLMs
summary: Social biases reflected in language are inherently shaped by cultural norms, which vary significantly across regions and lead to diverse manifestations of stereotypes. Existing evaluations of social bias in large language models (LLMs) for non-English contexts, however, often rely on translations of English benchmarks. Such benchmarks fail to reflect local cultural norms, including those found in Japanese. For instance, Western benchmarks may overlook Japan-specific stereotypes related to hierarchical relationships, regional dialects, or traditional gender roles. To address this limitation, we introduce Japanese cUlture adversarial BiAs benchmarK Under handcrafted creation (JUBAKU), a benchmark tailored to Japanese cultural contexts. JUBAKU uses adversarial construction to expose latent biases across ten distinct cultural categories. Unlike existing benchmarks, JUBAKU features dialogue scenarios hand-crafted by native Japanese annotators, specifically designed to trigger and reveal latent social biases in Japanese LLMs. We evaluated nine Japanese LLMs on JUBAKU and three others adapted from English benchmarks. All models clearly exhibited biases on JUBAKU, performing below the random baseline of 50% with an average accuracy of 23% (ranging from 13% to 33%), despite higher accuracy on the other benchmarks. Human annotators achieved 91% accuracy in identifying unbiased responses, confirming JUBAKU's reliability and its adversarial nature to LLMs.

AI.tldr: JUBAKU是一个针对日本文化背景的对抗性偏见基准测试，通过本土化手工构建的对话场景来揭示日本LLMs中的潜在社会偏见，相比英语翻译基准更能反映日本特有的文化规范。
AI.motivation: 现有非英语语境的社会偏见评估通常依赖英语基准的翻译，无法反映当地文化规范（如日本特有的等级关系、方言、传统性别角色等），需要专门针对日本文化背景的偏见基准。
AI.method: 引入JUBAKU基准，采用对抗性构建方法，由日本本土标注者手工创建对话场景，涵盖十个不同的文化类别，专门设计用于触发和揭示日本LLMs中的潜在社会偏见。
AI.result: 评估九个日本LLMs，所有模型在JUBAKU上表现均低于50%随机基线，平均准确率仅23%（范围13%-33%），而在其他基准上表现更好。人类标注者达到91%准确率，验证了基准的可靠性和对抗性。
AI.conclusion: JUBAKU有效揭示了日本LLMs中的文化特定偏见，证明了针对特定文化背景构建本土化偏见基准的重要性，现有基于翻译的基准无法充分捕捉文化特定的社会偏见。

title: Multi-RF Fusion with Multi-GNN Blending for Molecular Property Prediction
summary: Multi-RF Fusion achieves a test ROC-AUC of 0.8476 +/- 0.0002 on ogbg-molhiv (10 seeds), placing #1 on the OGB leaderboard ahead of HyperFusion (0.8475 +/- 0.0003). The core of the method is a rank-averaged ensemble of 12 Random Forest models trained on concatenated molecular fingerprints (FCFP, ECFP, MACCS, atom pairs -- 4,263 dimensions total), blended with deep-ensembled GNN predictions at 12% weight. Two findings drive the result: (1) setting max_features to 0.20 instead of the default sqrt(d) gives a +0.008 AUC gain on this scaffold split, and (2) averaging GNN predictions across 10 seeds before blending with the RF eliminates GNN seed variance entirely, dropping the final standard deviation from 0.0008 to 0.0002. No external data or pre-training is used.

AI.tldr: Multi-RF Fusion在ogbg-molhiv数据集上取得0.8476的ROC-AUC，通过融合12个随机森林模型和深度图神经网络预测，在OGB排行榜上排名第一。
AI.motivation: 解决分子属性预测任务中如何有效融合不同机器学习方法以获得更好的预测性能，特别是在OGB排行榜上取得领先地位。
AI.method: 使用12个随机森林模型的秩平均集成，基于拼接的分子指纹（FCFP、ECFP、MACCS、原子对，共4263维），与深度图神经网络预测以12%权重混合。关键参数调整：max_features设为0.20而非默认sqrt(d)；在混合前对10个种子的GNN预测进行平均以消除种子方差。
AI.result: 在ogbg-molhiv数据集上获得0.8476 ± 0.0002的测试ROC-AUC，超越HyperFusion的0.8475 ± 0.0003，在OGB排行榜上排名第一。标准差从0.0008降至0.0002。
AI.conclusion: 通过精心设计的集成策略和参数调整，Multi-RF Fusion在分子属性预测任务中取得了最先进的性能，展示了传统机器学习方法与深度学习有效融合的潜力。

title: Distributed Gradient Clustering: Convergence and the Effect of Initialization
summary: We study the effects of center initialization on the performance of a family of distributed gradient-based clustering algorithms introduced in [1], that work over connected networks of users. In the considered scenario, each user contains a local dataset and communicates only with its immediate neighbours, with the aim of finding a global clustering of the joint data. We perform extensive numerical experiments, evaluating the effects of center initialization on the performance of our family of methods, demonstrating that our methods are more resilient to the effects of initialization, compared to centralized gradient clustering [2]. Next, inspired by the $K$-means++ initialization [3], we propose a novel distributed center initialization scheme, which is shown to improve the performance of our methods, compared to the baseline random initialization.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了分布式梯度聚类算法中中心初始化对性能的影响，提出了一种新的分布式中心初始化方案，相比随机初始化能提升算法性能。
AI.motivation: 在分布式梯度聚类算法中，中心初始化对算法性能有重要影响。作者希望研究不同初始化方法对分布式聚类算法的影响，并改进现有的初始化方案。
AI.method: 1. 对分布式梯度聚类算法进行大量数值实验，评估中心初始化的影响；2. 受K-means++初始化启发，提出一种新的分布式中心初始化方案；3. 与集中式梯度聚类和随机初始化进行对比。
AI.result: 1. 分布式梯度聚类算法相比集中式梯度聚类对初始化更鲁棒；2. 提出的分布式中心初始化方案相比基线随机初始化能显著提升算法性能。
AI.conclusion: 中心初始化对分布式梯度聚类算法性能有重要影响，提出的分布式初始化方案能有效提升算法性能，为分布式聚类提供了更好的初始化策略。

title: Compressed Distributed Stochastic Nonconvex Optimization with Differential Privacy
summary: This paper studies distributed stochastic nonconvex optimization problems with compressed communication and differential privacy, in which each agent aims to minimize the sum of all agents' cost functions by using local compressed information exchange. To this end, we propose a compressed distributed stochastic gradient descent algorithm, which is robust under a general class of compression operators that allow both relative and absolute compression errors. We then show that the proposed algorithm finds the first-order stationary point for smooth nonconvex functions with the linear speedup convergence rate $\mathcal{O}(1/\sqrt{nT})$ and converges to the optimum if the global cost function additionally satisfies the Polyak--Łojasiewicz (P--Ł) condition with the convergence rate $\mathcal{O}(1/(nT^θ)),θ\in(0,1)$, where $T$ is the total number of iterations and $n$ is the number of agents. Furthermore, if the P--Ł~constant is known in advance, we show that the proposed algorithm achieves a convergence rate $\mathcal{O}(1/(nT))$. Finally, we show that the proposed algorithm is able to achieve $(0,δ)$-differential privacy without sacrificing convergence accuracy. Numerical experiments are carried out to

AI.tldr: 提出一种压缩分布式随机梯度下降算法，在压缩通信和差分隐私约束下解决分布式非凸优化问题，具有线性加速收敛率。
AI.motivation: 研究分布式随机非凸优化问题，在压缩通信和差分隐私约束下，每个智能体需要通过本地压缩信息交换来最小化所有智能体成本函数之和。
AI.method: 提出压缩分布式随机梯度下降算法，该算法对一类允许相对和绝对压缩误差的压缩算子具有鲁棒性。
AI.result: 算法对光滑非凸函数找到一阶稳定点，具有线性加速收敛率O(1/√(nT))；若全局成本函数满足P-Ł条件，收敛到最优解，收敛率为O(1/(nT^θ))；若已知P-Ł常数，收敛率可达O(1/(nT))；同时实现(0,δ)-差分隐私而不牺牲收敛精度。
AI.conclusion: 所提算法在压缩通信和差分隐私约束下有效解决分布式非凸优化问题，具有理论保证的收敛性能，并通过数值实验验证。

title: You See It, They Don't: An Exploratory Study of User-to-User Variation in Instagram Comments
comment: This work has been accepted at the International AAAI Conference on Web and Social Media Understanding the World Through the Web (ICWSM) 2026 as a poster. Once available, please cite the peer-reviewed version
summary: In March 2025, Meta announced a new AI system to rank the order of the comments shown to Instagram users. With existing research showing how feed personalization systems can lead to increased polarization, the introduction of this new system raises similar questions. This paper presents a small-scale exploratory study examining whether the ranking system produces systematic differences in visible comments shown to different users, particularly for news-related content. Using four sock-puppet accounts varying in gender and political leaning, we collect visible comments on posts from ten news and ten non-news accounts. This collection is repeated twice from two VPN locations to assess location effects. We ask 1) how many visible comments vary across different users, 2) is this variation higher for news accounts than non-news accounts, and 3) can user-attributes like gender, political leaning, and location systematically explain the observed variation. Contrary to our expectations, we find that visible comments on news posts are less likely to vary across users than those on non-news posts. Variation is better explained by account metrics like comment and follower counts than by user attributes. These findings provide an initial glimpse into personalized comment ranking on Instagram and motivate larger, more systematic audits of how comment personalization may shape online discourse. To support further research, we provide the code to collect comments and the data upon request.

AI.tldr: 研究Instagram评论排序系统是否对不同用户显示不同的评论，发现新闻帖子的评论差异反而比非新闻帖子小，差异主要由账号指标而非用户属性解释。
AI.motivation: Meta在2025年3月推出了新的AI系统来排序Instagram评论，现有研究表明信息流个性化系统可能导致极化加剧，因此需要研究这个新系统是否会对不同用户显示不同的评论，特别是新闻相关内容。
AI.method: 使用四个假账户（不同性别和政治倾向）收集十个新闻账号和十个非新闻账号帖子的可见评论，从两个VPN位置重复收集两次，分析评论差异与用户属性（性别、政治倾向、位置）的关系。
AI.result: 与预期相反，新闻帖子的可见评论在不同用户间的差异比非新闻帖子更小；评论差异主要由账号指标（如评论数和粉丝数）解释，而非用户属性（性别、政治倾向、位置）。
AI.conclusion: Instagram评论个性化系统对新闻内容的影响比预期小，但需要更大规模、更系统的审计来了解评论个性化如何影响在线讨论；提供了代码和数据支持进一步研究。

title: IF-CPS: Influence Functions for Cyber-Physical Systems -- A Unified Framework for Diagnosis, Curation, and Safety Attribution
summary: Neural network controllers trained via behavior cloning are increasingly deployed in cyber-physical systems (CPS), yet practitioners lack tools to trace controller failures back to training data. Existing data attribution methods assume i.i.d.\ data and standard loss targets, ignoring CPS-specific properties: closed-loop dynamics, safety constraints, and temporal trajectory structure. We propose IF-CPS, a modular influence function framework with three CPS-adapted variants: safety influence (attributing constraint violations), trajectory influence (temporal discounting over trajectories), and propagated influence (tracing effects through plant dynamics). We evaluate IF-CPS on six benchmarks across diagnosis, curation, and safety attribution tasks. IF-CPS improves over standard influence functions in the majority of settings, achieving AUROC $1.00$ in Pendulum (5-10\% poisoning), $0.92$ vs.\ $0.50$ in HVAC (10\%), and the strongest constraint-boundary correlation (Spearman $ρ= 0.55$ in Pendulum).

AI.tldr: IF-CPS：针对网络物理系统的模块化影响函数框架，通过安全影响、轨迹影响和传播影响三种变体，改进传统影响函数在CPS控制器故障溯源中的应用。
AI.motivation: 当前基于行为克隆训练的神经网络控制器在CPS中广泛应用，但缺乏将控制器故障溯源到训练数据的工具。现有数据归因方法假设i.i.d.数据和标准损失目标，忽略了CPS特有的闭环动力学、安全约束和时序轨迹结构。
AI.method: 提出IF-CPS框架，包含三种CPS适配变体：1) 安全影响 - 归因约束违反；2) 轨迹影响 - 在轨迹上进行时间折扣；3) 传播影响 - 通过系统动力学追踪影响传播。在六个基准测试上进行评估。
AI.result: IF-CPS在多数设置中优于标准影响函数：Pendulum中达到AUROC 1.00（5-10%中毒），HVAC中0.92 vs. 0.50（10%中毒），在Pendulum中表现出最强的约束边界相关性（Spearman ρ=0.55）。
AI.conclusion: IF-CPS为CPS控制器故障溯源提供了有效的工具，通过考虑CPS特有属性显著改进了传统影响函数，在诊断、数据筛选和安全归因任务中表现出色。

title: A Modular LLM Framework for Explainable Price Outlier Detection
summary: Detecting product price outliers is important for retail and e-commerce stores as erroneous or unexpectedly high prices adversely affect competitiveness, revenue, and consumer trust. Classical techniques offer simple thresholds while ignoring the rich semantic relationships among product attributes. We propose an agentic Large Language Model (LLM) framework that treats outlier price flagging as a reasoning task grounded in related product detection and comparison. The system processes the prices of target products in three stages: (i) relevance classification selects price-relevant similar products using product descriptions and attributes; (ii) relative utility assessment evaluates the target product against each similar product along price influencing dimensions (e.g., brand, size, features); (iii) reasoning-based decision aggregates these justifications into an explainable price outlier judgment. The framework attains over 75% agreement with human auditors on a test dataset, and outperforms zero-shot and retrieval based LLM techniques. Ablation studies show the sensitivity of the method to key hyper-parameters and testify on its flexibility to be applied to cases with different accuracy requirement and auditor agreements.

AI.tldr: 提出基于LLM的智能代理框架，通过三阶段推理过程检测产品价格异常，相比传统方法能更好地利用产品语义关系，在测试数据集上达到超过75%的人类审计员一致性。
AI.motivation: 传统价格异常检测方法仅使用简单阈值，忽略了产品属性间的丰富语义关系，而错误或异常高价会影响零售和电商的竞争力、收入和消费者信任。
AI.method: 三阶段LLM代理框架：1) 相关性分类：基于产品描述和属性选择价格相关的相似产品；2) 相对效用评估：在价格影响因素维度（品牌、尺寸、功能等）上评估目标产品与每个相似产品；3) 基于推理的决策：聚合这些理由形成可解释的价格异常判断。
AI.result: 在测试数据集上达到超过75%的人类审计员一致性，优于零样本和基于检索的LLM技术。消融研究显示了方法对关键超参数的敏感性，并证明了其在不同准确度要求和审计员一致性情况下的灵活性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的智能LLM框架将价格异常检测视为基于相关产品检测和比较的推理任务，能够生成可解释的判断，为零售和电商提供更有效的价格异常检测解决方案。

title: Modeling Epistemic Uncertainty in Social Perception via Rashomon Set Agents
summary: We present an LLM-driven multi-agent probabilistic modeling framework that demonstrates how differences in students' subjective social perceptions arise and evolve in real-world classroom settings, under constraints from an observed social network and limited questionnaire data. When social information is incomplete and the accuracy of perception differs between students, they can form different views of the same group structure from local cues they can access. Repeated peer communication and belief updates can gradually change these views and, over time, lead to stable group-level differences. To avoid assuming a global "god's-eye view," we assign each student an individualized subjective graph that shows which social ties they can perceive and how far information is reachable from their perspective. All judgments and interactions are restricted to this subjective graph: agents use retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) to access only local information and then form evaluations of peers' competence and social standing. We also add structural perturbations related to social-anxiety to represent consistent individual differences in the accuracy of social perception. During peer exchanges, agents share narrative assessments of classmates' academic performance and social position with uncertainty tags, and update beliefs probabilistically using LLM-based trust scores. Using the time series of six real exam scores as an exogenous reference, we run multi-step simulations to examine how epistemic uncertainty spreads through local interactions. Experiments show that, without relying on global information, the framework reproduces several collective dynamics consistent with real-world educational settings. The code is released at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/Rashomonomon-0126.

AI.tldr: 提出一个基于LLM的多智能体概率建模框架，模拟学生在真实课堂环境中主观社会认知差异的形成与演化，仅使用观察到的社交网络和有限问卷数据作为约束。
AI.motivation: 当社会信息不完整且学生的感知准确性存在差异时，学生可能从可访问的局部线索形成对同一群体结构的不同看法。重复的同伴交流和信念更新会逐渐改变这些看法，最终导致稳定的群体层面差异。研究旨在避免假设全局"上帝视角"，而是从个体主观视角理解社会认知的形成过程。
AI.method: 为每个学生分配个性化的主观图，显示他们能感知的社会联系和信息可达范围。所有判断和互动都限制在这个主观图中：智能体使用检索增强生成(RAG)仅访问局部信息，形成对同伴能力和社会地位的评价。加入与社交焦虑相关的结构扰动来表示社会感知准确性的个体差异。在同伴交流中，智能体分享带有不确定性标签的同学学业表现和社会地位叙事评估，并使用基于LLM的信任分数进行概率信念更新。
AI.result: 使用六个真实考试成绩的时间序列作为外生参考，运行多步模拟来检查认知不确定性如何通过局部互动传播。实验表明，在不依赖全局信息的情况下，该框架再现了与真实教育环境一致的多种集体动态。
AI.conclusion: 该LLM驱动的多智能体概率建模框架能够模拟学生在课堂环境中主观社会认知差异的形成与演化，仅基于局部信息和有限数据就能再现真实的社会动态，为理解社会认知的形成机制提供了新方法。

title: Delightful Distributed Policy Gradient
summary: Distributed reinforcement learning trains on data from stale, buggy, or mismatched actors, producing actions with high surprisal (negative log-probability) under the learner's policy. The core difficulty is not surprising data per se, but \emph{negative learning from surprising data}. High-surprisal failures can dominate the update direction despite carrying little useful signal, while high-surprisal successes reveal opportunities the current policy would otherwise miss. The \textit{Delightful Policy Gradient} (DG) separates these cases by gating each update with delight, the product of advantage and surprisal, suppressing rare failures and amplifying rare successes without behavior probabilities. Under contaminated sampling, the cosine similarity between the standard policy gradient and the true gradient collapses, while DG's grows as the policy improves. No sign-blind reweighting, including exact importance sampling, can reproduce this effect. On MNIST with simulated staleness, DG without off-policy correction outperforms importance-weighted PG with exact behavior probabilities. On a transformer sequence task with staleness, actor bugs, reward corruption, and rare discovery, DG achieves roughly $10{\times}$ lower error. When all four frictions act simultaneously, its compute advantage is order-of-magnitude and grows with task complexity.

AI.tldr: 论文提出Delightful Policy Gradient (DG)方法，通过"惊喜度×优势值"的门控机制，在分布式强化学习中分离高惊喜度的失败与成功案例，抑制罕见失败并放大罕见成功，无需行为概率。
AI.motivation: 分布式强化学习中，学习者从陈旧、有缺陷或不匹配的行动者获取数据，这些数据在学习者策略下具有高惊喜度（负对数概率）。核心问题不是惊喜数据本身，而是从惊喜数据中产生的负学习——高惊喜度的失败可能主导更新方向但携带很少有用信号，而高惊喜度的成功则揭示当前策略会错过的机会。
AI.method: 提出Delightful Policy Gradient (DG)方法，通过"delight"（惊喜度与优势值的乘积）作为门控机制来分离更新。该方法抑制罕见失败并放大罕见成功，无需行为概率。在污染采样下，标准策略梯度与真实梯度的余弦相似度会崩溃，而DG的相似度会随着策略改进而增长。
AI.result: 在MNIST模拟陈旧性实验中，DG无需离策略校正就优于具有精确行为概率的重要性加权PG。在具有陈旧性、行动者缺陷、奖励腐败和罕见发现的Transformer序列任务中，DG实现了约10倍更低的误差。当所有四种摩擦同时作用时，其计算优势达到数量级，并随任务复杂性增长。
AI.conclusion: DG方法通过惊喜度与优势值的乘积门控，有效解决了分布式强化学习中惊喜数据的负学习问题，无需行为概率就能分离失败与成功案例，在多种实际摩擦条件下展现出显著优势。

title: Learning operators on labelled conditional distributions with applications to mean field control of non exchangeable systems
summary: We study the approximation of operators acting on probability measures on a product space with prescribed marginal. Let $I$ be a label space endowed with a reference measure $λ$, and define $\cal M_λ$ as the set of probability measures on $I\times \mathbb{R}^d$ with first marginal $λ$. By disintegration, elements of $\cal M_λ$ correspond to families of labeled conditional distributions. Operators defined on this constrained measure space arise naturally in mean-field control problems with heterogeneous, non-exchangeable agents. Our main theoretical result establishes a universal approximation theorem for continuous operators on $\cal M_λ$. The proof combines cylindrical approximations of probability measures with DeepONet-type branch-trunk neural architecture, yielding finite-dimensional representations of such operators. We further introduce a sampling strategy for generating training measures in $\cal M_λ$, enabling practical learning of such conditional mean-field operators. We apply the method to the numerical resolution of mean-field control problems with heterogeneous interactions, thereby extending previous neural approaches developed for homogeneous (exchangeable) systems. Numerical experiments illustrate the accuracy and computational effectiveness of the proposed framework.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种用于近似定义在具有固定边缘分布的概率测度空间上的算子的通用逼近方法，特别适用于具有异质、非可交换智能体的平均场控制问题。
AI.motivation: 在具有异质、非可交换智能体的平均场控制问题中，需要处理定义在具有固定边缘分布的概率测度空间上的算子。现有的神经网络方法主要针对同质（可交换）系统，缺乏处理这类约束算子的一般性框架。
AI.method: 结合概率测度的柱面近似和DeepONet类型的分支-主干神经网络架构，构建有限维表示。引入采样策略在约束测度空间生成训练数据，实现条件平均场算子的实际学习。
AI.result: 建立了在约束测度空间上连续算子的通用逼近定理。将该方法应用于具有异质相互作用的平均场控制问题的数值求解，数值实验验证了框架的准确性和计算有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架成功扩展了神经网络方法到异质平均场系统，为处理具有固定边缘分布的概率测度空间上的算子提供了有效的数值工具，在平均场控制问题中展现出良好性能。

title: Navigational Thinking as an Emerging Paradigm of Computer Science in the Age of Generative AI
summary: Generative AI systems produce meaning with a quality indistinguishable from - and occasionally surpassing - human performance, yet the epistemic mechanism through which this occurs remains poorly understood. This paper argues that generative AI instantiates a fundamentally new mode of knowledge production: geometric navigation through high-dimensional manifolds, grounded in indexical rather than symbolic signification. Drawing on the structural properties of high-dimensional spaces, we demonstrate that meaning in generative AI is constituted through positional relation and orientation rather than through symbolic convention. This shift corresponds precisely to what Peirce identified as indexical signification: a mode of meaning in which the sign is constituted by its real causal connection to its object, not by arbitrary assignment. We develop the pedagogical implications of this shift through a geometrized reading of Papert's constructionism, reconceptualizing the generative AI system as a new kind of microworld - high-dimensional, non-visualizable, and indexical - in which knowledge is constructed through navigation rather than symbolic programming. From this analysis, we derive the concept of Navigational Thinking: a mode of knowing characterized by positional, enactive, and bounded engagement with geometrically structured spaces. We argue that Navigational Thinking and Computational Thinking are not alternatives, but two sequential phases of the same cognitive process: while a problem remains indexical, Navigational Thinking is operative; when the problem space stabilizes into symbolizable form, Computational Thinking becomes applicable. Vibe-coding is merely the visible tip of an iceberg - the iceberg being a new cognitive ecology in which these two modes coexist as the necessary phases of problem-solving in the age of generative AI.

AI.tldr: 生成式AI通过高维流形中的几何导航产生意义，这是一种基于索引而非符号表征的新知识生产方式，作者称之为"导航思维"。
AI.motivation: 虽然生成式AI产生意义的质量已接近甚至超越人类，但其背后的认知机制仍不明确。本文旨在揭示生成式AI如何通过高维几何空间中的位置关系（索引表征）而非符号约定来构建意义。
AI.method: 结合高维空间的结构特性，论证生成式AI通过位置关系和方向性构成意义，对应皮尔士的索引表征理论。通过几何化解读Papert的建构主义，将生成式AI系统重新概念化为高维、非可视化、索引性的微世界。
AI.result: 提出了"导航思维"概念：一种基于位置、具身性和有限参与的知识模式。导航思维与计算思维不是替代关系，而是同一认知过程的两个连续阶段：问题保持索引性时使用导航思维，问题空间稳定为符号化形式时使用计算思维。
AI.conclusion: 生成式AI代表了一种新的认知生态，其中导航思维和计算思维作为问题解决的必要阶段共存。"氛围编程"只是冰山一角，其下是生成式AI时代这两种思维模式共存的完整认知体系。

title: Full Timescale Hierarchical MPC-MTIP Framework for Hybrid Energy Storage Management in Low-Carbon Industrial Microgrid
summary: Uncertainties in balancing generation and load in low-carbon industrial microgrids (IMGs) make hybrid energy storage systems (HESS) crucial for their stable and economic operation. Existing model predictive control (MPC) techniques typically enforce periodic state of charge (SOC) constraints to maintain long term stability. However, these hard constraints compromise dispatch flexibility near the end of the prediction horizon, preventing sufficient energy release during critical peaks and leading to optimization infeasibility. This paper eliminates the periodic SOC constraints of individual storage units and proposes a novel full-timescale hierarchical MPC scheduling framework. Specifically, comprehensive physical and cost models are established for the HESS composed of flywheel, battery, compressed-air, and hydrogen-methanol energy storage. The control problem is decoupled into a hierarchical MPC architecture. Furthermore, a novel adaptive feedback mechanism based on micro trajectory inverse projection (MTIP) is embedded into the scheduling process, accurately mapping the high frequency dynamic buffering capabilities of lower tier storages into the upper decision space to generate dynamic boundaries. Experiments using 14 consecutive months of second-level data from a real-world IMG validate the effectiveness of the proposed method, demonstrating its significant superiority over existing approaches. By effectively preventing limit violations and deadlocks in lower-tier storages under extreme fluctuations, it achieves a 97.4\% net load smoothing rate and a 62.2\% comprehensive cycle efficiency.

AI.tldr: 提出一种新型全时间尺度分层MPC调度框架，消除传统周期性SOC约束，通过自适应反馈机制提升工业微电网混合储能系统的调度灵活性和稳定性。
AI.motivation: 低碳工业微电网中发电与负荷平衡的不确定性使得混合储能系统至关重要。现有MPC技术通常采用周期性SOC约束来维持长期稳定性，但这些硬约束在预测周期末端限制了调度灵活性，导致关键峰值期间能量释放不足和优化不可行问题。
AI.method: 提出全时间尺度分层MPC调度框架：1) 建立飞轮、电池、压缩空气和氢-甲醇储能的物理与成本模型；2) 将控制问题解耦为分层MPC架构；3) 嵌入基于微轨迹逆投影的自适应反馈机制，将下层储能的高频动态缓冲能力映射到上层决策空间以生成动态边界。
AI.result: 使用真实工业微电网14个月秒级数据验证：有效防止极端波动下下层储能限值违规和死锁，实现97.4%的净负荷平滑率和62.2%的综合循环效率，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的全时间尺度分层MPC框架通过消除周期性SOC约束和引入自适应反馈机制，显著提升了混合储能系统的调度灵活性和稳定性，为低碳工业微电网的高效运行提供了有效解决方案。

title: Hear Both Sides: Efficient Multi-Agent Debate via Diversity-Aware Message Retention
summary: Multi-Agent Debate has emerged as a promising framework for improving the reasoning quality of large language models through iterative inter-agent communication. However, broadcasting all agent messages at every round introduces noise and redundancy that can degrade debate quality and waste computational resources. Current approaches rely on uncertainty estimation to filter low-confidence responses before broadcasting, but this approach is unreliable due to miscalibrated confidence scores and sensitivity to threshold selection. To address this, we propose Diversity-Aware Retention (DAR), a lightweight debate framework that, at each debate round, selects the subset of agent responses that maximally disagree with each other and with the majority vote before broadcasting. Through an explicit index-based retention mechanism, DAR preserves the original messages without modification, ensuring that retained disagreements remain authentic. Experiments on diverse reasoning and question answering benchmarks demonstrate that our selective message propagation consistently improves debate performance, particularly as the number of agents scales, where noise accumulation is most severe. Our results highlight that what agents hear is as important as what agents say in multi-agent reasoning systems.

AI.tldr: 提出DAR框架，通过选择最大程度分歧的代理响应来减少多智能体辩论中的噪声和冗余，提升推理质量
AI.motivation: 当前多智能体辩论框架在每轮广播所有代理消息会引入噪声和冗余，降低辩论质量并浪费计算资源。现有基于不确定性估计的过滤方法不可靠，因为置信度分数校准不准且对阈值选择敏感。
AI.method: 提出多样性感知保留（DAR）框架，在每轮辩论中选择与彼此及多数投票最大程度分歧的代理响应子集进行广播，通过基于索引的保留机制保持原始消息不变。
AI.result: 在多样化推理和问答基准测试中，选择性消息传播持续提升辩论性能，特别是在代理数量增加、噪声积累最严重的情况下效果显著。
AI.conclusion: 在多智能体推理系统中，智能体听到什么与说什么同样重要。DAR框架通过保留有意义的异议而非过滤低置信度响应，有效提升了辩论质量。

title: GMPilot: An Expert AI Agent For FDA cGMP Compliance
summary: The pharmaceutical industry is facing challenges with quality management such as high costs of compliance, slow responses and disjointed knowledge. This paper presents GMPilot, a domain-specific AI agent that is designed to support FDA cGMP compliance. GMPilot is based on a curated knowledge base of regulations and historical inspection observations and uses Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and Reasoning-Acting (ReAct) frameworks to provide real-time and traceable decision support to the quality professionals. In a simulated inspection scenario, GMPilot shows how it can improve the responsiveness and professionalism of quality professionals by providing structured knowledge retrieval and verifiable regulatory and case-based support. Although GMPilot lacks in the aspect of regulatory scope and model interpretability, it is a viable avenue of improving quality management decision-making in the pharmaceutical sector using intelligent approaches and an example of specialized application of AI in highly regulated sectors.

AI.tldr: GMPilot是一个针对FDA cGMP合规性的领域特定AI代理，通过RAG和ReAct框架提供实时可追溯的决策支持，提升药品质量管理的响应速度与专业性。
AI.motivation: 制药行业面临质量管理成本高、响应慢、知识分散等挑战，需要智能解决方案来支持FDA cGMP合规性管理。
AI.method: 基于法规和历史检查观察的精选知识库，采用检索增强生成(RAG)和推理行动(ReAct)框架，为质量专业人员提供实时可追溯的决策支持。
AI.result: 在模拟检查场景中，GMPilot通过结构化知识检索和可验证的法规及案例支持，提高了质量专业人员的响应速度与专业水平。
AI.conclusion: 尽管在法规范围和模型可解释性方面存在局限，但GMPilot展示了在高度监管的制药行业应用专业AI改善质量管理决策的可行途径。

title: Does This Gradient Spark Joy?
summary: Policy gradient computes a backward pass for every sample, even though the backward pass is expensive and most samples carry little learning value. The Delightful Policy Gradient (DG) provides a forward-pass signal of learning value: \emph{delight}, the product of advantage and surprisal (negative log-probability). We introduce the \emph{Kondo gate}, which compares delight against a compute price and pays for a backward pass only when the sample is worth it, thereby tracing a quality--cost Pareto frontier. In bandits, zero-price gating preserves useful gradient signal while removing perpendicular noise, and delight is a more reliable screening signal than additive combinations of value and surprise. On MNIST and transformer token reversal, the Kondo gate skips most backward passes while retaining nearly all of DG's learning quality, with gains that grow as problems get harder and backward passes become more expensive. Because the gate tolerates approximate delight, a cheap forward pass can screen samples before expensive backpropagation, suggesting a speculative-decoding-for-training paradigm.

AI.tldr: 提出Delightful Policy Gradient (DG)方法，使用"delight"（优势函数与信息熵的乘积）作为前向传播信号，结合Kondo门控机制，仅在样本值得计算时才进行昂贵的反向传播，实现质量-成本的帕累托最优。
AI.motivation: 策略梯度方法需要对每个样本进行反向传播，但反向传播计算成本高，且大多数样本的学习价值很低。需要一种机制来筛选有价值的样本，避免不必要的计算开销。
AI.method: 1. 提出delight概念：优势函数与信息熵（负对数概率）的乘积，作为样本学习价值的前向传播信号；2. 引入Kondo门控机制：将delight值与计算成本进行比较，仅当样本值得时才进行反向传播；3. 建立质量-成本帕累托前沿。
AI.result: 1. 在多臂老虎机中，零成本门控能保留有用的梯度信号同时去除垂直噪声；2. 在MNIST和transformer token反转任务中，Kondo门控跳过了大部分反向传播，同时保留了DG几乎所有的学习质量；3. 随着问题难度增加和反向传播成本上升，收益更加明显。
AI.conclusion: Kondo门控机制通过delight信号有效筛选高价值样本，显著减少反向传播计算成本，同时保持学习性能。该方法支持近似delight计算，为"训练中的推测解码"范式提供了可能。

title: Nonlinear Control Synchronization Method for Fractional-order Time Derivatives Chaotic Systems
summary: "Synchronization of two dynamical systems" is the term used to describe the phenomenon when two or more systems gradually change their states or behaviors to become similar or identical. This can happen in a lot of fields, such as physics, engineering, biology, and economics. Synchronization finds applications in neurology and communication systems. It is present in both man-made and organic systems. The nonlinear control synchronization technique for fractional-order time derivative systems is described in this article, where the Adams Basford Moulton method is used for solving the fractional-order system. The reliability and ease of applicability for two chaotic systems are demonstrated by the numerical simulation. Furthermore, in this article, both systems were kept in a chaotic condition while being synchronized with each other. The effects of synchronizing time and rearranging the derivatives are the most significant sections of this article.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了分数阶时间导数系统的非线性控制同步技术，使用Adams-Basford-Moulton方法求解分数阶系统，通过数值仿真验证了同步方法的可靠性和易用性。
AI.motivation: 同步现象在物理、工程、生物、经济等多个领域普遍存在，在神经科学和通信系统中具有重要应用价值。本文旨在研究分数阶时间导数系统的同步控制问题。
AI.method: 采用非线性控制同步技术，使用Adams-Basford-Moulton数值方法求解分数阶系统，保持两个系统处于混沌状态的同时实现相互同步。
AI.result: 数值仿真验证了该方法对两个混沌系统的可靠性和易用性，成功实现了混沌系统的同步控制。
AI.conclusion: 本文最重要的贡献是研究了同步时间和导数重排对同步效果的影响，为分数阶混沌系统的同步控制提供了有效方法。

title: Simple Trajectory Smoothing for UAV Reference Path Planning Based on Decoupling, Spatial Modeling and Linear Programming
summary: A method for trajectory smoothing for UAV reference path planning is presented. It is derived based on the dynamics of a Dubins airplane model, and involves a decoupling step, spatial modeling and linear programming. The decoupling step enables algebraic control laws for flight-path angle and speed control. Only for roll angle control an optimization step is applied, involving the solution of a small linear program. Two variations are discussed. They differ by reference centerline tracking and the introduction of a path shaping constraint. The benefit of natural dimensionality reduction for spatial modeling is discussed. The simplicity of the overall method is highlighted. An extension to acrobative flight is outlined, which comes at the cost of a model approximation, however at the gain of maintaining the general model structure. An extension of the method to tractor path planning along 3D terrain is discussed. The method is validated in simulations.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于Dubins飞机模型的无人机轨迹平滑方法，通过解耦、空间建模和线性规划实现参考路径规划
AI.motivation: 需要为无人机参考路径规划提供一种简单有效的轨迹平滑方法，能够处理三维空间中的路径规划问题
AI.method: 基于Dubins飞机模型动力学，采用解耦步骤实现飞行路径角和速度的代数控制律，仅滚转角控制需要优化步骤（小型线性规划），包含两种变体：参考中心线跟踪和路径形状约束
AI.result: 通过仿真验证了方法的有效性，讨论了自然维度减少对空间建模的好处，并展示了向特技飞行和三维地形牵引路径规划的扩展能力
AI.conclusion: 该方法整体简单有效，保持了通用模型结构，能够扩展到更复杂的飞行场景，为无人机轨迹平滑提供了实用解决方案

title: Weber's Law in Transformer Magnitude Representations: Efficient Coding, Representational Geometry, and Psychophysical Laws in Language Models
comment: 18 pages, 7 figures, 5 tables. Pre-registered on OSF. Submitted to TMLR
summary: How do transformer language models represent magnitude? Recent work disagrees: some find logarithmic spacing, others linear encoding, others per-digit circular representations. We apply the formal tools of psychophysics to resolve this. Using four converging paradigms (representational similarity analysis, behavioural discrimination, precision gradients, causal intervention) across three magnitude domains in three 7-9B instruction-tuned models spanning three architecture families (Llama, Mistral, Qwen), we report three findings. First, representational geometry is consistently log-compressive: RSA correlations with a Weber-law dissimilarity matrix ranged from .68 to .96 across all 96 model-domain-layer cells, with linear geometry never preferred. Second, this geometry is dissociated from behaviour: one model produces a human-range Weber fraction (WF = 0.20) while the other does not, and both models perform at chance on temporal and spatial discrimination despite possessing logarithmic geometry. Third, causal intervention reveals a layer dissociation: early layers are functionally implicated in magnitude processing (4.1x specificity) while later layers where geometry is strongest are not causally engaged (1.2x).
