The review explores the nature of the problems tackled, considering factors such as the level of care, service delivery channels, objectives, criteria, or potential hierarchy, uncertainty, and multi-period settings. Additionally, we discuss the modeling approaches, solution methodologies, and the extent of practical implementation. The goal of this survey is not only to summarize existing work but also to provide a roadmap for future research, offering valuable insights for OR practitioners in the field.

AI.tldr: 本文回顾了过去20年使用优化技术改善发展中国家医疗可及性的战略规划研究，重点关注包含实际案例的文献，分析问题类型、建模方法和实施情况，为未来研究提供路线图。
AI.motivation: 发展中国家医疗可及性问题是实现联合国全民健康覆盖目标的关键挑战，运筹学社区虽已积极参与，但长期战略决策仍面临投资大、影响广的困难，且现有文献多偏理论，需要系统总结实际应用研究。
AI.method: 系统回顾过去20年发表的文献，筛选标准为：使用优化技术、关注医疗可及性战略规划、包含发展中国家案例研究。从问题性质（医疗层级、服务渠道、目标标准、不确定性、多周期等）、建模方法、求解技术和实际实施程度等多个维度进行分析。
AI.result: 综述识别了现有研究在医疗可及性优化方面的关键特征和模式，揭示了理论研究和实际应用之间的差距，总结了不同建模方法和求解技术的应用情况，为运筹学实践者提供了实用参考。
AI.conclusion: 该综述不仅总结了现有研究成果，更重要的是为未来研究提供了路线图，帮助运筹学实践者更好地将优化技术应用于发展中国家医疗可及性的战略规划，弥合理论与实践之间的鸿沟。

title: TrustFed: Enabling Trustworthy Medical AI under Data Privacy Constraints
summary: Protecting patient privacy remains a fundamental barrier to scaling machine learning across healthcare institutions, where centralizing sensitive data is often infeasible due to ethical, legal, and regulatory constraints. Federated learning offers a promising alternative by enabling privacy-preserving, multi-institutional training without sharing raw patient data; however, real-world deployments face severe challenges from data heterogeneity, site-specific biases, and class imbalance, which degrade predictive reliability and render existing uncertainty quantification methods ineffective. Here, we present TrustFed, a federated uncertainty quantification framework that provides distribution-free, finite-sample coverage guarantees under heterogeneous and imbalanced healthcare data, without requiring centralized access. TrustFed introduces a representation-aware client assignment mechanism that leverages internal model representations to enable effective calibration across institutions, along with a soft-nearest threshold aggregation strategy that mitigates assignment uncertainty while producing compact and reliable prediction sets. Using over 430,000 medical images across six clinically distinct imaging modalities, we conduct one of the most comprehensive evaluations of uncertainty-aware federated learning in medical imaging, demonstrating robust coverage guarantees across datasets with diverse class cardinalities and imbalance regimes. By validating TrustFed at this scale and breadth, our study advances uncertainty-aware federated learning from proof-of-concept toward clinically meaningful, modality-agnostic deployment, positioning statistically guaranteed uncertainty as a core requirement for next-generation healthcare AI systems.

AI.tldr: TrustFed是一个联邦不确定性量化框架，为异构和不平衡的医疗数据提供分布无关的有限样本覆盖保证，无需集中访问数据。
AI.motivation: 保护患者隐私是医疗机器学习规模化应用的根本障碍，而联邦学习虽然提供隐私保护的多机构训练方案，但在实际部署中面临数据异构性、站点特定偏差和类别不平衡等挑战，这些因素会降低预测可靠性并使现有不确定性量化方法失效。
AI.method: TrustFed引入了表示感知的客户端分配机制，利用内部模型表示实现跨机构有效校准，以及软最近邻阈值聚合策略，减轻分配不确定性的同时产生紧凑可靠预测集。
AI.result: 使用超过43万张医学图像，涵盖六种临床不同的成像模态，进行了医学成像中不确定性感知联邦学习最全面的评估之一，展示了在不同类别基数和不平衡机制的数据集上具有鲁棒的覆盖保证。
AI.conclusion: 通过大规模验证TrustFed，研究将不确定性感知联邦学习从概念验证推向具有临床意义的模态无关部署，将统计保证的不确定性定位为下一代医疗AI系统的核心要求。

title: Bayesian Scattering: A Principled Baseline for Uncertainty on Image Data
summary: Uncertainty quantification for image data is dominated by complex deep learning methods, yet the field lacks an interpretable, mathematically grounded baseline. We propose Bayesian scattering to fill this gap, serving as a first-step baseline akin to the role of Bayesian linear regression for tabular data. Our method couples the wavelet scattering transform-a deep, non-learned feature extractor-with a simple probabilistic head. Because scattering features are derived from geometric principles rather than learned, they avoid overfitting the training distribution. This helps provide sensible uncertainty estimates even under significant distribution shifts. We validate this on diverse tasks, including medical imaging under institution shift, wealth mapping under country-to-country shift, and Bayesian optimization of molecular properties. Our results suggest that Bayesian scattering is a solid baseline for complex uncertainty quantification methods.

AI.tldr: 提出Bayesian scattering作为图像不确定性量化的可解释、数学基础的基线方法，结合小波散射变换和简单概率头，在分布偏移下提供可靠的不确定性估计
AI.motivation: 图像不确定性量化领域缺乏可解释、数学基础的基线方法，现有方法多依赖复杂的深度学习模型
AI.method: 结合小波散射变换（非学习的深度特征提取器）和简单概率头，利用几何原理而非学习得到的特征避免过拟合
AI.result: 在医疗影像机构偏移、财富地图国家间偏移、分子性质贝叶斯优化等任务中验证了方法的有效性
AI.conclusion: Bayesian scattering可作为复杂不确定性量化方法的坚实基线，提供可解释且数学基础的方法

title: DQN Based Joint UAV Trajectory and Association Planning in NTN Assisted Networks
summary: Advanced Air Mobility (AAM) has emerged as a key pillar of next-generation transportation systems, encompassing a wide range of uncrewed aerial vehicle (UAV) applications. To enable AAM, maintaining reliable and efficient communication links between UAVs and control centers is essential. At the same time, the highly dynamic nature of wireless networks, combined with the limited onboard energy of UAVs, makes efficient trajectory planning and network association crucial. Existing terrestrial networks often fail to provide ubiquitous coverage due to frequent handovers and coverage gaps. To address these challenges, geostationary Earth orbit (GEO) satellites offer a promising complementary solution for extending UAV connectivity beyond terrestrial boundaries. This work proposes an integrated GEO terrestrial network architecture to ensure seamless UAV connectivity. Leveraging artificial intelligence (AI), a deep Q network (DQN) based algorithm is developed for joint UAV trajectory and association planning (JUTAP), aiming to minimize energy consumption, handover frequency, and disconnectivity. Simulation results validate the effectiveness of the proposed algorithm within the integrated GEO terrestrial framework.

AI.tldr: 提出基于深度Q网络(DQN)的联合无人机轨迹与关联规划算法(JUTAP)，在集成GEO卫星与地面网络架构中，最小化无人机能耗、切换频率和断连时间。
AI.motivation: 先进空中交通(AAM)需要可靠的无人机通信，但地面网络存在覆盖盲区和频繁切换问题，而无人机机载能源有限，需要高效轨迹规划和网络关联策略。
AI.method: 构建集成GEO卫星与地面网络架构，开发基于深度Q网络(DQN)的联合无人机轨迹与关联规划算法(JUTAP)，实现轨迹优化和网络选择的联合决策。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，在集成GEO地面网络框架下，所提算法能有效降低无人机能耗、减少切换频率并确保连接可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 集成GEO卫星与地面网络结合AI驱动的轨迹规划算法，为先进空中交通提供了可靠的通信解决方案，解决了地面网络覆盖不足和无人机能源受限问题。

title: BenchBench: Benchmarking Automated Benchmark Generation
summary: Benchmarks are the de facto standard for tracking progress in large language models (LLMs), yet static test sets can rapidly saturate, become vulnerable to contamination, and are costly to refresh. Scalable evaluation of open-ended items often relies on LLM judges, introducing additional sources of bias and prompt sensitivity. We argue that evaluation must extend beyond how well models answer benchmarks to how well models design them. We introduce BenchBench, a three-stage pipeline and dataset for benchmarking automated benchmark generation: (i) extract structured domain cards from seed benchmarks, (ii) prompt multiple designer LLMs to generate quota-controlled suites, and (iii) validate items with a multi-model answerer panel using exact/numeric/symbolic verifiers when possible and rubric-guided judging otherwise, yielding designer--answerer matrices with item-level quality flags and psychometric diagnostics. Across nine variants spanning computer science, mathematics, medicine, and theory-of-mind reasoning (including multilingual and multimodal settings), we generate 16.7K items, retain ~15K core items post-filtering, and produce ~152K graded model--item responses. BenchBench shows that benchmark-design ability is only moderately correlated with answer-time strength (Spearman rho ~0.37), invalidity is negatively associated with discrimination (Pearson r~0.62), and the resulting designer--answerer matrices enable scalable audits of format/modality/language fidelity and suite-dependent self/family interactions. The project is available at: https://github.com/koanatakiyo/BenchBench.

AI.tldr: BenchBench：一个用于评估大语言模型自动生成评测基准能力的框架，通过设计-回答矩阵分析模型在基准设计方面的表现
AI.motivation: 传统静态测试集容易饱和、易受污染且更新成本高，而基于LLM的开放式评估存在偏见和提示敏感性。需要评估模型不仅回答基准的能力，还要评估其设计基准的能力。
AI.method: 三阶段流水线：1) 从种子基准提取结构化领域卡片；2) 提示多个设计者LLM生成配额控制的测试套件；3) 使用多模型回答者面板验证项目，结合精确/数值/符号验证器和基于量表的评判，生成带有质量标记和心理测量诊断的设计者-回答者矩阵。
AI.result: 在计算机科学、数学、医学和心理理论推理等9个变体（包括多语言和多模态）中，生成了16.7K个项目，过滤后保留约15K个核心项目，产生了约152K个评分模型-项目响应。结果显示基准设计能力与回答能力仅中度相关，无效性与区分度负相关。
AI.conclusion: BenchBench框架能够评估LLM的基准设计能力，揭示了设计能力与回答能力的不同，为格式/模态/语言保真度和套件依赖的自/家族交互提供了可扩展的审计方法。

title: A Framework for Low-Latency, LLM-driven Multimodal Interaction on the Pepper Robot
comment: 4 pages, 2 figures. To appear in Proceedings of the 21st ACM/IEEE International Conference on Human-Robot Interaction (HRI '26), Edinburgh, Scotland, March 2026
summary: Despite recent advances in integrating Large Language Models (LLMs) into social robotics, two weaknesses persist. First, existing implementations on platforms like Pepper often rely on cascaded Speech-to-Text (STT)->LLM->Text-to-Speech (TTS) pipelines, resulting in high latency and the loss of paralinguistic information. Second, most implementations fail to fully leverage the LLM's capabilities for multimodal perception and agentic control. We present an open-source Android framework for the Pepper robot that addresses these limitations through two key innovations. First, we integrate end-to-end Speech-to-Speech (S2S) models to achieve low-latency interaction while preserving paralinguistic cues and enabling adaptive intonation. Second, we implement extensive Function Calling capabilities that elevate the LLM to an agentic planner, orchestrating robot actions (navigation, gaze control, tablet interaction) and integrating diverse multimodal feedback (vision, touch, system state). The framework runs on the robot's tablet but can also be built to run on regular Android smartphones or tablets, decoupling development from robot hardware. This work provides the HRI community with a practical, extensible platform for exploring advanced LLM-driven embodied interaction.

AI.tldr: 开发了一个用于Pepper机器人的开源Android框架，通过端到端语音到语音模型和扩展函数调用能力，解决了现有LLM集成中的延迟和功能限制问题。
AI.motivation: 当前将大语言模型集成到社交机器人中存在两个主要问题：1）传统的语音转文本->LLM->文本转语音流水线导致高延迟和副语言信息丢失；2）现有实现未能充分利用LLM的多模态感知和智能控制能力。
AI.method: 提出了一个开源Android框架，包含两个关键创新：1）集成端到端语音到语音模型，实现低延迟交互并保留副语言线索；2）实现扩展的函数调用能力，使LLM成为智能规划器，协调机器人动作并集成多模态反馈。
AI.result: 该框架在机器人平板上运行，也可在普通Android设备上构建，实现了与机器人硬件的解耦开发，为HRI社区提供了一个实用、可扩展的平台。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作为探索先进的LLM驱动的具身交互提供了一个实用的、可扩展的平台，解决了现有集成方案中的关键限制。

title: Bayesian Learning in Episodic Zero-Sum Games
summary: We study Bayesian learning in episodic, finite-horizon zero-sum Markov games with unknown transition and reward models. We investigate a posterior algorithm in which each player maintains a Bayesian posterior over the game model, independently samples a game model at the beginning of each episode, and computes an equilibrium policy for the sampled model. We analyze two settings: (i) Both players use the posterior sampling algorithm, and (ii) Only one player uses posterior sampling while the opponent follows an arbitrary learning algorithm. In each setting, we provide guarantees on the expected regret of the posterior sampling agent. Our notion of regret compares the expected total reward of the learning agent against the expected total reward under equilibrium policies of the true game. Our main theoretical result is an expected regret bound for the posterior sampling agent of order $O(HS\sqrt{ABHK\log(SABHK)})$ where $K$ is the number of episodes, $H$ is the episode length, $S$ is the number of states, and $A,B$ are the action space sizes of the two players. Experiments in a grid-world predator--prey domain illustrate the sublinear regret scaling and show that posterior sampling competes favorably with a fictitious-play baseline.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了零和马尔可夫博弈中的贝叶斯学习，提出了一种后验采样算法，并分析了两种设置下的期望遗憾界。
AI.motivation: 研究零和马尔可夫博弈中未知转移和奖励模型的贝叶斯学习问题，为智能体在对抗性环境中提供理论保证。
AI.method: 提出后验采样算法：每个玩家维护博弈模型的贝叶斯后验，在每个回合开始时独立采样模型，并为采样模型计算均衡策略。
AI.result: 获得了期望遗憾界 O(HS√(ABHK log(SABHK)))，并在网格世界捕食者-猎物领域实验中展示了次线性遗憾增长。
AI.conclusion: 后验采样算法在零和马尔可夫博弈中具有理论保证，实验表明其性能优于虚构博弈基线方法。

title: Politics of Questions in News: A Mixed-Methods Study of Interrogative Stances as Markers of Voice and Power
summary: Interrogatives in news discourse have been examined in linguistics and conversation analysis, but mostly in broadcast interviews and relatively small, often English-language corpora, while large-scale computational studies of news rarely distinguish interrogatives from declaratives or differentiate their functions. This paper brings these strands together through a mixed-methods study of the "Politics of Questions" in contemporary French-language digital news. Using over one million articles published between January 2023 and June 2024, we automatically detect interrogative stances, approximate their functional types, and locate textual answers when present, linking these quantitative measures to a qualitatively annotated subcorpus grounded in semantic and pragmatic theories of questions. Interrogatives are sparse but systematically patterned: they mainly introduce or organize issues, with most remaining cases being information-seeking or echo-like, while explicitly leading or tag questions are rare. Although their density and mix vary across outlets and topics, our heuristic suggests that questions are overwhelmingly taken up within the same article and usually linked to a subsequent answer-like span, most often in the journalist's narrative voice and less often through quoted speech. Interrogative contexts are densely populated with named individuals, organizations, and places, whereas publics and broad social groups are mentioned much less frequently, suggesting that interrogative discourse tends to foreground already prominent actors and places and thus exhibits strong personalization. We show how interrogative stance, textual uptake, and voice can be operationalized at corpus scale, and argue that combining computational methods with pragmatic and sociological perspectives can help account for how questioning practices structure contemporary news discourse.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过混合方法分析法语数字新闻中的疑问句使用模式，发现疑问句虽稀疏但系统化，主要用于引入或组织议题，且多数在文章内得到解答，呈现出强烈的个人化特征。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注广播访谈和小型英语语料库中的疑问句，而大规模计算研究很少区分疑问句与陈述句或其功能。本研究旨在结合计算方法和语用学视角，系统分析当代法语数字新闻中疑问句的政治功能和使用模式。
AI.method: 混合方法研究：使用2023年1月至2024年6月超过100万篇文章，自动检测疑问句立场、近似其功能类型、定位文本答案，并将定量测量与基于语义和语用理论的定性标注子语料库相结合。
AI.result: 疑问句稀疏但系统化：主要用于引入或组织议题，多数为信息寻求或回声式疑问，明确引导性或附加疑问句罕见。疑问句密度和类型因媒体和话题而异，多数在文章内得到解答，常以记者叙事声音呈现。疑问语境中命名个体、组织和地点密集出现，而公众和广泛社会群体提及较少，显示强烈的个人化特征。
AI.conclusion: 研究展示了如何在语料库规模上操作化疑问句立场、文本采纳和声音，并论证结合计算方法与语用学、社会学视角有助于解释疑问实践如何构建当代新闻话语。

title: From Singleton Obstacles to Clutter: Translation Invariant Compositional Avoid Sets
summary: This paper studies obstacle avoidance under translation invariant dynamics using an avoid-side travel cost Hamilton Jacobi formulation. For running costs that are zero outside an obstacle and strictly negative inside it, we prove that the value function is non-positive everywhere, equals zero exactly outside the avoid set, and is strictly negative exactly on it. Under translation invariance, this yields a reuse principle: the value of any translated obstacle is obtained by translating a single template value function. We show that the pointwise minimum of translated template values exactly characterizes the union of the translated single-obstacle avoid sets and provides a conservative inner certificate of unavoidable collision in clutter. To reduce conservatism, we introduce a blockwise composition framework in which subsets of obstacles are merged and solved jointly. This yields a hierarchy of conservative certificates from singleton reuse to the exact clutter value, together with monotonicity under block merging and an exactness criterion based on the existence of a common clutter avoiding control. The framework is illustrated on a Dubins car example in a repeated clutter field.

AI.tldr: 论文提出基于平移不变动力学的障碍物避障方法，通过Hamilton-Jacobi公式建立避障成本函数，证明值函数在障碍物内严格为负、外部为零，并利用平移不变性实现值函数复用，通过块组合减少保守性。
AI.motivation: 在平移不变动力学系统中，传统障碍物避障方法在处理多个障碍物时存在计算复杂性和保守性问题，需要一种能有效复用计算结果并减少保守性的框架。
AI.method: 使用Hamilton-Jacobi公式建立避障成本函数，利用平移不变性实现值函数模板复用，提出块组合框架将障碍物子集合并求解，形成从单障碍物复用到精确群集值的层次化保守证书。
AI.result: 证明值函数在障碍物内严格为负、外部为零，平移模板值函数的最小值精确表征平移单障碍物避障集的并集，块组合框架提供单调性保证和基于公共避障控制存在的精确性判据。
AI.conclusion: 该框架在平移不变动力学系统中实现了障碍物避障值函数的高效复用，通过块组合减少了保守性，在Dubins汽车重复群集场示例中得到验证，为复杂环境中的避障提供了理论保证和实用方法。

title: HiCI: Hierarchical Construction-Integration for Long-Context Attention
summary: Long-context language modeling is commonly framed as a scalability challenge of token-level attention, yet local-to-global information structuring remains largely implicit in existing approaches. Drawing on cognitive theories of discourse comprehension, we propose HiCI (Hierarchical Construction--Integration), a hierarchical attention module that constructs segment-level representations, integrates them into a shared global context, and broadcasts both to condition segment-level attention. We validate HiCI through parameter-efficient adaptation of LLaMA-2 with only <5.5% additional parameters, extending context from 4K to 100K tokens (7B) and 64K tokens (13B). Across language modeling, retrieval, and instruction-following benchmarks, HiCI yields consistent improvements over strong baselines, including matching proprietary models on topic retrieval and surpassing GPT-3.5-Turbo-16K on code comprehension. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of explicit hierarchical structuring as an inductive bias for long-context modeling.

AI.tldr: 提出HiCI分层注意力模块，通过构建段级表示并集成到全局上下文，实现高效的长上下文语言建模，仅用<5.5%额外参数将LLaMA-2扩展到100K/64K上下文。
AI.motivation: 现有长上下文建模方法主要关注token级注意力的可扩展性挑战，但局部到全局的信息结构化仍然是隐式的。受认知理论启发，需要显式的层次化结构作为长上下文建模的归纳偏置。
AI.method: 提出HiCI（Hierarchical Construction-Integration）分层注意力模块：1）构建段级表示；2）集成到共享全局上下文；3）广播两者以调节段级注意力。通过参数高效的方式适配LLaMA-2，仅增加<5.5%参数。
AI.result: 将LLaMA-2的上下文从4K扩展到100K（7B）和64K（13B）token。在语言建模、检索和指令跟随基准测试中持续优于强基线，在主题检索上匹配专有模型，在代码理解上超越GPT-3.5-Turbo-16K。
AI.conclusion: 显式的层次化结构化作为归纳偏置对长上下文建模是有效的，HiCI模块通过认知理论启发的分层注意力机制实现了高效的长上下文扩展。

title: Knowledge Boundary Discovery for Large Language Models
summary: We propose Knowledge Boundary Discovery (KBD), a reinforcement learning based framework to explore the knowledge boundaries of the Large Language Models (LLMs). We define the knowledge boundary by automatically generating two types of questions: (i) those the LLM can confidently answer (within-knowledge boundary) and (ii) those it cannot (beyond-knowledge boundary). Iteratively exploring and exploiting the LLM's responses to find its knowledge boundaries is challenging because of the hallucination phenomenon. To find the knowledge boundaries of an LLM, the agent interacts with the LLM under the modeling of exploring a partially observable environment. The agent generates a progressive question as the action, adopts an entropy reduction as the reward, receives the LLM's response as the observation and updates its belief states. We demonstrate that the KBD detects knowledge boundaries of LLMs by automatically finding a set of non-trivial answerable and unanswerable questions. We validate the KBD by comparing its generated knowledge boundaries with manually crafted LLM benchmark datasets. Experiments show that our KBD-generated question set is comparable to the human-generated datasets. Our approach paves a new way to evaluate LLMs.

AI.tldr: 提出知识边界发现（KBD）框架，使用强化学习探索大语言模型的知识边界，自动生成模型能回答和不能回答的问题，为LLM评估提供新方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以准确探索大语言模型的知识边界，特别是由于幻觉现象的存在，需要一种系统性的方法来发现LLM真正掌握和未掌握的知识范围。
AI.method: 基于强化学习的框架，将LLM视为部分可观测环境，智能体通过生成渐进式问题（动作）、采用熵减少作为奖励、接收LLM响应（观察）并更新信念状态来迭代探索知识边界。
AI.result: KBD能够自动发现非平凡的可回答和不可回答问题集，实验表明KBD生成的问题集与人工构建的基准数据集相当，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: KBD为评估大语言模型的知识边界提供了一种新途径，能够系统性地探索LLM的能力边界，为模型评估和优化提供重要工具。

title: Beyond Token Eviction: Mixed-Dimension Budget Allocation for Efficient KV Cache Compression
summary: Key-value (KV) caching is widely used to accelerate transformer inference, but its memory cost grows linearly with input length, limiting long-context deployment. Existing token eviction methods reduce memory by discarding less important tokens, which can be viewed as a coarse form of dimensionality reduction that assigns each token either zero or full dimension. We propose MixedDimKV, a mixed-dimension KV cache compression method that allocates dimensions to tokens at a more granular level, and MixedDimKV-H, which further integrates head-level importance information. Experiments on long-context benchmarks show that MixedDimKV outperforms prior KV cache compression methods that do not rely on head-level importance profiling. When equipped with the same head-level importance information, MixedDimKV-H consistently outperforms HeadKV. Notably, our approach achieves comparable performance to full attention on LongBench with only 6.25% of the KV cache. Furthermore, in the Needle-in-a-Haystack test, our solution maintains 100% accuracy at a 50K context length while using as little as 0.26% of the cache.

AI.tldr: MixedDimKV是一种混合维度KV缓存压缩方法，通过细粒度维度分配和结合注意力头重要性信息，显著减少内存占用同时保持模型性能
AI.motivation: 现有KV缓存方法内存成本随输入长度线性增长，限制了长上下文部署。现有的token驱逐方法虽然减少内存，但只是粗粒度的维度缩减（要么全维度要么零维度），不够精细
AI.method: 提出MixedDimKV混合维度KV缓存压缩方法，在更细粒度级别为token分配维度；进一步提出MixedDimKV-H，整合注意力头级别的重要性信息
AI.result: 在长上下文基准测试中，MixedDimKV优于不依赖头级重要性分析的现有方法；当配备相同头级重要性信息时，MixedDimKV-H始终优于HeadKV。在LongBench上仅用6.25%的KV缓存就达到与全注意力相当的性能；在Needle-in-a-Haystack测试中，50K上下文长度下保持100%准确率，仅使用0.26%的缓存
AI.conclusion: MixedDimKV通过细粒度的维度分配和头级重要性整合，实现了高效的KV缓存压缩，为长上下文Transformer推理提供了实用的内存优化解决方案

title: User Preference Modeling for Conversational LLM Agents: Weak Rewards from Retrieval-Augmented Interaction
summary: Large language models are increasingly used as personal assistants, yet most lack a persistent user model, forcing users to repeatedly restate preferences across sessions. We propose Vector-Adapted Retrieval Scoring (VARS), a pipeline-agnostic, frozen-backbone framework that represents each user with long-term and short-term vectors in a shared preference space and uses these vectors to bias retrieval scoring over structured preference memory. The vectors are updated online from weak scalar rewards from users' feedback, enabling personalization without per-user fine-tuning. We evaluate on \textsc{MultiSessionCollab}, an online multi-session collaboration benchmark with rich user preference profiles, across math and code tasks. Under frozen backbones, the main benefit of user-aware retrieval is improved interaction efficiency rather than large gains in raw task accuracy: our full VARS agent achieves the strongest overall performance, matches a strong Reflection baseline in task success, and reduces timeout rate and user effort. The learned long-term vectors also align with cross-user preference overlap, while short-term vectors capture session-specific adaptation, supporting the interpretability of the dual-vector design. Code, model, and data are available at https://github.com/YurenHao0426/VARS.

AI.tldr: VARS是一个无需微调的个性化框架，通过长期和短期向量在共享偏好空间中表示用户，利用用户反馈的弱标量奖励在线更新，提升交互效率而非任务准确率。
AI.motivation: 当前大语言模型作为个人助手缺乏持久用户模型，用户需要在不同会话中重复陈述偏好，需要一种无需微调就能实现个性化适配的方法。
AI.method: 提出Vector-Adapted Retrieval Scoring (VARS)框架，使用长期和短期向量在共享偏好空间中表示用户，通过用户反馈的弱标量奖励在线更新向量，利用这些向量偏置结构化偏好记忆的检索评分。
AI.result: 在MultiSessionCollab基准测试中，VARS在冻结骨干模型下实现最强整体性能，与强Reflection基线任务成功率相当，同时降低超时率和用户努力。长期向量与跨用户偏好重叠对齐，短期向量捕捉会话特定适配。
AI.conclusion: VARS证明了用户感知检索的主要优势是提高交互效率而非任务准确率，双向量设计具有可解释性，为无需微调的个性化助手提供了有效框架。

title: Route-Phasing-Split-Encoded Genetic Algorithm for Multi-Satellite On-Orbit Servicing Mission Planning
summary: This article addresses multi-servicer on-orbit servicing mission planning in geosynchronous Earth orbit, where routing decisions are tightly coupled with time-dependent orbital phasing and strict propellant and mission-duration constraints. We propose a Route-Phasing-Split Genetic Algorithm (RPS-GA) that simultaneously optimizes target sequencing, discrete phasing rotation decisions (i.e., the number of phasing revolutions/waiting cycles), and route partitioning across multiple servicing spacecrafts (SSCs). An RPS triplet chromosome encodes route order, phasing rotations, and route splits in a unified structure, enabling split-aware recombination without disrupting feasible multi-servicer route blocks. Feasibility is enforced through a constraint-aware fitness function that ranks feasible solutions based on total $ΔV$, while penalizing propellant and mission duration violations, using aggregate and imbalance penalties. This formulation discourages the concentration of violations on a single servicing spacecraft (SSC). Once a feasible best solution is identified, it is preserved as feasible in subsequent generations, thereby enhancing convergence stability. The framework incorporates split-aware crossover, mutation and a regret-based Large Neighborhood Search for local intensification. Experiments on representative GEO servicing scenarios demonstrate that RPS-GA produces feasible multi-servicer plans with substantially improved fuel efficiency, reducing total $ΔV$ by $24.5\%$, (from $1956.36 \ m/s$ to $ 1476.32\ m/s $) compared with a state-of-the-art LNS-AGA baseline.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于地球同步轨道多服务航天器在轨服务任务规划的RPS-GA算法，通过统一编码路由顺序、相位旋转和路径分割，在严格燃料和时间约束下优化任务规划，相比现有方法显著降低了燃料消耗。
AI.motivation: 地球同步轨道多服务航天器任务规划面临路由决策与时间相关轨道相位、严格燃料和任务时长约束的紧密耦合问题，需要同时优化目标序列、相位旋转决策和多航天器路径分割。
AI.method: 提出RPS-GA算法，使用RPS三元组染色体统一编码路由顺序、相位旋转和路径分割，支持分割感知的交叉重组；采用约束感知的适应度函数评估解的质量，结合分割感知的交叉、变异和基于遗憾的大邻域搜索进行局部强化。
AI.result: 在代表性GEO服务场景实验中，RPS-GA能够生成可行的多服务航天器计划，相比最先进的LNS-AGA基线方法，总ΔV降低了24.5%（从1956.36 m/s降至1476.32 m/s），显著提高了燃料效率。
AI.conclusion: RPS-GA算法有效解决了GEO多服务航天器任务规划中的复杂约束优化问题，通过统一编码和约束感知的进化策略，在保证可行性的同时显著提升了燃料效率，为在轨服务任务规划提供了有效解决方案。

title: Can ChatGPT Really Understand Modern Chinese Poetry?
summary: ChatGPT has demonstrated remarkable capabilities on both poetry generation and translation, yet its ability to truly understand poetry remains unexplored. Previous poetry-related work merely analyzed experimental outcomes without addressing fundamental issues of comprehension. This paper introduces a comprehensive framework for evaluating ChatGPT's understanding of modern poetry. We collaborated with professional poets to evaluate ChatGPT's interpretation of modern Chinese poems by different poets along multiple dimensions. Evaluation results show that ChatGPT's interpretations align with the original poets' intents in over 73% of the cases. However, its understanding in certain dimensions, particularly in capturing poeticity, proved to be less satisfactory. These findings highlight the effectiveness and necessity of our proposed framework. This study not only evaluates ChatGPT's ability to understand modern poetry but also establishes a solid foundation for future research on LLMs and their application to poetry-related tasks.

AI.tldr: 该研究评估了ChatGPT对现代诗歌的理解能力，发现其在73%的情况下能准确理解诗人意图，但在捕捉诗性方面表现不足
AI.motivation: 尽管ChatGPT在诗歌生成和翻译方面表现出色，但其对诗歌的真正理解能力尚未被探索。先前的研究仅分析实验结果，未解决理解的根本问题
AI.method: 提出了一个评估ChatGPT理解现代诗歌的全面框架，与专业诗人合作，从多个维度评估ChatGPT对不同诗人现代中文诗歌的解读
AI.result: 评估结果显示，ChatGPT的解读在超过73%的情况下与原作者意图一致，但在某些维度（特别是捕捉诗性方面）表现不够理想
AI.conclusion: 该研究不仅评估了ChatGPT理解现代诗歌的能力，还为未来LLM研究及其在诗歌相关任务中的应用奠定了坚实基础

title: KLDrive: Fine-Grained 3D Scene Reasoning for Autonomous Driving based on Knowledge Graph
summary: Autonomous driving requires reliable reasoning over fine-grained 3D scene facts. Fine-grained question answering over multi-modal driving observations provides a natural way to evaluate this capability, yet existing perception pipelines and driving-oriented large language model (LLM) methods still suffer from unreliable scene facts, hallucinations, opaque reasoning, and heavy reliance on task-specific training. We present KLDrive, the first knowledge-graph-augmented LLM reasoning framework for fine-grained question answering in autonomous driving. KLDrive addresses this problem through designing two tightly coupled components: an energy-based scene fact construction module that consolidates multi-source evidence into a reliable scene knowledge graph, and an LLM agent that performs fact-grounded reasoning over a constrained action space under explicit structural constraints. By combining structured prompting with few-shot in-context exemplars, the framework adapts to diverse reasoning tasks without heavy task-specific fine-tuning. Experiments on two large-scale autonomous-driving QA benchmarks show that KLDrive outperforms prior state-of-the-art methods, achieving the best overall accuracy of 65.04% on NuScenes-QA and the best SPICE score of 42.45 on GVQA. On counting, the most challenging factual reasoning task, it improves over the strongest baseline by 46.01 percentage points, demonstrating substantially reduced hallucinations and the benefit of coupling reliable scene fact construction with explicit reasoning.

AI.tldr: KLDrive：首个基于知识图谱增强的LLM推理框架，用于自动驾驶中的细粒度问答，通过能量驱动的场景事实构建和结构化约束推理，显著减少幻觉并提升准确性。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶需要可靠的细粒度3D场景推理。现有方法存在场景事实不可靠、幻觉、推理不透明、依赖任务特定训练等问题，需要更可靠的评估自动驾驶推理能力的方法。
AI.method: 设计两个紧密耦合的组件：1）基于能量的场景事实构建模块，整合多源证据构建可靠场景知识图谱；2）LLM智能体，在显式结构约束下对受限动作空间进行事实基础推理。结合结构化提示和少量上下文示例，无需大量任务特定微调。
AI.result: 在两个大规模自动驾驶QA基准测试中表现最佳：NuScenes-QA上达到65.04%的总体准确率，GVQA上获得42.45的SPICE分数。在最具挑战性的计数任务上，比最强基线提升46.01个百分点，显著减少幻觉。
AI.conclusion: KLDrive通过可靠场景事实构建与显式结构化推理的耦合，有效解决了自动驾驶细粒度问答中的幻觉问题，展示了知识图谱增强LLM推理框架的优越性，为自动驾驶场景理解提供了新方法。

title: Optimal low-rank stochastic gradient estimation for LLM training
summary: Large language model (LLM) training is often bottlenecked by memory constraints and stochastic gradient noise in extremely high-dimensional parameter spaces. Motivated by empirical evidence that many LLM gradient matrices are effectively low-rank during training, we present an unbiased, memory-efficient, low-rank matrix estimator with the lowest variance that is applicable across common stochastic gradient estimation paradigms. The core idea is to project a high-dimensional stochastic gradient estimator onto a random low-dimensional subspace and lift it back, reducing memory while keeping the estimator unbiased and controlling mean-squared error via an optimally designed projection distribution, including Haar--Stiefel projections. The projection distribution is derived by solving a constrained functional optimization problem, yielding an optimal random projector that guides algorithm design. Empirically, the resulting low-rank gradient estimators deliver both practical memory savings and improved training behavior. In RoBERTa-large fine-tuning, our method attains the lowest peak GPU memory among compared methods (e.g., 3.83GB versus 16.7GB for full BP) while remaining competitive in accuracy; in autoregressive LLM pretraining (LLaMA-20M/60M/100M), our method outperforms the traditional methods, supporting the benefit of the proposed optimal projection strategy.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于最优随机投影的低秩梯度估计器，用于减少大语言模型训练中的内存占用，同时保持无偏性和控制均方误差。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型训练常受内存限制和高维参数空间中的随机梯度噪声影响。观察到许多LLM梯度矩阵在训练中实际上是低秩的，这启发了开发内存高效的低秩梯度估计器。
AI.method: 将高维随机梯度估计器投影到随机低维子空间再提升回来，通过求解约束函数优化问题得到最优投影分布（包括Haar-Stiefel投影），设计出具有最低方差的无偏低秩矩阵估计器。
AI.result: 在RoBERTa-large微调中，该方法达到最低峰值GPU内存（3.83GB vs 全BP的16.7GB），同时保持竞争力精度；在LLaMA-20M/60M/100M自回归预训练中，优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的最优随机投影低秩梯度估计器能有效减少大语言模型训练的内存需求，同时改善训练行为，证明了最优投影策略的益处。

title: From Causal Discovery to Dynamic Causal Inference in Neural Time Series
summary: Time-varying causal models provide a powerful framework for studying dynamic scientific systems, yet most existing approaches assume that the underlying causal network is known a priori - an assumption rarely satisfied in real-world domains where causal structure is uncertain, evolving, or only indirectly observable. This limits the applicability of dynamic causal inference in many scientific settings. We propose Dynamic Causal Network Autoregression (DCNAR), a two-stage neural causal modeling framework that integrates data-driven causal discovery with time-varying causal inference. In the first stage, a neural autoregressive causal discovery model learns a sparse directed causal network from multivariate time series. In the second stage, this learned structure is used as a structural prior for a time-varying neural network autoregression, enabling dynamic estimation of causal influence without requiring pre-specified network structure. We evaluate the scientific validity of DCNAR using behavioral diagnostics that assess causal necessity, temporal stability, and sensitivity to structural change, rather than predictive accuracy alone. Experiments on multi-country panel time-series data demonstrate that learned causal networks yield more stable and behaviorally meaningful dynamic causal inferences than coefficient-based or structure-free alternatives, even when forecasting performance is comparable. These results position DCNAR as a general framework for using AI as a scientific instrument for dynamic causal reasoning under structural uncertainty.

AI.tldr: DCNAR是一个两阶段神经因果建模框架，集成了数据驱动的因果发现与时间变化的因果推断，无需预先指定因果网络结构。
AI.motivation: 现有时间变化因果模型大多假设底层因果网络已知，但这在现实世界中很少满足，因为因果结构通常不确定、演化或仅间接可观测，限制了动态因果推断在科学领域的应用。
AI.method: 提出动态因果网络自回归(DCNAR)：第一阶段，神经自回归因果发现模型从多元时间序列学习稀疏有向因果网络；第二阶段，将学习到的结构作为时间变化神经网络自回归的结构先验，实现动态因果影响估计。
AI.result: 在多国面板时间序列数据上的实验表明，学习到的因果网络比基于系数或无结构替代方案产生更稳定、行为更有意义的动态因果推断，即使预测性能相当。
AI.conclusion: DCNAR为在结构不确定性下使用AI作为动态因果推理的科学工具提供了一个通用框架，通过行为诊断评估因果必要性、时间稳定性和结构变化敏感性，而不仅仅是预测准确性。

title: A Portfolio-Level Optimization Framework for Coordinated Market Participation and Operational Scheduling of Hydrogen-Centric Companies
summary: The vision of electrolytic hydrogen as a clean energy vector prompts the emergence of hydrogen-centric companies that must simultaneously engage in electricity, hydrogen, and green certificate markets while operating complex, geographically distributed asset portfolios. This paper proposes a portfolio-level optimization framework tailored for the integrated operational scheduling and market participation of such companies. The model co-optimizes asset scheduling and market decisions across multiple sites, incorporating spatial distribution, technical constraints, and company-level policy requirements. It supports participation in the electricity market, physical and virtual Power Purchase Agreements (PPAs), bundled and unbundled hydrogen markets, and green certificate transactions. The model is applied to three operational scenarios to evaluate the economic and operational impacts of different compliance strategies. Results show that centralized, portfolio-level control unlocks the full flexibility of geographically distributed assets, enabling a 2.42-fold increase in hydrogen production and a 9.4% reduction in daily operational costs, while satisfying all company policy constraints.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个针对氢能公司的投资组合级优化框架，用于集成运营调度和市场参与，通过集中控制实现分布式资产灵活性最大化
AI.motivation: 随着电解氢作为清洁能源载体的发展，氢能公司需要在电力、氢气和绿色证书市场同时运营，并管理复杂的地理分布式资产组合，需要统一的优化框架
AI.method: 提出投资组合级优化框架，协同优化多个站点的资产调度和市场决策，考虑空间分布、技术约束和公司政策要求，支持电力市场、PPA、氢能市场和绿色证书交易
AI.result: 集中式投资组合级控制能充分利用地理分布式资产的灵活性，使氢气产量增加2.42倍，日常运营成本降低9.4%，同时满足所有公司政策约束
AI.conclusion: 该优化框架为氢能公司提供了有效的运营和市场参与工具，通过集中控制显著提升经济效益和运营效率，支持清洁氢能产业发展

title: SozKZ: Training Efficient Small Language Models for Kazakh from Scratch
summary: Kazakh, a Turkic language spoken by over 22 million people, remains underserved by existing multilingual language models, which allocate minimal capacity to low-resource languages and employ tokenizers ill-suited to agglutinative morphology. We present SozKZ, a family of Llama-architecture language models (50M-600M parameters) trained entirely from scratch on 9 billion tokens of Kazakh text with a dedicated 50K BPE tokenizer. We evaluate all models on three Kazakh benchmarks -- multiple-choice cultural QA, reading comprehension (Belebele), and topic classification (SIB-200) -- alongside five multilingual baselines ranging from 500M to 3B parameters. Our 600M model achieves 30.3% accuracy on Kazakh cultural QA, approaching the 32.0% of Llama-3.2-1B (2x larger), and 25.5% on SIB-200 topic classification, surpassing all evaluated multilingual models up to 2B parameters. We observe consistent scaling from 50M to 600M, with MC QA accuracy rising from 22.8% to 30.3%, suggesting that further scaling remains beneficial. These results demonstrate that small, dedicated models trained from scratch with a language-appropriate tokenizer offer a viable path for low-resource language technology, achieving competitive performance at a fraction of the computational cost. All models and the tokenizer are released under open licenses.

AI.tldr: SozKZ是专门针对哈萨克语训练的Llama架构语言模型系列（50M-600M参数），使用专用BPE分词器在90亿哈萨克语token上从头训练，在多项哈萨克语基准测试中超越了更大的多语言模型。
AI.motivation: 哈萨克语作为拥有2200万使用者的突厥语系语言，在多语言模型中资源分配不足，现有分词器不适合其黏着语形态学特点，需要专门的语言模型支持。
AI.method: 采用Llama架构，从头训练50M-600M参数的模型系列，使用专门为哈萨克语设计的50K BPE分词器，在90亿哈萨克语token上进行训练。
AI.result: 600M模型在哈萨克文化QA上达到30.3%准确率（接近Llama-3.2-1B的32.0%），在SIB-200主题分类上达到25.5%，超越了所有评估的2B参数以下多语言模型，且50M-600M参数范围内呈现一致的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 使用语言专用分词器从头训练的小型专用模型为低资源语言技术提供了可行路径，能以较低计算成本获得有竞争力的性能，进一步扩展仍有提升空间。

title: LongCat-Flash-Prover: Advancing Native Formal Reasoning via Agentic Tool-Integrated Reinforcement Learning
summary: We introduce LongCat-Flash-Prover, a flagship 560-billion-parameter open-source Mixture-of- Experts (MoE) model that advances Native Formal Reasoning in Lean4 through agentic tool-integrated reasoning (TIR). We decompose the native formal reasoning task into three independent formal capabilities, i.e., auto-formalization, sketching, and proving. To facilitate these capabilities, we propose a Hybrid-Experts Iteration Framework to expand high-quality task trajectories, including generating a formal statement based on a given informal problem, producing a whole-proof directly from the statement, or a lemma-style sketch. During agentic RL, we present a Hierarchical Importance Sampling Policy Optimization (HisPO) algorithm, which aims to stabilize the MoE model training on such long-horizon tasks. It employs a gradient masking strategy that accounts for the policy staleness and the inherent train-inference engine discrepancies at both sequence and token levels. Additionally, we also incorporate theorem consistency and legality detection mechanisms to eliminate reward hacking issues. Extensive evaluations show that our LongCat-Flash-Prover sets a new state-of-the-art for open-weights models in both auto-formalization and theorem proving. Demonstrating remarkable sample efficiency, it achieves a 97.1% pass rate on MiniF2F-Test using only 72 inference budget per problem. On more challenging benchmarks, it solves 70.8% of ProverBench and 41.5% of PutnamBench with no more than 220 attempts per problem, significantly outperforming existing open-weights baselines.

AI.tldr: LongCat-Flash-Prover是一个5600亿参数的MoE模型，通过工具集成推理在Lean4中推进形式推理，在自动形式化和定理证明方面达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: 提升在Lean4中的原生形式推理能力，将形式推理任务分解为自动形式化、草图和证明三个独立能力，解决长时程任务中的训练稳定性问题。
AI.method: 提出混合专家迭代框架扩展高质量任务轨迹，采用分层重要性采样策略优化算法稳定MoE训练，结合梯度掩码策略和定理一致性检测机制。
AI.result: 在MiniF2F-Test上仅用72次推理达到97.1%通过率，在ProverBench和PutnamBench上分别解决70.8%和41.5%问题，显著超越现有开源模型。
AI.conclusion: LongCat-Flash-Prover在自动形式化和定理证明方面为开源模型设立了新的SOTA，展示了在形式推理任务上的卓越样本效率和性能。

title: CFNN: Continued Fraction Neural Network
summary: Accurately characterizing non-linear functional manifolds with singularities is a fundamental challenge in scientific computing. While Multi-Layer Perceptrons (MLPs) dominate, their spectral bias hinders resolving high-curvature features without excessive parameters. We introduce Continued Fraction Neural Networks (CFNNs), integrating continued fractions with gradient-based optimization to provide a ``rational inductive bias.'' This enables capturing complex asymptotics and discontinuities with extreme parameter frugality. We provide formal approximation bounds demonstrating exponential convergence and stability guarantees. To address recursive instability, we develop three implementations: CFNN-Boost, CFNN-MoE, and CFNN-Hybrid. Benchmarks show CFNNs consistently outperform MLPs in precision with one to two orders of magnitude fewer parameters, exhibiting up to a 47-fold improvement in noise robustness and physical consistency. By bridging black-box flexibility and white-box transparency, CFNNs establish a reliable ``grey-box'' paradigm for AI-driven scientific research.

AI.tldr: CFNNs利用连分数与梯度优化结合，提供"有理归纳偏置"，以极少的参数捕捉复杂渐近性和不连续性，在精度和噪声鲁棒性上显著优于MLP。
AI.motivation: 准确表征具有奇点的非线性函数流形是科学计算的基本挑战。MLP存在频谱偏差，需要大量参数才能解析高曲率特征。
AI.method: 提出Continued Fraction Neural Networks (CFNNs)，将连分数与基于梯度的优化相结合，提供"有理归纳偏置"。开发了三种实现：CFNN-Boost、CFNN-MoE和CFNN-Hybrid以解决递归不稳定性。
AI.result: CFNNs在精度上始终优于MLP，参数数量减少1-2个数量级，噪声鲁棒性提高达47倍，物理一致性更好。提供了指数收敛和稳定性保证的形式近似边界。
AI.conclusion: CFNNs通过桥接黑盒灵活性和白盒透明度，为AI驱动的科学研究建立了可靠的"灰盒"范式。

title: Centrality-Based Pruning for Efficient Echo State Networks
summary: Echo State Networks (ESNs) are a reservoir computing framework widely used for nonlinear time-series prediction. However, despite their effectiveness, the randomly initialized reservoir often contains redundant nodes, leading to unnecessary computational overhead and reduced efficiency. In this work, we propose a graph centrality-based pruning approach that interprets the reservoir as a weighted directed graph and removes structurally less important nodes using centrality measures. Experiments on Mackey-Glass time-series prediction and electric load forecasting demonstrate that the proposed method can significantly reduce reservoir size while maintaining, and in some cases improving, prediction accuracy, while preserving the essential reservoir dynamics.

AI.tldr: 提出基于图中心性的ESN剪枝方法，通过移除结构不重要的节点减少计算开销，同时保持预测精度
AI.motivation: ESN中随机初始化的储备池常包含冗余节点，导致不必要的计算开销和效率降低
AI.method: 将储备池解释为加权有向图，使用中心性度量移除结构上不重要的节点
AI.result: 在Mackey-Glass时间序列预测和电力负荷预测实验中，显著减少储备池规模，同时保持甚至提高预测精度，保留基本储备池动态
AI.conclusion: 基于图中心性的剪枝方法能有效减少ESN计算复杂度，同时维持预测性能

title: ALMAB-DC: Active Learning, Multi-Armed Bandits, and Distributed Computing for Sequential Experimental Design and Black-Box Optimization
summary:
Sequential experimental design under expensive, gradient-free objectives is a central challenge in computational statistics: evaluation budgets are tightly constrained and information must be extracted efficiently from each observation. We propose \textbf{ALMAB-DC}, a GP-based sequential design framework combining active learning, multi-armed bandits (MAB), and distributed asynchronous computing for expensive black-box experimentation. A Gaussian process surrogate with uncertainty-aware acquisition identifies informative query points; a UCB or Thompson-sampling bandit controller allocates evaluations across parallel workers; and an asynchronous scheduler handles heterogeneous runtimes. We present cumulative regret bounds for the bandit components and characterize parallel scalability via Amdahl's Law.
  We validate ALMAB-DC on five benchmarks. On the two statistical experimental-design tasks, ALMAB-DC achieves lower simple regret than Equal Spacing, Random, and D-optimal designs in dose--response optimization, and in adaptive spatial field estimation matches the Greedy Max-Variance benchmark while outperforming Latin Hypercube Sampling; at $K=4$ the distributed setting reaches target performance in one-quarter of sequential wall-clock rounds. On three ML/engineering tasks (CIFAR-10 HPO, CFD drag minimization, MuJoCo RL), ALMAB-DC achieves 93.4\% CIFAR-10 accuracy (outperforming BOHB by 1.7\,pp and Optuna by 1.1\,pp), reduces airfoil drag to $C_D = 0.059$ (36.9\% below Grid Search), and improves RL return by 50\% over Grid Search. All advantages over non-ALMAB baselines are statistically significant under Bonferroni-corrected Mann--Whitney $U$ tests. Distributed execution achieves $7.5\times$ speedup at $K = 16$ agents, consistent with Amdahl's Law.

AI.tldr: ALMAB-DC：结合主动学习、多臂老虎机和分布式计算的GP序列设计框架，用于昂贵黑盒实验，在统计实验设计和ML/工程任务中表现优异
AI.motivation: 昂贵、无梯度目标下的序列实验设计是计算统计学的核心挑战：评估预算紧张，需要从每次观察中高效提取信息
AI.method: 提出ALMAB-DC框架，结合高斯过程代理模型（带不确定性感知采集）、UCB或Thompson采样老虎机控制器（分配并行评估）、异步调度器（处理异构运行时）
AI.result: 在5个基准测试中表现优异：统计实验设计任务中优于Equal Spacing、Random、D-optimal等；ML/工程任务中CIFAR-10准确率93.4%（优于BOHB和Optuna），空气动力学阻力降低36.9%，RL回报提高50%；分布式执行在16个代理上实现7.5倍加速
AI.conclusion: ALMAB-DC是有效的序列设计框架，结合主动学习、多臂老虎机和分布式计算，在昂贵黑盒实验中显著优于基准方法，具有统计显著优势

title: NoveltyAgent: Autonomous Novelty Reporting Agent with Point-wise Novelty Analysis and Self-Validation
summary: The exponential growth of academic publications has led to a surge in papers of varying quality, increasing the cost of paper screening. Current approaches either use novelty assessment within general AI Reviewers or repurpose DeepResearch, which lacks domain-specific mechanisms and thus delivers lower-quality results. To bridge this gap, we introduce NoveltyAgent, a multi-agent system designed to generate comprehensive and faithful novelty reports, enabling thorough evaluation of a paper's originality. It decomposes manuscripts into discrete novelty points for fine-grained retrieval and comparison, and builds a comprehensive related-paper database while cross-referencing claims to ensure faithfulness. Furthermore, to address the challenge of evaluating such open-ended generation tasks, we propose a checklist-based evaluation framework, providing an unbiased paradigm for building reliable evaluations. Extensive experiments show that NoveltyAgent achieves state-of-the-art performance, outperforming GPT-5 DeepResearch by 10.15%. We hope this system will provide reliable, high-quality novelty analysis and help researchers quickly identify novel papers. Code and demo are available at https://github.com/SStan1/NoveltyAgent.

AI.tldr: NoveltyAgent是一个多智能体系统，用于生成全面且忠实的新颖性报告，通过分解论文为离散新颖点进行细粒度检索和比较，在相关论文数据库中交叉验证，并采用基于检查表的评估框架。
AI.motivation: 学术论文数量激增导致筛选成本增加，现有方法要么使用通用AI审稿人的新颖性评估，要么重新利用DeepResearch，但缺乏领域特定机制，导致结果质量较低。
AI.method: 引入NoveltyAgent多智能体系统，将手稿分解为离散新颖点进行细粒度检索和比较，建立全面的相关论文数据库并交叉验证声明以确保忠实性，同时提出基于检查表的评估框架。
AI.result: 广泛实验表明，NoveltyAgent达到最先进性能，比GPT-5 DeepResearch高出10.15%，能够提供可靠、高质量的新颖性分析。
AI.conclusion: NoveltyAgent系统能够提供可靠、高质量的新颖性分析，帮助研究人员快速识别新颖论文，代码和演示已开源。

title: ORACLE: Optimizing Reasoning Abilities of Large Language Models via Constraint-Led Synthetic Data Elicitation
summary: Training large language models (LLMs) with synthetic reasoning data has become a popular approach to enhancing their reasoning capabilities, while a key factor influencing the effectiveness of this paradigm is the quality of the generated multi-step reasoning data. To generate high-quality reasoning data, many recent methods generate synthetic reasoning paths and filter them based on final answer correctness, often overlooking flaws in intermediate reasoning steps. To enhance the verification of intermediate reasoning steps, prior work primarily resorts to code execution or symbolic reasoning engines. However, code-based validation is restricted to code or mathematical tasks, and reasoning engines require a well-structured and complete context. As a result, existing methods fail to function effectively in natural language reasoning tasks that involve ambiguous or incomplete contexts. In these tasks, synthetic data still lack reliable checks for verifying each reasoning step. To address this challenge, we introduce ORACLE, a structured data generation framework inspired by syllogistic reasoning. ORACLE integrates the generative strengths of LLMs with symbolic supervision: the LLM produces step-wise reasoning contexts, while a symbolic reasoning engine verifies the validity of each intermediate step. By employing a unified prompting template to elicit modular reasoning chains, ORACLE enables fine-grained, step-level validation, facilitating the construction of high-quality multi-step reasoning data. Across six logical, factual, and commonsense reasoning benchmarks, our ORACLE consistently outperforms strong baselines on multiple models.

AI.tldr: ORACLE是一个结构化数据生成框架，通过结合LLM的生成能力和符号推理引擎的验证，为自然语言推理任务生成高质量的多步推理数据。
AI.motivation: 现有方法生成推理数据时主要依赖最终答案正确性过滤，忽略了中间推理步骤的缺陷。基于代码或符号推理引擎的验证方法在自然语言推理任务中效果有限，因为这些任务常涉及模糊或不完整的上下文。
AI.method: ORACLE框架结合LLM的生成能力和符号监督：LLM生成逐步推理上下文，符号推理引擎验证每个中间步骤的有效性。使用统一的提示模板来引出模块化推理链，实现细粒度的步骤级验证。
AI.result: 在六个逻辑、事实和常识推理基准测试中，ORACLE在多个模型上始终优于强基线方法。
AI.conclusion: ORACLE通过结构化生成和符号验证的结合，有效解决了自然语言推理任务中高质量多步推理数据生成的问题，显著提升了推理能力。

title: Diffusion Model for Manifold Data: Score Decomposition, Curvature, and Statistical Complexity
summary: Diffusion models have become a leading framework in generative modeling, yet their theoretical understanding -- especially for high-dimensional data concentrated on low-dimensional structures -- remains incomplete. This paper investigates how diffusion models learn such structured data, focusing on two key aspects: statistical complexity and influence of data geometric properties. By modeling data as samples from a smooth Riemannian manifold, our analysis reveals crucial decompositions of score functions in diffusion models under different levels of injected noise. We also highlight the interplay of manifold curvature with the structures in the score function. These analyses enable an efficient neural network approximation to the score function, built upon which we further provide statistical rates for score estimation and distribution learning. Remarkably, the obtained statistical rates are governed by the intrinsic dimension of data and the manifold curvature. These results advance the statistical foundations of diffusion models, bridging theory and practice for generative modeling on manifolds.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了扩散模型如何学习低维流形上的高维数据，揭示了得分函数的关键分解、流形曲率的影响，并提供了基于数据内在维度和曲率的统计收敛率。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型已成为生成建模的主要框架，但其理论理解仍不完整，特别是对于集中在低维结构上的高维数据。本文旨在研究扩散模型如何学习这种结构化数据，重点关注统计复杂度和数据几何性质的影响。
AI.method: 通过将数据建模为光滑黎曼流形上的样本，分析不同噪声水平下扩散模型中得分函数的关键分解，揭示流形曲率与得分函数结构的相互作用，并构建有效的神经网络近似得分函数。
AI.result: 获得了得分估计和分布学习的统计收敛率，这些速率由数据的内在维度和流形曲率决定。结果表明扩散模型能够有效学习低维流形上的数据分布。
AI.conclusion: 这些结果推进了扩散模型的统计理论基础，为流形上的生成建模架起了理论与实践的桥梁，揭示了内在维度和几何性质在扩散模型学习中的关键作用。

title: Incentive-Aware Federated Averaging with Performance Guarantees under Strategic Participation
summary: Federated learning (FL) is a communication-efficient collaborative learning framework that enables model training across multiple agents with private local datasets. While the benefits of FL in improving global model performance are well established, individual agents may behave strategically, balancing the learning payoff against the cost of contributing their local data. Motivated by the need for FL frameworks that successfully retain participating agents, we propose an incentive-aware federated averaging method in which, at each communication round, clients transmit both their local model parameters and their updated training dataset sizes to the server. The dataset sizes are dynamically adjusted via a Nash equilibrium (NE)-seeking update rule that captures strategic data participation. We analyze the proposed method under convex and nonconvex global objective settings and establish performance guarantees for the resulting incentive-aware FL algorithm. Numerical experiments on the MNIST and CIFAR-10 datasets demonstrate that agents achieve competitive global model performance while converging to stable data participation strategies.

AI.tldr: 提出一种激励感知的联邦平均方法，通过纳什均衡寻求更新规则动态调整客户端数据集大小，解决联邦学习中代理策略性行为问题。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习中个体代理可能策略性地平衡学习收益与贡献本地数据的成本，需要设计能够成功保留参与代理的联邦学习框架。
AI.method: 提出激励感知的联邦平均方法：客户端在每个通信轮次传输本地模型参数和更新的训练数据集大小；服务器通过纳什均衡寻求更新规则动态调整数据集大小，捕捉策略性数据参与。
AI.result: 在凸和非凸全局目标设置下分析了该方法的性能保证；在MNIST和CIFAR-10数据集上的数值实验表明，代理在收敛到稳定数据参与策略的同时实现了有竞争力的全局模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出的激励感知联邦学习框架能够有效处理代理的策略性行为，在保持全局模型性能的同时确保代理的持续参与，为联邦学习的激励机制设计提供了有效解决方案。

title: On the Role of Batch Size in Stochastic Conditional Gradient Methods
summary: We study the role of batch size in stochastic conditional gradient methods under a $μ$-Kurdyka-Łojasiewicz ($μ$-KL) condition. Focusing on momentum-based stochastic conditional gradient algorithms (e.g., Scion), we derive a new analysis that explicitly captures the interaction between stepsize, batch size, and stochastic noise. Our study reveals a regime-dependent behavior: increasing the batch size initially improves optimization accuracy but, beyond a critical threshold, the benefits saturate and can eventually degrade performance under a fixed token budget. Notably, the theory predicts the magnitude of the optimal stepsize and aligns well with empirical practices observed in large-scale training. Leveraging these insights, we derive principled guidelines for selecting the batch size and stepsize, and propose an adaptive strategy that increases batch size and sequence length during training while preserving convergence guarantees. Experiments on NanoGPT are consistent with the theoretical predictions and illustrate the emergence of the predicted scaling regimes. Overall, our results provide a theoretical framework for understanding batch size scaling in stochastic conditional gradient methods and offer guidance for designing efficient training schedules in large-scale optimization.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在μ-KL条件下随机条件梯度方法中批大小的作用，发现批大小存在一个临界阈值，超过该阈值后性能会饱和甚至下降，并提出了自适应批大小和步长的策略。
AI.motivation: 理解随机条件梯度方法（如Scion）中批大小、步长和随机噪声之间的相互作用，为大规模优化提供理论指导。
AI.method: 基于动量随机条件梯度算法，在μ-KL条件下进行理论分析，推导步长、批大小和随机噪声的交互关系，并提出自适应批大小和序列长度的策略。
AI.result: 理论预测了最优步长大小，揭示了批大小的阈值效应：初始增加批大小提高优化精度，但超过临界阈值后收益饱和甚至下降。在NanoGPT上的实验验证了理论预测。
AI.conclusion: 为理解随机条件梯度方法中的批大小缩放提供了理论框架，并为设计大规模优化中的高效训练计划提供了指导原则。

title: LLM Router: Prefill is All You Need
summary: LLMs often share comparable benchmark accuracies, but their complementary performance across task subsets suggests that an Oracle router--a theoretical selector with perfect foresight--can significantly surpass standalone model accuracy by navigating model-specific strengths. While current routers rely on fragile semantic signals, we propose using internal prefill activations via Encoder-Target Decoupling--a functional separation between the model providing the predictive signal (the Encoder) and the model whose performance is being estimated (the Target). This allows optimized heterogeneous pairing between unique encoders and target models. We utilize Fisher Separability (J) and Effective Dimensionality (d_eff) as mathematical probes to isolate optimal layer-wise signals, providing the predictive foundation for our SharedTrunkNet architecture. SharedTrunkNet captures up to 45.58% of the accuracy gap between the strongest standalone model and the Oracle while achieving 74.31% cost savings relative to the highest-cost model.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于预填充激活的LLM路由方法，通过编码器-目标解耦和数学探针技术，实现了在保持低成本的同时显著提升模型选择性能。
AI.motivation: 虽然不同LLM在基准测试中表现相近，但它们在任务子集上的互补性表明，理论上完美的Oracle路由器可以显著超越单个模型的性能。然而现有路由器依赖脆弱的语义信号，需要更可靠的预测方法。
AI.method: 提出编码器-目标解耦框架，将提供预测信号的模型（编码器）与性能被评估的模型（目标）功能分离。使用Fisher可分离性(J)和有效维度(d_eff)作为数学探针来识别最优层级信号，并构建SharedTrunkNet架构。
AI.result: SharedTrunkNet能够捕获最强独立模型与Oracle之间45.58%的准确率差距，同时相对于最高成本模型实现74.31%的成本节省。
AI.conclusion: 通过内部预填充激活和编码器-目标解耦，可以构建高效的路由器，在显著降低成本的同时大幅提升模型选择性能，为LLM协同工作提供了新思路。

title: Can LLMs Fool Graph Learning? Exploring Universal Adversarial Attacks on Text-Attributed Graphs
summary: Text-attributed graphs (TAGs) enhance graph learning by integrating rich textual semantics and topological context for each node. While boosting expressiveness, they also expose new vulnerabilities in graph learning through text-based adversarial surfaces. Recent advances leverage diverse backbones, such as graph neural networks (GNNs) and pre-trained language models (PLMs), to capture both structural and textual information in TAGs. This diversity raises a key question: How can we design universal adversarial attacks that generalize across architectures to assess the security of TAG models? The challenge arises from the stark contrast in how different backbones-GNNs and PLMs-perceive and encode graph patterns, coupled with the fact that many PLMs are only accessible via APIs, limiting attacks to black-box settings. To address this, we propose BadGraph, a novel attack framework that deeply elicits large language models (LLMs) understanding of general graph knowledge to jointly perturb both node topology and textual semantics. Specifically, we design a target influencer retrieval module that leverages graph priors to construct cross-modally aligned attack shortcuts, thereby enabling efficient LLM-based perturbation reasoning. Experiments show that BadGraph achieves universal and effective attacks across GNN- and LLM-based reasoners, with up to a 76.3% performance drop, while theoretical and empirical analyses confirm its stealthy yet interpretable nature.

AI.tldr: BadGraph：一种利用大语言模型理解图知识来攻击文本属性图的通用对抗攻击框架，能同时扰动节点拓扑和文本语义，在GNN和LLM模型上均有效。
AI.motivation: 文本属性图（TAGs）结合了丰富的文本语义和拓扑结构，增强了表达能力但也引入了新的安全漏洞。现有模型架构多样（GNNs和PLMs），如何设计能跨架构通用的对抗攻击来评估TAG模型安全性成为关键问题。挑战在于不同架构对图模式的感知和编码方式差异巨大，且许多PLM只能通过API访问（黑盒设置）。
AI.method: 提出BadGraph攻击框架，利用大语言模型对一般图知识的理解来联合扰动节点拓扑和文本语义。设计了目标影响者检索模块，利用图先验构建跨模态对齐的攻击捷径，从而实现高效的基于LLM的扰动推理。
AI.result: 实验表明BadGraph在GNN和LLM推理器上实现了通用且有效的攻击，性能下降最高达76.3%。理论和实证分析证实了其隐蔽且可解释的特性。
AI.conclusion: BadGraph通过利用LLMs的图知识理解，成功实现了跨架构的通用对抗攻击，为评估文本属性图模型的安全性提供了有效工具，同时揭示了TAGs在安全方面的脆弱性。

title: Constrained Online Convex Optimization with Memory and Predictions
summary: We study Constrained Online Convex Optimization with Memory (COCO-M), where both the loss and the constraints depend on a finite window of past decisions made by the learner. This setting extends the previously studied unconstrained online optimization with memory framework and captures practical problems such as the control of constrained dynamical systems and scheduling with reconfiguration budgets. For this problem, we propose the first algorithms that achieve sublinear regret and sublinear cumulative constraint violation under time-varying constraints, both with and without predictions of future loss and constraint functions. Without predictions, we introduce an adaptive penalty approach that guarantees sublinear regret and constraint violation. When short-horizon and potentially unreliable predictions are available, we reinterpret the problem as online learning with delayed feedback and design an optimistic algorithm whose performance improves as prediction accuracy improves, while remaining robust when predictions are inaccurate. Our results bridge the gap between classical constrained online convex optimization and memory-dependent settings, and provide a versatile learning toolbox with diverse applications.

AI.tldr: 提出首个针对带记忆约束在线凸优化（COCO-M）的算法，在时变约束下实现次线性遗憾和约束违反，支持有/无预测两种场景
AI.motivation: 传统约束在线凸优化（COCO）未考虑记忆效应，而实际应用中损失和约束常依赖于过去决策的有限窗口，如受限动态系统控制和带重配置预算的调度问题
AI.method: 1. 无预测时：提出自适应惩罚方法保证次线性遗憾和约束违反；2. 有预测时：将问题重新解释为带延迟反馈的在线学习，设计乐观算法，性能随预测精度提升而改善，在预测不准确时保持鲁棒性
AI.result: 首次在带记忆约束在线凸优化中实现次线性遗憾和累积约束违反，填补了经典约束在线凸优化与记忆依赖设置之间的空白
AI.conclusion: 该研究为带记忆约束在线优化提供了通用学习工具箱，在受限动态系统控制、调度优化等实际应用中具有广泛价值

title: BOOST-RPF: Boosted Sequential Trees for Radial Power Flow
summary: Accurate power flow analysis is critical for modern distribution systems, yet classical solvers face scalability issues, and current machine learning models often struggle with generalization. We introduce BOOST-RPF, a novel method that reformulates voltage prediction from a global graph regression task into a sequential path-based learning problem. By decomposing radial networks into root-to-leaf paths, we leverage gradient-boosted decision trees (XGBoost) to model local voltage-drop regularities. We evaluate three architectural variants: Absolute Voltage, Parent Residual, and Physics-Informed Residual. This approach aligns the model architecture with the recursive physics of power flow, ensuring size-agnostic application and superior out-of-distribution robustness. Benchmarked against the Kerber Dorfnetz grid and the ENGAGE suite, BOOST-RPF achieves state-of-the-art results with its Parent Residual variant which consistently outperforms both analytical and neural baselines in standard accuracy and generalization tasks. While global Multi-Layer Perceptrons (MLPs) and Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) often suffer from performance degradation under topological shifts, BOOST-RPF maintains high precision across unseen feeders. Furthermore, the framework displays linear $O(N)$ computational scaling and significantly increased sample efficiency through per-edge supervision, offering a scalable and generalizable alternative for real-time distribution system operator (DSO) applications.

AI.tldr: BOOST-RPF将潮流分析中的电压预测从全局图回归任务重构为基于路径的序列学习问题，通过分解辐射状网络为根到叶路径，利用XGBoost建模局部电压降规律，在泛化能力和计算效率上优于传统方法。
AI.motivation: 传统潮流分析求解器存在可扩展性问题，现有机器学习模型泛化能力不足，特别是在拓扑变化时性能下降明显，需要一种既能保持高精度又能适应不同规模网络的通用方法。
AI.method: 将辐射状网络分解为根到叶路径，将电压预测重构为基于路径的序列学习问题，使用梯度提升决策树(XGBoost)建模局部电压降规律，提出了三种架构变体：绝对电压、父节点残差和物理信息残差。
AI.result: 在Kerber Dorfnetz电网和ENGAGE套件上测试，BOOST-RPF的父节点残差变体在标准精度和泛化任务上均优于分析和神经网络基线，在拓扑变化时保持高精度，计算复杂度为线性O(N)，样本效率显著提高。
AI.conclusion: BOOST-RPF通过将模型架构与潮流递归物理对齐，实现了规模无关的应用和优越的分布外鲁棒性，为实时配电系统操作提供了可扩展且泛化能力强的替代方案。

title: Mitigating Shortcut Reasoning in Language Models: A Gradient-Aware Training Approach
comment: 12 pages, 2 figures. Preprint. Experiments on synthetic reasoning benchmarks. Code available
summary: Large language models exhibit strong reasoning capabilities, yet often rely on shortcuts such as surface pattern matching and answer memorization rather than genuine logical inference. We propose Shortcut-Aware Reasoning Training (SART), a gradient-aware framework that detects and mitigates shortcut-promoting samples via ShortcutScore and gradient surgery. Our method identifies shortcut signals through gradient misalignment with validation objectives and answer-token concentration, and modifies training dynamics accordingly. Experiments on controlled reasoning benchmarks show that SART achieves +16.5% accuracy and +40.2% robustness over the strongest baseline, significantly improving generalization under distribution shifts. Code is available at: https://github.com/fuyanjie/short-cut-aware-data-centric-reasoning.

AI.tldr: SART提出梯度感知框架，通过ShortcutScore和梯度手术检测并缓解捷径依赖样本，提升语言模型的推理泛化能力
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型虽然具备强大的推理能力，但往往依赖表面模式匹配和答案记忆等捷径，而非真正的逻辑推理。现有方法未能有效识别和缓解训练数据中的捷径依赖样本，导致模型泛化能力不足。
AI.method: 提出Shortcut-Aware Reasoning Training (SART)框架：1) 通过ShortcutScore检测捷径促进样本，利用梯度与验证目标的不对齐以及答案token集中度识别捷径信号；2) 采用梯度手术调整训练动态，缓解捷径依赖。
AI.result: 在受控推理基准测试中，SART相比最强基线实现了+16.5%的准确率和+40.2%的鲁棒性提升，显著改善了分布偏移下的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: SART通过梯度感知的捷径检测和缓解机制，有效提升了语言模型的推理泛化能力，为解决模型依赖捷径而非真正逻辑推理的问题提供了有效方案。

title: Revisiting Tree Search for LLMs: Gumbel and Sequential Halving for Budget-Scalable Reasoning
comment: The paper has been accepted to the ICAPS-2026 conference. 5 pages, 2 figures
summary: Neural tree search is a powerful decision-making algorithm widely used in complex domains such as game playing and model-based reinforcement learning. Recent work has applied AlphaZero-style tree search to enhance the reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs) during inference, but we find that this approach suffers from a scaling failure: on GSM8K and Game24, accuracy drops as the search budget increases. In this paper, we present ReSCALE, an adaptation of Gumbel AlphaZero MCTS that replaces Dirichlet noise and PUCT selection with Gumbel sampling and Sequential Halving, restoring monotonic scaling without changes to the model or its training. ReSCALE reaches 58.4\% on GSM8K and 85.3\% on Game24 at budgets where the baseline degrades. Ablations confirm that Sequential Halving is the primary driver of the improvement.

AI.tldr: ReSCALE通过将AlphaZero风格树搜索中的Dirichlet噪声和PUCT选择替换为Gumbel采样和Sequential Halving，解决了LLM推理中树搜索随预算增加而性能下降的问题，在GSM8K和Game24任务上实现了单调性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有AlphaZero风格的树搜索在增强大语言模型推理能力时存在缩放失败问题：随着搜索预算增加，在GSM8K和Game24等任务上的准确率反而下降，需要一种能保持单调性能提升的树搜索方法。
AI.method: ReSCALE是Gumbel AlphaZero MCTS的改进版本，用Gumbel采样替代Dirichlet噪声，用Sequential Halving替代PUCT选择策略，无需修改模型或其训练过程即可实现单调性能缩放。
AI.result: 在GSM8K上达到58.4%准确率，在Game24上达到85.3%准确率（在基线方法性能下降的预算水平下）。消融实验证实Sequential Halving是改进的主要驱动力。
AI.conclusion: ReSCALE通过改进树搜索的选择策略，成功解决了LLM推理中树搜索的缩放失败问题，实现了随搜索预算增加而单调提升的性能表现。

title: A Generalised Exponentiated Gradient Approach to Enhance Fairness in Binary and Multi-class Classification Tasks
summary: The widespread use of AI and ML models in sensitive areas raises significant concerns about fairness. While the research community has introduced various methods for bias mitigation in binary classification tasks, the issue remains under-explored in multi-class classification settings. To address this limitation, in this paper, we first formulate the problem of fair learning in multi-class classification as a multi-objective problem between effectiveness (i.e., prediction correctness) and multiple linear fairness constraints. Next, we propose a Generalised Exponentiated Gradient (GEG) algorithm to solve this task. GEG is an in-processing algorithm that enhances fairness in binary and multi-class classification settings under multiple fairness definitions. We conduct an extensive empirical evaluation of GEG against six baselines across seven multi-class and three binary datasets, using four widely adopted effectiveness metrics and three fairness definitions. GEG overcomes existing baselines, with fairness improvements up to 92% and a decrease in accuracy up to 14%.

AI.tldr: 提出GEG算法解决多类别分类中的公平性问题，在多个公平性定义下提升公平性92%，准确率下降最多14%
AI.motivation: AI/ML模型在敏感领域的广泛应用引发公平性担忧。现有偏置缓解方法主要针对二分类任务，多类别分类中的公平性问题研究不足，需要填补这一空白。
AI.method: 首先将多类别分类中的公平学习问题形式化为效果（预测正确性）与多个线性公平约束之间的多目标优化问题。然后提出广义指数梯度（GEG）算法来解决该任务，这是一个处理过程中的算法。
AI.result: 在7个多类别和3个二分类数据集上，使用4个效果指标和3个公平性定义，GEG超越了6个基线方法，公平性提升最高达92%，准确率下降最多14%。
AI.conclusion: GEG算法能有效提升多类别分类中的公平性，在多种公平性定义下表现优于现有方法，为解决多类别分类中的公平性问题提供了有效工具。

title: The Hidden Puppet Master: A Theoretical and Real-World Account of Emotional Manipulation in LLMs
summary: As users increasingly turn to LLMs for practical and personal advice, they become vulnerable to being subtly steered toward hidden incentives misaligned with their own interests. Prior works have benchmarked persuasion and manipulation detection, but these efforts rely on simulated or debate-style settings, remain uncorrelated with real human belief shifts, and overlook a critical dimension: the morality of hidden incentives driving the manipulation. We introduce PUPPET, a theoretical taxonomy of personalized emotional manipulation in LLM-human dialogues that centers around incentive morality, and conduct a human study with N=1,035 participants across realistic everyday queries, varying personalization and incentive direction (harmful versus prosocial). We find that harmful hidden incentives produce significantly larger belief shifts than prosocial ones. Finally, we benchmark LLMs on the task of belief prediction, finding that models exhibit moderate predictive ability of belief change based on conversational contexts (r=0.3 - 0.5), but they also systematically underestimate the magnitude of belief shift. Together, this work establishes a theoretically grounded and behaviorally validated foundation for studying, and ultimately combatting, incentive-driven manipulation in LLMs during everyday, practical user queries.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了PUPPET理论框架，用于分析LLM对话中的个性化情感操纵，重点关注隐藏动机的道德性，并通过大规模人类实验发现有害隐藏动机比亲社会动机产生更大的信念改变。
AI.motivation: 随着用户越来越多地依赖LLM获取实用和个人建议，他们容易受到与自身利益不符的隐藏动机的微妙操纵。现有研究主要关注模拟或辩论场景，缺乏真实人类信念改变的相关性，且忽视了操纵背后隐藏动机的道德维度。
AI.method: 提出PUPPET理论分类法，围绕动机道德性分析LLM-人类对话中的个性化情感操纵。通过N=1,035名参与者的真实日常查询实验，操纵个性化程度和动机方向（有害vs亲社会）。同时评估LLM在信念预测任务上的表现。
AI.result: 1) 有害隐藏动机比亲社会动机产生显著更大的信念改变；2) LLM在基于对话上下文预测信念改变方面表现出中等预测能力(r=0.3-0.5)，但系统性地低估信念改变的幅度。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为分析和最终对抗LLM在日常实用查询中的动机驱动操纵建立了理论基础和行为验证框架，强调了关注隐藏动机道德性的重要性。

title: Does AI Homogenize Student Thinking? A Multi-Dimensional Analysis of Structural Convergence in AI-Augmented Essays
summary: While AI-assisted writing has been widely reported to improve essay quality, its impact on the structural diversity of student thinking remains unexplored. Analyzing 6,875 essays across five conditions (Human-only, AI-only, and three Human+AI prompt strategies), we provide the first empirical evidence of a Quality-Homogenization Tradeoff, in which substantial quality gains co-occur with significant homogenization. The effect is dimension-specific: cohesion architecture lost 70-78% of its variance, whereas perspective plurality was diversified. Convergence target analysis further revealed that AI-augmented essays were pulled toward AI structural patterns yet deviated significantly from the Human-AI axis, indicating simultaneous partial replacement and partial emergence. Crucially, prompt specificity reversed homogenization into diversification on argument depth, demonstrating that homogenization is not an intrinsic property of AI but a function of interaction design.

AI.tldr: 研究发现AI辅助写作存在"质量-同质化权衡"：虽然能显著提升论文质量，但会导致结构多样性减少，不过提示词设计可以逆转这种同质化效应。
AI.motivation: 虽然AI辅助写作已被广泛报道能提高论文质量，但其对学生思维结构多样性的影响尚未被探索。本研究旨在填补这一空白，探究AI写作辅助是否会导致学生思维的同质化。
AI.method: 分析了6,875篇论文，涵盖五种条件：纯人类写作、纯AI写作、以及三种不同提示策略的人类+AI协作。使用收敛目标分析来研究AI增强论文的结构模式变化。
AI.result: 发现了质量-同质化权衡效应：质量大幅提升的同时伴随着显著同质化。具体而言，凝聚力架构的方差减少了70-78%，而视角多元性却得到了多样化。AI增强论文被拉向AI结构模式，但又显著偏离人类-AI轴线，表明同时存在部分替代和部分涌现。关键发现是，提示词特异性能够将同质化逆转成多样化，特别是在论证深度方面。
AI.conclusion: 同质化不是AI的固有属性，而是交互设计的函数。通过精心设计的提示策略，可以避免思维同质化，实现质量提升与多样性保持的双赢。

title: Multinoulli Extension: A Lossless Continuous Relaxation for Partition-Constrained Subset Selection
summary: Identifying the most representative subset for a close-to-submodular objective while satisfying the predefined partition constraint is a fundamental task with numerous applications in machine learning. However, the existing distorted local-search methods are often hindered by their prohibitive query complexities and the rigid requirement for prior knowledge of difficult-to-obtain structural parameters. To overcome these limitations, we introduce a novel algorithm titled Multinoulli-SCG, which not only is parameter-free, but also can achieve the same approximation guarantees as the distorted local-search methods with significantly fewer function evaluations. More specifically, when the objective function is monotone $α$-weakly DR-submodular or $(γ,β)$-weakly submodular, our Multinoulli-SCG algorithm can attain a value of $(1-e^{-α})\text{OPT}-ε$ or $(\frac{γ^{2}(1-e^{-(β(1-γ)+γ^2)})}{β(1-γ)+γ^2})\text{OPT}-ε$ with only $O(1/ε^{2})$ function evaluations, where OPT denotes the optimal value. The cornerstone of our Multinoulli-SCG algorithm is an innovative continuous-relaxation framework named Multinoulli Extension(ME), which can effectively convert the discrete subset selection problem subject to partition constraints into a solvable continuous maximization focused on learning the optimal multinoulli priors across the concerned partition. In sharp contrast with the well-established multi-linear extension for submodular subset selection, a notable advantage of our proposed ME is its intrinsic capacity to provide a lossless rounding scheme for any set function. Furthermore, based on our proposed ME, we also present two novel online algorithms, namely, Multinoulli-OSCG and Multinoulli-OSGA, for the unexplored online subset selection problems over partition constraints.

AI.tldr: 提出Multinoulli-SCG算法，用于解决带分区约束的近似次模目标函数子集选择问题，相比现有方法无需参数且查询复杂度更低
AI.motivation: 现有基于扭曲局部搜索的方法存在查询复杂度高、需要难以获取的结构参数等限制，需要开发更高效、参数自由的算法
AI.method: 提出Multinoulli扩展(ME)连续松弛框架，将离散子集选择问题转化为可学习的多努利先验优化，并基于此开发Multinoulli-SCG算法
AI.result: 算法在单调α-弱DR次模或(γ,β)-弱次模函数下，仅需O(1/ε²)函数评估即可达到(1-e^{-α})OPT-ε或(γ²(1-e^{-(β(1-γ)+γ²)}))/(β(1-γ)+γ²)OPT-ε近似保证
AI.conclusion: Multinoulli-SCG算法在保持相同近似保证的同时显著降低了查询复杂度，且无需参数，同时提出的ME框架为在线子集选择问题提供了新解决方案

title: Rule-State Inference (RSI): A Bayesian Framework for Compliance Monitoring in Rule-Governed Domains
comment: 16 pages, 2 tables, 1 figure. Code and dataset available at github.com/fless-lab/rsi-togo-fiscal
summary:
Existing machine learning frameworks for compliance monitoring -- Markov Logic Networks, Probabilistic Soft Logic, supervised models -- share a fundamental paradigm: they treat observed data as ground truth and attempt to approximate rules from it. This assumption breaks down in rule-governed domains such as taxation or regulatory compliance, where authoritative rules are known a priori and the true challenge is to infer the latent state of rule activation, compliance, and parametric drift from partial and noisy observations.
  We propose Rule-State Inference (RSI), a Bayesian framework that inverts this paradigm by encoding regulatory rules as structured priors and casting compliance monitoring as posterior inference over a latent rule-state space S = {(a_i, c_i, delta_i)}, where a_i captures rule activation, c_i models the compliance rate, and delta_i quantifies parametric drift. We prove three theoretical guarantees: (T1) RSI absorbs regulatory changes in O(1) time via a prior ratio correction, independently of dataset size; (T2) the posterior is Bernstein-von Mises consistent, converging to the true rule state as observations accumulate; (T3) mean-field variational inference monotonically maximizes the Evidence Lower BOund (ELBO).
  We instantiate RSI on the Togolese fiscal system and introduce RSI-Togo-Fiscal-Synthetic v1.0, a benchmark of 2,000 synthetic enterprises grounded in real OTR regulatory rules (2022-2025). Without any labeled training data, RSI achieves F1=0.519 and AUC=0.599, while absorbing regulatory changes in under 1ms versus 683-1082ms for full model retraining -- at least a 600x speedup.

AI.tldr: 提出Rule-State Inference (RSI)贝叶斯框架，将监管规则编码为结构化先验，通过后验推理监控合规性，相比传统方法在监管变更时快600倍。
AI.motivation: 现有合规监控框架（如马尔可夫逻辑网络、概率软逻辑、监督模型）将观测数据视为真实情况并从中近似规则，这在税收或监管合规等规则主导的领域存在问题，因为权威规则是已知的，真正的挑战是从部分和噪声观测中推断规则激活、合规性和参数漂移的潜在状态。
AI.method: 提出Rule-State Inference (RSI)贝叶斯框架，将监管规则编码为结构化先验，将合规监控转化为对潜在规则状态空间S = {(a_i, c_i, delta_i)}的后验推理，其中a_i捕获规则激活，c_i建模合规率，delta_i量化参数漂移。使用平均场变分推理单调最大化证据下界(ELBO)。
AI.result: 在多哥财政系统上实例化RSI，创建RSI-Togo-Fiscal-Synthetic v1.0基准数据集（2000个基于真实OTR监管规则的合成企业）。无需任何标记训练数据，RSI达到F1=0.519和AUC=0.599，吸收监管变更时间小于1ms，而完整模型重新训练需要683-1082ms，速度提升至少600倍。
AI.conclusion: RSI框架通过将监管规则编码为先验知识，在合规监控中实现了范式转变，提供了理论保证（O(1)时间吸收监管变更、后验一致性、ELBO单调最大化），并在实际应用中展示了显著的速度优势。

title: ConsRoute:Consistency-Aware Adaptive Query Routing for Cloud-Edge-Device Large Language Models
summary: Large language models (LLMs) deliver impressive capabilities but incur substantial inference latency and cost, which hinders their deployment in latency-sensitive and resource-constrained scenarios. Cloud-edge-device collaborative inference has emerged as a promising paradigm by dynamically routing queries to models of different capacities across tiers. In this paper, we propose ConsRoute, a lightweight, semantic-aware, and adaptive routing framework that significantly improves inference efficiency while minimizing impact on response quality. Unlike prior routing methods that rely on predicting coarse-grained output quality gaps, ConsRoute leverages a reranker to directly assess the semantic consistency between responses generated by models at different tiers, yielding fine-grained soft supervision signals for routing. To minimize device-side overhead, ConsRoute reuses hidden states from the LLM prefilling stage as compact query representations, avoiding additional encoders or inference passes. Furthermore, these representations are clustered, and Bayesian optimization is employed to learn cluster-specific routing thresholds that dynamically balance quality, latency, and cost under heterogeneous query distributions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ConsRoute achieves near-cloud performance (>=95%) while reducing end-to-end latency and inference cost by nearly 40%, consistently outperforming existing routing baselines in both response quality and system efficiency.

AI.tldr: ConsRoute：一个轻量级、语义感知的自适应路由框架，通过评估不同层级模型响应间的语义一致性来优化云边端协同推理，在保持95%云端性能的同时降低40%延迟和成本。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型虽然能力强大，但推理延迟和成本高昂，限制了其在延迟敏感和资源受限场景下的部署。云边端协同推理通过动态路由查询到不同层级的模型，成为有前景的解决方案。
AI.method: 1. 使用重排序器直接评估不同层级模型响应间的语义一致性，获得细粒度软监督信号；2. 重用LLM预填充阶段的隐藏状态作为紧凑查询表示，避免额外编码器或推理过程；3. 对这些表示进行聚类，并使用贝叶斯优化学习特定于聚类的路由阈值，动态平衡质量、延迟和成本。
AI.result: ConsRoute在保持接近云端性能（≥95%）的同时，将端到端延迟和推理成本降低了近40%，在响应质量和系统效率方面持续优于现有路由基线。
AI.conclusion: ConsRoute通过语义一致性评估和自适应路由阈值学习，实现了高效的云边端协同推理，为LLM在延迟敏感和资源受限场景下的部署提供了有效解决方案。

title: Neuronal Self-Adaptation Enhances Capacity and Robustness of Representation in Spiking Neural Networks
summary: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) are promising for energy-efficient, real-time edge computing, yet their performance is often constrained by the limited adaptability of conventional leaky integrate-and-fire (LIF) neurons. Existing LIF models struggle with restricted information capacity and susceptibility to noise, leading to degraded accuracy and compromised robustness. Inspired by the dynamic self-regulation of biological potassium channels, we propose the Potassium-regulated LIF (KvLIF) neuron model. KvLIF introduces an auxiliary conductance state that integrates membrane potential and spiking history to adaptively modulate neuronal excitability and reset dynamics. This design extends the dynamic response range of neurons to varying input intensities and effectively suppresses noise-induced spikes. We extensively evaluate KvLIF on both static image and neuromorphic datasets, demonstrating consistent improvements in classification accuracy and superior robustness compared to existing LIF models. Our work bridges biological plausibility with computational efficiency, offering a neuron model that enhances SNN performance while maintaining suitability for low-power neuromorphic deployment.

AI.tldr: 提出钾离子调控LIF神经元模型，通过引入辅助电导状态来提升SNN的性能和鲁棒性
AI.motivation: 传统LIF神经元信息容量有限、对噪声敏感，导致SNN性能下降，需要更适应性的神经元模型
AI.method: 受生物钾离子通道动态自调节启发，提出KvLIF模型，引入辅助电导状态，整合膜电位和脉冲历史来自适应调节神经元兴奋性和重置动态
AI.result: 在静态图像和神经形态数据集上评估，相比现有LIF模型，分类准确率持续提升，鲁棒性更优
AI.conclusion: KvLIF模型在生物合理性和计算效率之间架起桥梁，增强了SNN性能，同时保持低功耗神经形态部署的适用性

title: RAMPAGE: RAndomized Mid-Point for debiAsed Gradient Extrapolation
summary: A celebrated method for Variational Inequalities (VIs) is Extragradient (EG), which can be viewed as a standard discrete-time integration scheme. With this view in mind, in this paper we show that EG may suffer from discretization bias when applied to non-linear vector fields, conservative or otherwise. To resolve this discretization shortcoming, we introduce RAndomized Mid-Point for debiAsed Gradient Extrapolation (RAMPAGE) and its variance-reduced counterpart, RAMPAGE+ which leverages antithetic sampling. In contrast with EG, both methods are unbiased. Furthermore, leveraging negative correlation, RAMPAGE+ acts as an unbiased, geometric path-integrator that completely removes internal first-order terms from the variance, provably improving upon RAMPAGE. We further demonstrate that both methods enjoy provable $\mathcal{O}(1/k)$ convergence guarantees for a range of problems including root finding under co-coercive, co-hypomonotone, and generalized Lipschitzness regimes. Furthermore, we introduce symmetrically scaled variants to extend our results to constrained VIs. Finally, we provide convergence guarantees of both methods for stochastic and deterministic smooth convex-concave games. Somewhat interestingly, despite being a randomized method, RAMPAGE+ attains purely deterministic bounds for a number of the studied settings.

AI.tldr: 提出RAMPAGE和RAMPAGE+两种无偏随机中点方法，解决EG算法的离散化偏差问题，在多种变分不等式和博弈问题中实现O(1/k)收敛。
AI.motivation: 传统Extragradient方法作为离散时间积分方案，在处理非线性向量场时存在离散化偏差问题，无论向量场是否保守。需要设计无偏的替代方法。
AI.method: 提出RAMPAGE（随机中点去偏梯度外推）及其方差缩减版本RAMPAGE+。RAMPAGE+利用对偶采样实现无偏的几何路径积分，消除内部一阶项方差。还引入对称缩放变体处理约束变分不等式。
AI.result: 两种方法在共强制、共亚单调和广义Lipschitz条件下实现O(1/k)收敛。RAMPAGE+尽管是随机方法，在许多设置下获得确定性收敛界。方法适用于随机和确定性光滑凸凹博弈。
AI.conclusion: RAMPAGE和RAMPAGE+解决了EG的离散化偏差问题，提供了无偏的替代方案，在多种变分不等式和博弈问题中具有理论保证的收敛性能。

title: Graph of States: Solving Abductive Tasks with Large Language Models
summary: Logical reasoning encompasses deduction, induction, and abduction.
