We propose a Detection and Correction Matrix classifying model-task combinations into four regimes: Governable, Monitor Only, Steer Blind, and Ungovernable.

AI.tldr: 研究发现大型语言模型作为自主代理时存在"静默承诺失败"问题，即模型会自信地输出错误答案而不发出警告信号，且不同模型的可治理性差异巨大。
AI.motivation: 当前AI安全架构假设模型错误在运行时是可检测的，但本文通过实证研究证明这一假设在多数指令跟随模型中并不成立，需要重新评估模型的可治理性。
AI.method: 在6个模型、12个推理领域中进行实验，评估模型错误检测能力；引入"可治理性"概念，包含错误检测和纠正两个维度；设计2x2实验分析架构和微调对可治理性的影响。
AI.result: 2/3的指令跟随模型出现静默承诺失败（零警告信号）；剩余模型在贪心解码下提前57个token发出冲突信号；基准准确率不能预测可治理性；可治理性在预训练阶段基本固定，微调影响有限。
AI.conclusion: 提出检测与纠正矩阵，将模型-任务组合分为四类：可治理、仅监控、盲目引导和不可治理；强调需要针对不同模型特性设计差异化的治理策略。

title: Beyond the Birkhoff Polytope: Spectral-Sphere-Constrained Hyper-Connections
summary: Hyper-Connections (HC) generalize residual connections into multiple streams, employing residual matrices for cross-stream feature mixing to enrich model expressivity. However, unconstrained mixing disrupts the identity mapping property intrinsic to the residual connection, causing unstable training. To address this, Manifold-Constrained Hyper-Connections (mHC) and its variant restrict these matrices to the Birkhoff polytope (doubly stochastic matrices) via Sinkhorn iterations or permutation-based parameterizations. We reveal three limitations of this polytope constraint: (1) identity degeneration, where learned matrices collapse around the identity and diminish cross-stream interactions, (2) an expressivity bottleneck, as the non-negativity constraint prevents subtractive feature disentanglement, and (3) parameterization inefficiencies, manifesting as unstable Sinkhorn iterations or the factorial-scaling overhead of permutation-based parameterizations. To overcome these flaws, we propose Spectral-Sphere-Constrained Hyper-Connections (sHC). By geometrically shifting the feasible set from a rigid polytope to a spectral norm sphere, sHC allows negative entries, unlocking subtractive interactions for selective feature diversification. This shift eliminates unstable Sinkhorn projections and factorial parameterization, enabling expressive, non-degenerate residual matrices while preserving training stability.

AI.tldr: 论文提出Spectral-Sphere-Constrained Hyper-Connections (sHC)来解决现有Hyper-Connections方法在Birkhoff多面体约束下的三个局限性：身份退化、表达能力瓶颈和参数化低效。
AI.motivation: Hyper-Connections通过残差矩阵进行跨流特征混合来增强模型表达能力，但无约束的混合会破坏残差连接的身份映射特性，导致训练不稳定。现有方法使用Birkhoff多面体约束（双随机矩阵）存在三个主要问题：身份退化、表达能力瓶颈和参数化效率低下。
AI.method: 提出Spectral-Sphere-Constrained Hyper-Connections (sHC)，将可行集从刚性多面体转移到谱范数球体，允许负值条目，实现减性特征解缠。这种方法消除了不稳定的Sinkhorn投影和阶乘参数化，同时保持训练稳定性。
AI.result: sHC能够实现表达性强、非退化的残差矩阵，同时保持训练稳定性。通过允许负值条目，解锁了减性相互作用，实现选择性特征多样化。
AI.conclusion: 通过将约束从Birkhoff多面体转移到谱范数球体，sHC克服了现有方法的三个局限性，实现了更有效的跨流特征混合，同时保持了训练稳定性。

title: Conversation Tree Architecture: A Structured Framework for Context-Aware Multi-Branch LLM Conversations
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed for extended, multi-topic conversations, yet the flat, append-only structure of current conversation interfaces introduces a fundamental limitation: all context accumulates in a single unbounded window, causing topically distinct threads to bleed into one another and progressively degrade response quality. We term this failure mode logical context poisoning. In this paper, we introduce the Conversation Tree Architecture (CTA), a hierarchical framework that organizes LLM conversations as trees of discrete, context-isolated nodes. Each node maintains its own local context window; structured mechanisms govern how context flows between parent and child nodes, downstream on branch creation and upstream on branch deletion. We additionally introduce volatile nodes, transient branches whose local context must be selectively merged upward or permanently discarded before purging. We formalize the architecture's primitives, characterize the open design problems in context flow, relate our framework to prior work in LLM memory management, and describe a working prototype implementation. The CTA provides a principled foundation for structured conversational context management and extends naturally to multi-agent settings.

AI.tldr: 提出对话树架构（CTA），通过树状结构组织LLM对话，解决传统扁平对话结构中逻辑上下文污染问题
AI.motivation: 当前LLM对话采用扁平、仅追加的上下文结构，导致不同话题的上下文相互污染，逐渐降低响应质量，称为逻辑上下文污染问题
AI.method: 引入对话树架构（CTA），将对话组织为离散、上下文隔离的节点树，每个节点有独立的本地上下文窗口，通过结构化机制控制父子节点间的上下文流动
AI.result: 提出了CTA的原始形式化定义，描述了上下文流动的开放设计问题，与现有LLM内存管理研究建立联系，并实现了原型系统
AI.conclusion: CTA为结构化对话上下文管理提供了理论基础，可自然扩展到多智能体场景，解决了逻辑上下文污染问题

title: Is the future of AI green? What can innovation diffusion models say about generative AI's environmental impact?
summary: The rise of generative artificial intelligence (GAI) has led to alarming predictions about its environmental impact. However, these predictions often overlook the fact that the diffusion of innovation is accompanied by the evolution of products and the optimization of their performance, primarily for economic reasons. This can also reduce their environmental impact. By analyzing the GAI ecosystem using the classic A-U innovation diffusion model, we can forecast this industry's structure and how its environmental impact will evolve. While GAI will never be green, its impact may not be as problematic as is sometimes claimed. However, this depends on which business model becomes dominant.

AI.tldr: 本文通过A-U创新扩散模型分析生成式AI生态系统，认为虽然GAI永远不会完全绿色，但其环境影响可能没有某些预测那么严重，这取决于主导商业模式。
AI.motivation: 当前关于生成式AI环境影响的预测往往忽略了创新扩散过程中产品演化和性能优化（主要出于经济原因）也能减少环境影响的事实。
AI.method: 使用经典的A-U创新扩散模型分析生成式AI生态系统，预测行业结构及其环境影响的演变。
AI.result: 生成式AI永远不会完全绿色，但其环境影响可能没有某些预测那么严重，这取决于哪种商业模式成为主导。
AI.conclusion: 虽然生成式AI的环境影响问题存在，但通过产品演化和性能优化，其实际影响可能比当前预测要小，关键在于行业最终采用何种商业模式。

title: Natural Gradient Descent for Online Continual Learning
summary: Online Continual Learning (OCL) for image classification represents a challenging subset of Continual Learning, focusing on classifying images from a stream without assuming data independence and identical distribution (i.i.d). The primary challenge in this context is to prevent catastrophic forgetting, where the model's performance on previous tasks deteriorates as it learns new ones. Although various strategies have been proposed to address this issue, achieving rapid convergence remains a significant challenge in the online setting. In this work, we introduce a novel approach to training OCL models that utilizes the Natural Gradient Descent optimizer, incorporating an approximation of the Fisher Information Matrix (FIM) through Kronecker Factored Approximate Curvature (KFAC). This method demonstrates substantial improvements in performance across all OCL methods, particularly when combined with existing OCL tricks, on datasets such as Split CIFAR-100, CORE50, and Split miniImageNet.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种使用自然梯度下降优化器结合KFAC近似Fisher信息矩阵的方法，显著提升了在线持续学习模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 在线持续学习面临灾难性遗忘和快速收敛的挑战，现有方法在在线设置中难以实现快速收敛。
AI.method: 采用自然梯度下降优化器，通过Kronecker分解近似曲率（KFAC）来近似Fisher信息矩阵，并与现有OCL技巧结合。
AI.result: 在Split CIFAR-100、CORE50和Split miniImageNet等数据集上，该方法显著提升了所有OCL方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: 自然梯度下降结合KFAC近似是提升在线持续学习性能的有效方法，特别是在快速收敛方面表现优异。

title: More Than Sum of Its Parts: Deciphering Intent Shifts in Multimodal Hate Speech Detection
summary: Combating hate speech on social media is critical for securing cyberspace, yet relies heavily on the efficacy of automated detection systems. As content formats evolve, hate speech is transitioning from solely plain text to complex multimodal expressions, making implicit attacks harder to spot. Current systems, however, often falter on these subtle cases, as they struggle with multimodal content where the emergent meaning transcends the aggregation of individual modalities. To bridge this gap, we move beyond binary classification to characterize semantic intent shifts where modalities interact to construct implicit hate from benign cues or neutralize toxicity through semantic inversion. Guided by this fine-grained formulation, we curate the Hate via Vision-Language Interplay (H-VLI) benchmark where the true intent hinges on the intricate interplay of modalities rather than overt visual or textual slurs. To effectively decipher these complex cues, we further propose the Asymmetric Reasoning via Courtroom Agent DEbate (ARCADE) framework. By simulating a judicial process where agents actively argue for accusation and defense, ARCADE forces the model to scrutinize deep semantic cues before reaching a verdict. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ARCADE significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines on H-VLI, particularly for challenging implicit cases, while maintaining competitive performance on established benchmarks. Our code and data are available at: https://github.com/Sayur1n/H-VLI

AI.tldr: 本文提出ARCADE框架和H-VLI基准，用于检测多模态仇恨言论，特别关注模态间交互产生的隐含仇恨内容，通过模拟法庭辩论机制提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体仇恨言论检测对网络安全至关重要，但当前系统主要针对纯文本内容。随着内容形式演变，仇恨言论正从纯文本转向复杂的多模态表达，使得隐含攻击更难被发现。现有系统在处理多模态内容时表现不佳，特别是当语义意图通过模态交互产生时，无法有效识别隐含仇恨或语义反转中和毒性内容的情况。
AI.method: 1. 提出细粒度语义意图转移框架，超越二元分类，关注模态交互如何从良性线索构建隐含仇恨或通过语义反转中和毒性；2. 构建H-VLI基准数据集，其中真实意图依赖于模态间的复杂交互而非明显的视觉或文本侮辱；3. 提出ARCADE框架，模拟司法过程，让代理主动进行指控和辩护辩论，迫使模型在做出裁决前仔细审查深层语义线索。
AI.result: 实验表明，ARCADE在H-VLI基准上显著优于现有最先进基线方法，特别是在具有挑战性的隐含案例中表现突出，同时在现有基准上保持竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 通过关注多模态交互产生的语义意图转移，并采用法庭辩论式推理机制，可以有效提升多模态仇恨言论检测性能，特别是针对隐含仇恨内容。提出的H-VLI基准和ARCADE框架为这一领域提供了新的研究方向和工具。

title: DomAgent: Leveraging Knowledge Graphs and Case-Based Reasoning for Domain-Specific Code Generation
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have shown impressive capabilities in code generation. However, because most LLMs are trained on public domain corpora, directly applying them to real-world software development often yields low success rates, as these scenarios frequently require domain-specific knowledge. In particular, domain-specific tasks usually demand highly specialized solutions, which are often underrepresented or entirely absent in the training data of generic LLMs. To address this challenge, we propose DomAgent, an autonomous coding agent that bridges this gap by enabling LLMs to generate domain-adapted code through structured reasoning and targeted retrieval. A core component of DomAgent is DomRetriever, a novel retrieval module that emulates how humans learn domain-specific knowledge, by combining conceptual understanding with experiential examples. It dynamically integrates top-down knowledge-graph reasoning with bottom-up case-based reasoning, enabling iterative retrieval and synthesis of structured knowledge and representative cases to ensure contextual relevance and broad task coverage. DomRetriever can operate as part of DomAgent or independently with any LLM for flexible domain adaptation. We evaluate DomAgent on an open benchmark dataset in the data science domain (DS-1000) and further apply it to real-world truck software development tasks. Experimental results show that DomAgent significantly enhances domain-specific code generation, enabling small open-source models to close much of the performance gap with large proprietary LLMs in complex, real-world applications. The code is available at: https://github.com/Wangshuaiia/DomAgent.

AI.tldr: DomAgent是一个自主编码代理，通过结构化推理和针对性检索，使LLM能够生成领域适应的代码，解决通用LLM在领域特定任务中表现不佳的问题。
AI.motivation: 大多数LLM在公共领域语料上训练，直接应用于现实世界软件开发时成功率低，因为领域特定任务需要高度专业化的解决方案，而这些在通用LLM的训练数据中代表性不足或完全缺失。
AI.method: 提出DomAgent自主编码代理，核心组件是DomRetriever检索模块，模拟人类学习领域知识的方式，结合概念理解与经验示例。它动态集成自上而下的知识图谱推理和自下而上的案例推理，实现迭代检索和结构化知识与代表性案例的合成。
AI.result: 在数据科学领域基准数据集(DS-1000)和真实卡车软件开发任务上的实验表明，DomAgent显著增强了领域特定代码生成能力，使小型开源模型能够大幅缩小与大型专有LLM在复杂现实应用中的性能差距。
AI.conclusion: DomAgent通过结构化推理和针对性检索有效解决了LLM在领域特定代码生成中的局限性，DomRetriever可作为DomAgent的一部分或与任何LLM独立使用，实现灵活的领域适应。

title: Enhancing reasoning accuracy in large language models during inference time
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) often exhibit strong linguistic abilities while remaining unreliable on multi-step reasoning tasks, particularly when deployed without additional training or fine-tuning. In this work, we study inference-time techniques to improve the reasoning accuracy of LLMs. We systematically evaluate three classes of inference-time strategies: (i) self-consistency via stochastic decoding, where the model is sampled multiple times using controlled temperature and nucleus sampling and the most frequent final answer is selected; (ii) dual-model reasoning agreement, where outputs from two independent models are compared and only consistent reasoning traces are trusted; and (iii) self-reflection, where the model critiques and revises its own reasoning. Across all evaluated methods, we employ Chain-of-Thought (CoT) [1] prompting to elicit explicit intermediate reasoning steps before generating final answers. In this work, we provide a controlled comparative evaluation across three inference-time strategies under identical prompting and verification settings. Our experiments on LLM [2] show that self-consistency with nucleus sampling and controlled temperature value yields the substantial gains, achieving a 9% to 15% absolute improvement in accuracy over greedy single-pass decoding, well-suited for low-risk domains, offering meaningful gains with minimal overhead. The dual-model approach provides additional confirmation for model reasoning steps thus more appropriate for moderate-risk domains, where higher reliability justifies additional compute. Self-reflection offers only marginal improvements, suggesting limited effectiveness for smaller non-reasoning models at inference time.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了三种推理时策略（自一致性、双模型推理一致性、自反思）对LLM推理准确性的提升效果，发现自一致性方法效果最佳，双模型方法适合中等风险领域，自反思效果有限。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在语言能力方面表现强劲，但在多步推理任务上仍不可靠，特别是在没有额外训练或微调的情况下。本研究旨在探索推理时技术来提高LLM的推理准确性。
AI.method: 系统评估三种推理时策略：1）通过随机解码实现自一致性（使用控制温度和核采样多次采样，选择最常见答案）；2）双模型推理一致性（比较两个独立模型的输出，只信任一致的推理轨迹）；3）自反思（模型批判和修订自身推理）。所有方法都使用思维链提示来引出显式中间推理步骤。
AI.result: 自一致性方法（核采样和控制温度）效果最佳，相比贪婪单次解码获得9%-15%的绝对准确率提升，适合低风险领域；双模型方法提供额外确认，适合中等风险领域；自反思方法仅带来边际改进，对小型非推理模型效果有限。
AI.conclusion: 推理时策略能显著提升LLM推理准确性，其中自一致性方法效果最显著且计算开销小，双模型方法在需要更高可靠性的场景中有价值，而自反思在推理时对较小模型效果有限。

title: LLM-ODE: Data-driven Discovery of Dynamical Systems with Large Language Models
summary: Discovering the governing equations of dynamical systems is a central problem across many scientific disciplines. As experimental data become increasingly available, automated equation discovery methods offer a promising data-driven approach to accelerate scientific discovery. Among these methods, genetic programming (GP) has been widely adopted due to its flexibility and interpretability. However, GP-based approaches often suffer from inefficient exploration of the symbolic search space, leading to slow convergence and suboptimal solutions. To address these limitations, we propose LLM-ODE, a large language model-aided model discovery framework that guides symbolic evolution using patterns extracted from elite candidate equations. By leveraging the generative prior of large language models, LLM-ODE produces more informed search trajectories while preserving the exploratory strengths of evolutionary algorithms. Empirical results on 91 dynamical systems show that LLM-ODE variants consistently outperform classical GP methods in terms of search efficiency and Pareto-front quality. Overall, our results demonstrate that LLM-ODE improves both efficiency and accuracy over traditional GP-based discovery and offers greater scalability to higher-dimensional systems compared to linear and Transformer-only model discovery methods.

AI.tldr: LLM-ODE：利用大语言模型引导符号演化，提升动力学系统方程发现的效率和准确性
AI.motivation: 传统基于遗传编程的方程发现方法存在搜索空间探索效率低、收敛慢、解质量不高的问题，需要更高效的自动化方程发现方法
AI.method: 提出LLM-ODE框架，利用大语言模型的生成先验从精英候选方程中提取模式，引导符号演化过程，同时保留进化算法的探索优势
AI.result: 在91个动力学系统上的实验表明，LLM-ODE变体在搜索效率和帕累托前沿质量上均优于传统遗传编程方法，且在高维系统上具有更好的可扩展性
AI.conclusion: LLM-ODE通过结合大语言模型的模式提取能力和进化算法的探索优势，显著提升了方程发现的效率和准确性，为科学发现提供了更强大的数据驱动工具

title: TimeTox: An LLM-Based Pipeline for Automated Extraction of Time Toxicity from Clinical Trial Protocols
summary: Time toxicity, the cumulative healthcare contact days from clinical trial participation, is an important but labor-intensive metric to extract from protocol documents. We developed TimeTox, an LLM-based pipeline for automated extraction of time toxicity from Schedule of Assessments tables. TimeTox uses Google's Gemini models in three stages: summary extraction from full-length protocol PDFs, time toxicity quantification at six cumulative timepoints for each treatment arm, and multi-run consensus via position-based arm matching. We validated against 20 synthetic schedules (240 comparisons) and assessed reproducibility on 644 real-world oncology protocols. Two architectures were compared: single-pass (vanilla) and two-stage (structure-then-count). The two-stage pipeline achieved 100% clinically acceptable accuracy ($\pm$3 days) on synthetic data (MAE 0.81 days) versus 41.5% for vanilla (MAE 9.0 days). However, on real-world protocols, the vanilla pipeline showed superior reproducibility: 95.3% clinically acceptable accuracy (IQR $\leq$ 3 days) across 3 runs on 644 protocols, with 82.0% perfect stability (IQR = 0). The production pipeline extracted time toxicity for 1,288 treatment arms across multiple disease sites. Extraction stability on real-world data, rather than accuracy on synthetic benchmarks, is the decisive factor for production LLM deployment.

AI.tldr: TimeTox是一个基于LLM的自动化流水线，用于从临床试验方案中提取时间毒性指标，在真实世界数据上表现出95.3%的临床可接受准确性和82.0%的完美稳定性。
AI.motivation: 时间毒性是衡量临床试验参与者累积医疗接触天数的重要指标，但传统方法需要人工从方案文件中提取，耗时耗力。需要开发自动化工具来高效提取这一指标。
AI.method: 开发了TimeTox流水线，使用Google的Gemini模型分三个阶段处理：1)从完整PDF方案中提取摘要；2)为每个治疗组在六个时间点量化时间毒性；3)通过基于位置的组匹配进行多轮共识。比较了单次通过和两阶段（先结构后计数）两种架构。
AI.result: 在合成数据上，两阶段流水线达到100%临床可接受准确度（MAE 0.81天），而单次通过只有41.5%（MAE 9.0天）。但在真实世界方案上，单次通过流水线表现出更好的可重复性：95.3%临床可接受准确度（IQR ≤ 3天），82.0%完美稳定性（IQR = 0）。
AI.conclusion: 对于生产级LLM部署，真实世界数据的提取稳定性比合成基准的准确性更为关键。TimeTox成功从多个疾病部位的1,288个治疗组中提取了时间毒性数据。

title: Safety as Computation: Certified Answer Reuse via Capability Closure in Task-Oriented Dialogue
summary: We introduce a new paradigm for task-oriented dialogue systems: safety certification as a computational primitive for answer reuse. Current systems treat each turn independently, recomputing answers via retrieval or generation even when they are already derivable from prior state. We show that in capability-based systems, the safety certification step computes a fixed-point closure cl(At) that already contains every answer reachable from the current configuration. We operationalize this insight with a Certified Answer Store (CAS) augmented by Pre-Answer Blocks (PAB): at each certified turn, the system materializes all derivable follow-up answers together with minimal provenance witnesses. Subsequent queries are answered in sub-millisecond time via formal containment checks, eliminating redundant retrieval and generation.

AI.tldr: 提出任务导向对话系统新范式：将安全认证作为答案重用的计算原语，通过认证答案存储和预答案块实现亚毫秒级响应
AI.motivation: 当前系统将每个对话轮次独立处理，即使答案已可从先前状态推导出，仍通过检索或生成重新计算答案，导致冗余计算
AI.method: 在基于能力的系统中，安全认证步骤计算固定点闭包cl(At)，包含当前配置可达的所有答案。通过认证答案存储(CAS)和预答案块(PAB)实现：在每个认证轮次，系统物化所有可推导的后续答案及最小溯源见证
AI.result: 后续查询通过形式化包含检查在亚毫秒时间内回答，消除了冗余检索和生成
AI.conclusion: 安全认证可作为任务导向对话系统中答案重用的有效计算原语，显著提升系统效率

title: Enhancing LIME using Neural Decision Trees
summary: Interpreting complex machine learning models is a critical challenge, especially for tabular data where model transparency is paramount. Local Interpretable Model-Agnostic Explanations (LIME) has been a very popular framework for interpretable machine learning, also inspiring many extensions. While traditional surrogate models used in LIME variants (e.g. linear regression and decision trees) offer a degree of stability, they can struggle to faithfully capture the complex non-linear decision boundaries that are inherent in many sophisticated black-box models. This work contributes toward bridging the gap between high predictive performance and interpretable decision-making. Specifically, we propose the NDT-LIME variant that integrates Neural Decision Trees (NDTs) as surrogate models. By leveraging the structured, hierarchical nature of NDTs, our approach aims at providing more accurate and meaningful local explanations. We evaluate its effectiveness on several benchmark tabular datasets, showing consistent improvements in explanation fidelity over traditional LIME surrogates.

AI.tldr: 提出NDT-LIME方法，将神经决策树作为LIME的替代模型，提高对复杂非线性决策边界的解释保真度
AI.motivation: 传统LIME使用的线性回归和决策树等替代模型难以准确捕捉复杂黑盒模型的非线性决策边界，需要在预测性能和可解释性之间建立更好的桥梁
AI.method: 提出NDT-LIME变体，集成神经决策树作为替代模型，利用NDT的结构化层次特性提供更准确和有意义的本体解释
AI.result: 在多个基准表格数据集上评估，相比传统LIME替代模型，在解释保真度方面显示出持续改进
AI.conclusion: NDT-LIME通过神经决策树替代模型，能够更好地平衡高预测性能和可解释决策制定，为复杂机器学习模型提供更准确的本体解释

title: Beyond Memorization: Distinguishing between Reductive and Epistemic Reasoning in LLMs using Classic Logic Puzzles
summary: Epistemic reasoning requires agents to infer the state of the world from partial observations and information about other agents' knowledge. Prior work evaluating LLMs on canonical epistemic puzzles interpreted their behavior through a dichotomy between epistemic reasoning and brittle memorization. We argue that this framing is incomplete: in recent models, memorization is better understood as a special case of reduction, where a new instance is mapped onto a known problem. Instead, we introduce a reduction ladder, a sequence of modifications that progressively move instances away from a canonical epistemic puzzle, making reduction increasingly difficult while preserving the underlying logic. We find that while some large models succeed via reduction, other models fail early, and all models struggle once epistemic reasoning is required.

AI.tldr: 论文提出"还原阶梯"框架评估LLMs的认知推理能力，挑战传统"认知推理vs.机械记忆"二分法，发现大模型主要通过还原而非真正推理解决问题
AI.motivation: 现有研究将LLMs在认知谜题上的表现简单归为"认知推理"或"机械记忆"，这种二分法不完整。需要更精细的框架来理解模型如何通过还原而非真正推理来解决问题
AI.method: 提出"还原阶梯"方法：对标准认知谜题进行一系列渐进修改，使实例逐渐远离原始问题但保持逻辑一致性，从而测试模型在不同还原难度下的表现
AI.result: 研究发现：部分大模型通过还原成功解决问题，其他模型早期就失败，所有模型在需要真正认知推理时都表现不佳
AI.conclusion: 记忆应被视为还原的特殊情况，而非与推理对立。LLMs主要依赖还原而非真正的认知推理，需要更精细的评估框架来理解模型的能力边界

title: Beyond Correlation: Refutation-Validated Aspect-Based Sentiment Analysis for Explainable Energy Market Returns
comment: 13 pages, 6 figures, submitted to Expert Systems with Applications
summary: This paper proposes a refutation-validated framework for aspect-based sentiment analysis in financial markets, addressing the limitations of correlational studies that cannot distinguish genuine associations from spurious ones. Using X data for the energy sector, we test whether aspect-level sentiment signals show robust, refutation-validated relationships with equity returns. Our pipeline combines net-ratio scoring with z-normalization, OLS with Newey West HAC errors, and refutation tests including placebo, random common cause, subset stability, and bootstrap. Across six energy tickers, only a few associations survive all checks, while renewables show aspect and horizon specific responses. While not establishing causality, the framework provides statistically robust, directionally interpretable signals, with limited sample size (six stocks, one quarter) constraining generalizability and framing this work as a methodological proof of concept.

AI.tldr: 提出一个反驳验证框架用于金融市场基于方面的情感分析，通过多种统计检验区分真实关联与虚假关联，在能源股上验证了方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 解决传统相关性研究无法区分真实关联与虚假关联的局限性，为金融市场情感分析提供更稳健的统计验证方法。
AI.method: 结合净比率评分与z标准化、带Newey West HAC误差的OLS回归，以及多种反驳测试（安慰剂、随机共同原因、子集稳定性、自助法）。
AI.result: 在六个能源股票中，只有少数关联通过所有检验；可再生能源股票显示出方面和时域特定的响应模式。
AI.conclusion: 该框架提供了统计稳健、方向可解释的信号，但样本量有限（六只股票、一个季度）限制了普适性，主要作为方法论的概念验证。

title: Discriminative Representation Learning for Clinical Prediction
summary: Foundation models in healthcare have largely adopted self supervised pretraining objectives inherited from natural language processing and computer vision, emphasizing reconstruction and large scale representation learning prior to downstream adaptation. We revisit this paradigm in outcome centric clinical prediction settings and argue that, when high quality supervision is available, direct outcome alignment may provide a stronger inductive bias than generative pretraining. We propose a supervised deep learning framework that explicitly shapes representation geometry by maximizing inter class separation relative to within class variance, thereby concentrating model capacity along clinically meaningful axes. Across multiple longitudinal electronic health record tasks, including mortality and readmission prediction, our approach consistently outperforms masked, autoregressive, and contrastive pretraining baselines under matched model capacity. The proposed method improves discrimination, calibration, and sample efficiency, while simplifying the training pipeline to a single stage optimization. These findings suggest that in low entropy, outcome driven healthcare domains, supervision can act as the statistically optimal driver of representation learning, challenging the assumption that large scale self supervised pretraining is a prerequisite for strong clinical performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种监督式深度学习框架，通过最大化类间分离和最小化类内方差来优化临床预测任务中的表征学习，在多项临床预测任务中优于传统自监督预训练方法。
AI.motivation: 当前医疗领域的基座模型大多采用自然语言处理和计算机视觉中的自监督预训练目标，强调重构和大规模表征学习。作者认为在高质量监督可用的临床预测场景中，直接与临床结果对齐可能比生成式预训练提供更强的归纳偏置。
AI.method: 提出监督式深度学习框架，通过最大化类间分离相对于类内方差来显式塑造表征几何结构，将模型能力集中在具有临床意义的轴上。该方法将训练流程简化为单阶段优化。
AI.result: 在多项纵向电子健康记录任务（包括死亡率和再入院预测）中，该方法在相同模型容量下持续优于掩码、自回归和对比预训练基线。提高了判别能力、校准性和样本效率。
AI.conclusion: 在低熵、结果驱动的医疗领域，监督可以作为表征学习的统计最优驱动因素，挑战了大规模自监督预训练是强大临床性能前提的假设。

title: Unified-MAS: Universally Generating Domain-Specific Nodes for Empowering Automatic Multi-Agent Systems
summary: Automatic Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) generation has emerged as a promising paradigm for solving complex reasoning tasks. However, existing frameworks are fundamentally bottlenecked when applied to knowledge-intensive domains (e.g., healthcare and law). They either rely on a static library of general nodes like Chain-of-Thought, which lack specialized expertise, or attempt to generate nodes on the fly. In the latter case, the orchestrator is not only bound by its internal knowledge limits but must also simultaneously generate domain-specific logic and optimize high-level topology, leading to a severe architectural coupling that degrades overall system efficacy. To bridge this gap, we propose Unified-MAS that decouples granular node implementation from topological orchestration via offline node synthesis. Unified-MAS operates in two stages: (1) Search-Based Node Generation retrieves external open-world knowledge to synthesize specialized node blueprints, overcoming the internal knowledge limits of LLMs; and (2) Reward-Based Node Optimization utilizes a perplexity-guided reward to iteratively enhance the internal logic of bottleneck nodes. Extensive experiments across four specialized domains demonstrate that integrating Unified-MAS into four Automatic-MAS baselines yields a better performance-cost trade-off, achieving up to a 14.2% gain while significantly reducing costs. Further analysis reveals its robustness across different designer LLMs and its effectiveness on conventional tasks such as mathematical reasoning.

AI.tldr: Unified-MAS通过离线节点合成解耦细粒度节点实现与拓扑编排，在知识密集型领域显著提升自动多智能体系统性能
AI.motivation: 现有自动多智能体系统框架在知识密集型领域（如医疗、法律）存在瓶颈：要么依赖通用节点库缺乏专业专长，要么在线生成节点导致架构耦合，限制了系统效能
AI.method: 采用两阶段方法：1) 基于搜索的节点生成，检索外部开放世界知识合成专业化节点蓝图；2) 基于奖励的节点优化，使用困惑度指导的奖励迭代增强瓶颈节点的内部逻辑
AI.result: 在四个专业领域的实验中，将Unified-MAS集成到四个自动多智能体基线中，实现了更好的性能-成本权衡，性能提升高达14.2%同时显著降低成本
AI.conclusion: Unified-MAS通过解耦节点实现与拓扑编排，有效克服了LLM内部知识限制，在知识密集型任务中展现出优越性能，并在不同设计者LLM和传统数学推理任务上具有鲁棒性

title: Causally-Guided Diffusion for Stable Feature Selection
summary: Feature selection is fundamental to robust data-centric AI, but most existing methods optimize predictive performance under a single data distribution. This often selects spurious features that fail under distribution shifts. Motivated by principles from causal invariance, we study feature selection from a stability perspective and introduce Causally-Guided Diffusion for Stable Feature Selection (CGDFS). In CGDFS, we formalized feature selection as approximate posterior inference over feature subsets, whose posterior mass favors low prediction error and low cross-environment variance. Our framework combines three key insights: First, we formulate feature selection as stability-aware posterior sampling. Here, causal invariance serves as a soft inductive bias rather than explicit causal discovery. Second, we train a diffusion model as a learned prior over plausible continuous selection masks, combined with a stability-aware likelihood that rewards invariance across environments. This diffusion prior captures structural dependencies among features and enables scalable exploration of the combinatorially large selection space. Third, we perform guided annealed Langevin sampling that combines the diffusion prior with the stability objective, which yields a tractable, uncertainty-aware posterior inference that avoids discrete optimization and produces robust feature selections. We evaluate CGDFS on open-source real-world datasets exhibiting distribution shifts. Across both classification and regression tasks, CGDFS consistently selects more stable and transferable feature subsets, which leads to improved out-of-distribution performance and greater selection robustness compared to sparsity-based, tree-based, and stability-selection baselines.

AI.tldr: CGDFS：一种基于因果引导扩散的稳定特征选择方法，通过结合扩散模型先验和稳定性感知似然，在分布偏移下选择更稳定、可迁移的特征子集。
AI.motivation: 传统特征选择方法通常在单一数据分布下优化预测性能，容易选择虚假特征，在分布偏移时失效。受因果不变性原理启发，需要从稳定性角度进行特征选择。
AI.method: 1) 将特征选择形式化为特征子集的后验推断，后验质量偏好低预测误差和低跨环境方差；2) 训练扩散模型作为连续选择掩码的先验，结合稳定性感知似然；3) 执行引导退火Langevin采样，结合扩散先验和稳定性目标。
AI.result: 在开源真实数据集上评估，CGDFS在分类和回归任务中一致选择更稳定、可迁移的特征子集，相比基于稀疏性、基于树和稳定性选择基线，获得更好的分布外性能和选择鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: CGDFS通过将因果不变性作为软归纳偏置，结合扩散先验和稳定性感知推断，提供了一种可扩展、不确定性感知的特征选择框架，在分布偏移下实现更鲁棒的特征选择。

title: Conspiracy Frame: a Semiotically-Driven Approach for Conspiracy Theories Detection
summary: Conspiracy theories are anti-authoritarian narratives that lead to social conflict, impacting how people perceive political information. To help in understanding this issue, we introduce the Conspiracy Frame: a fine-grained semantic representation of conspiratorial narratives derived from frame-semantics and semiotics, which spawned the Conspiracy Frames (Con.Fra.) dataset: a corpus of Telegram messages annotated at span-level. The Conspiracy Frame and Con.Fra. dataset contribute to the implementation of a more generalizable understanding and recognition of conspiracy theories. We observe the ability of LLMs to recognize this phenomenon in-domain and out-of-domain, investigating the role that frames may have in supporting this task. Results show that, while the injection of frames in an in-context approach does not lead to clear increase of performance, it has potential; the mapping of annotated spans with FrameNet shows abstract semantic patterns (e.g., `Kinship', `Ingest\_substance') that potentially pave the way for a more semantically- and semiotically-aware detection of conspiratorial narratives.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了"阴谋论框架"和Con.Fra.数据集，用于细粒度语义表示阴谋论叙事，并研究了LLMs在识别阴谋论方面的能力。
AI.motivation: 阴谋论是反权威叙事，会导致社会冲突并影响人们对政治信息的认知。需要更好的方法来理解和识别阴谋论。
AI.method: 基于框架语义学和符号学开发了"阴谋论框架"语义表示，创建了Con.Fra.数据集（Telegram消息的span级标注语料库），并研究了LLMs在领域内和跨领域识别阴谋论的能力。
AI.result: 虽然上下文注入框架的方法没有显著提升性能，但显示出潜力。与FrameNet的映射揭示了抽象语义模式（如"亲属关系"、"摄入物质"），为更语义和符号学感知的阴谋论检测铺平了道路。
AI.conclusion: 阴谋论框架和Con.Fra.数据集有助于实现更通用的阴谋论理解和识别，为基于语义和符号学的阴谋论叙事检测提供了新途径。

title: Stabilizing Iterative Self-Training with Verified Reasoning via Symbolic Recursive Self-Alignment
comment: Accepted at ICLR 2026 Workshop on World Models. 10 pages, 3 figures, 5 tables
summary: Recursive self-improvement--where a model iteratively trains on its own outputs--promises sustained capability growth but faces a fundamental obstacle: recursive drift. As models train on self-generated data across multiple iterations, errors in intermediate reasoning compound, leading to mode collapse and performance degradation. We propose Neuro-Symbolic Recursive Self-Alignment (NSRSA), which stabilizes iterative self-training by embedding a symbolic verification subsystem that gates training data quality at the reasoning step level. Unlike outcome-only filtering (which admits "lucky guesses" with flawed reasoning), NSRSA verifies each arithmetic operation via sympy, checks logical flow consistency across reasoning steps, and enforces domain constraints. We evaluate NSRSA on GSM8K using Qwen3-4B-Thinking across 5 self-training iterations under five conditions: no verification, outcome verification, majority voting, full NSRSA symbolic verification, and NSRSA with DPO. Our filtering analysis shows that NSRSA rejects approximately 34% of correct-answer solutions that pass outcome verification, eliminating "lucky guesses" with flawed reasoning from the training set. We further demonstrate that constructing DPO preference pairs from NSRSA verification teaches the model to distinguish sound from flawed reasoning (reward accuracy 46% to 63%). NSRSA provides an extensible framework that demonstrates how external symbolic verification can make recursive self-improvement measurable and reliable within domains where automated verification is available.

AI.tldr: NSRSA通过符号验证子系统稳定递归自训练，在推理步骤级别过滤数据质量，消除"幸运猜测"，提升递归自改进的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 递归自改进面临递归漂移问题：模型在多轮迭代中训练自身输出时，中间推理错误会累积，导致模式崩溃和性能下降。需要一种方法来稳定迭代自训练过程。
AI.method: 提出神经符号递归自对齐（NSRSA），嵌入符号验证子系统，在推理步骤级别控制训练数据质量。使用sympy验证每个算术操作，检查推理步骤间的逻辑流一致性，并强制执行领域约束。
AI.result: NSRSA拒绝了约34%通过结果验证的正确答案解决方案，消除了训练集中的"幸运猜测"。使用NSRSA验证构建DPO偏好对，使模型区分合理与有缺陷推理的能力从46%提升到63%。
AI.conclusion: NSRSA提供了一个可扩展框架，展示了外部符号验证如何使递归自改进在可自动验证的领域中变得可测量和可靠。

title: Beyond Expression Similarity: Contrastive Learning Recovers Functional Gene Associations from Protein Interaction Structure
summary: The Predictive Associative Memory (PAM) framework posits that useful relationships often connect items that co-occur in shared contexts rather than items that appear similar in embedding space. A contrastive MLP trained on co-occurrence annotations--Contrastive Association Learning (CAL)--has improved multi-hop passage retrieval and discovered narrative function at corpus scale in text. We test whether this principle transfers to molecular biology, where protein-protein interactions provide functional associations distinct from gene expression similarity. Four experiments across two biological domains map the operating envelope. On gene perturbation data (Replogle K562 CRISPRi, 2,285 genes), CAL trained on STRING protein interactions achieves cross-boundary AUC of 0.908 where expression similarity scores 0.518. A second gene dataset (DepMap, 17,725 genes) confirms the result after negative sampling correction, reaching cross-boundary AUC of 0.947. Two drug sensitivity experiments produce informative negatives that sharpen boundary conditions. Three cross-domain findings emerge: (1) inductive transfer succeeds in biology--a node-disjoint split with unseen genes yields AUC 0.826 (Delta +0.127)--where it fails in text (+/-0.10), suggesting physically grounded associations are more transferable than contingent co-occurrences; (2) CAL scores anti-correlate with interaction degree (Spearman r = -0.590), with gains concentrating on understudied genes with focused interaction profiles; (3) tighter association quality outperforms larger but noisier training sets, reversing the text pattern. Results are stable across training seeds (SD < 0.001) and cross-boundary threshold choices.

AI.tldr: CAL（对比关联学习）在生物领域验证了PAM框架：基于蛋白质相互作用训练的模型优于基因表达相似性，在跨边界预测中表现优异，且发现生物学关联比文本共现更具可迁移性。
AI.motivation: 验证PAM框架在生物学领域的适用性，测试基于共现（蛋白质相互作用）而非相似性（基因表达）的关联学习是否能在分子生物学中产生更好的预测性能。
AI.method: 使用对比关联学习（CAL）方法，基于STRIN蛋白质相互作用数据训练MLP模型，在四个实验（两个基因扰动数据集和两个药物敏感性实验）中测试跨边界预测性能。
AI.result: CAL在基因扰动数据上达到跨边界AUC 0.908（表达相似性仅0.518），在DepMap数据上达到0.947。发现三个跨领域发现：1）生物学关联比文本共现更具可迁移性；2）CAL分数与相互作用度负相关；3）关联质量比训练集规模更重要。
AI.conclusion: PAM框架在生物学中有效，基于蛋白质相互作用的关联学习优于基于相似性的方法，且生物学中的物理基础关联比文本中的偶然共现更具可迁移性和稳定性。

title: Task-Specific Efficiency Analysis: When Small Language Models Outperform Large Language Models
comment: Accepted for publication at ESANN 2025. This is a task-specific efficiency analysis comparing small language models
summary: Large Language Models achieve remarkable performance but incur substantial computational costs unsuitable for resource-constrained deployments. This paper presents the first comprehensive task-specific efficiency analysis comparing 16 language models across five diverse NLP tasks. We introduce the Performance-Efficiency Ratio (PER), a novel metric integrating accuracy, throughput, memory, and latency through geometric mean normalization. Our systematic evaluation reveals that small models (0.5--3B parameters) achieve superior PER scores across all given tasks. These findings establish quantitative foundations for deploying small models in production environments prioritizing inference efficiency over marginal accuracy gains.

AI.tldr: 该论文首次对16个语言模型在5个NLP任务上进行全面的任务特定效率分析，提出PER指标（综合考虑准确率、吞吐量、内存和延迟），发现小模型（0.5-3B参数）在所有任务中均获得最佳PER分数。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型虽然性能优异但计算成本高昂，不适合资源受限的部署场景。需要建立系统性的效率评估框架来指导实际部署决策。
AI.method: 提出性能-效率比（PER）指标，通过几何平均归一化整合准确率、吞吐量、内存使用和延迟四个维度。对16个不同规模的LLM在5个多样化NLP任务上进行系统评估。
AI.result: 小模型（0.5-3B参数）在所有任务中均获得最佳PER分数，表明在推理效率优先的生产环境中，小模型比追求边际准确率提升的大模型更具优势。
AI.conclusion: 为生产环境部署提供了量化基础，建议优先考虑小模型以获得更好的效率-性能平衡，而非盲目追求大模型的边际准确率提升。

title: Counterfactual Credit Policy Optimization for Multi-Agent Collaboration
summary: Collaborative multi-agent large language models (LLMs) can solve complex reasoning tasks by decomposing roles and aggregating diverse hypotheses. Yet, reinforcement learning (RL) for such systems is often undermined by credit assignment: a shared global reward obscures individual contributions, inflating update variance and encouraging free-riding. We introduce Counterfactual Credit Policy Optimization (CCPO), a framework that assigns agent-specific learning signals by estimating each agent's marginal contribution through counterfactual trajectories. CCPO builds dynamic counterfactual baselines that simulate outcomes with an agent's contribution removed, yielding role-sensitive advantages for policy optimization. To further improve stability under heterogeneous tasks and data distributions, we propose a global-history-aware normalization scheme that calibrates advantages using global rollout statistics. We evaluate CCPO on two collaboration topologies: a sequential Think--Reason dyad and multi-agent voting. Across mathematical and logical reasoning benchmarks, CCPO mitigates free-riding and outperforms strong multi-agent RL baselines, yielding finer-grained and more effective credit assignment for collaborative LLM training. Our code is available at https://github.com/bhai114/ccpo.

AI.tldr: CCPO是一个为多智能体LLM协作设计的强化学习框架，通过反事实轨迹估计每个智能体的边际贡献，解决信用分配问题，减少搭便车现象。
AI.motivation: 多智能体LLM协作中，共享全局奖励会模糊个体贡献，导致信用分配问题、更新方差增大和搭便车现象，影响学习效果。
AI.method: 提出CCPO框架：1）通过反事实轨迹估计每个智能体的边际贡献，构建动态反事实基线；2）引入全局历史感知归一化方案，利用全局轨迹统计校准优势函数。
AI.result: 在顺序思考-推理双智能体和多智能体投票两种协作拓扑上，CCPO在数学和逻辑推理基准测试中优于现有多智能体RL基线，有效缓解搭便车问题。
AI.conclusion: CCPO通过精细化的信用分配机制，为协作LLM训练提供了更有效和稳定的强化学习框架，改善了多智能体协作中的学习效率。

title: Understanding Contextual Recall in Transformers: How Finetuning Enables In-Context Reasoning over Pretraining Knowledge
summary: Transformer-based language models excel at in-context learning (ICL), where they can adapt to new tasks based on contextual examples, without parameter updates. In a specific form of ICL, which we refer to as \textit{contextual recall}, models pretrained on open-ended text leverage pairwise examples to recall specific facts in novel prompt formats. We investigate whether contextual recall emerges from pretraining alone, what finetuning is required, and what mechanisms drive the necessary representations. For this, we introduce a controlled synthetic framework where pretraining sequences consist of subject-grammar-attribute tuples, with attribute types tied to grammar statistics. We demonstrate that while such pretraining successfully yields factual knowledge, it is insufficient for contextual recall: models fail to implicitly infer attribute types when the grammar statistics are removed in ICL prompts. However, we show that finetuning on tasks requiring implicit inference, distinct from the ICL evaluation, using a subset of subjects, triggers the emergence of contextual recall across all subjects. This transition is accompanied by the formation of low-dimensional latent encodings of the shared attribute type. For mechanistic insight, we derive a construction for an attention-only transformer that replicates the transition from factual to contextual recall, corroborated by empirical validation.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了Transformer语言模型在上下文学习中的"上下文回忆"能力，发现预训练本身不足以支持这种能力，但通过特定微调可以触发其涌现，并揭示了相关的表示机制。
AI.motivation: 研究Transformer语言模型在上下文学习中的"上下文回忆"能力如何形成，探究预训练是否足够，需要什么样的微调，以及驱动这种能力的机制是什么。
AI.method: 引入受控的合成框架，预训练序列由主语-语法-属性元组组成，属性类型与语法统计相关。通过移除ICL提示中的语法统计来测试模型能力，并设计特定微调任务来触发上下文回忆的涌现。
AI.result: 预训练能成功获取事实知识，但不足以支持上下文回忆；在ICL提示中移除语法统计时，模型无法隐式推断属性类型。然而，在部分主语上进行需要隐式推断的微调后，上下文回忆能力在所有主语上涌现，并伴随低维潜在编码的形成。
AI.conclusion: 上下文回忆能力不是预训练的直接结果，而是通过特定微调触发的涌现现象，与低维潜在编码的形成相关。研究还构建了注意力机制模型来验证这一转变。

title: Multi-Perspective LLM Annotations for Valid Analyses in Subjective Tasks
summary: Large language models are increasingly used to annotate texts, but their outputs reflect some human perspectives better than others. Existing methods for correcting LLM annotation error assume a single ground truth. However, this assumption fails in subjective tasks where disagreement across demographic groups is meaningful. Here we introduce Perspective-Driven Inference, a method that treats the distribution of annotations across groups as the quantity of interest, and estimates it using a small human annotation budget. We contribute an adaptive sampling strategy that concentrates human annotation effort on groups where LLM proxies are least accurate. We evaluate on politeness and offensiveness rating tasks, showing targeted improvements for harder-to-model demographic groups relative to uniform sampling baselines, while maintaining coverage.

AI.tldr: 提出Perspective-Driven Inference方法，通过自适应采样策略，用有限人工标注预算估计不同人群的标注分布，解决主观任务中LLM标注偏差问题
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型越来越多用于文本标注，但其输出反映某些人类观点优于其他观点。现有方法假设单一真实标注，这在主观任务中不成立，因为不同人群间的分歧是有意义的。
AI.method: 提出Perspective-Driven Inference方法，将跨人群的标注分布作为关注量，使用有限人工标注预算进行估计。贡献自适应采样策略，将人工标注努力集中在LLM代理最不准确的人群上。
AI.result: 在礼貌性和冒犯性评分任务上评估，相对于均匀采样基线，在难以建模的人群上显示出针对性改进，同时保持覆盖范围。
AI.conclusion: Perspective-Driven Inference方法能有效处理主观任务中的标注分歧，通过智能分配人工标注资源，提高对不同人群观点分布的估计准确性。

title: Adaptive Robust Estimator for Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
summary: Multi-agent collaboration has emerged as a powerful paradigm for enhancing the reasoning capabilities of large language models, yet it suffers from interaction-level ambiguity that blurs generation, critique, and revision, making credit assignment across agents difficult. Moreover, policy optimization in this setting is vulnerable to heavy-tailed and noisy rewards, which can bias advantage estimation and trigger unstable or even divergent training. To address both issues, we propose a robust multi-agent reinforcement learning framework for collaborative reasoning, consisting of two components: Dual-Agent Answer-Critique-Rewrite (DACR) and an Adaptive Robust Estimator (ARE). DACR decomposes reasoning into a structured three-stage pipeline: answer, critique, and rewrite, while enabling explicit attribution of each agent's marginal contribution to its partner's performance. ARE provides robust estimation of batch experience means during multi-agent policy optimization. Across mathematical reasoning and embodied intelligence benchmarks, even under noisy rewards, our method consistently outperforms the baseline in both homogeneous and heterogeneous settings. These results indicate stronger robustness to reward noise and more stable training dynamics, effectively preventing optimization failures caused by noisy reward signals.

AI.tldr: 提出DACR+ARE框架解决多智能体协作推理中的角色模糊和奖励噪声问题，通过结构化三阶段流程和鲁棒估计器提升训练稳定性
AI.motivation: 多智能体协作能增强大语言模型的推理能力，但存在交互层面的角色模糊问题（生成、批判、修订界限不清），导致信用分配困难。同时，策略优化易受重尾和噪声奖励影响，造成优势估计偏差和不稳定训练
AI.method: 提出双智能体答案-批判-重写（DACR）框架，将推理分解为结构化三阶段流程，明确各智能体的边际贡献。结合自适应鲁棒估计器（ARE），在多智能体策略优化中提供鲁棒的批量经验均值估计
AI.result: 在数学推理和具身智能基准测试中，即使在噪声奖励下，该方法在同类和异类设置中均优于基线，表现出更强的奖励噪声鲁棒性和更稳定的训练动态
AI.conclusion: DACR+ARE框架有效解决了多智能体协作推理中的角色模糊和奖励噪声问题，通过结构化交互和鲁棒估计防止了噪声奖励信号导致的优化失败，实现了更稳定高效的训练

title: Detection of adversarial intent in Human-AI teams using LLMs
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in human-AI teams as support agents for complex tasks such as information retrieval, programming, and decision-making assistance. While these agents' autonomy and contextual knowledge enables them to be useful, it also exposes them to a broad range of attacks, including data poisoning, prompt injection, and even prompt engineering. Through these attack vectors, malicious actors can manipulate an LLM agent to provide harmful information, potentially manipulating human agents to make harmful decisions. While prior work has focused on LLMs as attack targets or adversarial actors, this paper studies their potential role as defensive supervisors within mixed human-AI teams. Using a dataset consisting of multi-party conversations and decisions for a real human-AI team over a 25 round horizon, we formulate the problem of malicious behavior detection from interaction traces. We find that LLMs are capable of identifying malicious behavior in real-time, and without task-specific information, indicating the potential for task-agnostic defense. Moreover, we find that the malicious behavior of interest is not easily identified using simple heuristics, further suggesting the introduction of LLM defenders could render human teams more robust to certain classes of attack.

AI.tldr: LLMs可作为防御性监督者，在混合人机团队中实时检测恶意行为，实现任务无关的防御
AI.motivation: LLM代理在复杂任务中部署时面临多种攻击风险（数据投毒、提示注入等），可能被操纵提供有害信息，影响人类决策。现有研究主要关注LLM作为攻击目标或对抗者，本文探索LLM作为防御性监督者的潜力。
AI.method: 使用包含25轮多参与者对话和决策的真实人机团队数据集，从交互轨迹中构建恶意行为检测问题。评估LLM在无任务特定信息情况下实时识别恶意行为的能力。
AI.result: LLM能够实时检测恶意行为，且无需任务特定信息，表明具备任务无关防御潜力。目标恶意行为难以通过简单启发式方法识别，进一步支持引入LLM防御者能增强团队对特定攻击的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: LLM可作为有效的防御性监督者，在混合人机团队中提供任务无关的恶意行为检测，增强团队对复杂攻击的防御能力。

title: Efficient Fine-Tuning Methods for Portuguese Question Answering: A Comparative Study of PEFT on BERTimbau and Exploratory Evaluation of Generative LLMs
summary: Although large language models have transformed natural language processing, their computational costs create accessibility barriers for low-resource languages such as Brazilian Portuguese. This work presents a systematic evaluation of Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT) and quantization techniques applied to BERTimbau for Question Answering on SQuAD-BR, the Brazilian Portuguese translation of SQuAD v1. We evaluate 40 configurations combining four PEFT methods (LoRA, DoRA, QLoRA, QDoRA) across two model sizes (Base: 110M, Large: 335M parameters). Our findings reveal three critical insights: (1) LoRA achieves 95.8\% of baseline performance on BERTimbau-Large while reducing training time by 73.5\% (F1=81.32 vs 84.86); (2) higher learning rates (2e-4) substantially improve PEFT performance, with F1 gains of up to +19.71 points over standard rates; and (3) larger models show twice the quantization resilience (loss of 4.83 vs 9.56 F1 points). These results demonstrate that encoder-based models can be efficiently fine-tuned for extractive Brazilian Portuguese QA with substantially lower computational cost than large generative LLMs, promoting more sustainable approaches aligned with \textit{Green AI} principles. An exploratory evaluation of Tucano and Sabiá on the same extractive QA benchmark shows that while generative models can reach competitive F1 scores with LoRA fine-tuning, they require up to 4.2$\times$ more GPU memory and 3$\times$ more training time than BERTimbau-Base, reinforcing the efficiency advantage of smaller encoder-based architectures for this task.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了参数高效微调(PEFT)和量化技术在巴西葡萄牙语问答任务上的应用，发现LoRA等方法能在保持95.8%性能的同时减少73.5%训练时间，证明了小规模编码器模型相比生成式LLM的效率优势。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型的计算成本高昂，为巴西葡萄牙语等低资源语言创建了可访问性障碍。需要寻找更高效、可持续的方法来支持这些语言的NLP任务。
AI.method: 在BERTimbau模型上系统评估了40种配置，结合四种PEFT方法（LoRA、DoRA、QLoRA、QDoRA）和两种模型规模（Base: 110M、Large: 335M），使用SQuAD-BR数据集进行问答任务评估。同时探索性评估了Tucano和Sabiá生成模型。
AI.result: 1) LoRA在BERTimbau-Large上达到基线性能的95.8%，训练时间减少73.5%；2) 更高学习率(2e-4)显著提升PEFT性能，F1分数提升达+19.71分；3) 大模型量化鲁棒性是小模型的两倍(F1损失4.83 vs 9.56)。生成模型需要4.2倍GPU内存和3倍训练时间。
AI.conclusion: 编码器模型可以通过PEFT和量化技术高效微调巴西葡萄牙语问答任务，计算成本远低于大型生成式LLM，符合绿色AI原则，为低资源语言NLP提供了可持续的解决方案。

title: Mind over Space: Can Multimodal Large Language Models Mentally Navigate?
summary: Despite the widespread adoption of MLLMs in embodied agents, their capabilities remain largely confined to reactive planning from immediate observations, consistently failing in spatial reasoning across extensive spatiotemporal scales. Cognitive science reveals that Biological Intelligence (BI) thrives on "mental navigation": the strategic construction of spatial representations from experience and the subsequent mental simulation of paths prior to action. To bridge the gap between AI and BI, we introduce Video2Mental, a pioneering benchmark for evaluating the mental navigation capabilities of MLLMs. The task requires constructing hierarchical cognitive maps from long egocentric videos and generating landmark-based path plans step by step, with planning accuracy verified through simulator-based physical interaction. Our benchmarking results reveal that mental navigation capability does not naturally emerge from standard pre-training. Frontier MLLMs struggle profoundly with zero-shot structured spatial representation, and their planning accuracy decays precipitously over extended horizons. To overcome this, we propose \textbf{NavMind}, a reasoning model that internalizes mental navigation using explicit, fine-grained cognitive maps as learnable intermediate representations. Through a difficulty-stratified progressive supervised fine-tuning paradigm, NavMind effectively bridges the gap between raw perception and structured planning. Experiments demonstrate that NavMind achieves superior mental navigation capabilities, significantly outperforming frontier commercial and spatial MLLMs.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了Video2Mental基准来评估多模态大语言模型的心理导航能力，发现现有模型在此任务上表现不佳，并提出了NavMind模型通过显式认知地图显著提升了心理导航性能。
AI.motivation: 当前MLLMs在具身智能体中的应用主要局限于基于即时观察的反应式规划，缺乏跨时空尺度的空间推理能力。认知科学研究表明生物智能依赖于"心理导航"——从经验构建空间表征并进行行动前的心理路径模拟。需要弥合AI与BI在这方面的差距。
AI.method: 1) 提出Video2Mental基准，要求从长时第一人称视频构建分层认知地图并生成地标驱动的逐步路径规划；2) 提出NavMind模型，使用显式、细粒度的认知地图作为可学习的中间表征；3) 采用难度分层的渐进式监督微调范式，连接原始感知与结构化规划。
AI.result: 基准测试显示：心理导航能力不会从标准预训练中自然涌现；前沿MLLMs在零样本结构化空间表征方面表现糟糕；规划准确性随时间跨度急剧下降。NavMind在心理导航能力上显著优于前沿商业和空间MLLMs。
AI.conclusion: 心理导航是MLLMs在具身智能中的关键能力缺口，需要专门的建模方法。通过显式认知地图作为中间表征，NavMind成功弥合了原始感知与结构化规划之间的鸿沟，为开发具有生物智能类似空间推理能力的AI系统提供了有效途径。

title: Semantic Shift: the Fundamental Challenge in Text Embedding and Retrieval
summary:
Transformer-based embedding models rely on pooling to map variable-length text into a single vector, enabling efficient similarity search but also inducing well-known geometric pathologies such as anisotropy and length-induced embedding collapse. Existing accounts largely describe \emph{what} these pathologies look like, yet provide limited insight into \emph{when} and \emph{why} they harm downstream retrieval. In this work, we argue that the missing causal factor is \emph{semantic shift}: the intrinsic, structured evolution and dispersion of semantics within a text.
  We first present a theoretical analysis of \emph{semantic smoothing} in Transformer embeddings: as the semantic diversity among constituent sentences increases, the pooled representation necessarily shifts away from every individual sentence embedding, yielding a smoothed and less discriminative vector. Building on this foundation, we formalize semantic shift as a computable measure integrating local semantic evolution and global semantic dispersion. Through controlled experiments across corpora and multiple embedding models, we show that semantic shift aligns closely with the severity of embedding concentration and predicts retrieval degradation, whereas text length alone does not. Overall, semantic shift offers a unified and actionable lens for understanding embedding collapse and for diagnosing when anisotropy becomes harmful.

AI.tldr: 论文提出语义偏移（semantic shift）是导致Transformer嵌入模型几何病理（如各向异性和长度诱导嵌入塌缩）的根本原因，而非文本长度本身。语义偏移衡量文本内部语义的演化和分散程度，能预测检索性能下降。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要描述Transformer嵌入模型的几何病理（如各向异性和长度诱导嵌入塌缩）的表现，但缺乏对这些病理何时以及为何损害下游检索性能的深入理解。需要找到导致这些问题的根本因果因素。
AI.method: 1. 理论分析Transformer嵌入中的语义平滑现象：随着构成句子间语义多样性增加，池化表示必然偏离每个句子嵌入，产生平滑且区分度低的向量。2. 形式化语义偏移作为可计算度量，整合局部语义演化和全局语义分散。3. 在多个语料库和嵌入模型上进行控制实验验证。
AI.result: 语义偏移与嵌入集中程度密切相关，能预测检索性能下降，而文本长度单独不能。语义偏移提供了理解嵌入塌缩的统一框架，并能诊断何时各向异性变得有害。
AI.conclusion: 语义偏移是导致Transformer嵌入模型几何病理的根本因果因素，为理解嵌入塌缩提供了统一且可操作的理论框架，能有效诊断检索性能问题。

title: A Multidisciplinary AI Board for Multimodal Dementia Characterization and Risk Assessment
summary: Modern clinical practice increasingly depends on reasoning over heterogeneous, evolving, and incomplete patient data. Although recent advances in multimodal foundation models have improved performance on various clinical tasks, most existing models remain static, opaque, and poorly aligned with real-world clinical workflows. We present Cerebra, an interactive multi-agent AI team that coordinates specialized agents for EHR, clinical notes, and medical imaging analysis. These outputs are synthesized into a clinician-facing dashboard that combines visual analytics with a conversational interface, enabling clinicians to interrogate predictions and contextualize risk at the point of care. Cerebra supports privacy-preserving deployment by operating on structured representations and remains robust when modalities are incomplete. We evaluated Cerebra using a massive multi-institutional dataset spanning 3 million patients from four independent healthcare systems. Cerebra consistently outperformed both state-of-the-art single-modality models and large multimodal language model baselines. In dementia risk prediction, it achieved AUROCs up to 0.80, compared with 0.74 for the strongest single-modality model and 0.68 for language model baselines. For dementia diagnosis, it achieved an AUROC of 0.86, and for survival prediction, a C-index of 0.81. In a reader study with experienced physicians, Cerebra significantly improved expert performance, increasing accuracy by 17.5 percentage points in prospective dementia risk estimation. These results demonstrate Cerebra's potential for interpretable, robust decision support in clinical care.

AI.tldr: Cerebra是一个交互式多智能体AI系统，通过协调专门处理电子健康记录、临床笔记和医学影像的智能体，为临床决策提供支持，在痴呆风险预测、诊断和生存预测等任务上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现代临床实践需要处理异构、动态且不完整的患者数据，而现有多模态基础模型多为静态、不透明且与真实临床工作流程不匹配，需要开发更符合临床需求的交互式AI系统。
AI.method: Cerebra采用多智能体架构，协调专门处理不同数据模态（EHR、临床笔记、医学影像）的智能体，通过可视化分析仪表板和对话界面将分析结果呈现给临床医生，支持隐私保护部署并能在数据不完整时保持鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在包含300万患者的多机构数据集上，Cerebra在痴呆风险预测（AUROC达0.80）、痴呆诊断（AUROC 0.86）和生存预测（C-index 0.81）方面均优于现有单模态模型和多模态语言模型基线。在医生读者研究中，将专家在痴呆风险估计中的准确率提高了17.5个百分点。
AI.conclusion: Cerebra展示了在临床护理中提供可解释、鲁棒决策支持的潜力，通过多智能体协作和交互式界面有效整合异构临床数据，显著提升临床决策质量。

title: Joint Surrogate Learning of Objectives, Constraints, and Sensitivities for Efficient Multi-objective Optimization of Neural Dynamical Systems
summary: Biophysical neural system simulations are among the most computationally demanding scientific applications, and their optimization requires navigating high-dimensional parameter spaces under numerous constraints that impose a binary feasible/infeasible partition with no gradient signal to guide the search. Here, we introduce DMOSOPT, a scalable optimization framework that leverages a unified, jointly learned surrogate model to capture the interplay between objectives, constraints, and parameter sensitivities. By learning a smooth approximation of both the objective landscape and the feasibility boundary, the joint surrogate provides a unified gradient that simultaneously steers the search toward improved objective values and greater constraint satisfaction, while its partial derivatives yield per-parameter sensitivity estimates that enable more targeted exploration. We validate the framework from single-cell dynamics to population-level network activity, spanning incremental stages of a neural circuit modeling workflow, and demonstrate efficient, effective optimization of highly constrained problems at supercomputing scale with substantially fewer problem evaluations. While motivated by and demonstrated in the context of computational neuroscience, the framework is general and applicable to constrained multi-objective optimization problems across scientific and engineering domains.

AI.tldr: DMOSOPT是一个可扩展的优化框架，使用联合学习的代理模型来处理高维参数空间中的约束多目标优化问题，特别适用于计算神经科学中的生物物理模拟。
AI.motivation: 生物物理神经系统的模拟是计算需求最高的科学应用之一，其优化需要在众多约束条件下导航高维参数空间，这些约束条件将空间划分为可行/不可行区域，且没有梯度信号来指导搜索。
AI.method: 引入DMOSOPT框架，利用统一联合学习的代理模型来捕捉目标、约束和参数敏感性之间的相互作用。通过学习目标景观和可行性边界的平滑近似，联合代理提供统一的梯度，同时引导搜索朝向改进的目标值和更高的约束满足度。
AI.result: 该框架从单细胞动力学到群体级网络活动进行了验证，涵盖了神经回路建模工作流程的各个阶段，并在超级计算规模上展示了高效、有效的优化，显著减少了问题评估次数。
AI.conclusion: 虽然该框架的动机和演示都在计算神经科学背景下，但它是通用的，适用于科学和工程领域的约束多目标优化问题。

title: PROMPT2BOX: Uncovering Entailment Structure among LLM Prompts
summary: To discover the weaknesses of LLMs, researchers often embed prompts into a vector space and cluster them to extract insightful patterns. However, vector embeddings primarily capture topical similarity. As a result, prompts that share a topic but differ in specificity, and consequently in difficulty, are often represented similarly, making fine-grained weakness analysis difficult. To address this limitation, we propose PROMPT2BOX, which embeds prompts into a box embedding space using a trained encoder. The encoder, trained on existing and synthesized datasets, outputs box embeddings that capture not only semantic similarity but also specificity relations between prompts (e.g., "writing an adventure story" is more specific than "writing a story"). We further develop a novel dimension reduction technique for box embeddings to facilitate dataset visualization and comparison. Our experiments demonstrate that box embeddings consistently capture prompt specificity better than vector baselines. On the downstream task of creating hierarchical clustering trees for 17 LLMs from the UltraFeedback dataset, PROMPT2BOX can identify 8.9\% more LLM weaknesses than vector baselines and achieves an approximately 33\% stronger correlation between hierarchical depth and instruction specificity.

AI.tldr: PROMPT2BOX：使用盒嵌入空间分析LLM弱点，比传统向量嵌入更好地捕捉提示语的特异性关系，能发现更多模型弱点
AI.motivation: 传统向量嵌入主要捕捉主题相似性，但无法区分提示语的特异性差异（如"写冒险故事"比"写故事"更具体），导致难以进行细粒度的LLM弱点分析
AI.method: 提出PROMPT2BOX方法，使用训练好的编码器将提示语嵌入到盒嵌入空间；编码器在现有和合成数据集上训练，输出的盒嵌入能同时捕捉语义相似性和特异性关系；还开发了盒嵌入的降维技术用于数据集可视化和比较
AI.result: 盒嵌入比向量基线更好地捕捉提示语特异性；在UltraFeedback数据集上为17个LLM创建层次聚类树时，PROMPT2BOX能比向量基线多发现8.9%的LLM弱点，层次深度与指令特异性的相关性增强约33%
AI.conclusion: PROMPT2BOX通过盒嵌入空间有效解决了传统向量嵌入在LLM弱点分析中的局限性，能更好地捕捉提示语的特异性关系，从而更准确地识别模型弱点

title: INTRYGUE: Induction-Aware Entropy Gating for Reliable RAG Uncertainty Estimation
summary: While retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) significantly improves the factual reliability of LLMs, it does not eliminate hallucinations, so robust uncertainty quantification (UQ) remains essential. In this paper, we reveal that standard entropy-based UQ methods often fail in RAG settings due to a mechanistic paradox. An internal "tug-of-war" inherent to context utilization appears: while induction heads promote grounded responses by copying the correct answer, they collaterally trigger the previously established "entropy neurons". This interaction inflates predictive entropy, causing the model to signal false uncertainty on accurate outputs. To address this, we propose INTRYGUE (Induction-Aware Entropy Gating for Uncertainty Estimation), a mechanistically grounded method that gates predictive entropy based on the activation patterns of induction heads. Evaluated across four RAG benchmarks and six open-source LLMs (4B to 13B parameters), INTRYGUE consistently matches or outperforms a wide range of UQ baselines. Our findings demonstrate that hallucination detection in RAG benefits from combining predictive uncertainty with interpretable, internal signals of context utilization.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了标准基于熵的不确定性量化方法在RAG中因机制性悖论而失效，提出了基于归纳头激活模式的INTRYGUE方法，在多个基准测试中优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管检索增强生成(RAG)显著提高了LLMs的事实可靠性，但并不能完全消除幻觉，因此需要稳健的不确定性量化。研究发现标准熵基UQ方法在RAG设置中经常失败，因为存在机制性悖论：归纳头在促进接地响应时会同时触发"熵神经元"，导致预测熵膨胀，使模型在准确输出上发出虚假不确定性信号。
AI.method: 提出了INTRYGUE（Induction-Aware Entropy Gating for Uncertainty Estimation），这是一种基于机制的方法，根据归纳头的激活模式对预测熵进行门控。该方法结合预测不确定性和可解释的内部上下文利用信号来检测幻觉。
AI.result: 在四个RAG基准测试和六个开源LLM（4B到13B参数）上评估，INTRYGUE始终匹配或优于广泛的UQ基线方法。该方法在幻觉检测方面表现出色。
AI.conclusion: RAG中的幻觉检测受益于将预测不确定性与可解释的内部上下文利用信号相结合。INTRYGUE通过机制性地解决归纳头与熵神经元之间的"拔河"问题，提供了更可靠的不确定性量化。

title: Interpreting the Synchronization Gap: The Hidden Mechanism Inside Diffusion Transformers
summary: Recent theoretical models of diffusion processes, conceptualized as coupled Ornstein-Uhlenbeck systems, predict a hierarchy of interaction timescales, and consequently, the existence of a synchronization gap between modes that commit at different stages of the reverse process. However, because these predictions rely on continuous time and analytically tractable score functions, it remains unclear how this phenomenology manifests in the deep, discrete architectures deployed in practice. In this work, we investigate how the synchronization gap is mechanistically realized within pretrained Diffusion Transformers (DiTs). We construct an explicit architectural realization of replica coupling by embedding two generative trajectories into a joint token sequence, modulated by a symmetric cross attention gate with variable coupling strength g. Through a linearized analysis of the attention difference, we show that the replica interaction decomposes mechanistically. We empirically validate our theoretical framework on a pretrained DiT-XL/2 model by tracking commitment and per layer internal mode energies. Our results reveal that: (1) the synchronization gap is an intrinsic architectural property of DiTs that persists even when external coupling is turned off; (2) as predicted by our spatial routing bounds, the gap completely collapses under strong coupling; (3) the gap is strictly depth localized, emerging sharply only within the final layers of the Transformer; and (4) global, low frequency structures consistently commit before local, high frequency details. Ultimately, our findings provide a mechanistic interpretation of how Diffusion Transformers resolve generative ambiguity, isolating speciation transitions to the terminal layers of the network.

AI.tldr: 研究揭示了Diffusion Transformers中同步间隙的内在机制，发现这是DiTs的固有架构特性，仅出现在网络最后几层，且全局低频结构先于局部高频细节确定。
AI.motivation: 理论模型预测扩散过程中存在同步间隙，但这些预测基于连续时间和解析可处理的分数函数，不清楚这种现象如何在实践中部署的深度离散架构中体现。
AI.method: 通过将两个生成轨迹嵌入联合令牌序列，构建副本耦合的显式架构实现，使用对称交叉注意力门调节耦合强度。对注意力差异进行线性化分析，并基于预训练的DiT-XL/2模型进行经验验证。
AI.result: 发现：(1)同步间隙是DiTs的内在架构特性，即使外部耦合关闭也存在；(2)强耦合下间隙完全消失；(3)间隙严格深度局部化，仅在Transformer最后几层出现；(4)全局低频结构始终先于局部高频细节确定。
AI.conclusion: 研究提供了Diffusion Transformers如何解决生成模糊性的机制解释，将物种形成转变隔离到网络的终端层，为扩散模型的理论预测提供了实证基础。

title: KG-Hopper: Empowering Compact Open LLMs with Knowledge Graph Reasoning via Reinforcement Learning
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) demonstrate impressive natural language capabilities but often struggle with knowledge-intensive reasoning tasks. Knowledge Base Question Answering (KBQA), which leverages structured Knowledge Graphs (KGs) exemplifies this challenge due to the need for accurate multi-hop reasoning. Existing approaches typically perform sequential reasoning steps guided by predefined pipelines, restricting flexibility and causing error cascades due to isolated reasoning at each step. To address these limitations, we propose KG-Hopper, a novel Reinforcement Learning (RL) framework that empowers compact open LLMs with the ability to perform integrated multi-hop KG reasoning within a single inference round. Rather than reasoning step-by-step, we train a Reasoning LLM that embeds the entire KG traversal and decision process into a unified ``thinking'' stage, enabling global reasoning over cross-step dependencies and dynamic path exploration with backtracking. Experimental results on eight KG reasoning benchmarks show that KG-Hopper, based on a 7B-parameter LLM, consistently outperforms larger multi-step systems (up to 70B) and achieves competitive performance with proprietary models such as GPT-3.5-Turbo and GPT-4o-mini, while remaining compact, open, and data-efficient. The code is publicly available at: https://github.com/Wangshuaiia/KG-Hopper.

AI.tldr: KG-Hopper：基于强化学习的框架，让小型开源LLM在单次推理中完成多跳知识图谱推理，性能媲美大型多步系统和专有模型
AI.motivation: 现有KBQA方法通常采用预定义管道的顺序推理步骤，缺乏灵活性且容易因各步骤孤立推理导致错误级联。需要一种能够进行全局推理、动态路径探索和回溯的集成方法。
AI.method: 提出KG-Hopper强化学习框架，训练一个推理LLM，将整个KG遍历和决策过程嵌入到统一的"思考"阶段，实现跨步骤依赖的全局推理和带回溯的动态路径探索。
AI.result: 在8个KG推理基准测试中，基于7B参数LLM的KG-Hopper一致优于更大的多步系统（最高达70B），并与GPT-3.5-Turbo和GPT-4o-mini等专有模型竞争，同时保持紧凑、开源和数据高效。
AI.conclusion: KG-Hopper通过强化学习框架使小型开源LLM能够在单次推理中执行集成多跳KG推理，解决了现有方法的局限性，为高效知识推理提供了新途径。

title: EnterpriseLab: A Full-Stack Platform for developing and deploying agents in Enterprises
summary: Deploying AI agents in enterprise environments requires balancing capability with data sovereignty and cost constraints. While small language models offer privacy-preserving alternatives to frontier models, their specialization is hindered by fragmented development pipelines that separate tool integration, data generation, and training. We introduce EnterpriseLab, a full-stack platform that unifies these stages into a closed-loop framework. EnterpriseLab provides (1) a modular environment exposing enterprise applications via Model Context Protocol, enabling seamless integration of proprietary and open-source tools; (2) automated trajectory synthesis that programmatically generates training data from environment schemas; and (3) integrated training pipelines with continuous evaluation. We validate the platform through EnterpriseArena, an instantiation with 15 applications and 140+ tools across IT, HR, sales, and engineering domains. Our results demonstrate that 8B-parameter models trained within EnterpriseLab match GPT-4o's performance on complex enterprise workflows while reducing inference costs by 8-10x, and remain robust across diverse enterprise benchmarks, including EnterpriseBench (+10%) and CRMArena (+10%). EnterpriseLab provides enterprises a practical path to deploying capable, privacy-preserving agents without compromising operational capability.

AI.tldr: EnterpriseLab是一个全栈平台，通过统一工具集成、数据生成和训练阶段，帮助企业部署高性能、隐私保护的小型语言模型AI代理，在保持GPT-4o级别性能的同时将推理成本降低8-10倍。
AI.motivation: 企业部署AI代理时面临能力、数据主权和成本之间的平衡难题。小型语言模型虽然能提供隐私保护，但其专业化受到分散的开发流程阻碍，工具集成、数据生成和训练阶段相互分离。
AI.method: 1) 模块化环境通过Model Context Protocol暴露企业应用，实现专有和开源工具的无缝集成；2) 自动化轨迹合成从环境模式中程序化生成训练数据；3) 集成训练管道与持续评估，形成闭环框架。
AI.result: 在包含15个应用和140+工具的EnterpriseArena实例中，8B参数模型在复杂企业工作流中达到GPT-4o的性能水平，推理成本降低8-10倍，在EnterpriseBench和CRMArena等企业基准测试中表现稳健（提升10%）。
AI.conclusion: EnterpriseLab为企业提供了部署能力强、隐私保护的AI代理的实用路径，无需牺牲操作能力，实现了成本效益与性能的平衡。

title: Structural Sensitivity in Compressed Transformers: Error Propagation, Lyapunov Stability, and Formally Verified Bounds
summary: A single matrix out of 468 in GPT-2 Small can increase perplexity by 20,000x when compressed, revealing that transformer compression sensitivity spans five orders of magnitude. We map this sensitivity landscape across five architectures (117M-8B parameters), finding a consistent hierarchy: early-layer MLP up-projections are catastrophically sensitive while value projections compress nearly for free. This hierarchy is stable across compression levels, evaluation scales (2K-51K tokens), and datasets (WikiText-103, C4). Using Lyapunov stability theory, we show that residual connections contract compression errors by growing the hidden state faster than the error. Error contraction is necessary but not sufficient for compression tolerance: architecture-specific redundancy plays an equally important role, as demonstrated by the hybrid LFM2-2.6B degrading only 7x despite higher amplification than the fully-contracting GPT-2 Small (120x). Ten machine-checked Lean 4 theorems formalize per-matrix error bounds with no sorry markers; all bounds produce zero violations across 14,040+ configurations. We validate with downstream task evaluation (HellaSwag, ARC-Easy, Winogrande), activation-aware pruning on two architectures, and a Compression Fragility Index that rank-orders model robustness.

AI.tldr: 研究发现Transformer模型压缩敏感性差异巨大（5个数量级），早期层MLP上投影对压缩极其敏感，而值投影几乎可无损压缩。通过李雅普诺夫稳定性理论分析误差收缩机制，并开发了形式化验证的压缩脆弱性指数。
AI.motivation: 理解Transformer模型不同组件对压缩的敏感性差异，揭示压缩鲁棒性的内在机制，为模型压缩提供理论指导。
AI.method: 1. 在5种架构（117M-8B参数）上系统测量压缩敏感性；2. 使用李雅普诺夫稳定性理论分析误差收缩机制；3. 开发形式化验证的误差边界定理（Lean 4）；4. 通过下游任务评估和激活感知剪枝验证；5. 提出压缩脆弱性指数量化模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 1. 发现一致的敏感性层级：早期层MLP上投影最敏感（压缩可导致困惑度增加20,000倍），值投影最鲁棒；2. 该层级在不同压缩级别、评估规模（2K-51K tokens）和数据集上稳定；3. 残差连接通过使隐藏状态增长快于误差来收缩压缩误差；4. 误差收缩是必要条件但非充分条件，架构特定冗余同样重要；5. 所有形式化定理在14,040+配置中零违规。
AI.conclusion: Transformer压缩敏感性存在系统性差异，可通过李雅普诺夫稳定性理论解释。压缩鲁棒性取决于误差收缩和架构冗余的平衡，压缩脆弱性指数可有效量化模型鲁棒性，为高效模型压缩提供理论基础。

title: Cross-Context Verification: Hierarchical Detection of Benchmark Contamination through Session-Isolated Analysis
summary:
LLM coding benchmarks face a credibility crisis: widespread solution leakage and test quality issues undermine SWE-bench Verified, while existing detection methods--paraphrase consistency, n-gram overlap, perplexity analysis--never directly observe whether a model reasons or recalls. Meanwhile, simply repeating verification degrades accuracy: multi-turn review generates false positives faster than it discovers true errors, suggesting that structural approaches are needed.
  We introduce Cross-Context Verification (CCV), a black-box method that solves the same benchmark problem in N independent sessions and measures solution diversity, combined with the Hierarchical Cross-Context Architecture (HCCA), a multi-agent analysis framework that prevents confirmation bias through intentional information restriction across specialized analytical roles.
  On 9 SWE-bench Verified problems (45 trials, Claude Opus 4.6, temperature 0), CCV achieves perfect separation between contaminated and genuine reasoning (Mann-Whitney U=0, p approx 0.012, r = 1.0). Key findings: (1) contamination is binary--models either recall perfectly or not at all; (2) reasoning absence is a perfect discriminator; (3) 33% of prior contamination labels are false positives; (4) HCCA's independent analysis structure discovers contamination-flaw composite cases that single-analyst approaches miss. A pilot experiment extending HCCA to multi-stage verification (Worker to Verifier to Director) yields a negative result--100% sycophantic confirmation--providing further evidence that information restriction, not structural complexity, is the key mechanism. We release all code and data.

AI.tldr: 提出跨上下文验证(CCV)和分层跨上下文架构(HCCA)来检测LLM编码基准中的解决方案泄漏问题，通过独立会话验证和信息限制机制实现完美区分污染与真实推理。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM编码基准面临可信度危机：解决方案泄漏和测试质量问题普遍存在，现有检测方法（如释义一致性、n-gram重叠、困惑度分析）无法直接观察模型是在推理还是回忆。重复验证反而会降低准确性，需要结构性方法来解决这些问题。
AI.method: 提出跨上下文验证(CCV)：在N个独立会话中解决相同基准问题并测量解决方案多样性。结合分层跨上下文架构(HCCA)：通过跨专门分析角色的有意信息限制来防止确认偏误的多智能体分析框架。
AI.result: 在9个SWE-bench Verified问题上（45次试验，Claude Opus 4.6，温度0），CCV实现了污染与真实推理的完美分离（Mann-Whitney U=0，p≈0.012，r=1.0）。关键发现：污染是二元的；推理缺失是完美判别器；33%的先前污染标签是假阳性；HCCA能发现单分析师方法遗漏的污染-缺陷复合案例。
AI.conclusion: 信息限制而非结构复杂性是关键机制。跨上下文验证和分层架构能有效检测LLM编码基准中的解决方案泄漏问题，提供更可靠的污染检测方法。多阶段验证实验显示100%的顺从性确认，进一步证明信息限制的重要性。

title: Silicon Bureaucracy and AI Test-Oriented Education: Contamination Sensitivity and Score Confidence in LLM Benchmarks
summary: Public benchmarks increasingly govern how large language models (LLMs) are ranked, selected, and deployed. We frame this benchmark-centered regime as Silicon Bureaucracy and AI Test-Oriented Education, and argue that it rests on a fragile assumption: that benchmark scores directly reflect genuine generalization. In practice, however, such scores may conflate exam-oriented competence with principled capability, especially when contamination and semantic leakage are difficult to exclude from modern training pipelines. We therefore propose an audit framework for analyzing contamination sensitivity and score confidence in LLM benchmarks. Using a router-worker setup, we compare a clean-control condition with noisy conditions in which benchmark problems are systematically deleted, rewritten, and perturbed before being passed downstream. For a genuinely clean benchmark, noisy conditions should not consistently outperform the clean-control baseline. Yet across multiple models, we find widespread but heterogeneous above-baseline gains under noisy conditions, indicating that benchmark-related cues may be reassembled and can reactivate contamination-related memory. These results suggest that similar benchmark scores may carry substantially different levels of confidence. Rather than rejecting benchmarks altogether, we argue that benchmark-based evaluation should be supplemented with explicit audits of contamination sensitivity and score confidence.

AI.tldr: 论文提出"硅官僚主义"和"AI应试教育"概念，指出当前LLM基准测试存在污染问题，基准分数可能无法反映真实泛化能力。作者开发了审计框架分析污染敏感性和分数置信度，发现噪声条件下模型表现反而提升，表明基准分数置信度存在差异。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM评估过度依赖基准测试排名，但基准分数可能无法真实反映模型泛化能力，因为训练数据可能包含基准内容（污染问题）。需要建立审计框架来评估基准分数的可靠性和置信度。
AI.method: 提出审计框架，使用router-worker设置，比较干净控制条件与噪声条件（基准问题被删除、重写、扰动）下的模型表现。如果基准真正干净，噪声条件不应持续优于干净基线。
AI.result: 多个模型在噪声条件下普遍出现高于基线的性能提升，表明基准相关线索可能被重组并激活污染相关记忆。不同基准分数的置信度存在显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 不应完全否定基准测试，但需要在基准评估基础上补充污染敏感性和分数置信度的显式审计，以更准确评估LLM的真实能力。

title: Long-Term Outlier Prediction Through Outlier Score Modeling
summary: This study addresses an important gap in time series outlier detection by proposing a novel problem setting: long-term outlier prediction. Conventional methods primarily focus on immediate detection by identifying deviations from normal patterns. As a result, their applicability is limited when forecasting outlier events far into the future. To overcome this limitation, we propose a simple and unsupervised two-layer method that is independent of specific models. The first layer performs standard outlier detection, and the second layer predicts future outlier scores based on the temporal structure of previously observed outliers. This framework enables not only pointwise detection but also long-term forecasting of outlier likelihoods. Experiments on synthetic datasets show that the proposed method performs well in both detection and prediction tasks. These findings suggest that the method can serve as a strong baseline for future work in outlier detection and forecasting.

AI.tldr: 提出长期异常值预测新问题，设计无监督双层方法，第一层检测异常，第二层基于异常时间结构预测未来异常分数
AI.motivation: 现有时间序列异常检测方法主要关注即时检测，无法预测未来的异常事件，存在应用局限性
AI.method: 提出简单无监督双层方法：第一层执行标准异常检测，第二层基于已观测异常的时间结构预测未来异常分数
AI.result: 在合成数据集上实验表明，该方法在检测和预测任务中都表现良好
AI.conclusion: 该方法可作为未来异常检测和预测研究的强基线，为解决长期异常预测问题提供了新思路

title: DRTriton: Large-Scale Synthetic Data Reinforcement Learning for Triton Kernel Generation
summary: Developing efficient CUDA kernels is a fundamental yet challenging task in the generative AI industry. Recent researches leverage Large Language Models (LLMs) to automatically convert PyTorch reference implementations to CUDA kernels, significantly reducing the engineering efforts. State-of-the-art LLMs, such as GPT-5.2 and Claude-Sonnet-4.5, still struggle in this specific task. To address this challenge, we propose DRTriton, a scalable learning framework for training LLMs to convert PyTorch codes into highly optimized Triton kernels, which are then compiled to CUDA kernels at runtime. DRTriton consists of three key components: (i) a data synthetic algorithm CSP-DAG that guarantees full coverage and unbiased uniform sampling over the operator space with controlled difficulty; (ii) a curriculum reinforcement learning with decoupled reward efficiently optimizes conversion success rate and inference speed simultaneously; and (iii) a test-time search algorithm that further improves the inference speed of the generated Triton kernels. Notably, despite being trained exclusively on synthetic data, DRTriton generalizes effectively to real-world CUDA kernels that are challenging even for human experts. Experimental results show that DRTriton-7B achieves speedup on 92% of the KernelBench Level 2, compared to 23% for GPT-5.2 and 19% for Claude-Sonnet-4.5.

AI.tldr: DRTriton是一个可扩展的学习框架，用于训练LLMs将PyTorch代码转换为高度优化的Triton内核，然后编译为CUDA内核，显著提升生成AI中的CUDA内核开发效率。
AI.motivation: 生成AI行业中开发高效CUDA内核是一项基础但具有挑战性的任务。现有LLMs（如GPT-5.2和Claude-Sonnet-4.5）在此特定任务上仍然表现不佳，需要减少工程投入并提高转换效率。
AI.method: DRTriton包含三个关键组件：1) CSP-DAG数据合成算法，保证操作符空间全覆盖和无偏均匀采样；2) 解耦奖励的课程强化学习，同时优化转换成功率和推理速度；3) 测试时搜索算法，进一步提升生成的Triton内核的推理速度。
AI.result: DRTriton-7B在KernelBench Level 2上实现了92%的加速，而GPT-5.2为23%，Claude-Sonnet-4.5为19%。尽管仅使用合成数据训练，但能有效泛化到人类专家都难以处理的真实世界CUDA内核。
AI.conclusion: DRTriton框架通过合成数据训练和系统化优化方法，显著提升了LLMs在PyTorch到CUDA内核转换任务上的性能，为生成AI行业的高效CUDA内核开发提供了有效解决方案。

title: Mirage The Illusion of Visual Understanding
summary: Multimodal AI systems have achieved remarkable performance across a broad range of real-world tasks, yet the mechanisms underlying visual-language reasoning remain surprisingly poorly understood. We report three findings that challenge prevailing assumptions about how these systems process and integrate visual information. First, Frontier models readily generate detailed image descriptions and elaborate reasoning traces, including pathology-biased clinical findings, for images never provided; we term this phenomenon mirage reasoning. Second, without any image input, models also attain strikingly high scores across general and medical multimodal benchmarks, bringing into question their utility and design. In the most extreme case, our model achieved the top rank on a standard chest X-ray question-answering benchmark without access to any images. Third, when models were explicitly instructed to guess answers without image access, rather than being implicitly prompted to assume images were present, performance declined markedly. Explicit guessing appears to engage a more conservative response regime, in contrast to the mirage regime in which models behave as though images have been provided. These findings expose fundamental vulnerabilities in how visual-language models reason and are evaluated, pointing to an urgent need for private benchmarks that eliminate textual cues enabling non-visual inference, particularly in medical contexts where miscalibrated AI carries the greatest consequence. We introduce B-Clean as a principled solution for fair, vision-grounded evaluation of multimodal AI systems.

AI.tldr: 研究发现多模态AI系统存在"海市蜃楼推理"现象：模型能在没有图像输入的情况下生成详细的图像描述和推理痕迹，并在多模态基准测试中获得高分，这挑战了现有评估方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 尽管多模态AI系统在实际任务中表现出色，但其视觉-语言推理机制仍不明确。研究者希望揭示这些系统如何处理和整合视觉信息，特别是在医学等高风险领域，评估方法的缺陷可能导致严重后果。
AI.method: 通过三个实验设计：1) 测试模型在没有图像输入时生成图像描述和推理的能力；2) 评估模型在无图像情况下在通用和医学多模态基准上的表现；3) 比较模型在"猜测"指令和"假设图像存在"指令下的性能差异。
AI.result: 1) 前沿模型能在无图像输入时生成详细图像描述和临床发现（海市蜃楼推理）；2) 无图像时模型在多模态基准上仍获得高分，甚至在某胸部X光问答基准上排名第一；3) 明确要求猜测而非假设图像存在时，性能显著下降。
AI.conclusion: 多模态AI系统的推理和评估存在根本性漏洞，文本线索使模型能进行非视觉推理。需要开发消除文本线索的私有基准测试，特别是在医学领域。作者提出了B-Clean作为公平、视觉基础的多模态AI评估解决方案。

title: When Does Content-Based Routing Work? Representation Requirements for Selective Attention in Hybrid Sequence Models
summary: We identify a routing paradox in hybrid recurrent-attention architectures: content-based routing - deciding which tokens deserve expensive attention - requires exactly the pairwise computation that routing is designed to avoid. Through 20+ controlled experiments across three tasks (a synthetic diagnostic, the Zoology MQAR benchmark, and HotpotQA), we map the routing landscape exhaustively. One layer of softmax attention creates a latent ~34-dimensional subspace enabling 98.4% routing precision; zero layers yield 1.2%.
