This subspace is invisible to cosine similarity, destroyed by random projections (98.4% to 2.6%), and cannot be created by contrastive pretraining - proving attention's role is writing pairwise match results into representations, not merely computing them. Twelve alternative mechanisms all cluster at 15-29%. Non-learned indices (Bloom filter: 90.9%; BM25 on HotpotQA: 82.7%) bypass the bottleneck entirely. The result is a sharp two-regime hierarchy with an empty middle ground. These findings provide the mechanistic explanation for the empirical observation that recurrent models fail at associative recall, and reframe attention as a representation constructor rather than merely a computation mechanism.

AI.tldr: 研究发现混合循环-注意力架构中存在路由悖论：基于内容的路由需要计算本应避免的成对计算。注意力创建了约34维的潜在子空间，实现98.4%路由精度，而替代机制仅15-29%。非学习索引可绕过瓶颈，形成两极分化的层次结构。
AI.motivation: 研究混合循环-注意力架构中的路由悖论：基于内容的路由需要计算本应避免的成对计算，这解释了为什么循环模型在关联召回任务上失败。
AI.method: 通过20多个受控实验，在三个任务（合成诊断、Zoology MQAR基准、HotpotQA）上全面探索路由机制。比较了注意力层、随机投影、对比预训练和12种替代机制。
AI.result: 单层softmax注意力创建约34维潜在子空间，实现98.4%路由精度；零层仅1.2%。该子空间对余弦相似度不可见，被随机投影破坏，无法通过对比预训练创建。非学习索引（Bloom过滤器90.9%，BM25 82.7%）可绕过瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: 注意力是表示构造器而非仅仅是计算机制，将成对匹配结果写入表示中。这为循环模型在关联召回任务上的失败提供了机制解释，并重新定义了注意力的作用。

title: TaigiSpeech: A Low-Resource Real-World Speech Intent Dataset and Preliminary Results with Scalable Data Mining In-the-Wild
summary: Speech technologies have advanced rapidly and serve diverse populations worldwide. However, many languages remain underrepresented due to limited resources. In this paper, we introduce \textbf{TaigiSpeech}, a real-world speech intent dataset in Taiwanese Taigi (aka Taiwanese Hokkien/Southern Min), which is a low-resource and primarily spoken language. The dataset is collected from older adults, comprising 21 speakers with a total of 3k utterances. It is designed for practical intent detection scenarios, including healthcare and home assistant applications. To address the scarcity of labeled data, we explore two data mining strategies with two levels of supervision: keyword match data mining with LLM pseudo labeling via an intermediate language and an audio-visual framework that leverages multimodal cues with minimal textual supervision. This design enables scalable dataset construction for low-resource and unwritten spoken languages. TaigiSpeech will be released under the CC BY 4.0 license to facilitate broad adoption and research on low-resource and unwritten languages. The project website and the dataset can be found on https://kwchang.org/taigispeech.

AI.tldr: TaigiSpeech是一个针对台湾台语（闽南语）的真实世界语音意图数据集，专门收集自老年人，包含21位说话者的3000条话语，用于医疗保健和家庭助手等实际意图检测场景。
AI.motivation: 尽管语音技术发展迅速，但许多语言因资源有限而代表性不足。台语作为一种低资源且主要为口语的语言，缺乏合适的语音数据集来支持实际应用。
AI.method: 采用两种数据挖掘策略：1）关键词匹配与LLM通过中间语言进行伪标注；2）利用多模态线索的音频-视觉框架，仅需最小文本监督。这种设计使得低资源和无文字口语语言的数据集构建具有可扩展性。
AI.result: 创建了TaigiSpeech数据集，包含21位说话者的3000条话语，专门针对实际意图检测场景。数据集将在CC BY 4.0许可下发布，以促进低资源和无文字语言的研究。
AI.conclusion: TaigiSpeech为低资源且主要为口语的台语提供了一个实用的语音意图数据集，通过创新的数据挖掘方法解决了标注数据稀缺的问题，有望推动低资源和无文字语言的研究与应用。

title: CLT-Forge: A Scalable Library for Cross-Layer Transcoders and Attribution Graphs
summary: Mechanistic interpretability seeks to understand how Large Language Models (LLMs) represent and process information. Recent approaches based on dictionary learning and transcoders enable representing model computation in terms of sparse, interpretable features and their interactions, giving rise to feature attribution graphs. However, these graphs are often large and redundant, limiting their interpretability in practice. Cross-Layer Transcoders (CLTs) address this issue by sharing features across layers while preserving layer-specific decoding, yielding more compact representations, but remain difficult to train and analyze at scale. We introduce an open-source library for end-to-end training and interpretability of CLTs. Our framework integrates scalable distributed training with model sharding and compressed activation caching, a unified automated interpretability pipeline for feature analysis and explanation, attribution graph computation using Circuit-Tracer, and a flexible visualization interface. This provides a practical and unified solution for scaling CLT-based mechanistic interpretability. Our code is available at: https://github.com/LLM-Interp/CLT-Forge.

AI.tldr: 开发了一个开源库CLT-Forge，用于跨层转码器的端到端训练和可解释性分析，解决现有特征归因图过大冗余的问题。
AI.motivation: 当前基于字典学习和转码器的机制可解释性方法虽然能产生稀疏可解释特征，但生成的特征归因图通常过大且冗余，限制了实际可解释性。跨层转码器通过跨层共享特征解决了紧凑性问题，但难以大规模训练和分析。
AI.method: 开发了开源库CLT-Forge，集成了可扩展的分布式训练（模型分片和压缩激活缓存）、统一自动可解释性流水线（特征分析和解释）、使用Circuit-Tracer的特征归因图计算，以及灵活的可视化界面。
AI.result: 提供了一个实用且统一的解决方案，用于扩展基于跨层转码器的机制可解释性分析，代码已在GitHub开源。
AI.conclusion: CLT-Forge框架为跨层转码器的训练和可解释性分析提供了端到端的解决方案，解决了现有方法在大规模应用中的可扩展性和实用性限制。

title: Effective Strategies for Asynchronous Software Engineering Agents
summary: AI agents have become increasingly capable at isolated software engineering (SWE) tasks such as resolving issues on Github. Yet long-horizon tasks involving multiple interdependent subtasks still pose challenges both with respect to accuracy, and with respect to timely completion. A natural approach to solving these long-horizon tasks in a timely manner is asynchronous multi-agent collaboration, where multiple agents work on different parts of the task at the same time. But effective application of multi-agent systems has proven surprisingly difficult: concurrent edits by multiple agents interfere with each other, dependencies are difficult to synchronize, and combining partial progress into a coherent whole is challenging. On the other hand, human developers have long relied on mature collaboration infrastructure to manage these challenges in large software projects. Inspired by these collaboration primitives, we introduce Centralized Asynchronous Isolated Delegation (CAID), a structured multi-agent coordination paradigm grounded in three core SWE primitives: centralized task delegation, asynchronous execution, and isolated workspaces. CAID constructs dependency-aware task plans through a central manager, executes subtasks concurrently in isolated workspaces, and consolidates progress via structured integration with executable test-based verification. In empirical evaluation, we find that CAID improves accuracy over single-agent baselines by 26.7% absolute on paper reproduction tasks (PaperBench) and 14.3% on Python library development tasks (Commit0). Through systematic analysis, we find that branch-and-merge is a central coordination mechanism for multi-agent collaboration, and that SWE primitives such as git worktree, git commit, and git merge enable it to be realized in a reliable and executable manner.

AI.tldr: CAID是一种基于软件工程协作原语的多智能体协调范式，通过集中式任务委派、异步执行和隔离工作空间，显著提升了长时程软件工程任务的准确性和效率。
AI.motivation: 当前AI智能体在独立软件工程任务上表现出色，但在涉及多个相互依赖子任务的长时程任务中面临准确性和及时完成的挑战。多智能体协作虽然自然，但存在并发编辑冲突、依赖同步困难等问题，而人类开发者已通过成熟的协作基础设施成功管理这些挑战。
AI.method: CAID基于三个核心软件工程原语：集中式任务委派、异步执行和隔离工作空间。通过中央管理器构建依赖感知的任务计划，在隔离工作空间中并发执行子任务，并通过基于可执行测试验证的结构化集成来整合进展。
AI.result: 在实证评估中，CAID相比单智能体基线在论文复现任务（PaperBench）上绝对准确率提升26.7%，在Python库开发任务（Commit0）上提升14.3%。分析发现分支合并是多智能体协作的核心协调机制，git worktree、git commit和git merge等软件工程原语使其可靠实现。
AI.conclusion: CAID通过借鉴人类软件开发的成熟协作基础设施，成功解决了多智能体协作中的协调挑战，为长时程软件工程任务提供了有效的结构化多智能体协调范式。

title: Reasoning Provenance for Autonomous AI Agents: Structured Behavioral Analytics Beyond State Checkpoints and Execution Traces
summary: As AI agents transition from human-supervised copilots to autonomous platform infrastructure, the ability to analyze their reasoning behavior across populations of investigations becomes a pressing infrastructure requirement. Existing operational tooling addresses adjacent needs effectively: state checkpoint systems enable fault tolerance; observability platforms provide execution traces for debugging; telemetry standards ensure interoperability. What current systems do not natively provide as a first-class, schema-level primitive is structured reasoning provenance -- normalized, queryable records of why the agent chose each action, what it concluded from each observation, how each conclusion shaped its strategy, and which evidence supports its final verdict. This paper introduces the Agent Execution Record (AER), a structured reasoning provenance primitive that captures intent, observation, and inference as first-class queryable fields on every step, alongside versioned plans with revision rationale, evidence chains, structured verdicts with confidence scores, and delegation authority chains. We formalize the distinction between computational state persistence and reasoning provenance, argue that the latter cannot in general be faithfully reconstructed from the former, and show how AERs enable population-level behavioral analytics: reasoning pattern mining, confidence calibration, cross-agent comparison, and counterfactual regression testing via mock replay. We present a domain-agnostic model with extensible domain profiles, a reference implementation and SDK, and outline an evaluation methodology informed by preliminary deployment on a production platformized root cause analysis agent.

AI.tldr: 论文提出Agent Execution Record (AER)，一种结构化推理溯源原语，用于捕获AI代理的推理行为，支持群体级行为分析。
AI.motivation: 随着AI代理从人类监督的副驾驶转变为自主平台基础设施，需要跨调查群体分析其推理行为。现有系统缺乏结构化推理溯源作为一等原语，无法原生记录代理选择每个动作的原因、从每个观察得出的结论等。
AI.method: 引入Agent Execution Record (AER)，捕获意图、观察和推理作为每个步骤的一等可查询字段，包括版本化计划与修订理由、证据链、带置信度的结构化裁决和委托授权链。提出领域无关模型和可扩展领域配置文件。
AI.result: 形式化计算状态持久性与推理溯源的区别，论证后者无法从前者忠实重构。展示AER支持群体级行为分析：推理模式挖掘、置信度校准、跨代理比较和通过模拟重放的假设回归测试。
AI.conclusion: AER为AI代理提供结构化推理溯源基础设施，支持生产环境中的群体级行为分析，包括参考实现、SDK和基于生产平台化根本原因分析代理初步部署的评估方法。

title: Deep Attention-based Sequential Ensemble Learning for BLE-Based Indoor Localization in Care Facilities
comment: 8 pages, 9 figures, IEEE format. Best Challenge Paper Award at the ABC 2026 Activity and Location Recognition Challenge (ABC 2026)
summary: Indoor localization systems in care facilities enable optimization of staff allocation, workload management, and quality of care delivery. Traditional machine learning approaches to Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE)-based localization treat each temporal measurement as an independent observation, fundamentally limiting their performance. To address this limitation, this paper introduces Deep Attention-based Sequential Ensemble Learning (DASEL), a novel framework that reconceptualizes indoor localization as a sequential learning problem. The framework integrates frequency-based feature engineering, bidirectional GRU networks with attention mechanisms, multi-directional sliding windows, and confidence-weighted temporal smoothing to capture human movement trajectories. Evaluated on real-world data from a care facility using 4-fold temporal cross-validation, DASEL achieves a macro F1 score of 0.4438, representing a 53.1% improvement over the best traditional baseline (0.2898).

AI.tldr: 提出DASEL框架，将室内定位重构为序列学习问题，通过注意力机制和时序平滑显著提升BLE定位性能
AI.motivation: 传统BLE定位方法将每个时间测量视为独立观测，限制了性能。在护理设施中，准确的室内定位对优化人员配置、工作负荷管理和护理质量至关重要。
AI.method: 提出Deep Attention-based Sequential Ensemble Learning (DASEL)框架：1) 基于频率的特征工程；2) 带注意力机制的双向GRU网络；3) 多方向滑动窗口；4) 置信度加权的时序平滑，以捕捉人体运动轨迹。
AI.result: 在护理设施真实数据上使用4折时序交叉验证评估，DASEL获得宏观F1分数0.4438，相比最佳传统基线(0.2898)提升53.1%。
AI.conclusion: 将室内定位重构为序列学习问题，结合注意力机制和时序平滑的DASEL框架显著优于传统方法，为护理设施中的BLE定位提供了有效解决方案。

title: Agentic Automation of BT-RADS Scoring: End-to-End Multi-Agent System for Standardized Brain Tumor Follow-up Assessment
comment: 17 pages, 5 figures, 4 tables, 2 supplementary figures, 3 supplementary tables
summary: The Brain Tumor Reporting and Data System (BT-RADS) standardizes post-treatment MRI response assessment in patients with diffuse gliomas but requires complex integration of imaging trends, medication effects, and radiation timing. This study evaluates an end-to-end multi-agent large language model (LLM) and convolutional neural network (CNN) system for automated BT-RADS classification. A multi-agent LLM system combined with automated CNN-based tumor segmentation was retrospectively evaluated on 509 consecutive post-treatment glioma MRI examinations from a single high-volume center. An extractor agent identified clinical variables (steroid status, bevacizumab status, radiation date) from unstructured clinical notes, while a scorer agent applied BT-RADS decision logic integrating extracted variables with volumetric measurements. Expert reference standard classifications were established by an independent board-certified neuroradiologist. Of 509 examinations, 492 met inclusion criteria. The system achieved 374/492 (76.0%; 95% CI, 72.1%-79.6%) accuracy versus 283/492 (57.5%; 95% CI, 53.1%-61.8%) for initial clinical assessments (+18.5 percentage points; P<.001). Context-dependent categories showed high sensitivity (BT-1b 100%, BT-1a 92.7%, BT-3a 87.5%), while threshold-dependent categories showed moderate sensitivity (BT-3c 74.8%, BT-2 69.2%, BT-4 69.3%, BT-3b 57.1%). For BT-4, positive predictive value was 92.9%. The multi-agent LLM system achieved higher BT-RADS classification agreement with expert reference standard compared to initial clinical scoring, with high accuracy for context-dependent scores and high positive predictive value for BT-4 detection.

AI.tldr: 多智能体LLM系统结合CNN分割，用于脑肿瘤治疗后MRI的BT-RADS自动分类，相比临床评估准确率提升18.5个百分点
AI.motivation: BT-RADS系统需要整合影像趋势、药物效果和放疗时间等复杂信息，临床评估存在主观性和不一致性，需要自动化解决方案来提高评估准确性和一致性
AI.method: 开发端到端多智能体LLM系统：1）提取器智能体从非结构化临床记录中识别临床变量（类固醇状态、贝伐珠单抗状态、放疗日期）；2）结合CNN自动肿瘤分割的容积测量；3）评分器智能体应用BT-RADS决策逻辑整合提取变量和容积测量
AI.result: 系统在492个符合条件的检查中达到76.0%准确率，相比临床初始评估的57.5%提升18.5个百分点（P<0.001）。上下文依赖类别显示高敏感性（BT-1b 100%，BT-1a 92.7%，BT-3a 87.5%），阈值依赖类别显示中等敏感性。BT-4的阳性预测值达92.9%
AI.conclusion: 多智能体LLM系统在BT-RADS分类上与专家参考标准的一致性高于临床初始评分，对上下文依赖评分具有高准确性，对BT-4检测具有高阳性预测值，展示了自动化脑肿瘤治疗后MRI评估的潜力

title: Deterministic Hallucination Detection in Medical VQA via Confidence-Evidence Bayesian Gain
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have shown strong potential for medical Visual Question Answering (VQA), yet they remain prone to hallucinations, defined as generating responses that contradict the input image, posing serious risks in clinical settings. Current hallucination detection methods, such as Semantic Entropy (SE) and Vision-Amplified Semantic Entropy (VASE), require 10 to 20 stochastic generations per sample together with an external natural language inference model for semantic clustering, making them computationally expensive and difficult to deploy in practice. We observe that hallucinated responses exhibit a distinctive signature directly in the model's own log-probabilities: inconsistent token-level confidence and weak sensitivity to visual evidence. Based on this observation, we propose Confidence-Evidence Bayesian Gain (CEBaG), a deterministic hallucination detection method that requires no stochastic sampling, no external models, and no task-specific hyperparameters. CEBaG combines two complementary signals: token-level predictive variance, which captures inconsistent confidence across response tokens, and evidence magnitude, which measures how much the image shifts per-token predictions relative to text-only inference. Evaluated across four medical MLLMs and three VQA benchmarks (16 experimental settings), CEBaG achieves the highest AUC in 13 of 16 settings and improves over VASE by 8 AUC points on average, while being fully deterministic and self-contained. The code will be made available upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 提出CEBaG方法，一种无需随机采样、无需外部模型、无需任务特定超参数的确定性幻觉检测方法，用于医疗多模态大语言模型，通过结合token级预测方差和证据强度来检测幻觉。
AI.motivation: 医疗多模态大语言模型在视觉问答中存在幻觉问题（生成与输入图像矛盾的回答），现有检测方法如SE和VASE需要大量随机采样和外部自然语言推理模型，计算成本高且难以实际部署。
AI.method: 提出置信度-证据贝叶斯增益（CEBaG）方法，基于两个互补信号：1）token级预测方差，捕捉响应token间的不一致置信度；2）证据强度，衡量图像相对于纯文本推理对每个token预测的偏移程度。
AI.result: 在4个医疗MLLM和3个VQA基准测试（16个实验设置）中，CEBaG在13个设置中取得最高AUC，平均比VASE提高8个AUC点，同时完全确定性和自包含。
AI.conclusion: CEBaG是一种高效、实用的医疗MLLM幻觉检测方法，无需随机采样和外部模型，在多个基准测试中表现优异，有望在临床环境中实际部署。

title: Fuel Consumption Prediction: A Comparative Analysis of Machine Learning Paradigms
summary: The automotive industry is under growing pressure to reduce its environmental impact, requiring accurate predictive modeling to support sustainable engineering design. This study examines the factors that determine vehicle fuel consumption from the seminal Motor Trend dataset, identifying the governing physical factors of efficiency through rigorous quantitative analysis. Methodologically, the research uses data sanitization, statistical outlier elimination, and in-depth Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA) to curb the occurrence of multicollinearity between powertrain features. A comparative analysis of machine learning paradigms including Multiple Linear Regression, Support Vector Machines (SVM), and Logistic Regression was carried out to assess predictive efficacy. Findings indicate that SVM Regression is most accurate on continuous prediction (R-squared = 0.889, RMSE = 0.326), and is effective in capturing the non-linear relationships between vehicle mass and engine displacement. In parallel, Logistic Regression proved superior for classification (Accuracy = 90.8%) and showed exceptional recall (0.957) when identifying low-efficiency vehicles. These results challenge the current trend toward black-box deep learning architectures for static physical datasets, providing validation of robust performance by interpretable and well-tuned classical models. The research finds that intrinsic vehicle efficiency is fundamentally determined by physical design parameters, weight and displacement, offering a data-driven framework for how manufacturers should focus on lightweighting and engine downsizing to achieve stringent global sustainability goals.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过分析Motor Trend数据集，发现支持向量机回归在预测车辆燃油消耗方面最准确，逻辑回归在分类任务中表现最佳，挑战了当前对黑盒深度学习模型的偏好，强调轻量化和发动机小型化是实现可持续目标的关键。
AI.motivation: 汽车行业面临减少环境影响的压力，需要准确的预测模型来支持可持续工程设计。研究旨在识别决定车辆燃油消耗的关键物理因素，为制造商提供数据驱动的设计指导。
AI.method: 使用数据清洗、统计异常值消除和探索性数据分析来减少动力系统特征间的多重共线性。比较了多元线性回归、支持向量机回归和逻辑回归等机器学习方法。
AI.result: SVM回归在连续预测中表现最佳（R平方=0.889，RMSE=0.326），能有效捕捉车辆质量和发动机排量间的非线性关系。逻辑回归在分类任务中表现最优（准确率=90.8%），识别低效车辆时召回率达0.957。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明车辆效率主要由物理设计参数（重量和排量）决定，为制造商提供了轻量化和发动机小型化的数据驱动框架。研究挑战了当前对黑盒深度学习模型的偏好，验证了可解释的经典模型在静态物理数据集上的强大性能。

title: MIND: Multi-agent inference for negotiation dialogue in travel planning
summary: While Multi-Agent Debate (MAD) research has advanced, its efficacy in coordinating complex stakeholder interests such as travel planning remains largely unexplored. To bridge this gap, we propose MIND (Multi-agent Inference for Negotiation Dialogue), a framework designed to simulate realistic consensus-building among travelers with heterogeneous preferences. Grounded in the Theory of Mind (ToM), MIND introduces a Strategic Appraisal phase that infers opponent willingness (w) from linguistic nuances with 90.2% accuracy. Experimental results demonstrate that MIND outperforms traditional MAD frameworks, achieving a 20.5% improvement in High-w Hit and a 30.7% increase in Debate Hit-Rate, effectively prioritizing high-stakes constraints. Furthermore, qualitative evaluations via LLM-as-a-Judge confirm that MIND surpasses baselines in Rationality (68.8%) and Fluency (72.4%), securing an overall win rate of 68.3%. These findings validate that MIND effectively models human negotiation dynamics to derive persuasive consensus.

AI.tldr: MIND框架通过战略评估阶段分析语言细微差别，在多智能体辩论中实现更好的协商共识，在旅行规划等复杂利益协调任务中表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有多智能体辩论研究在协调复杂利益相关者（如旅行规划）方面的有效性尚未充分探索，需要开发能模拟真实协商共识的框架。
AI.method: 提出MIND框架，基于心智理论，引入战略评估阶段，通过分析语言细微差别推断对手意愿度，准确率达90.2%。
AI.result: MIND优于传统多智能体辩论框架：High-w Hit提升20.5%，辩论命中率提升30.7%；在理性度（68.8%）和流畅度（72.4%）上超越基线，总体胜率68.3%。
AI.conclusion: MIND能有效建模人类协商动态，产生有说服力的共识，为复杂利益协调任务提供了有效解决方案。

title: Benchmarking Scientific Machine Learning Models for Air Quality Data
comment: Accepted at IEEE IGARSS 2026; 22 pages, 6 figures;
summary: Accurate air quality index (AQI) forecasting is essential for the protecting public health in rapidly growing urban regions, and the practical model evaluation and selection are often challenged by the lack of rigorous, region-specific benchmarking on standardized datasets. Physics-guided machine learning and deep learning models could be a good and effective solution to resolve such issues with more accurate and efficient AQI forecasting. This research study presents an explainable and comprehensive benchmark that enables a guideline and proposed physics-guided best model by benchmarking classical time-series, machine-learning, and deep-learning approaches for multi-horizon AQI forecasting in North Texas (Dallas County). Using publicly available U.S. Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) daily observations of air quality data from 2022 to 2024, we curate city-level time series for PM2.5 and O3 by aggregating station measurements and constructing lag-wise forecasting datasets for LAG in {1,7,14,30} days. For benchmarking the best model, linear regression (LR), SARIMAX, multilayer perceptrons (MLP), and LSTM networks are evaluated with the proposed physics-guided variants (MLP+Physics and LSTM+Physics) that incorporate the EPA breakpoint-based AQI formulation as a consistency constraint through a weighted loss. Experiments using chronological train-test splits and error metrics MAE, RMSE showed that deep-learning models outperform simpler baselines, while physics guidance improves stability and yields physically consistent pollutant with AQI relationships, with the largest benefits observed for short-horizon prediction and for PM2.5 and O3. Overall, the results provide a practical reference for selecting AQI forecasting models in North Texas and clarify when lightweight physics constraints meaningfully improve predictive performance across pollutants and forecast horizons.

AI.tldr: 该研究为北德克萨斯州（达拉斯县）的空气质量指数（AQI）预测建立了一个可解释的综合基准，通过比较经典时间序列、机器学习和深度学习方法，并提出了物理引导的最佳模型。
AI.motivation: 在快速发展的城市地区，准确的AQI预测对保护公众健康至关重要，但实际模型评估和选择常因缺乏严格、针对特定区域的标准化数据集基准而受到挑战。物理引导的机器学习和深度学习模型可能是解决这些问题、实现更准确高效AQI预测的有效方案。
AI.method: 使用2022-2024年美国环保署（EPA）的公开空气质量数据，构建城市级PM2.5和O3时间序列，创建LAG为{1,7,14,30}天的预测数据集。评估线性回归（LR）、SARIMAX、多层感知器（MLP）和LSTM网络，并提出物理引导变体（MLP+Physics和LSTM+Physics），通过加权损失将EPA断点式AQI公式作为一致性约束。
AI.result: 实验使用时间顺序的训练-测试分割和MAE、RMSE误差指标显示，深度学习模型优于简单基线，而物理引导提高了稳定性并产生物理一致的污染物与AQI关系，最大效益出现在短期预测以及PM2.5和O3预测中。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为北德克萨斯州选择AQI预测模型提供了实用参考，并阐明了轻量级物理约束在污染物和预测时间范围内何时能显著改善预测性能。

title: Generalizable Self-Evolving Memory for Automatic Prompt Optimization
summary: Automatic prompt optimization is a promising approach for adapting large language models (LLMs) to downstream tasks, yet existing methods typically search for a specific prompt specialized to a fixed task. This paradigm limits generalization across heterogeneous queries and prevents models from accumulating reusable prompting knowledge over time. In this paper, we propose MemAPO, a memory-driven framework that reconceptualizes prompt optimization as generalizable and self-evolving experience accumulation. MemAPO maintains a dual-memory mechanism that distills successful reasoning trajectories into reusable strategy templates while organizing incorrect generations into structured error patterns that capture recurrent failure modes. Given a new prompt, the framework retrieves both relevant strategies and failure patterns to compose prompts that promote effective reasoning while discouraging known mistakes. Through iterative self-reflection and memory editing, MemAPO continuously updates its memory, enabling prompt optimization to improve over time rather than restarting from scratch for each task. Experiments on diverse benchmarks show that MemAPO consistently outperforms representative prompt optimization baselines while substantially reducing optimization cost.

AI.tldr: MemAPO：基于记忆的提示优化框架，将提示优化重构为可泛化、自演化的经验积累过程，通过双记忆机制积累可重用策略模板和结构化错误模式，实现跨任务知识积累和持续改进。
AI.motivation: 现有自动提示优化方法通常针对特定任务搜索专用提示，限制了跨异构查询的泛化能力，且无法积累可重用的提示知识。需要一种能够积累经验、实现持续改进的提示优化框架。
AI.method: 提出MemAPO框架，采用双记忆机制：1) 将成功推理轨迹提炼为可重用策略模板；2) 将错误生成组织为结构化错误模式以捕捉重复失败模式。对新提示检索相关策略和失败模式，组合成既促进有效推理又避免已知错误的提示。通过迭代自反思和记忆编辑实现持续更新。
AI.result: 在多样化基准测试中，MemAPO始终优于代表性提示优化基线方法，同时显著降低优化成本。
AI.conclusion: MemAPO将提示优化重构为可泛化和自演化的经验积累过程，通过记忆驱动的方法实现了跨任务的持续改进，为提示优化提供了新的研究方向。

title: A Blueprint for Self-Evolving Coding Agents in Vehicle Aerodynamic Drag Prediction
summary: High-fidelity vehicle drag evaluation is constrained less by solver runtime than by workflow friction: geometry cleanup, meshing retries, queue contention, and reproducibility failures across teams. We present a contract-centric blueprint for self-evolving coding agents that discover executable surrogate pipelines for predicting drag coefficient $C_d$ under industrial constraints. The method formulates surrogate discovery as constrained optimization over programs, not static model instances, and combines Famou-Agent-style evaluator feedback with population-based island evolution, structured mutations (data, model, loss, and split policies), and multi-objective selection balancing ranking quality, stability, and cost. A hard evaluation contract enforces leakage prevention, deterministic replay, multi-seed robustness, and resource budgets before any candidate is admitted. Across eight anonymized evolutionary operators, the best system reaches a Combined Score of 0.9335 with sign-accuracy 0.9180, while trajectory and ablation analyses show that adaptive sampling and island migration are primary drivers of convergence quality. The deployment model is explicitly ``screen-and-escalate'': surrogates provide high-throughput ranking for design exploration, but low-confidence or out-of-distribution cases are automatically escalated to high-fidelity CFD. The resulting contribution is an auditable, reusable workflow for accelerating aerodynamic design iteration while preserving decision-grade reliability, governance traceability, and safety boundaries.

AI.tldr: 提出基于合约的自进化编码代理框架，通过程序化替代管道发现来加速车辆阻力评估，平衡精度、稳定性和成本，实现高吞吐量设计探索与高保真CFD的协同工作流。
AI.motivation: 高保真车辆阻力评估的主要瓶颈不是求解器运行时间，而是工作流程摩擦：几何清理、网格重试、队列争用和团队间可重复性失败。需要一种既能加速设计迭代又能保持决策级可靠性的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用合约中心的蓝图设计自进化编码代理，将替代管道发现建模为程序而非静态模型实例的约束优化。结合Famou-Agent风格评估器反馈、基于种群的岛屿进化、结构化突变（数据、模型、损失、分割策略）和多目标选择。硬评估合约强制执行泄漏预防、确定性重放、多种子鲁棒性和资源预算。
AI.result: 在八个匿名进化算子中，最佳系统达到综合得分0.9335，符号准确率0.9180。轨迹和消融分析显示自适应采样和岛屿迁移是收敛质量的主要驱动因素。
AI.conclusion: 提出可审计、可重用工作流，采用"筛选-升级"部署模式：替代管道提供高吞吐量设计探索排名，低置信度或分布外案例自动升级至高保真CFD，在加速空气动力学设计迭代的同时保持决策级可靠性、治理可追溯性和安全边界。

title: Confidence Freeze: Early Success Induces a Metastable Decoupling of Metacognition and Behaviour
summary:
Humans must flexibly arbitrate between exploring alternatives and exploiting learned strategies, yet they frequently exhibit maladaptive persistence by continuing to execute failing strategies despite accumulating negative evidence. Here we propose a ``confidence-freeze'' account that reframes such persistence as a dynamic learning state rather than a stable dispositional trait. Using a multi-reversal two-armed bandit task across three experiments (total N = 332; 19,920 trials),
  we first show that human learners normally make use of the symmetric statistical structure inherent
  in outcome trajectories: runs of successes provide positive evidence for environmental stability
  and thus for strategy maintenance, whereas runs of failures provide negative evidence and should
  raise switching probability. Behaviour in the control group conformed to this normative pattern.
  However, individuals who experienced a high rate of early success (90\% vs.\ 60\%) displayed a robust
  and selective distortion after the first reversal: they persisted through long stretches of
  non-reward (mean = 6.2 consecutive losses) while their metacognitive confidence ratings
  simultaneously dropped from 5 to 2 on a 7-point scale.

AI.tldr: 早期高成功率导致学习者在环境反转后出现"信心冻结"现象：即使信心下降仍持续执行失败策略
AI.motivation: 研究人类在探索与利用之间的灵活仲裁机制，解释为何人们会持续执行失败策略（即使有负面证据积累），提出这可能是动态学习状态而非稳定特质
AI.method: 使用多反转双臂老虎机任务，三个实验共332名参与者（19,920次试验）。控制组早期成功率60%，实验组早期成功率90%，观察环境反转后的行为模式
AI.result: 控制组遵循规范性模式：成功序列提供环境稳定证据支持策略维持，失败序列提高切换概率。但早期高成功率组在第一次反转后出现显著扭曲：即使元认知信心从5分降至2分（7分量表），仍平均持续6.2次连续损失
AI.conclusion: 提出"信心冻结"理论，将策略持续性重新定义为动态学习状态而非稳定特质。早期高成功率导致学习者在环境变化后出现信心与行为解耦，即使信心下降仍坚持原有策略

title: CatRAG: Functor-Guided Structural Debiasing with Retrieval Augmentation for Fair LLMs
comment: 9 pages, 4 figures, and accepted in IJCNN 2026 (part of IEEE WCCI 2026)
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are deployed in high-stakes settings but can show demographic, gender, and geographic biases that undermine fairness and trust. Prior debiasing methods, including embedding-space projections, prompt-based steering, and causal interventions, often act at a single stage of the pipeline, resulting in incomplete mitigation and brittle utility trade-offs under distribution shifts. We propose CatRAG Debiasing, a dual-pronged framework that integrates functor with Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) guided structural debiasing. The functor component leverages category-theoretic structure to induce a principled, structure-preserving projection that suppresses bias-associated directions in the embedding space while retaining task-relevant semantics. On the Bias Benchmark for Question Answering (BBQ) across three open-source LLMs (Meta Llama-3, OpenAI GPT-OSS, and Google Gemma-3), CatRAG achieves state-of-the-art results, improving accuracy by up to 40% over the corresponding base models and by more than 10% over prior debiasing methods, while reducing bias scores to near zero (from 60% for the base models) across gender, nationality, race, and intersectional subgroups.

AI.tldr: CatRAG Debiasing：结合范畴论与检索增强生成的双管齐下框架，通过结构保持投影抑制嵌入空间中的偏见方向，在BBQ基准测试中实现SOTA效果，准确率提升40%，偏见分数降至接近零。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在关键应用场景中存在人口统计、性别和地理偏见，削弱公平性和可信度。现有去偏见方法通常只在单一阶段操作，导致缓解不完整且在分布变化下产生脆弱的效用权衡。
AI.method: 提出CatRAG Debiasing框架，结合范畴论函子与检索增强生成的结构化去偏见。函子组件利用范畴论结构诱导原则性的结构保持投影，抑制嵌入空间中的偏见相关方向，同时保留任务相关语义。
AI.result: 在Bias Benchmark for Question Answering (BBQ)基准测试中，对三个开源LLM（Meta Llama-3、OpenAI GPT-OSS、Google Gemma-3）进行评估，CatRAG实现SOTA结果：准确率比基础模型提升高达40%，比先前去偏见方法提升10%以上，偏见分数从基础模型的60%降至接近零，涵盖性别、国籍、种族和交叉子组。
AI.conclusion: CatRAG Debiasing通过整合范畴论的结构化方法与检索增强生成，提供了一种更完整、鲁棒的LLM去偏见解决方案，在保持效用的同时显著降低偏见，为公平AI系统提供了有前景的途径。

title: Compensating Visual Insufficiency with Stratified Language Guidance for Long-Tail Class Incremental Learning
summary: Long-tail class incremental learning (LT CIL) remains highly challenging because the scarcity of samples in tail classes not only hampers their learning but also exacerbates catastrophic forgetting under continuously evolving and imbalanced data distributions. To tackle these issues, we exploit the informativeness and scalability of language knowledge. Specifically, we analyze the LT CIL data distribution to guide large language models (LLMs) in generating a stratified language tree that hierarchically organizes semantic information from coarse to fine grained granularity. Building upon this structure, we introduce stratified adaptive language guidance, which leverages learnable weights to merge multi-scale semantic representations, thereby enabling dynamic supervisory adjustment for tail classes and alleviating the impact of data imbalance. Furthermore, we introduce stratified alignment language guidance, which exploits the structural stability of the language tree to constrain optimization and reinforce semantic visual alignment, thereby alleviating catastrophic forgetting. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks demonstrate that our method achieves state of the art performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用语言知识解决长尾类增量学习问题的方法，通过分层语言树和多尺度语义指导来缓解数据不平衡和灾难性遗忘。
AI.motivation: 长尾类增量学习面临双重挑战：尾部类别样本稀缺不仅影响学习效果，还在持续演化的不平衡数据分布下加剧灾难性遗忘。现有方法难以同时应对数据不平衡和持续学习问题。
AI.method: 1) 分析LT CIL数据分布，指导大语言模型生成分层语言树，从粗到细组织语义信息；2) 提出分层自适应语言指导，使用可学习权重融合多尺度语义表示，动态调整尾部类别监督；3) 提出分层对齐语言指导，利用语言树的结构稳定性约束优化，增强语义视觉对齐。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试上的广泛实验表明，该方法达到了最先进的性能水平。
AI.conclusion: 通过利用语言知识的丰富性和可扩展性，提出的分层语言指导方法有效解决了长尾类增量学习中的数据不平衡和灾难性遗忘问题，实现了显著性能提升。

title: Harmful Visual Content Manipulation Matters in Misinformation Detection Under Multimedia Scenarios
summary: Nowadays, the widespread dissemination of misinformation across numerous social media platforms has led to severe negative effects on society. To address this challenge, the automatic detection of misinformation, particularly under multimedia scenarios, has gained significant attention from both academic and industrial communities, leading to the emergence of a research task known as Multimodal Misinformation Detection (MMD). Typically, current MMD approaches focus on capturing the semantic relationships and inconsistency between various modalities but often overlook certain critical indicators within multimodal content. Recent research has shown that manipulated features within visual content in social media articles serve as valuable clues for MMD. Meanwhile, we argue that the potential intentions behind the manipulation, e.g., harmful and harmless, also matter in MMD. Therefore, in this study, we aim to identify such multimodal misinformation by capturing two types of features: manipulation features, which represent if visual content has been manipulated, and intention features, which assess the nature of these manipulations, distinguishing between harmful and harmless intentions. Unfortunately, the manipulation and intention labels that supervise these features to be discriminative are unknown. To address this, we introduce two weakly supervised indicators as substitutes by incorporating supplementary datasets focused on image manipulation detection and framing two different classification tasks as positive and unlabeled learning issues. With this framework, we introduce an innovative MMD approach, titled Harmful Visual Content Manipulation Matters in MMD (HAVC-M4 D). Comprehensive experiments conducted on four prevalent MMD datasets indicate that HAVC-M4 D significantly and consistently enhances the performance of existing MMD methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HAVC-M4D方法，通过捕捉视觉内容的操纵特征和操纵意图特征来改进多模态虚假信息检测，在四个数据集上显著提升现有方法性能。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态虚假信息检测方法主要关注模态间的语义关系和一致性，但忽略了视觉内容中的操纵特征以及操纵背后的意图（有害/无害），而这些特征对于检测虚假信息至关重要。
AI.method: 提出HAVC-M4D方法，通过弱监督指标替代未知的操纵和意图标签：1）利用图像操纵检测数据集获取操纵特征；2）将分类任务构建为正例-未标记学习问题来获取意图特征。
AI.result: 在四个主流多模态虚假信息检测数据集上的实验表明，HAVC-M4D方法能够显著且一致地提升现有MMD方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: 视觉内容的操纵特征和操纵意图特征对于多模态虚假信息检测至关重要，HAVC-M4D方法通过弱监督方式有效捕捉这些特征，为MMD研究提供了新方向。

title: SynSym: A Synthetic Data Generation Framework for Psychiatric Symptom Identification
summary: Psychiatric symptom identification on social media aims to infer fine-grained mental health symptoms from user-generated posts, allowing a detailed understanding of users' mental states. However, the construction of large-scale symptom-level datasets remains challenging due to the resource-intensive nature of expert labeling and the lack of standardized annotation guidelines, which in turn limits the generalizability of models to identify diverse symptom expressions from user-generated text. To address these issues, we propose SynSym, a synthetic data generation framework for constructing generalizable datasets for symptom identification. Leveraging large language models (LLMs), SynSym constructs high-quality training samples by (1) expanding each symptom into sub-concepts to enhance the diversity of generated expressions, (2) producing synthetic expressions that reflect psychiatric symptoms in diverse linguistic styles, and (3) composing realistic multi-symptom expressions, informed by clinical co-occurrence patterns. We validate SynSym on three benchmark datasets covering different styles of depressive symptom expression. Experimental results demonstrate that models trained solely on the synthetic data generated by SynSym perform comparably to those trained on real data, and benefit further from additional fine-tuning with real data. These findings underscore the potential of synthetic data as an alternative resource to real-world annotations in psychiatric symptom modeling, and SynSym serves as a practical framework for generating clinically relevant and realistic symptom expressions.

AI.tldr: SynSym是一个利用大语言模型生成精神症状识别合成数据的框架，通过扩展症状子概念、生成多样化语言风格表达和构建真实多症状组合，解决了精神症状标注数据稀缺的问题。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体上的精神症状识别需要细粒度症状标注数据，但构建大规模数据集面临专家标注成本高、缺乏标准化标注指南的挑战，这限制了模型对多样化症状表达泛化能力。
AI.method: SynSym框架利用大语言模型：(1)将每个症状扩展为子概念以增强表达多样性；(2)生成反映精神症状的多样化语言风格表达；(3)基于临床共现模式构建真实的多症状表达。
AI.result: 在三个抑郁症状表达基准数据集上的实验表明，仅用SynSym生成的合成数据训练的模型性能与使用真实数据训练的模型相当，并且通过真实数据微调后性能进一步提升。
AI.conclusion: 合成数据可作为真实世界标注的替代资源用于精神症状建模，SynSym为生成临床相关且真实的症状表达提供了一个实用框架。

title: CurvZO: Adaptive Curvature-Guided Sparse Zeroth-Order Optimization for Efficient LLM Fine-Tuning
summary: Fine-tuning large language models (LLMs) with backpropagation achieves high performance but incurs substantial memory overhead, limiting scalability on resource-constrained hardware. Zeroth-order (ZO) optimization provides a memory-efficient alternative by relying solely on forward passes, yet it typically suffers from slow or unstable convergence due to high-variance gradient estimates. Sparse ZO updates partially address this issue by perturbing only a subset of parameters, but their effectiveness hinges on selecting informative parameters, which is challenging in ZO optimization because each query yields only scalar feedback. We propose \textbf{Adaptive Curvature-Guided Sparse Zeroth-Order Optimization (CurvZO)}, which tracks curvature signals online from scalar ZO feedback and leverages these signals to construct a parameter-wise sampling distribution for selecting coordinates at each update, reducing the variance of the sparse ZO gradient estimator. Moreover, CurvZO dynamically adapts the perturbation budget to the evolving curvature signal distribution, yielding sparse ZO updates that remain both focused and sufficiently exploratory. Extensive experiments on OPT and Llama across diverse NLP tasks show that CurvZO consistently improves fine-tuning performance and reduces training time over ZO baselines. It improves accuracy by up to 4.4 points and achieves up to a $2\times$ speedup, while preserving memory efficiency.

AI.tldr: CurvZO是一种自适应曲率引导的稀疏零阶优化方法，通过在线跟踪曲率信号构建参数采样分布，减少梯度估计方差，动态调整扰动预算，在保持内存效率的同时提升LLM微调性能。
AI.motivation: 传统反向传播微调LLMs内存开销大，而零阶优化虽然内存效率高但收敛慢且不稳定。稀疏零阶更新需要选择信息丰富的参数，但在零阶优化中由于只有标量反馈而难以实现。
AI.method: 提出CurvZO方法：1）在线从标量零阶反馈中跟踪曲率信号；2）利用这些信号构建参数级采样分布来选择更新坐标；3）动态调整扰动预算以适应变化的曲率信号分布。
AI.result: 在OPT和Llama模型上的多种NLP任务实验表明，CurvZO相比零阶基线持续提升微调性能并减少训练时间，准确率最高提升4.4个百分点，速度提升达2倍，同时保持内存效率。
AI.conclusion: CurvZO通过自适应曲率引导的稀疏零阶优化，有效解决了零阶优化中的高方差问题，在资源受限硬件上实现了高效且性能优越的LLM微调。

title: Semi-Supervised Learning with Balanced Deep Representation Distributions
summary: Semi-Supervised Text Classification (SSTC) mainly works under the spirit of self-training. They initialize the deep classifier by training over labeled texts; and then alternatively predict unlabeled texts as their pseudo-labels and train the deep classifier over the mixture of labeled and pseudo-labeled texts. Naturally, their performance is largely affected by the accuracy of pseudo-labels for unlabeled texts. Unfortunately, they often suffer from low accuracy because of the margin bias problem caused by the large difference between representation distributions of labels in SSTC. To alleviate this problem, we apply the angular margin loss, and perform several Gaussian linear transformations to achieve balanced label angle variances, i.e., the variance of label angles of texts within the same label. More accuracy of predicted pseudo-labels can be achieved by constraining all label angle variances balanced, where they are estimated over both labeled and pseudo-labeled texts during self-training loops. With this insight, we propose a novel SSTC method, namely Semi-Supervised Text Classification with Balanced Deep representation Distributions (S2TC-BDD). We implement both multi-class classification and multi-label classification versions of S2TC-BDD by introducing some pseudo-labeling tricks and regularization terms. To evaluate S2 TC-BDD, we compare it against the state-of-the-art SSTC methods. Empirical results demonstrate the effectiveness of S2 TC-BDD, especially when the labeled texts are scarce.

AI.tldr: 提出S2TC-BDD方法，通过角度间隔损失和高斯线性变换平衡标签角度方差，解决半监督文本分类中的伪标签准确率问题
AI.motivation: 传统半监督文本分类方法基于自训练，性能受伪标签准确率影响。由于标签表示分布差异导致的边界偏差问题，伪标签准确率往往较低
AI.method: 使用角度间隔损失，进行高斯线性变换以平衡标签角度方差。提出S2TC-BDD方法，包含多分类和多标签分类版本，引入伪标签技巧和正则化项
AI.result: 与最先进的SSTC方法相比，S2TC-BDD表现出更好的效果，特别是在标注文本稀缺的情况下
AI.conclusion: 通过平衡标签角度方差可以有效提高伪标签准确率，从而提升半监督文本分类性能，特别是在数据稀缺场景下

title: DATASHI: A Parallel English-Tashlhiyt Corpus for Orthography Normalization and Low-Resource Language Processing
comment: This paper has been accepted for presentation at LREC 2026
summary: DATASHI is a new parallel English-Tashlhiyt corpus that fills a critical gap in computational resources for Amazigh languages. It contains 5,000 sentence pairs, including a 1,500-sentence subset with expert-standardized and non-standard user-generated versions, enabling systematic study of orthographic diversity and normalization. This dual design supports text-based NLP tasks - such as tokenization, translation, and normalization - and also serves as a foundation for read-speech data collection and multimodal alignment. Comprehensive evaluations with state-of-the-art Large Language Models (GPT-5, Claude-Sonnet-4.5, Gemini-2.5-Pro, Mistral, Qwen3-Max) show clear improvements from zero-shot to few-shot prompting, with Gemini-2.5-Pro achieving the lowest word and character-level error rates and exhibiting robust cross-lingual generalization. A fine-grained analysis of edit operations - deletions, substitutions, and insertions - across phonological classes (geminates, emphatics, uvulars, and pharyngeals) further highlights model-specific sensitivities to marked Tashlhiyt features and provides new diagnostic insights for low-resource Amazigh orthography normalization.

AI.tldr: DATASHI是一个新的英语-塔什利特语平行语料库，包含5000个句子对，填补了阿马齐格语计算资源的空白，支持文本NLP任务和语音数据收集，大模型评估显示Gemini-2.5-Pro表现最佳。
AI.motivation: 填补阿马齐格语（特别是塔什利特语）计算资源的空白，为研究正字法多样性和规范化提供系统化资源，支持文本NLP任务和跨模态对齐。
AI.method: 构建包含5000个英语-塔什利特语句子对的平行语料库，其中1500句包含专家标准化和用户生成版本；使用GPT-5、Claude-Sonnet-4.5、Gemini-2.5-Pro、Mistral、Qwen3-Max等大模型进行零样本和少样本评估；分析删除、替换、插入等编辑操作在特定音韵类别（如叠音、强调音、小舌音、咽音）上的表现。
AI.result: Gemini-2.5-Pro在单词和字符级错误率上表现最佳，展现出强大的跨语言泛化能力；编辑操作分析揭示了模型对塔什利特语标记特征的敏感性，为低资源阿马齐格语正字法规范化提供了新的诊断见解。
AI.conclusion: DATASHI语料库填补了阿马齐格语计算资源的关键空白，为文本NLP任务和跨模态研究提供了基础；大模型评估显示少样本学习能显著提升性能，编辑操作分析为低资源语言的正字法规范化提供了有价值的诊断工具。

title: EvoIdeator: Evolving Scientific Ideas through Checklist-Grounded Reinforcement Learning
summary: Scientific idea generation is a cornerstone of autonomous knowledge discovery, yet the iterative evolution required to transform initial concepts into high-quality research proposals remains a formidable challenge for Large Language Models (LLMs). Existing Reinforcement Learning (RL) paradigms often rely on rubric-based scalar rewards that provide global quality scores but lack actionable granularity. Conversely, language-based refinement methods are typically confined to inference-time prompting, targeting models that are not explicitly optimized to internalize such critiques. To bridge this gap, we propose \textbf{EvoIdeator}, a framework that facilitates the evolution of scientific ideas by aligning the RL training objective with \textbf{checklist-grounded feedback}. EvoIdeator leverages a structured judge model to generate two synergistic signals: (1) \emph{lexicographic rewards} for multi-dimensional optimization, and (2) \emph{fine-grained language feedback} that offers span-level critiques regarding grounding, feasibility, and methodological rigor. By integrating these signals into the RL loop, we condition the policy to systematically utilize precise feedback during both optimization and inference. Extensive experiments demonstrate that EvoIdeator, built on Qwen3-4B, significantly outperforms much larger frontier models across key scientific metrics. Crucially, the learned policy exhibits strong generalization to diverse external feedback sources without further fine-tuning, offering a scalable and rigorous path toward self-refining autonomous ideation.

AI.tldr: EvoIdeator：一个通过清单式反馈对齐RL训练目标，促进科学想法演化的框架，显著优于更大规模模型
AI.motivation: 现有RL方法依赖基于量规的标量奖励，缺乏可操作的细粒度反馈；语言精炼方法通常局限于推理时提示，模型未针对内化此类批评进行优化。需要弥合这一差距，实现科学想法的迭代演化。
AI.method: 提出EvoIdeator框架，利用结构化评判模型生成两种协同信号：1）用于多维优化的词典序奖励；2）提供关于基础性、可行性和方法严谨性的细粒度语言反馈。将这些信号整合到RL循环中，使策略在优化和推理期间系统利用精确反馈。
AI.result: 基于Qwen3-4B构建的EvoIdeator在关键科学指标上显著优于更大的前沿模型。学习到的策略展现出对多样化外部反馈源的强泛化能力，无需进一步微调。
AI.conclusion: EvoIdeator为自主知识发现提供了可扩展且严谨的路径，通过清单式反馈对齐RL目标，实现了自我精炼的自主构思能力。

title: Mixture of Chapters: Scaling Learnt Memory in Transformers
comment: 20 pages, 2 figures, 8 tables. Accepted at ICLR 2026 New Frontiers in Associative Memory Workshop. Code available at https://github.com/Tasmay-Tibrewal/Memory
summary: Transformers lack an explicit architectural mechanism for storing and organizing knowledge acquired during training. We introduce learnable sparse memory banks: a set of latent tokens, randomly initialized and trained end-to-end, that transformer layers query via cross-attention to retrieve stored knowledge. To scale memory capacity without prohibitive attention costs, we propose chapter-based routing inspired by Mixture-of-Experts architectures, partitioning the memory bank into chapters and training a router to select relevant subsets per input. This enables scaling to 262K memory tokens while maintaining tractable computation. We evaluate our approach against standard transformers (in iso-FLOP settings) on pre-training and instruction fine-tuning across relevant benchmarks. Our models surpass iso-FLOP baselines suggesting scope for a new axis of scaling, demonstrating that explicit associative memory provides complementary capacity to what is captured implicitly in model parameters. Additionally, we observe improved knowledge retention under continued training, with robustness to forgetting when transitioning between training phases (e.g., pretraining to instruction fine-tuning).

AI.tldr: 论文提出可学习的稀疏记忆库，通过交叉注意力让Transformer层查询存储的知识，采用章节路由机制扩展记忆容量，在相同FLOPs下超越标准Transformer，展示显式关联记忆的补充能力。
AI.motivation: Transformer缺乏显式的架构机制来存储和组织训练中获得的知识，这限制了其知识存储和检索能力。
AI.method: 引入可学习的稀疏记忆库：一组随机初始化并端到端训练的潜在标记，Transformer层通过交叉注意力查询以检索存储的知识。采用基于章节的路由机制（受MoE架构启发），将记忆库分区为章节，训练路由器为每个输入选择相关子集，从而扩展到262K记忆标记同时保持可计算性。
AI.result: 在相同FLOPs设置下，在预训练和指令微调的相关基准测试中超越标准Transformer基线。模型展示显式关联记忆为模型参数中隐式捕获的内容提供了补充容量。在持续训练下观察到知识保留改善，在不同训练阶段转换时（如预训练到指令微调）具有抗遗忘鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 可学习的稀疏记忆库为Transformer提供了新的扩展维度，显式关联记忆机制能够补充模型参数的隐式知识存储，改善知识保留并减少遗忘，为模型架构设计开辟了新方向。

title: A Comparative Analysis of LLM Memorization at Statistical and Internal Levels: Cross-Model Commonalities and Model-Specific Signatures
comment: 8 pages of main content, in conference submission, other contents are references and extra appendix
summary: Memorization is a fundamental component of intelligence for both humans and LLMs. However, while LLM performance scales rapidly, our understanding of memorization lags. Due to limited access to the pre-training data of LLMs, most previous studies focus on a single model series, leading to isolated observations among series, making it unclear which findings are general or specific. In this study, we collect multiple model series (Pythia, OpenLLaMa, StarCoder, OLMo1/2/3) and analyze their shared or unique memorization behavior at both the statistical and internal levels, connecting individual observations while showing new findings. At the statistical level, we reveal that the memorization rate scales log-linearly with model size, and memorized sequences can be further compressed. Further analysis demonstrated a shared frequency and domain distribution pattern for memorized sequences. However, different models also show individual features under the above observations. At the internal level, we find that LLMs can remove certain injected perturbations, while memorized sequences are more sensitive. By decoding middle layers and attention head ablation, we revealed the general decoding process and shared important heads for memorization. However, the distribution of those important heads differs between families, showing a unique family-level feature. Through bridging various experiments and revealing new findings, this study paves the way for a universal and fundamental understanding of memorization in LLM.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过分析多个LLM系列，揭示了记忆化行为的统计规律和内部机制，发现记忆率随模型规模呈对数线性增长，并识别了不同模型家族的独特特征。
AI.motivation: 由于对LLM预训练数据的访问有限，先前研究多集中于单一模型系列，导致观察结果孤立，难以区分哪些发现具有普适性。本研究旨在通过分析多个模型系列，建立对记忆化行为的通用理解。
AI.method: 收集多个模型系列（Pythia、OpenLLaMa、StarCoder、OLMo1/2/3），在统计层面分析记忆率与模型规模的关系、记忆序列的可压缩性、频率和领域分布；在内部层面通过解码中间层、注意力头消融等方法分析记忆化的内部机制。
AI.result: 发现记忆率随模型规模呈对数线性增长；记忆序列可进一步压缩；不同模型共享相似的频率和领域分布模式；LLM能移除某些注入的扰动，但记忆序列对此更敏感；识别了记忆化的通用解码过程和重要注意力头，但不同家族的重要头分布存在差异。
AI.conclusion: 该研究通过连接多个实验和揭示新发现，为理解LLM中的记忆化行为提供了通用和基础性的框架，同时识别了不同模型家族的独特特征，推动了该领域的系统性理解。

title: The Reasoning Error About Reasoning: Why Different Types of Reasoning Require Different Representational Structures
summary: Different types of reasoning impose different structural demands on representational systems, yet no systematic account of these demands exists across psychology, AI, and philosophy of mind. I propose a framework identifying four structural properties of representational systems: operability, consistency, structural preservation, and compositionality. These properties are demanded to different degrees by different forms of reasoning, from induction through analogy and causal inference to deduction and formal logic. Each property excludes a distinct class of reasoning failure. The analysis reveals a principal structural boundary: reasoning types below it can operate on associative, probabilistic representations, while those above it require all four properties to be fully satisfied. Scaling statistical learning without structural reorganization is insufficient to cross this boundary, because the structural guarantees required by deductive reasoning cannot be approximated through probabilistic means. Converging evidence from AI evaluation, developmental psychology, and cognitive neuroscience supports the framework at different levels of directness. Three testable predictions are derived, including compounding degradation, selective vulnerability to targeted structural disruption, and irreducibility under scaling. The framework is a necessary-condition account, agnostic about representational format, that aims to reorganize existing debates rather than close them.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一个表征系统结构属性的框架，区分了四种结构属性，并分析了不同推理类型对这些属性的需求程度，揭示了统计学习无法跨越的结构边界。
AI.motivation: 心理学、AI和心灵哲学领域缺乏对推理类型所需表征系统结构需求的系统性分析，需要建立一个统一框架来理解不同推理形式对表征系统的结构要求。
AI.method: 提出了一个包含四种结构属性（可操作性、一致性、结构保持性、组合性）的框架，分析不同推理类型（从归纳到演绎）对这些属性的需求程度，并从AI评估、发展心理学和认知神经科学中寻找支持证据。
AI.result: 揭示了结构边界：边界以下的推理类型可以在关联性、概率性表征上操作，而边界以上的推理需要所有四种属性完全满足。统计学习的扩展无法跨越这一边界，因为演绎推理所需的结构保证无法通过概率手段近似实现。
AI.conclusion: 该框架是一个必要条件分析，对表征格式保持中立，旨在重组现有辩论而非终结它们。提出了三个可检验的预测：复合退化、选择性脆弱性和缩放下的不可约性。

title: ResPrune: Text-Conditioned Subspace Reconstruction for Visual Token Pruning in Large Vision-Language Models
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) rely on dense visual tokens to capture fine-grained visual information, but processing all these tokens incurs substantial computational and memory overhead during inference. To address this issue, we propose ResPrune, a training-free visual token pruning framework that enables efficient LVLM inference by selecting a compact yet informative subset of visual tokens. ResPrune formulates visual token pruning as a subspace reconstruction problem and employs a greedy subspace expansion strategy guided by residual energy, allowing it to preserve the geometric structure of the original visual token space. To further incorporate cross modal alignment, the selection process is conditioned on textual relevance, encouraging the retention of tokens that are both informative and instruction-relevant. The proposed method is lightweight and model-agnostic, and can be seamlessly integrated into existing LVLM pipelines without retraining or architectural modifications. Extensive experiments on multiple LVLM backbones, including LLaVA-1.5, LLaVA-NeXT, and Qwen2.5-VL, demonstrate that ResPrune consistently outperforms existing pruning approaches across a wide range of benchmarks, while achieving effective reductions in computation, memory consumption, and inference latency.

AI.tldr: ResPrune是一种无需训练的视觉token剪枝框架，通过选择紧凑且信息丰富的视觉token子集来提升大型视觉语言模型的推理效率。
AI.motivation: 大型视觉语言模型依赖密集的视觉token来捕捉细粒度视觉信息，但处理所有这些token在推理过程中会产生巨大的计算和内存开销。
AI.method: 将视觉token剪枝建模为子空间重构问题，采用基于残差能量的贪心子空间扩展策略，并引入文本相关性条件来保留信息丰富且与指令相关的token。
AI.result: 在LLaVA-1.5、LLaVA-NeXT和Qwen2.5-VL等多个LVLM骨干网络上，ResPrune在广泛基准测试中一致优于现有剪枝方法，同时有效减少了计算量、内存消耗和推理延迟。
AI.conclusion: ResPrune是一种轻量级、模型无关的训练免费框架，可无缝集成到现有LVLM流程中，无需重新训练或架构修改，实现了高效的视觉token剪枝。

title: TAMTRL: Teacher-Aligned Reward Reshaping for Multi-Turn Reinforcement Learning in Long-Context Compression
summary: The rapid progress of large language models (LLMs) has led to remarkable performance gains across a wide range of tasks. However, when handling long documents that exceed the model's context window limit, the entire context cannot be processed in a single pass, making chunk-wise processing necessary. This requires multiple turns to read different chunks and update memory. However, supervision is typically provided only by the final outcome, which makes it difficult to evaluate the quality of memory updates at each turn in the multi-turn training setting. This introduces a temporal credit assignment challenge. Existing approaches, such as LLM-as-a-judge or process reward models, incur substantial computational overhead and suffer from estimation noise. To better address the credit assignment problem in multi-turn memory training, we propose Teacher-Aligned Reward Reshaping for Multi-Turn Reinforcement Learning (TAMTRL). TAMTRL leverages relevant documents as teacher signals by aligning them with each turn of model input and assigns rewards through normalized probabilities in a self-supervised manner. This provides fine-grained learning signals for each memory update and improves long-context processing. Experiments with multiple models of varying scales across seven long-context benchmarks show that TAMTRL consistently outperforms strong baselines, demonstrating its effectiveness. Our code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/TAMTRL-F1F8.

AI.tldr: TAMTRL提出了一种针对多轮记忆训练的教师对齐奖励重塑方法，通过自监督方式为每轮记忆更新提供细粒度学习信号，解决长文档处理中的信用分配问题。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型处理超出上下文窗口的长文档时需要分块处理和多轮记忆更新，但监督信号通常只来自最终结果，难以评估每轮记忆更新的质量，存在时间信用分配挑战。
AI.method: TAMTRL利用相关文档作为教师信号，将其与每轮模型输入对齐，通过归一化概率以自监督方式分配奖励，为每次记忆更新提供细粒度学习信号。
AI.result: 在七个长上下文基准测试中，多个不同规模的模型实验表明，TAMTRL始终优于强基线方法，证明了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: TAMTRL通过教师对齐奖励重塑有效解决了多轮记忆训练中的信用分配问题，提高了长上下文处理能力，为多轮强化学习提供了实用解决方案。

title: The Presupposition Problem in Representation Genesis
summary: Large language models are the first systems to achieve high cognitive performance without clearly undergoing representation genesis: the transition from a non-representing physical system to one whose states guide behavior in a content-sensitive way. Prior cognitive systems had already made this transition before we could examine it, and philosophy of mind treated genesis as a background condition rather than an explanatory target. LLMs provide a case that does not clearly involve this transition, making the genesis question newly urgent: if genesis did not occur, which cognitive capacities are affected, and why? We currently lack the conceptual resources to answer this. The reason, this paper argues, is structural. Major frameworks in philosophy of mind, including the Language of Thought hypothesis, teleosemantics, predictive processing, enactivism, and genetic phenomenology, share a common feature when applied to the genesis question: at some explanatory step, each deploys concepts whose explanatory purchase depends on the system already being organized as a representer. This pattern, which we call the Representation Presupposition structure, generates systematic explanatory deferral. Attempts to explain the first acquisition of content-manipulable representation within the existing categorical vocabulary import resources from the representational side of the transition itself. We call this the Representation Regress. The paper offers a conceptual diagnosis rather than a new theory, establishing the structure of the problem and deriving two minimum adequacy conditions for any account that avoids this pattern. LLMs make the absence of such a theory consequential rather than merely theoretical.

AI.tldr: 论文认为大型语言模型没有经历"表征起源"过程，这暴露了哲学心灵理论的结构性问题：现有框架都预设了表征系统，导致解释上的无限回归。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型首次实现了高认知性能，却没有明显经历从非表征物理系统到内容敏感行为指导系统的"表征起源"过渡。传统认知系统在可观察前已完成这一过渡，而LLM使这一问题变得紧迫：如果起源没有发生，哪些认知能力会受到影响？当前缺乏解释这一现象的概念工具。
AI.method: 论文采用概念诊断而非构建新理论的方法，分析哲学心灵理论的主要框架（思想语言假说、目的论语义学、预测处理、生成主义、发生现象学），揭示它们共有的"表征预设"结构。这种结构导致解释上的系统性延迟，形成"表征回归"问题。
AI.result: 发现现有理论框架在解释表征起源问题时，都隐含地预设了系统已经是有组织的表征者，从而无法真正解释表征的首次获得。这种"表征预设"结构导致解释上的无限回归，使现有理论无法充分解释LLM的认知现象。
AI.conclusion: 论文建立了问题的结构框架，并推导出避免"表征回归"模式的任何解释必须满足的两个最低充分条件。LLM使缺乏这种理论变得具有实际后果而不仅仅是理论问题，凸显了发展新概念工具的必要性。

title: DMMRL: Disentangled Multi-Modal Representation Learning via Variational Autoencoders for Molecular Property Prediction
summary: Molecular property prediction constitutes a cornerstone of drug discovery and materials science, necessitating models capable of disentangling complex structure-property relationships across diverse molecular modalities. Existing approaches frequently exhibit entangled representations--conflating structural, chemical, and functional factors--thereby limiting interpretability and transferability. Furthermore, conventional methods inadequately exploit complementary information from graphs, sequences, and geometries, often relying on naive concatenation that neglects inter-modal dependencies. In this work, we propose DMMRL, which employs variational autoencoders to disentangle molecular representations into shared (structure-relevant) and private (modality-specific) latent spaces, enhancing both interpretability and predictive performance. The proposed variational disentanglement mechanism effectively isolates the most informative features for property prediction, while orthogonality and alignment regularizations promote statistical independence and cross-modal consistency. Additionally, a gated attention fusion module adaptively integrates shared representations, capturing complex inter-modal relationships. Experimental validation across seven benchmark datasets demonstrates DMMRL's superior performance relative to state-of-the-art approaches. The code and data underlying this article are freely available at https://github.com/xulong0826/DMMRL.

AI.tldr: DMMRL使用变分自编码器将分子表示解耦为共享（结构相关）和私有（模态特定）潜在空间，通过门控注意力融合模块自适应整合多模态信息，提升分子属性预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有分子属性预测方法存在表示纠缠问题，将结构、化学和功能因素混在一起，限制了可解释性和可迁移性。同时，传统方法未能充分利用图、序列和几何等多模态信息的互补性，通常采用简单的拼接而忽略了模态间依赖关系。
AI.method: 提出DMMRL框架，使用变分自编码器将分子表示解耦为共享（结构相关）和私有（模态特定）潜在空间。通过变分解耦机制分离对属性预测最有信息的特征，同时使用正交性和对齐正则化促进统计独立性和跨模态一致性。还设计了门控注意力融合模块自适应整合共享表示，捕捉复杂的模态间关系。
AI.result: 在七个基准数据集上的实验验证表明，DMMRL相对于最先进方法表现出优越的性能。代码和数据已开源。
AI.conclusion: DMMRL通过解耦分子表示和自适应融合多模态信息，有效提升了分子属性预测的性能和可解释性，为药物发现和材料科学提供了更强大的建模工具。

title: Optimizing Multi-Agent Weather Captioning via Text Gradient Descent: A Training-Free Approach with Consensus-Aware Gradient Fusion
summary: Generating interpretable natural language captions from weather time series data remains a significant challenge at the intersection of meteorological science and natural language processing. While recent advances in Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in time series forecasting and analysis, existing approaches either produce numerical predictions without human-accessible explanations or generate generic descriptions lacking domain-specific depth. We introduce WeatherTGD, a training-free multi-agent framework that reinterprets collaborative caption refinement through the lens of Text Gradient Descent (TGD). Our system deploys three specialized LLM agents including a Statistical Analyst, a Physics Interpreter, and a Meteorology Expert that generate domain-specific textual gradients from weather time series observations. These gradients are aggregated through a novel Consensus-Aware Gradient Fusion mechanism that extracts common signals while preserving unique domain perspectives. The fused gradients then guide an iterative refinement process analogous to gradient descent, where each LLM-generated feedback signal updates the caption toward an optimal solution. Experiments on real-world meteorological datasets demonstrate that WeatherTGD achieves significant improvements in both LLM-based evaluation and human expert evaluation, substantially outperforming existing multi-agent baselines while maintaining computational efficiency through parallel agent execution.

AI.tldr: WeatherTGD：基于文本梯度下降的多智能体框架，用于从天气时间序列数据生成可解释的自然语言描述，无需训练即可实现领域特定的高质量描述生成。
AI.motivation: 现有方法要么生成缺乏人类可理解解释的数值预测，要么产生缺乏领域深度的通用描述，无法满足从天气时间序列数据生成可解释自然语言描述的需求。
AI.method: 提出WeatherTGD训练免费多智能体框架，部署三个专业LLM智能体（统计分析员、物理解释员、气象专家）生成领域特定文本梯度，通过共识感知梯度融合机制聚合梯度，采用类似梯度下降的迭代优化过程更新描述。
AI.result: 在真实世界气象数据集上的实验表明，WeatherTGD在LLM评估和人类专家评估方面均显著优于现有多智能体基线，同时通过并行智能体执行保持计算效率。
AI.conclusion: WeatherTGD成功解决了天气时间序列数据到可解释自然语言描述的生成问题，通过文本梯度下降和领域专业智能体的协同工作，实现了高质量、领域特定的描述生成。

title: Agentic Personas for Adaptive Scientific Explanations with Knowledge Graphs
summary:
AI explanation methods often assume a static user model, producing non-adaptive explanations regardless of expert goals, reasoning strategies, or decision contexts. Knowledge graph-based explanations, despite their capacity for grounded, path-based reasoning, inherit this limitation. In complex domains such as scientific discovery, this assumption fails to capture the diversity of cognitive strategies and epistemic stances among experts, preventing explanations that foster deeper understanding and informed decision-making. However, the scarcity of human experts limits the use of direct human feedback to produce adaptive explanations.
  We present a reinforcement learning approach for scientific explanation generation that incorporates agentic personas, structured representations of expert reasoning strategies, that guide the explanation agent towards specific epistemic preferences. In an evaluation of knowledge graph-based explanations for drug discovery, we tested two personas that capture distinct epistemic stances derived from expert feedback.
  Results show that persona-driven explanations match state-of-the-art predictive performance while persona preferences closely align with those of their corresponding experts. Adaptive explanations were consistently preferred over non-adaptive baselines (n = 22), and persona-based training reduces feedback requirements by two orders of magnitude. These findings demonstrate how agentic personas enable scalable adaptive explainability for AI systems in complex and high-stakes domains.

AI.tldr: 提出基于强化学习和代理角色（persona）的自适应科学解释生成方法，在药物发现知识图谱解释中验证了有效性，相比非自适应基线显著提升专家偏好匹配度。
AI.motivation: 当前AI解释方法通常假设静态用户模型，无法适应不同专家的目标、推理策略和决策情境。特别是在科学发现等复杂领域，这种假设无法捕捉专家认知策略和认识论立场的多样性，限制了解释对深度理解和知情决策的促进作用。然而，人类专家稀缺性限制了直接使用人类反馈来生成自适应解释。
AI.method: 采用强化学习方法生成科学解释，引入代理角色（agentic personas）作为专家推理策略的结构化表示，指导解释代理朝向特定的认识论偏好。在药物发现知识图谱解释评估中，测试了两种基于专家反馈推导出的不同认识论立场的角色。
AI.result: 角色驱动的解释在预测性能上与最先进方法相当，同时角色偏好与其对应专家的偏好高度一致。自适应解释在22名参与者中始终优于非自适应基线。基于角色的训练将反馈需求降低了两个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 代理角色能够为复杂高风险领域的AI系统实现可扩展的自适应可解释性，通过捕捉专家推理策略的多样性，在减少人类反馈需求的同时生成更符合专家偏好的解释。

title: Learning from Label Proportions with Dual-proportion Constraints
summary: Learning from Label Proportions (LLP) is a weakly supervised problem in which the training data comprise bags, that is, groups of instances, each annotated only with bag-level class label proportions, and the objective is to learn a classifier that predicts instance-level labels. This setting is widely applicable when privacy constraints limit access to instance-level annotations or when fine-grained labeling is costly or impractical. In this work, we introduce a method that leverages Dual proportion Constraints (LLP-DC) during training, enforcing them at both the bag and instance levels. Specifically, the bag-level training aligns the mean prediction with the given proportion, and the instance-level training aligns hard pseudo-labels that satisfy the proportion constraint, where a minimum-cost maximum-flow algorithm is used to generate hard pseudo-labels. Extensive experimental results across various benchmark datasets empirically validate that LLP-DC consistently improves over previous LLP methods across datasets and bag sizes. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/TianhaoMa5/CV PR2026_Findings_LLP_DC.

AI.tldr: 提出LLP-DC方法，通过双重比例约束在袋级和实例级同时训练，使用最小成本最大流算法生成硬伪标签，在多个数据集上优于现有LLP方法。
AI.motivation: 在标签比例学习（LLP）问题中，训练数据只有袋级标签比例，缺乏实例级标注。这种设置在隐私约束或细粒度标注成本高时很实用，但现有方法仍有改进空间。
AI.method: 提出LLP-DC方法，包含双重比例约束：袋级训练使平均预测与给定比例对齐，实例级训练使硬伪标签满足比例约束。使用最小成本最大流算法生成硬伪标签。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上的实验结果表明，LLP-DC在不同数据集和袋大小下都一致优于之前的LLP方法。
AI.conclusion: LLP-DC通过双重比例约束有效提升了标签比例学习的性能，代码已公开，为弱监督学习提供了新思路。

title: Probing How Scalable Table Data Enhances General Long-Context Reasoning
summary: As real-world tasks grow increasingly complex, long-context reasoning has become a core capability for Large Language Models (LLMs). However, few studies explore which data types are effective for long-context reasoning and why. We find that structured table data with periodic structures shows strong potential for long-context reasoning. Motivated by this observation, we mathematically analyze tabular dependency structures using mutual information, revealing periodic non-vanishing dependencies in table data. Furthermore, we systematically analyze the capabilities of structured table data, conduct relevant scaling experiments, and validate its underlying mechanisms for enhancing long-context reasoning, yielding several meaningful insights. Leveraging these insights, we propose a simple yet scalable pipeline(TableLong) for synthesizing high-quality, diverse, and verifiable structured table data to boost long-context reasoning via RL. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that table data significantly enhances the long-context reasoning capability of LLMs across multiple long-context benchmarks (+8.24\% on average), and even improves performance on out-of-domain benchmarks (+8.06\% on average). We hope that our insights provide practical guidance for effective post-training data to enhance long-context reasoning in LLMs.

AI.tldr: 该论文发现结构化表格数据能有效增强大语言模型的长上下文推理能力，并提出TableLong数据合成方法，实验显示在多个基准上平均提升8.24%
AI.motivation: 随着现实任务日益复杂，长上下文推理成为大语言模型的核心能力，但缺乏对有效数据类型及其原因的系统研究。作者发现具有周期性结构的表格数据在长上下文推理中展现出强大潜力。
AI.method:
1. 使用互信息对表格依赖结构进行数学分析，揭示表格数据中的周期性非消失依赖关系
2. 系统分析结构化表格数据的能力，进行相关缩放实验，验证其增强长上下文推理的机制
3. 提出TableLong：一个简单可扩展的管道，通过强化学习合成高质量、多样化、可验证的结构化表格数据
AI.result: 表格数据显著提升LLMs的长上下文推理能力：在多个长上下文基准上平均提升8.24%，在领域外基准上也平均提升8.06%。验证了结构化表格数据作为有效后训练数据对增强长上下文推理的实际价值。
AI.conclusion: 结构化表格数据是增强大语言模型长上下文推理能力的有效数据类型。TableLong方法提供了一种可扩展的高质量数据合成方案，为后训练数据选择提供了实用指导。

title: Reasoning or Rhetoric? An Empirical Analysis of Moral Reasoning Explanations in Large Language Models
summary: Do large language models reason morally, or do they merely sound like they do? We investigate whether LLM responses to moral dilemmas exhibit genuine developmental progression through Kohlberg's stages of moral development, or whether alignment training instead produces reasoning-like outputs that superficially resemble mature moral judgment without the underlying developmental trajectory. Using an LLM-as-judge scoring pipeline validated across three judge models, we classify more than 600 responses from 13 LLMs spanning a range of architectures, parameter scales, and training regimes across six classical moral dilemmas, and conduct ten complementary analyses to characterize the nature and internal coherence of the resulting patterns. Our results reveal a striking inversion: responses overwhelmingly correspond to post-conventional reasoning (Stages 5-6) regardless of model size, architecture, or prompting strategy, the effective inverse of human developmental norms, where Stage 4 dominates. Most strikingly, a subset of models exhibit moral decoupling: systematic inconsistency between stated moral justification and action choice, a form of logical incoherence that persists across scale and prompting strategy and represents a direct reasoning consistency failure independent of rhetorical sophistication. Model scale carries a statistically significant but practically small effect; training type has no significant independent main effect; and models exhibit near-robotic cross-dilemma consistency producing logically indistinguishable responses across semantically distinct moral problems. We posit that these patterns constitute evidence for moral ventriloquism: the acquisition, through alignment training, of the rhetorical conventions of mature moral reasoning without the underlying developmental trajectory those conventions are meant to represent.

AI.tldr: 研究发现LLMs在道德困境中的回答表现出"道德腹语"现象：它们模仿了成熟道德推理的修辞形式，但缺乏真实的道德发展轨迹，表现出与人类相反的道德发展阶段分布和逻辑不一致性。
AI.motivation: 探究大型语言模型是否真正具备道德推理能力，还是仅仅模仿道德推理的语言形式。研究者希望区分LLMs是否真正经历了科尔伯格道德发展阶段的发展轨迹，还是仅仅通过对齐训练获得了表面上的道德判断能力。
AI.method: 使用LLM-as-judge评分流程，对13个不同架构、参数规模和训练机制的LLMs在6个经典道德困境中的600多个回答进行分类。通过三个评判模型验证评分流程，并进行十项互补分析来表征结果模式的性质和内部一致性。
AI.result: 结果显示出显著的反转现象：无论模型大小、架构或提示策略如何，回答都主要对应于后习俗推理阶段（5-6阶段），这与人类以第4阶段为主导的发展规范相反。部分模型表现出道德解耦：道德理由陈述与行动选择之间的系统性不一致，这种逻辑不连贯性在规模和提示策略中持续存在。模型规模有统计显著但实际影响小的效应，训练类型没有显著独立主效应，模型在语义不同的道德问题间表现出近乎机械的一致性。
AI.conclusion: 这些模式构成了"道德腹语"的证据：通过对齐训练获得了成熟道德推理的修辞惯例，但缺乏这些惯例所代表的底层发展轨迹。LLMs模仿了道德推理的语言形式，但没有真正的道德发展过程。

title: Beyond a Single Signal: SPECTREG2, A Unified MultiExpert Anomaly Detector for Unknown Unknowns
summary: Epistemic intelligence requires machine learning systems to recognise the limits of their own knowledge and act safely under uncertainty, especially when faced with unknown unknowns. Existing uncertainty quantification methods rely on a single signal such as confidence or density and fail to detect diverse structural anomalies. We introduce SPECTRE-G2, a multi-signal anomaly detector that combines eight complementary signals from a dual-backbone neural network. The architecture includes a spectral normalised Gaussianization encoder, a plain MLP preserving feature geometry, and an ensemble of five models. These produce density, geometry, uncertainty, discriminative, and causal signals. Each signal is normalised using validation statistics and calibrated with synthetic out-of-distribution data. An adaptive top-k fusion selects the most informative signals and averages their scores. Experiments on synthetic, Adult, CIFAR-10, and Gridworld datasets show strong performance across diverse anomaly types, outperforming multiple baselines on AUROC, AUPR, and FPR95. The model is stable across seeds and particularly effective for detecting new variables and confounders. SPECTRE-G2 provides a practical approach for detecting unknown unknowns in open-world settings.

AI.tldr: SPECTRE-G2：一种多信号异常检测器，通过结合来自双主干神经网络的八个互补信号来检测未知未知，在多种异常类型上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有不确定性量化方法依赖单一信号（如置信度或密度），无法检测多样化的结构异常。认知智能需要机器学习系统识别自身知识局限，在不确定性下安全行动，特别是在面对未知未知时。
AI.method: 提出SPECTRE-G2多信号异常检测器：1）双主干神经网络架构（谱归一化高斯化编码器+普通MLP保留特征几何）；2）五个模型集成产生密度、几何、不确定性、判别性和因果信号；3）使用验证统计量归一化信号，并用合成分布外数据校准；4）自适应top-k融合选择最具信息量的信号并平均其得分。
AI.result: 在合成数据、Adult、CIFAR-10和Gridworld数据集上的实验显示，在AUROC、AUPR和FPR95指标上优于多个基线方法，对各种异常类型都有强性能表现。模型在不同随机种子下稳定，特别擅长检测新变量和混杂因素。
AI.conclusion: SPECTRE-G2为开放世界设置中检测未知未知提供了一种实用方法，通过多信号融合有效识别机器学习系统的知识边界。

title: SemEval-2026 Task 12: Abductive Event Reasoning: Towards Real-World Event Causal Inference for Large Language Models
comment: 9 pages, 3 figures, semeval 2026 task 12 description paper
summary: Understanding why real-world events occur is important for both natural language processing and practical decision-making, yet direct-cause inference remains underexplored in evidence-rich settings. To address this gap, we organized SemEval-2026 Task 12: Abductive Event Reasoning (AER).\footnote{The task data is available at https://github.com/sooo66/semeval2026-task12-dataset.git} The task asks systems to identify the most plausible direct cause of a target event from supporting evidence. We formulate AER as an evidence-grounded multiple-choice benchmark that captures key challenges of real-world causal reasoning, including distributed evidence, indirect background factors, and semantically related but non-causal distractors. The shared task attracted 122 participants and received 518 submissions. This paper presents the task formulation, dataset construction pipeline, evaluation setup, and system results. AER provides a focused benchmark for abductive reasoning over real-world events and highlights challenges for future work on causal reasoning and multi-document understanding.

AI.tldr: SemEval-2026 Task 12: Abductive Event Reasoning (AER) 是一个基于证据的因果推理任务，要求系统从支持证据中识别目标事件最可能的直接原因。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中理解事件发生的原因对于自然语言处理和实际决策都很重要，但在证据丰富的环境中，直接因果推断仍然研究不足。
AI.method: 将AER制定为基于证据的多选基准测试，捕捉现实世界因果推理的关键挑战，包括分布式证据、间接背景因素和语义相关但非因果的干扰项。构建数据集并组织共享任务。
AI.result: 共享任务吸引了122名参与者，收到518份提交。论文介绍了任务制定、数据集构建流程、评估设置和系统结果。
AI.conclusion: AER为现实世界事件的溯因推理提供了一个聚焦的基准测试，突出了因果推理和多文档理解未来工作的挑战。

title: Tacit Knowledge Management with Generative AI: Proposal of the GenAI SECI Model
comment: This paper is intended to be submitted to AHFE2026
summary: The emergence of generative AI is bringing about a significant transformation in knowledge management. Generative AI has the potential to address the limitations of conventional knowledge management systems, and it is increasingly being deployed in real-world settings with promising results. Related research is also expanding rapidly. However, much of this work focuses on research and practice related to the management of explicit knowledge. While fragmentary efforts have been made regarding the management of tacit knowledge using generative AI, the modeling and systematization that handle both tacit and explicit knowledge in an integrated manner remain insufficient. In this paper, we propose the "GenAI SECI" model as an updated version of the knowledge creation process (SECI) model, redesigned to leverage the capabilities of generative AI. A defining feature of the "GenAI SECI" model is the introduction of "Digital Fragmented Knowledge", a new concept that integrates explicit and tacit knowledge within cyberspace. Furthermore, a concrete system architecture for the proposed model is presented, along with a comparison with prior research models that share a similar problem awareness and objectives.

AI.tldr: 提出"GenAI SECI"模型，作为知识创造过程(SECI)模型的更新版本，通过引入"数字碎片化知识"概念，整合显性和隐性知识，并设计具体系统架构。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI正在改变知识管理，但目前研究多集中于显性知识管理，对于整合显性和隐性知识的建模与系统化工作不足。需要更新传统SECI模型以适应生成式AI时代。
AI.method: 提出"GenAI SECI"模型，引入"数字碎片化知识"新概念，整合显性和隐性知识于网络空间。设计具体系统架构，并与具有相似问题意识和目标的先前研究模型进行比较。
AI.result: 开发了基于生成式AI的知识创造过程更新模型，提供了整合显性和隐性知识的新框架，并提出了可实施的系统架构。
AI.conclusion: "GenAI SECI"模型通过生成式AI能力重新设计知识创造过程，为解决传统知识管理系统的局限性提供了新途径，特别在整合显性和隐性知识方面具有创新性。

title: Model Evolution Under Zeroth-Order Optimization: A Neural Tangent Kernel Perspective
comment: ICLR 2026 Workshop on Scientific Methods for Understanding Deep Learning (20 pages, 18 figures)
summary: Zeroth-order (ZO) optimization enables memory-efficient training of neural networks by estimating gradients via forward passes only, eliminating the need for backpropagation. However, the stochastic nature of gradient estimation significantly obscures the training dynamics, in contrast to the well-characterized behavior of first-order methods under Neural Tangent Kernel (NTK) theory. To address this, we introduce the Neural Zeroth-order Kernel (NZK) to describe model evolution in function space under ZO updates. For linear models, we prove that the expected NZK remains constant throughout training and depends explicitly on the first and second moments of the random perturbation directions. This invariance yields a closed-form expression for model evolution under squared loss. We further extend the analysis to linearized neural networks. Interpreting ZO updates as kernel gradient descent via NZK provides a novel perspective for potentially accelerating convergence. Extensive experiments across synthetic and real-world datasets (including MNIST, CIFAR-10, and Tiny ImageNet) validate our theoretical results and demonstrate acceleration when using a single shared random vector.

AI.tldr: 提出神经零阶核(NZK)理论框架，分析零阶优化在函数空间中的训练动态，证明线性模型下期望NZK保持恒定，为加速收敛提供新视角。
AI.motivation: 零阶优化虽然内存效率高，但其随机梯度估计特性使得训练动态难以理解，与一阶方法在NTK理论下的清晰行为形成对比，需要建立理论框架来分析零阶优化的训练动态。
AI.method: 引入神经零阶核(NZK)描述零阶更新下的函数空间模型演化；证明线性模型中期望NZK在整个训练过程中保持恒定，并显式依赖于随机扰动方向的一阶和二阶矩；将分析扩展到线性化神经网络；将零阶更新解释为通过NZK的核梯度下降。
AI.result: 理论分析表明线性模型下期望NZK恒定不变，为模型演化提供闭式解；实验在合成和真实数据集(MNIST、CIFAR-10、Tiny ImageNet)上验证了理论结果，并证明使用单个共享随机向量可以加速收敛。
AI.conclusion: NZK理论框架成功描述了零阶优化的训练动态，为理解零阶优化提供了新视角，通过将零阶更新解释为核梯度下降，为加速收敛提供了潜在途径，实验验证了理论的有效性。

title: Guideline-grounded retrieval-augmented generation for ophthalmic clinical decision support
summary: In this work, we propose Oph-Guid-RAG, a multimodal visual RAG system for ophthalmology clinical question answering and decision support. We treat each guideline page as an independent evidence unit and directly retrieve page images, preserving tables, flowcharts, and layout information. We further design a controllable retrieval framework with routing and filtering, which selectively introduces external evidence and reduces noise. The system integrates query decomposition, query rewriting, retrieval, reranking, and multimodal reasoning, and provides traceable outputs with guideline page references. We evaluate our method on HealthBench using a doctor-based scoring protocol. On the hard subset, our approach improves the overall score from 0.2969 to 0.3861 (+0.0892, +30.0%) compared to GPT-5.2, and achieves higher accuracy, improving from 0.5956 to 0.6576 (+0.0620, +10.4%). Compared to GPT-5.4, our method achieves a larger accuracy gain of +0.1289 (+24.4%). These results show that our method is more effective on challenging cases that require precise, evidence-based reasoning. Ablation studies further show that reranking, routing, and retrieval design are critical for stable performance, especially under difficult settings. Overall, we show how combining visionbased retrieval with controllable reasoning can improve evidence grounding and robustness in clinical AI applications,while pointing out that further work is needed to be more complete.

AI.tldr: Oph-Guid-RAG：用于眼科临床问答和决策支持的多模态视觉RAG系统，通过检索指南页面图像并采用可控检索框架，显著提升在困难病例上的表现。
AI.motivation: 解决临床AI应用中证据基础不足的问题，特别是在需要精确、基于证据推理的挑战性眼科病例中，传统方法难以有效利用包含表格、流程图和布局信息的指南页面。
AI.method: 将每个指南页面作为独立证据单元，直接检索页面图像以保留视觉信息；设计可控检索框架，包含路由和过滤机制，选择性引入外部证据并减少噪声；集成查询分解、查询重写、检索、重排序和多模态推理，提供可追溯的输出和指南页面引用。
AI.result: 在HealthBench的困难子集上，相比GPT-5.2，整体分数从0.2969提升至0.3861（+30.0%），准确率从0.5956提升至0.6576（+10.4%）；相比GPT-5.4，准确率增益达+0.1289（+24.4%）。消融研究表明重排序、路由和检索设计对稳定性能至关重要。
AI.conclusion: 结合基于视觉的检索与可控推理可以改善临床AI应用中的证据基础和鲁棒性，但需要进一步工作来完善系统。该方法在需要精确证据推理的挑战性病例上表现更有效。

title: Pruned Adaptation Modules: A Simple yet Strong Baseline for Continual Foundation Models
summary: The continual learning literature has rapidly shifted from traditional class incremental learning (CIL) techniques to foundation model (FM)-based CIL methods without a clear understanding of how these newer approaches compare to strong, lightweight convolutional baselines. This abrupt transition has created a substantial methodological gap, making it difficult to assess whether recent FM-based CIL progress reflects genuine advances or merely the absence of rigorous baselines. To address this gap, we introduce Pruned Adaptation Modules (PAM), a simple yet effective method that freezes the vast majority of the pre-trained ResNet while enabling scalable continual adaptation through sparse task-specific layers.
